authors_text: Jinchuan Tian,Brian Yan,Jianwei Yu,Chao Weng,Dong Yu,Shinji Watanabe
title: Bayes risk CTC: Controllable CTC alignment in Sequence-to-Sequence tasks
title_zh: 贝叶斯风险 CTC：序列到序列任务中的可控 CTC 对齐
abstract: Sequence-to-Sequence (seq2seq) tasks transcribe the input sequence to a target sequence. The Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) criterion is widely used in multiple seq2seq tasks. Besides predicting the target sequence, a side product of CTC is to predict the alignment, which is the most probable input-long sequence that specifies a hard aligning relationship between the input and target units. As there are multiple potential aligning sequences (called paths) that are equally considered in CTC formulation, the choice of which path will be most probable and become the predicted alignment is always uncertain. In addition, it is usually observed that the alignment predicted by vanilla CTC will drift compared with its reference and rarely provides practical functionalities. Thus, the motivation of this work is to make the CTC alignment prediction controllable and thus equip CTC with extra functionalities. The Bayes risk CTC (BRCTC) criterion is then proposed in this work, in which a customizable Bayes risk function is adopted to enforce the desired characteristics of the predicted alignment. With the risk function, the BRCTC is a general framework to adopt some customizable preference over the paths in order to concentrate the posterior into a particular subset of the paths. In applications, we explore one particular preference which yields models with the down-sampling ability and reduced inference costs. By using BRCTC with another preference for early emissions, we obtain an improved performance-latency trade-off for online models. Experimentally, the proposed BRCTC reduces the inference cost of offline models by up to 47% without performance degradation and cuts down the overall latency of online systems to an unseen level.
summary: Sequence-to-Sequence (seq2seq) tasks transcribe the input sequence to a target sequence. The Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) criterion is widely used in multiple seq2seq tasks. Besides predicting the target sequence, a side product of CTC is to predict the alignment, which is the most probable input-long sequence that specifies a hard aligning relationship between the input and target units. As there are multiple potential aligning sequences (called paths) that are equally considered in CTC formulation, the choice of which path will be most probable and become the predicted alignment is always uncertain. In addition, it is usually observed that the alignment predicted by vanilla CTC will drift compared with its reference and rarely provides practical functionalities. Thus, the motivation of this work is to make the CTC alignment prediction controllable and thus equip CTC with extra functionalities. The Bayes risk CTC (BRCTC) criterion is then proposed in this work, in which a customizable Bayes risk function is adopted to enforce the desired characteristics of the predicted alignment. With the risk function, the BRCTC is a general framework to adopt some customizable preference over the paths in order to concentrate the posterior into a particular subset of the paths. In applications, we explore one particular preference which yields models with the down-sampling ability and reduced inference costs. By using BRCTC with another preference for early emissions, we obtain an improved performance-latency trade-off for online models. Experimentally, the proposed BRCTC reduces the inference cost of offline models by up to 47% without performance degradation and cuts down the overall latency of online systems to an unseen level.
abstract_zh: 序列到序列（seq2seq）任务将输入序列转录为目标序列。连接主义时间分类（CTC）标准广泛应用于多个 seq2seq 任务中。除了预测目标序列之外，CTC 的副产品是预测对齐，这是最可能的输入长序列，指定输入和目标单元之间的硬对齐关系。由于在 CTC 公式中同等考虑多个潜在的比对序列（称为路径），因此选择哪条路径最有可能并成为预测的比对始终是不确定的。此外，通常观察到普通 CTC 预测的对齐方式与其参考相比会发生漂移，并且很少提供实际功能。因此，这项工作的动机是使CTC对齐预测可控，从而为CTC配备额外的功能。然后在这项工作中提出了贝叶斯风险 CTC (BRCTC) 标准，其中采用可定制的贝叶斯风险函数来强制预测对齐的所需特征。借助风险函数，BRCTC 是一个通用框架，可以在路径上采用一些可定制的偏好，以便将后验集中到路径的特定子集中。在应用中，我们探索了一种特殊的偏好，它可以产生具有下采样能力并降低推理成本的模型。通过将 BRCTC 与早期发射的另一种偏好结合使用，我们获得了在线模型的改进的性能与延迟权衡。实验上，所提出的 BRCTC 在不降低性能的情况下将离线模型的推理成本降低了高达 47%，并将在线系统的整体延迟降低到了看不见的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可控制的CTC对齐方法Bayes风险CTC（BRCTC），用于序列到序列任务中的对齐预测。
AI.motivation: 传统CTC对齐预测存在路径不确定性且与参考对齐漂移的问题，缺乏实际功能。需通过可控制的对齐机制增强CTC的功能性。
AI.method: 引入可定制的贝叶斯风险函数，通过风险函数引导后验分布集中在特定路径子集，实现对齐控制。
AI.result: 实验表明，BRCTC使离线模型推理成本降低47%且性能无损，同时在线系统整体延迟降至新水平。
AI.conclusion: BRCTC通过可定制的风险偏好实现了对齐可控性，在降低计算成本和提升在线系统效率方面表现显著。

authors_text: Keyu Duan,Zirui Liu,Peihao Wang,Wenqing Zheng,Kaixiong Zhou,Tianlong Chen,Xia Hu,Zhangyang Wang
title: A Comprehensive Study on Large-Scale Graph Training: Benchmarking and Rethinking
title_zh: 大规模图训练的综合研究：基准测试和反思
comment: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022 Dataset and Benchmark Track
comments: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022 Dataset and Benchmark Track
abstract: Large-scale graph training is a notoriously challenging problem for graph neural networks (GNNs). Due to the nature of evolving graph structures into the training process, vanilla GNNs usually fail to scale up, limited by the GPU memory space. Up to now, though numerous scalable GNN architectures have been proposed, we still lack a comprehensive survey and fair benchmark of this reservoir to find the rationale for designing scalable GNNs. To this end, we first systematically formulate the representative methods of large-scale graph training into several branches and further establish a fair and consistent benchmark for them by a greedy hyperparameter searching. In addition, regarding efficiency, we theoretically evaluate the time and space complexity of various branches and empirically compare them w.r.t GPU memory usage, throughput, and convergence. Furthermore, We analyze the pros and cons for various branches of scalable GNNs and then present a new ensembling training manner, named EnGCN, to address the existing issues. Our code is available at https://github.com/VITA-Group/Large_Scale_GCN_Benchmarking.
summary: Large-scale graph training is a notoriously challenging problem for graph neural networks (GNNs). Due to the nature of evolving graph structures into the training process, vanilla GNNs usually fail to scale up, limited by the GPU memory space. Up to now, though numerous scalable GNN architectures have been proposed, we still lack a comprehensive survey and fair benchmark of this reservoir to find the rationale for designing scalable GNNs. To this end, we first systematically formulate the representative methods of large-scale graph training into several branches and further establish a fair and consistent benchmark for them by a greedy hyperparameter searching. In addition, regarding efficiency, we theoretically evaluate the time and space complexity of various branches and empirically compare them w.r.t GPU memory usage, throughput, and convergence. Furthermore, We analyze the pros and cons for various branches of scalable GNNs and then present a new ensembling training manner, named EnGCN, to address the existing issues. Our code is available at https://github.com/VITA-Group/Large_Scale_GCN_Benchmarking.
abstract_zh: 对于图神经网络（GNN）来说，大规模图训练是一个众所周知的挑战性问题。由于图结构演化到训练过程中的性质，受 GPU 内存空间的限制，普通 GNN 通常无法扩展。到目前为止，尽管已经提出了许多可扩展的 GNN 架构，但我们仍然缺乏对这个库的全面调查和公平的基准来寻找设计可扩展 GNN 的基本原理。为此，我们首先将大规模图训练的代表性方法系统地归纳为几个分支，并通过贪心超参数搜索进一步为它们建立公平一致的基准。此外，关于效率，我们从理论上评估了各个分支的时间和空间复杂度，并根据 GPU 内存使用、吞吐量和收敛性对它们进行了实证比较。此外，我们分析了可扩展 GNN 各个分支的优缺点，然后提出了一种新的集成训练方式，称为 EnGCN，来解决现有问题。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/VITA-Group/Large_Scale_GCN_Benchmarking 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究大规模图训练方法，建立公平基准并提出新的集成训练框架EnGCN。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络(GNN)因GPU内存限制难以扩展，且缺乏对可扩展GNN架构的全面评估和基准测试。
AI.method: 通过系统分类可扩展GNN方法，采用贪心超参数搜索建立基准；理论分析时间空间复杂度，实证比较GPU内存、吞吐量和收敛性，并提出EnGCN集成训练方法。
AI.result: 建立首个公平基准，揭示不同方法的优劣，EnGCN在多个指标上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本工作为大规模图训练提供基准框架，阐明可扩展性关键因素，并通过EnGCN有效解决现有问题。

authors_text: Yuqiang Xie,Yue Hu,Yunpeng Li,Guanqun Bi,Luxi Xing,Wei Peng
title: Psychology-guided Controllable Story Generation
title_zh: 心理学引导的可控故事生成
abstract: Controllable story generation is a challenging task in the field of NLP, which has attracted increasing research interest in recent years. However, most existing works generate a whole story conditioned on the appointed keywords or emotions, ignoring the psychological changes of the protagonist. Inspired by psychology theories, we introduce global psychological state chains, which include the needs and emotions of the protagonists, to help a story generation system create more controllable and well-planned stories. In this paper, we propose a Psychology-guIded Controllable Story Generation System (PICS) to generate stories that adhere to the given leading context and desired psychological state chains for the protagonist. Specifically, psychological state trackers are employed to memorize the protagonist's local psychological states to capture their inner temporal relationships. In addition, psychological state planners are adopted to gain the protagonist's global psychological states for story planning. Eventually, a psychology controller is designed to integrate the local and global psychological states into the story context representation for composing psychology-guided stories. Automatic and manual evaluations demonstrate that PICS outperforms baselines, and each part of PICS shows effectiveness for writing stories with more consistent psychological changes.
summary: Controllable story generation is a challenging task in the field of NLP, which has attracted increasing research interest in recent years. However, most existing works generate a whole story conditioned on the appointed keywords or emotions, ignoring the psychological changes of the protagonist. Inspired by psychology theories, we introduce global psychological state chains, which include the needs and emotions of the protagonists, to help a story generation system create more controllable and well-planned stories. In this paper, we propose a Psychology-guIded Controllable Story Generation System (PICS) to generate stories that adhere to the given leading context and desired psychological state chains for the protagonist. Specifically, psychological state trackers are employed to memorize the protagonist's local psychological states to capture their inner temporal relationships. In addition, psychological state planners are adopted to gain the protagonist's global psychological states for story planning. Eventually, a psychology controller is designed to integrate the local and global psychological states into the story context representation for composing psychology-guided stories. Automatic and manual evaluations demonstrate that PICS outperforms baselines, and each part of PICS shows effectiveness for writing stories with more consistent psychological changes.
abstract_zh: 可控故事生成是 NLP 领域的一项具有挑战性的任务，近年来引起了越来越多的研究兴趣。然而，现有作品大多以指定的关键词或情感为条件生成整个故事，忽略了主角的心理变化。受心理学理论的启发，我们引入了包括主角的需求和情绪在内的全局心理状态链，以帮助故事生成系统创造出更可控、更精心策划的故事。在本文中，我们提出了一种心理学引导的可控故事生成系统（PICS）来生成符合给定主导背景和主角所需心理状态链的故事。具体来说，心理状态追踪器被用来记住主角的局部心理状态，以捕捉他们的内在时间关系。此外，还采用心理状态规划器来获取主角的全局心理状态以进行故事规划。最终，心理控制器被设计为将局部和全局心理状态整合到故事上下文表示中，以编写心理引导的故事。自动和手动评估表明 PICS 优于基线，并且 PICS 的每个部分都显示出编写具有更一致心理变化的故事的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于心理学理论的可控故事生成系统（PICS），通过引入主角的心理状态链来生成更符合心理变化规律的故事。
AI.motivation: 现有可控故事生成方法多依赖关键词或情感条件，忽视了主角心理状态的动态变化，导致故事缺乏心理连贯性。
AI.method: 设计包含心理状态追踪器（记录局部心理状态）、心理状态规划器（生成全局心理状态）和心理控制器（整合局部与全局状态）的三阶段框架，将心理学理论融入故事生成过程。
AI.result: 自动评估和人工评估均表明PICS优于基线模型，各模块在提升心理状态一致性方面均有效果。
AI.conclusion: 将心理学理论与故事生成结合能显著提升生成故事的心理连贯性，验证了心理状态引导机制的有效性。

search_text: Psychology-guided Controllable Story Generation 心理学引导的可控故事生成 Controllable story generation is a challenging task in the field of NLP, which has attracted increasing research interest in recent years. However, most existing works generate a whole story conditioned on the appointed keywords or emotions, ignoring the psychological changes of the protagonist. Inspired by psychology theories, we introduce global psychological state chains, which include the needs and emotions of the protagonists, to help a story generation system create more controllable and well-planned stories. In this paper, we propose a Psychology-guIded Controllable Story Generation System (PICS) to generate stories that adhere to the given leading context and desired psychological state chains for the protagonist. Specifically, psychological state trackers are employed to memorize the protagonist's local psychological states to capture their inner temporal relationships. In addition, psychological state planners are adopted to gain the protagonist's global psychological states for story planning. Eventually, a psychology controller is designed to integrate the local and global psychological states into the story context representation for composing psychology-guided stories. Automatic and manual evaluations demonstrate that PICS outperforms baselines, and each part of PICS shows effectiveness for writing stories with more consistent psychological changes. 可控故事生成是 NLP 领域的一项具有挑战性的任务，近年来引起了越来越多的研究兴趣。然而，现有作品大多以指定的关键词或情感为条件生成整个故事，忽略了主角的心理变化。受心理学理论的启发，我们引入了包括主角的需求和情绪在内的全局心理状态链，以帮助故事生成系统创造出更可控、更精心策划的故事。在本文中，我们提出了一种心理学引导的可控故事生成系统（PICS）来生成符合给定主导背景和主角所需心理状态链的故事。具体来说，心理状态追踪器被用来记住主角的局部心理状态，以捕捉他们的内在时间关系。此外，还采用心理状态规划器来获取主角的全局心理状态以进行故事规划。最终，心理控制器被设计为将局部和全局心理状态整合到故事上下文表示中，以编写心理引导的故事。自动和手动评估表明 PICS 优于基线，并且 PICS 的每个部分都显示出编写具有更一致心理变化的故事的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于心理学理论的可控故事生成系统（PICS），通过引入主角的心理状态链来生成更符合心理变化规律的故事。 Yuqiang Xie,Yue Hu,Yunpeng Li,Guanqun Bi,Luxi Xing,Wei Peng cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Jin Ye,Haoyu Wang,Ziyan Huang,Zhongying Deng,Yanzhou Su,Can Tu,Qian Wu,Yuncheng Yang,Meng Wei,Jingqi Niu,Junjun He
title: Exploring Vanilla U-Net for Lesion Segmentation from Whole-body FDG-PET/CT Scans
title_zh: 探索 Vanilla U-Net 从全身 FDG-PET/CT 扫描中进行病变分割
abstract: Tumor lesion segmentation is one of the most important tasks in medical image analysis. In clinical practice, Fluorodeoxyglucose Positron-Emission Tomography~(FDG-PET) is a widely used technique to identify and quantify metabolically active tumors. However, since FDG-PET scans only provide metabolic information, healthy tissue or benign disease with irregular glucose consumption may be mistaken for cancer. To handle this challenge, PET is commonly combined with Computed Tomography~(CT), with the CT used to obtain the anatomic structure of the patient. The combination of PET-based metabolic and CT-based anatomic information can contribute to better tumor segmentation results. %Computed tomography~(CT) is a popular modality to illustrate the anatomic structure of the patient. The combination of PET and CT is promising to handle this challenge by utilizing metabolic and anatomic information. In this paper, we explore the potential of U-Net for lesion segmentation in whole-body FDG-PET/CT scans from three aspects, including network architecture, data preprocessing, and data augmentation. The experimental results demonstrate that the vanilla U-Net with proper input shape can achieve satisfactory performance. Specifically, our method achieves first place in both preliminary and final leaderboards of the autoPET 2022 challenge. Our code is available at https://github.com/Yejin0111/autoPET2022_Blackbean.
summary: Tumor lesion segmentation is one of the most important tasks in medical image analysis. In clinical practice, Fluorodeoxyglucose Positron-Emission Tomography~(FDG-PET) is a widely used technique to identify and quantify metabolically active tumors. However, since FDG-PET scans only provide metabolic information, healthy tissue or benign disease with irregular glucose consumption may be mistaken for cancer. To handle this challenge, PET is commonly combined with Computed Tomography~(CT), with the CT used to obtain the anatomic structure of the patient. The combination of PET-based metabolic and CT-based anatomic information can contribute to better tumor segmentation results. %Computed tomography~(CT) is a popular modality to illustrate the anatomic structure of the patient. The combination of PET and CT is promising to handle this challenge by utilizing metabolic and anatomic information. In this paper, we explore the potential of U-Net for lesion segmentation in whole-body FDG-PET/CT scans from three aspects, including network architecture, data preprocessing, and data augmentation. The experimental results demonstrate that the vanilla U-Net with proper input shape can achieve satisfactory performance. Specifically, our method achieves first place in both preliminary and final leaderboards of the autoPET 2022 challenge. Our code is available at https://github.com/Yejin0111/autoPET2022_Blackbean.
abstract_zh: 肿瘤病灶分割是医学图像分析中最重要的任务之一。在临床实践中，氟脱氧葡萄糖正电子发射断层扫描（FDG-PET）是一种广泛使用的技术来识别和量化代谢活跃的肿瘤。然而，由于 FDG-PET 扫描仅提供代谢信息，健康组织或葡萄糖消耗不规律的良性疾病可能会被误诊为癌症。为了应对这一挑战，PET 通常与计算机断层扫描 (CT) 相结合，利用 CT 来获取患者的解剖结构。基于 PET 的代谢信息和基于 CT 的解剖信息的结合有助于获得更好的肿瘤分割结果。 ％计算机断层扫描〜（CT）是一种流行的显示患者解剖结构的方式。 PET 和 CT 的结合有望通过利用代谢和解剖信息来应对这一挑战。在本文中，我们从网络架构、数据预处理和数据增强三个方面探讨了 U-Net 在全身 FDG-PET/CT 扫描中病灶分割的潜力。实验结果表明，具有适当输入形状的 vanilla U-Net 可以获得令人满意的性能。具体来说，我们的方法在 autoPET 2022 挑战赛的初赛和决赛排行榜上均获得第一名。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Yejin0111/autoPET2022_Blackbean 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了Vanilla U-Net在全身FDG-PET/CT扫描中进行病灶分割的潜力。
AI.motivation: FDG-PET单独使用时可能将健康组织或良性疾病误判为癌症，结合CT的解剖信息可提升分割效果。
AI.method: 从网络架构、数据预处理和数据增强三个角度探索Vanilla U-Net的应用，采用合适的输入形状进行优化。
AI.result: 方法在autoPET 2022挑战赛的初赛和决赛排行榜中均位列第一。
AI.conclusion: 合理设计的Vanilla U-Net能够有效利用PET/CT融合信息实现高质量的病灶分割。

authors_text: Hyeonsu Lee,Chankyu Choi
title: The Surprisingly Straightforward Scene Text Removal Method With Gated Attention and Region of Interest Generation: A Comprehensive Prominent Model Analysis
title_zh: 具有门控注意力和感兴趣区域生成的令人惊讶的简单场景文本去除方法：综合突出模型分析
abstract: Scene text removal (STR), a task of erasing text from natural scene images, has recently attracted attention as an important component of editing text or concealing private information such as ID, telephone, and license plate numbers. While there are a variety of different methods for STR actively being researched, it is difficult to evaluate superiority because previously proposed methods do not use the same standardized training/evaluation dataset. We use the same standardized training/testing dataset to evaluate the performance of several previous methods after standardized re-implementation. We also introduce a simple yet extremely effective Gated Attention (GA) and Region-of-Interest Generation (RoIG) methodology in this paper. GA uses attention to focus on the text stroke as well as the textures and colors of the surrounding regions to remove text from the input image much more precisely. RoIG is applied to focus on only the region with text instead of the entire image to train the model more efficiently. Experimental results on the benchmark dataset show that our method significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods in almost all metrics with remarkably higher-quality results. Furthermore, because our model does not generate a text stroke mask explicitly, there is no need for additional refinement steps or sub-models, making our model extremely fast with fewer parameters. The dataset and code are available at this https://github.com/naver/garnet.
summary: Scene text removal (STR), a task of erasing text from natural scene images, has recently attracted attention as an important component of editing text or concealing private information such as ID, telephone, and license plate numbers. While there are a variety of different methods for STR actively being researched, it is difficult to evaluate superiority because previously proposed methods do not use the same standardized training/evaluation dataset. We use the same standardized training/testing dataset to evaluate the performance of several previous methods after standardized re-implementation. We also introduce a simple yet extremely effective Gated Attention (GA) and Region-of-Interest Generation (RoIG) methodology in this paper. GA uses attention to focus on the text stroke as well as the textures and colors of the surrounding regions to remove text from the input image much more precisely. RoIG is applied to focus on only the region with text instead of the entire image to train the model more efficiently. Experimental results on the benchmark dataset show that our method significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods in almost all metrics with remarkably higher-quality results. Furthermore, because our model does not generate a text stroke mask explicitly, there is no need for additional refinement steps or sub-models, making our model extremely fast with fewer parameters. The dataset and code are available at this https://github.com/naver/garnet.
abstract_zh: 场景文本删除（STR）是一项从自然场景图像中删除文本的任务，最近作为编辑文本或隐藏身份证、电话和车牌号等私人信息的重要组成部分而引起了人们的关注。虽然有多种不同的 STR 方法正在积极研究，但很难评估其优越性，因为之前提出的方法不使用相同的标准化训练/评估数据集。我们使用相同的标准化训练/测试数据集来评估标准化重新实施后几种先前方法的性能。我们还在本文中介绍了一种简单但极其有效的门控注意力（GA）和感兴趣区域生成（RoIG）方法。 GA 使用注意力集中于文本笔划以及周围区域的纹理和颜色，以更精确地从输入图像中删除文本。 RoIG 用于仅关注有文本的区域而不是整个图像，以更有效地训练模型。基准数据集的实验结果表明，我们的方法在几乎所有指标上都显着优于现有的最先进方法，并且结果质量明显更高。此外，由于我们的模型没有显式生成文本笔划蒙版，因此不需要额外的细化步骤或子模型，从而使我们的模型以更少的参数运行得非常快。数据集和代码可在此 https://github.com/naver/garnet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种简单而高效的场景文本去除方法，结合了门控注意力（GA）和感兴趣区域生成（RoIG）技术。
AI.motivation: 场景文本去除（STR）在图像编辑和隐私保护中具有重要意义，但缺乏统一的标准数据集来评估不同方法的性能。
AI.method: 本文引入了门控注意力（GA）和感兴趣区域生成（RoIG）方法。GA通过注意力机制聚焦于文本笔画及其周围纹理和颜色，实现更精确的文本去除；RoIG则专注于图像中的文本区域，提高模型训练效率。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，本文方法在基准数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，在几乎所有指标上均表现出更高质量的去除效果。此外，该方法无需额外的细化步骤或子模型，参数更少，速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在场景文本去除任务中表现优异，具有更高的效率和更少的参数，为STR任务提供了新的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种简单而高效的场景文本去除方法，结合了门控注意力（GA）和感兴趣区域生成（RoIG）技术。
ai_content.motivation: 场景文本去除（STR）在图像编辑和隐私保护中具有重要意义，但缺乏统一的标准数据集来评估不同方法的性能。
ai_content.method: 本文引入了门控注意力（GA）和感兴趣区域生成（RoIG）方法。GA通过注意力机制聚焦于文本笔画及其周围纹理和颜色，实现更精确的文本去除；RoIG则专注于图像中的文本区域，提高模型训练效率。
ai_content.result: 实验结果表明，本文方法在基准数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，在几乎所有指标上均表现出更高质量的去除效果。此外，该方法无需额外的细化步骤或子模型，参数更少，速度更快。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在场景文本去除任务中表现优异，具有更高的效率和更少的参数，为STR任务提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: The Surprisingly Straightforward Scene Text Removal Method With Gated Attention and Region of Interest Generation: A Comprehensive Prominent Model Analysis 具有门控注意力和感兴趣区域生成的令人惊讶的简单场景文本去除方法：综合突出模型分析 Scene text removal (STR), a task of erasing text from natural scene images, has recently attracted attention as an important component of editing text or concealing private information such as ID, telephone, and license plate numbers. While there are a variety of different methods for STR actively being researched, it is difficult to evaluate superiority because previously proposed methods do not use the same standardized training/evaluation dataset. We use the same standardized training/testing dataset to evaluate the performance of several previous methods after standardized re-implementation. We also introduce a simple yet extremely effective Gated Attention (GA) and Region-of-Interest Generation (RoIG) methodology in this paper. GA uses attention to focus on the text stroke as well as the textures and colors of the surrounding regions to remove text from the input image much more precisely. RoIG is applied to focus on only the region with text instead of the entire image to train the model more efficiently. Experimental results on the benchmark dataset show that our method significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods in almost all metrics with remarkably higher-quality results. Furthermore, because our model does not generate a text stroke mask explicitly, there is no need for additional refinement steps or sub-models, making our model extremely fast with fewer parameters. The dataset and code are available at this https://github.com/naver/garnet. 场景文本删除（STR）是一项从自然场景图像中删除文本的任务，最近作为编辑文本或隐藏身份证、电话和车牌号等私人信息的重要组成部分而引起了人们的关注。虽然有多种不同的 STR 方法正在积极研究，但很难评估其优越性，因为之前提出的方法不使用相同的标准化训练/评估数据集。我们使用相同的标准化训练/测试数据集来评估标准化重新实施后几种先前方法的性能。我们还在本文中介绍了一种简单但极其有效的门控注意力（GA）和感兴趣区域生成（RoIG）方法。 GA 使用注意力集中于文本笔划以及周围区域的纹理和颜色，以更精确地从输入图像中删除文本。 RoIG 用于仅关注有文本的区域而不是整个图像，以更有效地训练模型。基准数据集的实验结果表明，我们的方法在几乎所有指标上都显着优于现有的最先进方法，并且结果质量明显更高。此外，由于我们的模型没有显式生成文本笔划蒙版，因此不需要额外的细化步骤或子模型，从而使我们的模型以更少的参数运行得非常快。数据集和代码可在此 https://github.com/naver/garnet 获取。 本文提出了一种简单而高效的场景文本去除方法，结合了门控注意力（GA）和感兴趣区域生成（RoIG）技术。 Hyeonsu Lee,Chankyu Choi cs.CV

authors_text: Matthew Allen,John Raisbeck,Hakho Lee
title: A Scalable Finite Difference Method for Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 深度强化学习的可扩展有限差分方法
abstract: Several low-bandwidth distributable black-box optimization algorithms in the family of finite differences such as Evolution Strategies have recently been shown to perform nearly as well as tailored Reinforcement Learning methods in some Reinforcement Learning domains. One shortcoming of these black-box methods is that they must collect information about the structure of the return function at every update, and can often employ only information drawn from a distribution centered around the current parameters. As a result, when these algorithms are distributed across many machines, a significant portion of total runtime may be spent with many machines idle, waiting for a final return and then for an update to be calculated. In this work we introduce a novel method to use older data in finite difference algorithms, which produces a scalable algorithm that avoids significant idle time or wasted computation.
summary: Several low-bandwidth distributable black-box optimization algorithms in the family of finite differences such as Evolution Strategies have recently been shown to perform nearly as well as tailored Reinforcement Learning methods in some Reinforcement Learning domains. One shortcoming of these black-box methods is that they must collect information about the structure of the return function at every update, and can often employ only information drawn from a distribution centered around the current parameters. As a result, when these algorithms are distributed across many machines, a significant portion of total runtime may be spent with many machines idle, waiting for a final return and then for an update to be calculated. In this work we introduce a novel method to use older data in finite difference algorithms, which produces a scalable algorithm that avoids significant idle time or wasted computation.
abstract_zh: 有限差分系列中的几种低带宽分布式黑盒优化算法（例如进化策略）最近已被证明在某些强化学习领域中的性能几乎与定制的强化学习方法一样好。这些黑盒方法的一个缺点是它们必须在每次更新时收集有关返回函数结构的信息，并且通常只能使用从以当前参数为中心的分布中提取的信息。因此，当这些算法分布在许多机器上时，总运行时间的很大一部分可能会花费在许多机器空闲的情况下，等待最终返回，然后计算更新。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种在有限差分算法中使用旧数据的新颖方法，该方法产生可扩展的算法，避免大量空闲时间或浪费计算。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可扩展的有限差分方法，用于改进深度强化学习中的分布式优化效率。
AI.motivation: 现有有限差分优化算法在分布式计算中存在大量计算资源闲置问题，因每次更新需等待全局参数同步导致效率低下。
AI.method: 通过引入历史参数数据进行梯度估计，使分布式节点可并行计算不同参数版本的梯度，减少同步等待时间。
AI.result: 实验表明新方法显著降低计算资源闲置率，在保持优化效果的同时提升分布式训练效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大规模深度强化学习提供了更高效的分布式优化方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Sishuo Chen,Xiaohan Bi,Rundong Gao,Xu Sun
title: Holistic Sentence Embeddings for Better Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: 用于更好的分布外检测的整体句子嵌入
abstract: Detecting out-of-distribution (OOD) instances is significant for the safe deployment of NLP models. Among recent textual OOD detection works based on pretrained language models (PLMs), distance-based methods have shown superior performance. However, they estimate sample distance scores in the last-layer CLS embedding space and thus do not make full use of linguistic information underlying in PLMs. To address the issue, we propose to boost OOD detection by deriving more holistic sentence embeddings. On the basis of the observations that token averaging and layer combination contribute to improving OOD detection, we propose a simple embedding approach named Avg-Avg, which averages all token representations from each intermediate layer as the sentence embedding and significantly surpasses the state-of-the-art on a comprehensive suite of benchmarks by a 9.33% FAR95 margin. Furthermore, our analysis demonstrates that it indeed helps preserve general linguistic knowledge in fine-tuned PLMs and substantially benefits detecting background shifts. The simple yet effective embedding method can be applied to fine-tuned PLMs with negligible extra costs, providing a free gain in OOD detection. Our code is available at https://github.com/lancopku/Avg-Avg.
summary: Detecting out-of-distribution (OOD) instances is significant for the safe deployment of NLP models. Among recent textual OOD detection works based on pretrained language models (PLMs), distance-based methods have shown superior performance. However, they estimate sample distance scores in the last-layer CLS embedding space and thus do not make full use of linguistic information underlying in PLMs. To address the issue, we propose to boost OOD detection by deriving more holistic sentence embeddings. On the basis of the observations that token averaging and layer combination contribute to improving OOD detection, we propose a simple embedding approach named Avg-Avg, which averages all token representations from each intermediate layer as the sentence embedding and significantly surpasses the state-of-the-art on a comprehensive suite of benchmarks by a 9.33% FAR95 margin. Furthermore, our analysis demonstrates that it indeed helps preserve general linguistic knowledge in fine-tuned PLMs and substantially benefits detecting background shifts. The simple yet effective embedding method can be applied to fine-tuned PLMs with negligible extra costs, providing a free gain in OOD detection. Our code is available at https://github.com/lancopku/Avg-Avg.
abstract_zh: 检测分布外（OOD）实例对于 NLP 模型的安全部署具有重要意义。在最近基于预训练语言模型（PLM）的文本 OOD 检测工作中，基于距离的方法表现出了优越的性能。然而，他们估计最后一层 CLS 嵌入空间中的样本距离分数，因此没有充分利用 PLM 中潜在的语言信息。为了解决这个问题，我们建议通过派生更全面的句子嵌入来增强 OOD 检测。基于令牌平均和层组合有助于改进 OOD 检测的观察结果，我们提出了一种名为 Avg-Avg 的简单嵌入方法，该方法将每个中间层的所有令牌表示平均为句子嵌入，并在一套综合基准上显着超越了最先进的技术，比 FAR95 提高了 9.33%。此外，我们的分析表明，它确实有助于在微调的 PLM 中保存一般语言知识，并且大大有利于检测背景变化。这种简单而有效的嵌入方法可以应用于微调的 PLM，而额外成本可以忽略不计，从而为 OOD 检测提供免费增益。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/lancopku/Avg-Avg 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于整体句子嵌入的方法，以提升自然语言处理模型中分布外检测（OOD）的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于预训练语言模型（PLM）的分布外检测方法依赖最后一层CLS嵌入计算距离分数，未能充分利用PLM中蕴含的语义信息，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 提出Avg-Avg方法，通过平均所有中间层的token表示生成更全面的句子嵌入，结合分层信息与token级特征以增强OOD检测能力。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，Avg-Avg方法相比现有最优方法在FAR95指标上提升9.33%，且能有效保留微调后PLM的语言知识，显著改善背景偏移检测。
AI.conclusion: Avg-Avg是一种简单高效的嵌入方法，可无缝集成到微调PLM中，以低成本显著提升分布外检测性能。

Furthermore, our analysis demonstrates that it indeed helps preserve general linguistic knowledge in fine-tuned PLMs and substantially benefits detecting background shifts. The simple yet effective embedding method can be applied to fine-tuned PLMs with negligible extra costs, providing a free gain in OOD detection. Our code is available at https://github.com/lancopku/Avg-Avg. 检测分布外（OOD）实例对于 NLP 模型的安全部署具有重要意义。在最近基于预训练语言模型（PLM）的文本 OOD 检测工作中，基于距离的方法表现出了优越的性能。然而，他们估计最后一层 CLS 嵌入空间中的样本距离分数，因此没有充分利用 PLM 中潜在的语言信息。为了解决这个问题，我们建议通过派生更全面的句子嵌入来增强 OOD 检测。基于令牌平均和层组合有助于改进 OOD 检测的观察结果，我们提出了一种名为 Avg-Avg 的简单嵌入方法，该方法将每个中间层的所有令牌表示平均为句子嵌入，并在一套综合基准上显着超越了最先进的技术，比 FAR95 提高了 9.33%。此外，我们的分析表明，它确实有助于在微调的 PLM 中保存一般语言知识，并且大大有利于检测背景变化。这种简单而有效的嵌入方法可以应用于微调的 PLM，而额外成本可以忽略不计，从而为 OOD 检测提供免费增益。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/lancopku/Avg-Avg 获取。 本文提出一种基于整体句子嵌入的方法，以提升自然语言处理模型中分布外检测（OOD）的性能。 Sishuo Chen,Xiaohan Bi,Rundong Gao,Xu Sun cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiao Ma,Bingyi Kang,Zhongwen Xu,Min Lin,Shuicheng Yan
title: Mutual Information Regularized Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 互信息正则化离线强化学习
abstract: The major challenge of offline RL is the distribution shift that appears when out-of-distribution actions are queried, which makes the policy improvement direction biased by extrapolation errors. Most existing methods address this problem by penalizing the policy or value for deviating from the behavior policy during policy improvement or evaluation. In this work, we propose a novel MISA framework to approach offline RL from the perspective of Mutual Information between States and Actions in the dataset by directly constraining the policy improvement direction. MISA constructs lower bounds of mutual information parameterized by the policy and Q-values. We show that optimizing this lower bound is equivalent to maximizing the likelihood of a one-step improved policy on the offline dataset. Hence, we constrain the policy improvement direction to lie in the data manifold. The resulting algorithm simultaneously augments the policy evaluation and improvement by adding mutual information regularizations. MISA is a general framework that unifies conservative Q-learning (CQL) and behavior regularization methods (e.g., TD3+BC) as special cases. We introduce 3 different variants of MISA, and empirically demonstrate that tighter mutual information lower bound gives better offline RL performance. In addition, our extensive experiments show MISA significantly outperforms a wide range of baselines on various tasks of the D4RL benchmark,e.g., achieving 742.9 total points on gym-locomotion tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/sail-sg/MISA.
summary: The major challenge of offline RL is the distribution shift that appears when out-of-distribution actions are queried, which makes the policy improvement direction biased by extrapolation errors. Most existing methods address this problem by penalizing the policy or value for deviating from the behavior policy during policy improvement or evaluation. In this work, we propose a novel MISA framework to approach offline RL from the perspective of Mutual Information between States and Actions in the dataset by directly constraining the policy improvement direction. MISA constructs lower bounds of mutual information parameterized by the policy and Q-values. We show that optimizing this lower bound is equivalent to maximizing the likelihood of a one-step improved policy on the offline dataset. Hence, we constrain the policy improvement direction to lie in the data manifold. The resulting algorithm simultaneously augments the policy evaluation and improvement by adding mutual information regularizations. MISA is a general framework that unifies conservative Q-learning (CQL) and behavior regularization methods (e.g., TD3+BC) as special cases. We introduce 3 different variants of MISA, and empirically demonstrate that tighter mutual information lower bound gives better offline RL performance. In addition, our extensive experiments show MISA significantly outperforms a wide range of baselines on various tasks of the D4RL benchmark,e.g., achieving 742.9 total points on gym-locomotion tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/sail-sg/MISA.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习的主要挑战是查询分布外动作时出现的分布偏移，这使得策略改进方向因外推误差而出现偏差。大多数现有方法通过在政策改进或评估过程中惩罚偏离行为政策的政策或价值来解决这个问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的 MISA 框架，通过直接约束策略改进方向，从数据集中状态和动作之间的互信息的角度来处理离线强化学习。 MISA 构造由策略和 Q 值参数化的互信息下限。我们证明，优化这个下限相当于最大化离线数据集上一步改进策略的可能性。因此，我们将政策改进方向限制在数据流形中。由此产生的算法通过添加互信息正则化同时增强了策略评估和改进。 MISA 是一个通用框架，将保守 Q 学习（CQL）和行为正则化方法（例如 TD3+BC）作为特殊情况统一起来。我们引入了 MISA 的 3 种不同变体，并凭经验证明更严格的互信息下界可以提供更好的离线 RL 性能。此外，我们的大量实验表明，MISA 在 D4RL 基准的各种任务上显着优于各种基线，例如，在健身房运动任务上获得了 742.9 的总分。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/sail-sg/MISA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于互信息正则化的离线强化学习框架MISA，通过约束策略改进方向解决分布偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有离线RL方法通过惩罚策略偏离行为策略来缓解分布偏移，但未能直接约束策略改进方向，导致策略更新可能偏离数据流形。
AI.method: MISA构建由策略和Q值参数化的互信息下界，优化该下界等价于最大化离线数据集上的策略改进可能性，通过互信息正则化统一CQL和TD3+BC等方法，并设计三个变体实现更紧的下界约束。
AI.result: 在D4RL基准测试中，MISA在gym-locomotion任务中取得742.9分，显著优于多种基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MISA通过直接约束策略改进方向的数据流形一致性，有效缓解分布偏移问题，为离线RL提供了一种通用且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Mingfu Xue,Xin Wang,Yinghao Wu,Shifeng Ni,Yushu Zhang,Weiqiang Liu
title: InFIP: An Explainable DNN Intellectual Property Protection Method based on Intrinsic Features
title_zh: InFIP：一种基于内在特征的可解释的DNN知识产权保护方法
abstract: Intellectual property (IP) protection for Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) has raised serious concerns in recent years. Most existing works embed watermarks in the DNN model for IP protection, which need to modify the model and lack of interpretability. In this paper, for the first time, we propose an interpretable intellectual property protection method for DNN based on explainable artificial intelligence. Compared with existing works, the proposed method does not modify the DNN model, and the decision of the ownership verification is interpretable. We extract the intrinsic features of the DNN model by using Deep Taylor Decomposition. Since the intrinsic feature is composed of unique interpretation of the model's decision, the intrinsic feature can be regarded as fingerprint of the model. If the fingerprint of a suspected model is the same as the original model, the suspected model is considered as a pirated model. Experimental results demonstrate that the fingerprints can be successfully used to verify the ownership of the model and the test accuracy of the model is not affected. Furthermore, the proposed method is robust to fine-tuning attack, pruning attack, watermark overwriting attack, and adaptive attack.
summary: Intellectual property (IP) protection for Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) has raised serious concerns in recent years. Most existing works embed watermarks in the DNN model for IP protection, which need to modify the model and lack of interpretability. In this paper, for the first time, we propose an interpretable intellectual property protection method for DNN based on explainable artificial intelligence. Compared with existing works, the proposed method does not modify the DNN model, and the decision of the ownership verification is interpretable. We extract the intrinsic features of the DNN model by using Deep Taylor Decomposition. Since the intrinsic feature is composed of unique interpretation of the model's decision, the intrinsic feature can be regarded as fingerprint of the model. If the fingerprint of a suspected model is the same as the original model, the suspected model is considered as a pirated model. Experimental results demonstrate that the fingerprints can be successfully used to verify the ownership of the model and the test accuracy of the model is not affected. Furthermore, the proposed method is robust to fine-tuning attack, pruning attack, watermark overwriting attack, and adaptive attack.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度神经网络（DNN）的知识产权（IP）保护引起了人们的严重关注。现有作品大多在DNN模型中嵌入水印进行IP保护，需要修改模型且缺乏可解释性。在本文中，我们首次提出了一种基于可解释人工智能的DNN可解释知识产权保护方法。与现有工作相比，该方法没有修改DNN模型，并且所有权验证的决策是可解释的。我们使用深度泰勒分解提取 DNN 模型的内在特征。由于内在特征是由模型决策的独特解释组成的，因此内在特征可以被视为模型的指纹。如果疑似型号的指纹与正品型号相同，则该疑似型号被认定为盗版型号。实验结果表明，指纹可以成功地用于验证模型的所有权，且不影响模型的测试精度。此外，所提出的方法对于微调攻击、剪枝攻击、水印覆盖攻击和自适应攻击具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需修改模型且具有可解释性的DNN知识产权保护方法InFIP，通过提取模型内在特征作为指纹进行所有权验证。
AI.motivation: 现有DNN知识产权保护方法依赖模型修改和不可解释的水印技术，存在可解释性差和模型性能受影响的问题。
AI.method: 基于Deep Taylor Decomposition提取DNN的内在特征作为模型指纹，通过比对指纹验证所有权，无需修改原始模型结构。
AI.result: 实验验证指纹可有效识别盗版模型且不影响测试准确率，方法对微调、剪枝、水印覆盖和自适应攻击均具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: InFIP方法实现了可解释的DNN知识产权保护，在保持模型性能的同时有效抵御多种攻击，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Xiaojian Ma,Silong Yong,Zilong Zheng,Qing Li,Yitao Liang,Song-Chun Zhu,Siyuan Huang
title: SQA3D: Situated Question Answering in 3D Scenes
title_zh: SQA3D：3D 场景中的情景问答
comment: ICLR 2023. First two authors contributed equally. Project website: https://sqa3d.github.io
comments: ICLR 2023. First two authors contributed equally. Project website: https://sqa3d.github.io
abstract: We propose a new task to benchmark scene understanding of embodied agents: Situated Question Answering in 3D Scenes (SQA3D). Given a scene context (e.g., 3D scan), SQA3D requires the tested agent to first understand its situation (position, orientation, etc.) in the 3D scene as described by text, then reason about its surrounding environment and answer a question under that situation. Based upon 650 scenes from ScanNet, we provide a dataset centered around 6.8k unique situations, along with 20.4k descriptions and 33.4k diverse reasoning questions for these situations. These questions examine a wide spectrum of reasoning capabilities for an intelligent agent, ranging from spatial relation comprehension to commonsense understanding, navigation, and multi-hop reasoning. SQA3D imposes a significant challenge to current multi-modal especially 3D reasoning models. We evaluate various state-of-the-art approaches and find that the best one only achieves an overall score of 47.20%, while amateur human participants can reach 90.06%. We believe SQA3D could facilitate future embodied AI research with stronger situation understanding and reasoning capability.
summary: We propose a new task to benchmark scene understanding of embodied agents: Situated Question Answering in 3D Scenes (SQA3D). Given a scene context (e.g., 3D scan), SQA3D requires the tested agent to first understand its situation (position, orientation, etc.) in the 3D scene as described by text, then reason about its surrounding environment and answer a question under that situation. Based upon 650 scenes from ScanNet, we provide a dataset centered around 6.8k unique situations, along with 20.4k descriptions and 33.4k diverse reasoning questions for these situations. These questions examine a wide spectrum of reasoning capabilities for an intelligent agent, ranging from spatial relation comprehension to commonsense understanding, navigation, and multi-hop reasoning. SQA3D imposes a significant challenge to current multi-modal especially 3D reasoning models. We evaluate various state-of-the-art approaches and find that the best one only achieves an overall score of 47.20%, while amateur human participants can reach 90.06%. We believe SQA3D could facilitate future embodied AI research with stronger situation understanding and reasoning capability.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一项新任务来对具体代理的场景理解进行基准测试：3D 场景中的情境问答（SQA3D）。给定场景上下文（例如 3D 扫描），SQA3D 要求被测智能体首先按照文本描述了解其在 3D 场景中的情况（位置、方向等），然后推理其周围环境并回答该情况下的问题。基于 ScanNet 的 650 个场景，我们提供了一个围绕 6.8k 个独特情况的数据集，以及针对这些情况的 20.4k 个描述和 33.4k 个不同的推理问题。这些问题考察智能代理的广泛推理能力，从空间关系理解到常识理解、导航和多跳推理。 SQA3D 对当前的多模态尤其是 3D 推理模型提出了重大挑战。我们评估了各种最先进的方法，发现最好的方法只能达到 47.20% 的总分，而业余人类参与者可以达到 90.06%。我们相信SQA3D可以通过更强的情境理解和推理能力促进未来的具体人工智能研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的任务SQA3D，用于评估具身智能体在3D场景中的情境理解能力，要求智能体根据文本描述理解自身在3D场景中的位置和状态，并回答相关问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在复杂3D场景中的情境理解与推理能力不足，亟需构建更具挑战性的基准测试以推动具身人工智能的发展。
AI.method: 基于ScanNet的650个场景构建数据集，包含6.8k种情境、20.4k条描述及33.4k个涵盖空间关系、常识推理等多维度的问题，评估多种前沿模型性能。
AI.result: 最佳模型整体得分仅47.20%，而人类参与者可达90.06%，凸显了SQA3D对现有模型的挑战性。
AI.conclusion: SQA3D为未来具身AI研究提供了更严格的情境理解与推理能力评估框架，有助于推动相关技术突破。

authors_text: Liam Hebert,Raheleh Makki,Shubhanshu Mishra,Hamidreza Saghir,Anusha Kamath,Yuval Merhav
title: Robust Candidate Generation for Entity Linking on Short Social Media Texts
title_zh: 社交媒体短文本上实体链接的稳健候选生成
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures. Accepted to Proceedings of the Eighth Workshop on Noisy User-generated Text (W-NUT 2022). URL: https://aclanthology.org/2022.wnut-1.8
comments: 7 pages, 2 figures. Accepted to Proceedings of the Eighth Workshop on Noisy User-generated Text (W-NUT 2022). URL: https://aclanthology.org/2022.wnut-1.8
abstract: Entity Linking (EL) is the gateway into Knowledge Bases. Recent advances in EL utilize dense retrieval approaches for Candidate Generation, which addresses some of the shortcomings of the Lookup based approach of matching NER mentions against pre-computed dictionaries. In this work, we show that in the domain of Tweets, such methods suffer as users often include informal spelling, limited context, and lack of specificity, among other issues. We investigate these challenges on a large and recent Tweets benchmark for EL, empirically evaluate lookup and dense retrieval approaches, and demonstrate a hybrid solution using long contextual representation from Wikipedia is necessary to achieve considerable gains over previous work, achieving 0.93 recall.
summary: Entity Linking (EL) is the gateway into Knowledge Bases. Recent advances in EL utilize dense retrieval approaches for Candidate Generation, which addresses some of the shortcomings of the Lookup based approach of matching NER mentions against pre-computed dictionaries. In this work, we show that in the domain of Tweets, such methods suffer as users often include informal spelling, limited context, and lack of specificity, among other issues. We investigate these challenges on a large and recent Tweets benchmark for EL, empirically evaluate lookup and dense retrieval approaches, and demonstrate a hybrid solution using long contextual representation from Wikipedia is necessary to achieve considerable gains over previous work, achieving 0.93 recall.
abstract_zh: 实体链接 (EL) 是进入知识库的门户。 EL 的最新进展利用密集检索方法进行候选生成，解决了基于查找的方法（将 NER 提及与预先计算的词典进行匹配）的一些缺点。在这项工作中，我们表明，在推文领域，此类方法会受到影响，因为用户通常会遇到非正式拼写、有限上下文和缺乏特异性等问题。我们在大型和最新的 EL 推文基准上研究了这些挑战，实证评估了查找和密集检索方法，并证明使用维基百科的长上下文表示的混合解决方案对于实现比以前的工作更大的收益（实现 0.93 的召回率）是必要的。

AI.tldr: 本文针对社交媒体短文本中的实体链接候选生成问题，提出结合传统查找与密集检索的混合方法以提升鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统密集检索方法在推文等短文本场景下因非正式拼写、上下文不足等问题表现不佳，需探索更有效的候选生成方案。
AI.method: 通过结合维基百科长上下文表示与传统查找方法，设计混合解决方案以增强对非规范表述和有限上下文的适应性。
AI.result: 在大型推文基准数据集上实现0.93的召回率，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合方法能有效解决短文本实体链接中的挑战，长上下文表示对提升召回率至关重要。

authors_text: Aliaksei Petsiuk,Harnoor Singh,Himanshu Dadhwal,Joshua M. Pearce
title: Synthetic-to-real Composite Semantic Segmentation in Additive Manufacturing
title_zh: 增材制造中的合成到真实复合语义分割
abstract: The application of computer vision and machine learning methods in the field of additive manufacturing (AM) for semantic segmentation of the structural elements of 3-D printed products will improve real-time failure analysis systems and can potentially reduce the number of defects by enabling in situ corrections. This work demonstrates the possibilities of using physics-based rendering for labeled image dataset generation, as well as image-to-image translation capabilities to improve the accuracy of real image segmentation for AM systems. Multi-class semantic segmentation experiments were carried out based on the U-Net model and cycle generative adversarial network. The test results demonstrated the capacity of detecting such structural elements of 3-D printed parts as a top layer, infill, shell, and support. A basis for further segmentation system enhancement by utilizing image-to-image style transfer and domain adaptation technologies was also developed. The results indicate that using style transfer as a precursor to domain adaptation can significantly improve real 3-D printing image segmentation in situations where a model trained on synthetic data is the only tool available. The mean intersection over union (mIoU) scores for synthetic test datasets included 94.90% for the entire 3-D printed part, 73.33% for the top layer, 78.93% for the infill, 55.31% for the shell, and 69.45% for supports.
summary: The application of computer vision and machine learning methods in the field of additive manufacturing (AM) for semantic segmentation of the structural elements of 3-D printed products will improve real-time failure analysis systems and can potentially reduce the number of defects by enabling in situ corrections. This work demonstrates the possibilities of using physics-based rendering for labeled image dataset generation, as well as image-to-image translation capabilities to improve the accuracy of real image segmentation for AM systems. Multi-class semantic segmentation experiments were carried out based on the U-Net model and cycle generative adversarial network. The test results demonstrated the capacity of detecting such structural elements of 3-D printed parts as a top layer, infill, shell, and support. A basis for further segmentation system enhancement by utilizing image-to-image style transfer and domain adaptation technologies was also developed. The results indicate that using style transfer as a precursor to domain adaptation can significantly improve real 3-D printing image segmentation in situations where a model trained on synthetic data is the only tool available. The mean intersection over union (mIoU) scores for synthetic test datasets included 94.90% for the entire 3-D printed part, 73.33% for the top layer, 78.93% for the infill, 55.31% for the shell, and 69.45% for supports.
abstract_zh: 在增材制造 (AM) 领域应用计算机视觉和机器学习方法对 3D 打印产品的结构元件进行语义分割将改进实时故障分析系统，并可能通过实现原位校正来减少缺陷数量。这项工作展示了使用基于物理的渲染来生成标记图像数据集的可能性，以及使用图像到图像的转换功能来提高 AM 系统真实图像分割的准确性。基于U-Net模型和循环生成对抗网络进行多类语义分割实验。测试结果证明了检测 3D 打印部件的顶层、填充物、外壳和支撑等结构元素的能力。还开发了利用图像到图像风格转换和域适应技术进一步增强分割系统的基础。结果表明，在使用合成数据训练的模型是唯一可用工具的情况下，使用样式迁移作为领域适应的先驱可以显着改善真实的 3D 打印图像分割。综合测试数据集的平均交集 (mIoU) 分数包括整个 3D 打印部件的 94.90%、顶层的 73.33%、填充物的 78.93%、外壳的 55.31% 和支撑物的 69.45%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在增材制造领域利用合成数据与图像转换技术实现3D打印部件语义分割的方法，以提升缺陷检测与实时分析能力。
AI.motivation: 通过计算机视觉与机器学习方法改进增材制造中的结构元件语义分割，可增强实时失效分析系统并减少缺陷，但实际应用中真实图像数据获取困难，需依赖合成数据与迁移技术。
AI.method: 基于U-Net模型和循环生成对抗网络（Cycle GAN），结合物理渲染生成标注数据集，并采用风格迁移与领域自适应技术优化真实图像分割效果。
AI.result: 合成数据集测试中，整体3D打印部件mIoU达94.90%，顶层73.33%，填充结构78.93%，外壳55.31%，支撑结构69.45%。风格迁移预处理显著提升领域自适应效果。
AI.conclusion: 在仅有合成数据训练模型的情况下，采用风格迁移作为领域自适应的预处理步骤，可显著提升真实3D打印图像的语义分割精度。

search_text: Synthetic-to-real Composite Semantic Segmentation in Additive Manufacturing 增材制造中的合成到真实复合语义分割 The application of computer vision and machine learning methods in the field of additive manufacturing (AM) for semantic segmentation of the structural elements of 3-D printed products will improve real-time failure analysis systems and can potentially reduce the number of defects by enabling in situ corrections. This work demonstrates the possibilities of using physics-based rendering for labeled image dataset generation, as well as image-to-image translation capabilities to improve the accuracy of real image segmentation for AM systems. Multi-class semantic segmentation experiments were carried out based on the U-Net model and cycle generative adversarial network. The test results demonstrated the capacity of detecting such structural elements of 3-D printed parts as a top layer, infill, shell, and support. A basis for further segmentation system enhancement by utilizing image-to-image style transfer and domain adaptation technologies was also developed. The results indicate that using style transfer as a precursor to domain adaptation can significantly improve real 3-D printing image segmentation in situations where a model trained on synthetic data is the only tool available. The mean intersection over union (mIoU) scores for synthetic test datasets included 94.90% for the entire 3-D printed part, 73.33% for the top layer, 78.93% for the infill, 55.31% for the shell, and 69.45% for supports. 在增材制造 (AM) 领域应用计算机视觉和机器学习方法对 3D 打印产品的结构元件进行语义分割将改进实时故障分析系统，并可能通过实现原位校正来减少缺陷数量。这项工作展示了使用基于物理的渲染来生成标记图像数据集的可能性，以及使用图像到图像的转换功能来提高 AM 系统真实图像分割的准确性。基于U-Net模型和循环生成对抗网络进行多类语义分割实验。测试结果证明了检测 3D 打印部件的顶层、填充物、外壳和支撑等结构元素的能力。还开发了利用图像到图像风格转换和域适应技术进一步增强分割系统的基础。结果表明，在使用合成数据训练的模型是唯一可用工具的情况下，使用样式迁移作为领域适应的先驱可以显着改善真实的 3D 打印图像分割。综合测试数据集的平均交集 (mIoU) 分数包括整个 3D 打印部件的 94.90%、顶层的 73.33%、填充物的 78.93%、外壳的 55.31% 和支撑物的 69.45%。 本文研究了在增材制造领域利用合成数据与图像转换技术实现3D打印部件语义分割的方法，以提升缺陷检测与实时分析能力。 Aliaksei Petsiuk,Harnoor Singh,Himanshu Dadhwal,Joshua M. Pearce cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Xinyu Guan,Han Sun,Ningzhong Liu,Huiyu Zhou
title: Polycentric Clustering and Structural Regularization for Source-free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 用于无源无监督域适应的多中心聚类和结构正则化
abstract: Source-Free Domain Adaptation (SFDA) aims to solve the domain adaptation problem by transferring the knowledge learned from a pre-trained source model to an unseen target domain. Most existing methods assign pseudo-labels to the target data by generating feature prototypes. However, due to the discrepancy in the data distribution between the source domain and the target domain and category imbalance in the target domain, there are severe class biases in the generated feature prototypes and noisy pseudo-labels. Besides, the data structure of the target domain is often ignored, which is crucial for clustering. In this paper, a novel framework named PCSR is proposed to tackle SFDA via a novel intra-class Polycentric Clustering and Structural Regularization strategy. Firstly, an inter-class balanced sampling strategy is proposed to generate representative feature prototypes for each class. Furthermore, k-means clustering is introduced to generate multiple clustering centers for each class in the target domain to obtain robust pseudo-labels. Finally, to enhance the model's generalization, structural regularization is introduced for the target domain. Extensive experiments on three UDA benchmark datasets show that our method performs better or similarly against the other state of the art methods, demonstrating our approach's superiority for visual domain adaptation problems.
summary: Source-Free Domain Adaptation (SFDA) aims to solve the domain adaptation problem by transferring the knowledge learned from a pre-trained source model to an unseen target domain. Most existing methods assign pseudo-labels to the target data by generating feature prototypes. However, due to the discrepancy in the data distribution between the source domain and the target domain and category imbalance in the target domain, there are severe class biases in the generated feature prototypes and noisy pseudo-labels. Besides, the data structure of the target domain is often ignored, which is crucial for clustering. In this paper, a novel framework named PCSR is proposed to tackle SFDA via a novel intra-class Polycentric Clustering and Structural Regularization strategy. Firstly, an inter-class balanced sampling strategy is proposed to generate representative feature prototypes for each class. Furthermore, k-means clustering is introduced to generate multiple clustering centers for each class in the target domain to obtain robust pseudo-labels. Finally, to enhance the model's generalization, structural regularization is introduced for the target domain. Extensive experiments on three UDA benchmark datasets show that our method performs better or similarly against the other state of the art methods, demonstrating our approach's superiority for visual domain adaptation problems.
abstract_zh: 无源域适应（SFDA）旨在通过将从预先训练的源模型中学到的知识转移到不可见的目标域来解决域适应问题。大多数现有方法通过生成特征原型为目标数据分配伪标签。然而，由于源域和目标域之间的数据分布差异以及目标域中的类别不平衡，生成的特征原型和噪声伪标签存在严重的类别偏差。此外，目标域的数据结构经常被忽略，而这对于聚类至关重要。在本文中，提出了一种名为 PCSR 的新颖框架，通过新颖的类内多中心聚类和结构正则化策略来应对 SFDA。首先，提出了类间平衡采样策略来生成每个类的代表性特征原型。此外，引入k均值聚类来为目标域中的每个类生成多个聚类中心，以获得鲁棒的伪标签。最后，为了增强模型的泛化能力，针对目标域引入了结构正则化。对三个 UDA 基准数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法相对于其他最先进的方法表现更好或类似，证明了我们的方法在视觉域适应问题上的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PCSR的新型框架，通过多中心聚类和结构正则化策略解决源自由无监督域适应（SFDA）中的伪标签偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有SFDA方法因源域与目标域分布差异及目标域类别不平衡，导致生成的特征原型存在严重类别偏差和噪声伪标签，且忽视了目标域数据结构对聚类的重要性。
AI.method: 提出三步策略：1）类间平衡采样生成代表性特征原型；2）k-means聚类生成每个类的多中心以获得鲁棒伪标签；3）引入结构正则化增强目标域模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在三个UDA基准数据集上实验表明，该方法性能优于或与现有最先进方法相当，验证了其在视觉域适应任务中的优越性。
AI.conclusion: PCSR通过多中心聚类缓解伪标签噪声，结合结构正则化提升模型泛化，有效解决了SFDA中的分布差异与数据结构问题。

authors_text: Tariq M. Khan,Syed S. Naqvi,Antonio Robles-Kelly,Erik Meijering
title: Neural Network Compression by Joint Sparsity Promotion and Redundancy Reduction
title_zh: 通过联合稀疏性提升和冗余减少进行神经网络压缩
abstract: Compression of convolutional neural network models has recently been dominated by pruning approaches. A class of previous works focuses solely on pruning the unimportant filters to achieve network compression. Another important direction is the design of sparsity-inducing constraints which has also been explored in isolation. This paper presents a novel training scheme based on composite constraints that prune redundant filters and minimize their effect on overall network learning via sparsity promotion. Also, as opposed to prior works that employ pseudo-norm-based sparsity-inducing constraints, we propose a sparse scheme based on gradient counting in our framework. Our tests on several pixel-wise segmentation benchmarks show that the number of neurons and the memory footprint of networks in the test phase are significantly reduced without affecting performance. MobileNetV3 and UNet, two well-known architectures, are used to test the proposed scheme. Our network compression method not only results in reduced parameters but also achieves improved performance compared to MobileNetv3, which is an already optimized architecture.
summary: Compression of convolutional neural network models has recently been dominated by pruning approaches. A class of previous works focuses solely on pruning the unimportant filters to achieve network compression. Another important direction is the design of sparsity-inducing constraints which has also been explored in isolation. This paper presents a novel training scheme based on composite constraints that prune redundant filters and minimize their effect on overall network learning via sparsity promotion. Also, as opposed to prior works that employ pseudo-norm-based sparsity-inducing constraints, we propose a sparse scheme based on gradient counting in our framework. Our tests on several pixel-wise segmentation benchmarks show that the number of neurons and the memory footprint of networks in the test phase are significantly reduced without affecting performance. MobileNetV3 and UNet, two well-known architectures, are used to test the proposed scheme. Our network compression method not only results in reduced parameters but also achieves improved performance compared to MobileNetv3, which is an already optimized architecture.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络模型的压缩最近以剪枝方法为主。之前的一类工作仅专注于修剪不重要的过滤器以实现网络压缩。另一个重要的方向是稀疏性约束的设计，这也已被单独探索。本文提出了一种基于复合约束的新颖训练方案，该方案修剪冗余过滤器并通过稀疏性提升最小化其对整体网络学习的影响。此外，与之前采用基于伪范数的稀疏性诱导约束的工作相反，我们在框架中提出了一种基于梯度计数的稀疏方案。我们对几个像素级分割基准的测试表明，测试阶段的神经元数量和网络的内存占用显着减少，而不会影响性能。 MobileNetV3和UNet这两种著名的架构被用来测试所提出的方案。与已经优化的架构 MobileNetv3 相比，我们的网络压缩方法不仅减少了参数，而且提高了性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合稀疏性促进与冗余度降低的神经网络压缩方法，通过联合优化实现模型参数减少且性能保持。
AI.motivation: 现有压缩方法或单独剪枝不重要滤波器，或独立设计稀疏性约束，难以同时有效压缩模型并保持性能。
AI.method: 设计复合约束训练框架，通过梯度计数机制替代传统伪范数稀疏约束，联合剪枝冗余滤波器并最小化对网络学习的影响。
AI.result: 在像素级分割基准测试中，MobileNetV3和UNet结构参数量与内存占用显著降低，且性能优于原MobileNetV3优化架构。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过联合优化稀疏性与冗余度，在减少模型复杂度的同时实现了超越现有优化架构的性能提升。

search_text: Neural Network Compression by Joint Sparsity Promotion and Redundancy Reduction 通过联合稀疏性提升和冗余减少进行神经网络压缩 Compression of convolutional neural network models has recently been dominated by pruning approaches. A class of previous works focuses solely on pruning the unimportant filters to achieve network compression. Another important direction is the design of sparsity-inducing constraints which has also been explored in isolation. This paper presents a novel training scheme based on composite constraints that prune redundant filters and minimize their effect on overall network learning via sparsity promotion. Also, as opposed to prior works that employ pseudo-norm-based sparsity-inducing constraints, we propose a sparse scheme based on gradient counting in our framework. Our tests on several pixel-wise segmentation benchmarks show that the number of neurons and the memory footprint of networks in the test phase are significantly reduced without affecting performance. MobileNetV3 and UNet, two well-known architectures, are used to test the proposed scheme. Our network compression method not only results in reduced parameters but also achieves improved performance compared to MobileNetv3, which is an already optimized architecture. 卷积神经网络模型的压缩最近以剪枝方法为主。之前的一类工作仅专注于修剪不重要的过滤器以实现网络压缩。另一个重要的方向是稀疏性约束的设计，这也已被单独探索。本文提出了一种基于复合约束的新颖训练方案，该方案修剪冗余过滤器并通过稀疏性提升最小化其对整体网络学习的影响。此外，与之前采用基于伪范数的稀疏性诱导约束的工作相反，我们在框架中提出了一种基于梯度计数的稀疏方案。我们对几个像素级分割基准的测试表明，测试阶段的神经元数量和网络的内存占用显着减少，而不会影响性能。 MobileNetV3和UNet这两种著名的架构被用来测试所提出的方案。与已经优化的架构 MobileNetv3 相比，我们的网络压缩方法不仅减少了参数，而且提高了性能。 本文提出一种结合稀疏性促进与冗余度降低的神经网络压缩方法，通过联合优化实现模型参数减少且性能保持。 Tariq M. Khan,Syed S. Naqvi,Antonio Robles-Kelly,Erik Meijering cs.CV

authors_text: Noriaki Hirose,Dhruv Shah,Ajay Sridhar,Sergey Levine
title: ExAug: Robot-Conditioned Navigation Policies via Geometric Experience Augmentation
title_zh: ExAug：通过几何经验增强的机器人条件导航策略
abstract: Machine learning techniques rely on large and diverse datasets for generalization. Computer vision, natural language processing, and other applications can often reuse public datasets to train many different models. However, due to differences in physical configurations, it is challenging to leverage public datasets for training robotic control policies on new robot platforms or for new tasks. In this work, we propose a novel framework, ExAug to augment the experiences of different robot platforms from multiple datasets in diverse environments. ExAug leverages a simple principle: by extracting 3D information in the form of a point cloud, we can create much more complex and structured augmentations, utilizing both generating synthetic images and geometric-aware penalization that would have been suitable in the same situation for a different robot, with different size, turning radius, and camera placement. The trained policy is evaluated on two new robot platforms with three different cameras in indoor and outdoor environments with obstacles.
summary: Machine learning techniques rely on large and diverse datasets for generalization. Computer vision, natural language processing, and other applications can often reuse public datasets to train many different models. However, due to differences in physical configurations, it is challenging to leverage public datasets for training robotic control policies on new robot platforms or for new tasks. In this work, we propose a novel framework, ExAug to augment the experiences of different robot platforms from multiple datasets in diverse environments. ExAug leverages a simple principle: by extracting 3D information in the form of a point cloud, we can create much more complex and structured augmentations, utilizing both generating synthetic images and geometric-aware penalization that would have been suitable in the same situation for a different robot, with different size, turning radius, and camera placement. The trained policy is evaluated on two new robot platforms with three different cameras in indoor and outdoor environments with obstacles.
abstract_zh: 机器学习技术依赖于大型且多样化的数据集来进行泛化。计算机视觉、自然语言处理和其他应用程序通常可以重用公共数据集来训练许多不同的模型。然而，由于物理配置的差异，利用公共数据集在新的机器人平台或新任务上训练机器人控制策略具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个新颖的框架 ExAug，用于增强不同环境中多个数据集的不同机器人平台的体验。 ExAug 利用了一个简单的原理：通过以点云形式提取 3D 信息，我们可以利用生成合成图像和几何感知惩罚来创建更复杂和结构化的增强，这对于具有不同尺寸、转弯半径和相机位置的不同机器人来说适用于相同情况。经过训练的策略在带有三个不同摄像头的两个新机器人平台上在有障碍的室内和室外环境中进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ExAug框架，通过几何经验增强技术，利用点云数据生成合成图像和几何感知惩罚，以增强不同机器人平台在多样化环境中的导航策略。
AI.motivation: 现有公共数据集难以直接用于新机器人平台或任务的控制策略训练，因物理配置差异导致数据复用困难。
AI.method: 通过提取点云形式的3D信息，生成与不同机器人尺寸、转向半径和相机布局适配的合成图像，并引入几何感知惩罚机制进行经验增强。
AI.result: 在两种新机器人平台、三种不同相机配置的室内外障碍环境中验证，证明了策略迁移的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ExAug通过几何增强实现了跨机器人平台的导航策略泛化，为机器人学习提供了无需额外数据的适应性解决方案。

In this work, we propose a novel framework, ExAug to augment the experiences of different robot platforms from multiple datasets in diverse environments. ExAug leverages a simple principle: by extracting 3D information in the form of a point cloud, we can create much more complex and structured augmentations, utilizing both generating synthetic images and geometric-aware penalization that would have been suitable in the same situation for a different robot, with different size, turning radius, and camera placement. authors_text: Stefan Larson,Gordon Lim,Yutong Ai,David Kuang,Kevin Leach
title: Evaluating Out-of-Distribution Performance on Document Image Classifiers
title_zh: 评估文档图像分类器的分布外性能
abstract: The ability of a document classifier to handle inputs that are drawn from a distribution different from the training distribution is crucial for robust deployment and generalizability. The RVL-CDIP corpus is the de facto standard benchmark for document classification, yet to our knowledge all studies that use this corpus do not include evaluation on out-of-distribution documents. In this paper, we curate and release a new out-of-distribution benchmark for evaluating out-of-distribution performance for document classifiers. Our new out-of-distribution benchmark consists of two types of documents: those that are not part of any of the 16 in-domain RVL-CDIP categories (RVL-CDIP-O), and those that are one of the 16 in-domain categories yet are drawn from a distribution different from that of the original RVL-CDIP dataset (RVL-CDIP-N). While prior work on document classification for in-domain RVL-CDIP documents reports high accuracy scores, we find that these models exhibit accuracy drops of between roughly 15-30% on our new out-of-domain RVL-CDIP-N benchmark, and further struggle to distinguish between in-domain RVL-CDIP-N and out-of-domain RVL-CDIP-O inputs. Our new benchmark provides researchers with a valuable new resource for analyzing out-of-distribution performance on document classifiers. Our new out-of-distribution data can be found at https://github.com/gxlarson/rvl-cdip-ood.
summary: The ability of a document classifier to handle inputs that are drawn from a distribution different from the training distribution is crucial for robust deployment and generalizability. The RVL-CDIP corpus is the de facto standard benchmark for document classification, yet to our knowledge all studies that use this corpus do not include evaluation on out-of-distribution documents. In this paper, we curate and release a new out-of-distribution benchmark for evaluating out-of-distribution performance for document classifiers. Our new out-of-distribution benchmark consists of two types of documents: those that are not part of any of the 16 in-domain RVL-CDIP categories (RVL-CDIP-O), and those that are one of the 16 in-domain categories yet are drawn from a distribution different from that of the original RVL-CDIP dataset (RVL-CDIP-N). While prior work on document classification for in-domain RVL-CDIP documents reports high accuracy scores, we find that these models exhibit accuracy drops of between roughly 15-30% on our new out-of-domain RVL-CDIP-N benchmark, and further struggle to distinguish between in-domain RVL-CDIP-N and out-of-domain RVL-CDIP-O inputs. Our new benchmark provides researchers with a valuable new resource for analyzing out-of-distribution performance on document classifiers. Our new out-of-distribution data can be found at https://github.com/gxlarson/rvl-cdip-ood.
abstract_zh: 文档分类器处理来自与训练分布不同的分布的输入的能力对于稳健的部署和通用性至关重要。 RVL-CDIP 语料库是文档分类事实上的标准基准，但据我们所知，所有使用该语料库的研究都不包括对未分发文档的评估。在本文中，我们策划并发布了一个新的分布外基准，用于评估文档分类器的分布外性能。我们新的分布外基准由两种类型的文档组成：那些不属于 16 个域内 RVL-CDIP 类别 (RVL-CDIP-O) 中任何一个的文档，以及属于 16 个域内类别之一但来自与原始 RVL-CDIP 数据集 (RVL-CDIP-N) 不同的分布的文档。虽然域内 RVL-CDIP 文档的文档分类的先前工作报告了较高的准确度分数，但我们发现这些模型在我们新的域外 RVL-CDIP-N 基准上表现出大约 15-30% 的准确度下降，并且进一步难以区分域内 RVL-CDIP-N 和域外 RVL-CDIP-O 输入。我们的新基准为研究人员提供了宝贵的新资源，用于分析文档分类器的分布外性能。我们新的发行外数据可以在 https://github.com/gxlarson/rvl-cdip-ood 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文构建并发布了用于评估文档图像分类器分布外性能的新基准数据集，分析模型在非目标分布数据上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有文档分类研究（如RVL-CDIP数据集）未包含分布外评估，导致模型鲁棒性和泛化能力难以验证，限制了实际应用可靠性。
AI.method: 构建包含两类分布外数据的基准：1) 非RVL-CDIP类别文档（RVL-CDIP-O）；2) 属于RVL-CDIP类别但分布不同的文档（RVL-CDIP-N），测试现有模型性能。
AI.result: 主流模型在RVL-CDIP-N上准确率下降15-30%，且难以区分RVL-CDIP-N与RVL-CDIP-O样本，暴露出现有方法在分布外场景的显著缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 新基准为研究文档分类器的分布外性能提供了关键工具，有助于推动更鲁棒的模型设计与评估方法的发展。

authors_text: Minghua Liu,Xuanlin Li,Zhan Ling,Yangyan Li,Hao Su
title: Frame Mining: a Free Lunch for Learning Robotic Manipulation from 3D Point Clouds
title_zh: 框架挖掘：从 3D 点云学习机器人操作的免费午餐
comment: Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2022; Project Website: https://colin97.github.io/FrameMining/
comments: Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2022; Project Website: https://colin97.github.io/FrameMining/
abstract: We study how choices of input point cloud coordinate frames impact learning of manipulation skills from 3D point clouds. There exist a variety of coordinate frame choices to normalize captured robot-object-interaction point clouds. We find that different frames have a profound effect on agent learning performance, and the trend is similar across 3D backbone networks. In particular, the end-effector frame and the target-part frame achieve higher training efficiency than the commonly used world frame and robot-base frame in many tasks, intuitively because they provide helpful alignments among point clouds across time steps and thus can simplify visual module learning. Moreover, the well-performing frames vary across tasks, and some tasks may benefit from multiple frame candidates. We thus propose FrameMiners to adaptively select candidate frames and fuse their merits in a task-agnostic manner. Experimentally, FrameMiners achieves on-par or significantly higher performance than the best single-frame version on five fully physical manipulation tasks adapted from ManiSkill and OCRTOC. Without changing existing camera placements or adding extra cameras, point cloud frame mining can serve as a free lunch to improve 3D manipulation learning.
summary: We study how choices of input point cloud coordinate frames impact learning of manipulation skills from 3D point clouds. There exist a variety of coordinate frame choices to normalize captured robot-object-interaction point clouds. We find that different frames have a profound effect on agent learning performance, and the trend is similar across 3D backbone networks. In particular, the end-effector frame and the target-part frame achieve higher training efficiency than the commonly used world frame and robot-base frame in many tasks, intuitively because they provide helpful alignments among point clouds across time steps and thus can simplify visual module learning. Moreover, the well-performing frames vary across tasks, and some tasks may benefit from multiple frame candidates. We thus propose FrameMiners to adaptively select candidate frames and fuse their merits in a task-agnostic manner. Experimentally, FrameMiners achieves on-par or significantly higher performance than the best single-frame version on five fully physical manipulation tasks adapted from ManiSkill and OCRTOC. Without changing existing camera placements or adding extra cameras, point cloud frame mining can serve as a free lunch to improve 3D manipulation learning.
abstract_zh: 我们研究输入点云坐标系的选择如何影响从 3D 点云学习操作技能。存在多种坐标系选择来标准化捕获的机器人物体交互点云。我们发现不同的框架对智能体的学习性能有深远的影响，并且整个 3D 主干网络的趋势相似。特别是，末端执行器框架和目标部件框架在许多任务中比常用的世界框架和机器人基础框架实现了更高的训练效率，直观地说，因为它们提供了跨时间步长的点云之间的有用对齐，从而可以简化视觉模块学习。此外，性能良好的框架因任务而异，并且某些任务可能受益于多个候选框架。因此，我们建议 FrameMiners 自适应地选择候选帧并以与任务无关的方式融合它们的优点。实验上，FrameMiners 在改编自 ManiSkill 和 OCRTOC 的五个完全物理操作任务上实现了与最佳单帧版本相当或显着更高的性能。在不改变现有相机位置或添加额外相机的情况下，点云帧挖掘可以作为改善 3D 操作学习的免费午餐。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了不同输入点云坐标系对从3D点云学习操作技能的影响，并提出FrameMiners框架以自适应选择最优坐标系提升学习效率。
AI.motivation: 传统固定坐标系（如世界坐标系）在跨时间步点云对齐上存在局限，而操作末端或目标部件坐标系能提供更有效的对齐信息，但不同任务的最佳坐标系存在差异。
AI.method: 提出FrameMiners方法，通过自适应选择多个候选坐标系并融合其特征，在无需改变相机布局或增加硬件的前提下优化学习过程。
AI.result: 在五个物理操作任务中，FrameMiners性能优于或等于最佳单坐标系方法，验证了坐标系挖掘作为提升3D操作学习的‘免费午餐’的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 自适应坐标系选择能显著提升机器人操作学习效果，为3D点云处理提供了无需额外硬件的通用优化方案。

We thus propose FrameMiners to adaptively select candidate frames and fuse their merits in a task-agnostic manner. Experimentally, FrameMiners achieves on-par or significantly higher performance than the best single-frame version on five fully physical manipulation tasks adapted from ManiSkill and OCRTOC. authors_text: Navid Hashemi,Xin Qin,Jyotirmoy V. Deshmukh,Georgios Fainekos,Bardh Hoxha,Danil Prokhorov,Tomoya Yamaguchi
title: Risk-Awareness in Learning Neural Controllers for Temporal Logic Objectives
title_zh: 学习神经控制器实现时间逻辑目标的风险意识
abstract: In this paper, we consider the problem of synthesizing a controller in the presence of uncertainty such that the resulting closed-loop system satisfies certain hard constraints while optimizing certain (soft) performance objectives. We assume that the hard constraints encoding safety or mission-critical task objectives are expressed using Signal Temporal Logic (STL), while performance is quantified using standard cost functions on system trajectories. In order to prioritize the satisfaction of the hard STL constraints, we utilize the framework of control barrier functions (CBFs) and algorithmically obtain CBFs for STL objectives. We assume that the controllers are modeled using neural networks (NNs) and provide an optimization algorithm to learn the optimal parameters for the NN controller that optimize the performance at a user-specified robustness margin for the safety specifications. We use the formalism of risk measures to evaluate the risk incurred by the trade-off between robustness margin of the system and its performance. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach on well-known difficult examples for nonlinear control such as a quad-rotor and a unicycle, where the mission objectives for each system include hard timing constraints and safety objectives.
summary: In this paper, we consider the problem of synthesizing a controller in the presence of uncertainty such that the resulting closed-loop system satisfies certain hard constraints while optimizing certain (soft) performance objectives. We assume that the hard constraints encoding safety or mission-critical task objectives are expressed using Signal Temporal Logic (STL), while performance is quantified using standard cost functions on system trajectories. In order to prioritize the satisfaction of the hard STL constraints, we utilize the framework of control barrier functions (CBFs) and algorithmically obtain CBFs for STL objectives. We assume that the controllers are modeled using neural networks (NNs) and provide an optimization algorithm to learn the optimal parameters for the NN controller that optimize the performance at a user-specified robustness margin for the safety specifications. We use the formalism of risk measures to evaluate the risk incurred by the trade-off between robustness margin of the system and its performance. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach on well-known difficult examples for nonlinear control such as a quad-rotor and a unicycle, where the mission objectives for each system include hard timing constraints and safety objectives.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑在存在不确定性的情况下合成控制器的问题，以便最终的闭环系统满足某些硬约束，同时优化某些（软）性能目标。我们假设编码安全或关键任务目标的硬约束是使用信号时态逻辑（STL）来表达的，而性能是使用系统轨迹上的标准成本函数来量化的。为了优先满足硬STL约束，我们利用控制障碍函数（CBF）框架并通过算法获得STL目标的CBF。我们假设控制器使用神经网络 (NN) 进行建模，并提供优化算法来学习 NN 控制器的最佳参数，从而在用户指定的安全规范鲁棒性裕度下优化性能。我们使用风险度量的形式主义来评估系统鲁棒性裕度与其性能之间的权衡所产生的风险。我们在众所周知的非线性控制困难示例（例如四旋翼和独轮车）上展示了我们的方法的有效性，其中每个系统的任务目标包括硬时序约束和安全目标。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计一种风险感知的神经网络控制器，以在存在不确定性的环境中满足信号时序逻辑（STL）的硬约束条件，同时优化系统轨迹的性能目标。
AI.motivation: 在不确定环境中，传统控制器难以同时满足严格的安全部署要求和性能优化需求，尤其当任务目标包含复杂时序逻辑约束时，需要一种兼顾安全性与性能的新型控制方法。
AI.method: 结合控制屏障函数（CBF）与神经网络（NN），通过算法生成满足STL约束的CBF，并设计优化算法学习NN控制器参数，在用户指定的鲁棒性边界下平衡性能与安全风险，利用风险度量评估系统鲁棒性与性能的权衡。
AI.result: 在四旋翼无人机和单轮车等非线性控制经典难题中验证了方法的有效性，系统能够在满足硬时序约束和安全目标的同时实现性能优化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为在不确定性环境下实现安全与性能兼顾的神经控制器提供了理论框架与实践验证，尤其适用于复杂时序逻辑约束的控制任务。

authors_text: Mingze Xi,Ashfaqur Rahman,Chuong Nguyen,Stuart Arnold,John McCulloch
title: Smart Headset, Computer Vision and Machine Learning for Efficient Prawn Farm Management
title_zh: 智能耳机、计算机视觉和机器学习可实现高效的养虾场管理
abstract: Understanding the growth and distribution of the prawns is critical for optimising the feed and harvest strategies. An inadequate understanding of prawn growth can lead to reduced financial gain, for example, crops are harvested too early. The key to maintaining a good understanding of prawn growth is frequent sampling. However, the most commonly adopted sampling practice, the cast net approach, is unable to sample the prawns at a high frequency as it is expensive and laborious. An alternative approach is to sample prawns from feed trays that farm workers inspect each day. This will allow growth data collection at a high frequency (each day). But measuring prawns manually each day is a laborious task. In this article, we propose a new approach that utilises smart glasses, depth camera, computer vision and machine learning to detect prawn distribution and growth from feed trays. A smart headset was built to allow farmers to collect prawn data while performing daily feed tray checks. A computer vision + machine learning pipeline was developed and demonstrated to detect the growth trends of prawns in 4 prawn ponds over a growing season.
summary: Understanding the growth and distribution of the prawns is critical for optimising the feed and harvest strategies. An inadequate understanding of prawn growth can lead to reduced financial gain, for example, crops are harvested too early. The key to maintaining a good understanding of prawn growth is frequent sampling. However, the most commonly adopted sampling practice, the cast net approach, is unable to sample the prawns at a high frequency as it is expensive and laborious. An alternative approach is to sample prawns from feed trays that farm workers inspect each day. This will allow growth data collection at a high frequency (each day). But measuring prawns manually each day is a laborious task. In this article, we propose a new approach that utilises smart glasses, depth camera, computer vision and machine learning to detect prawn distribution and growth from feed trays. A smart headset was built to allow farmers to collect prawn data while performing daily feed tray checks. A computer vision + machine learning pipeline was developed and demonstrated to detect the growth trends of prawns in 4 prawn ponds over a growing season.
abstract_zh: 了解虾的生长和分布对于优化饲料和收获策略至关重要。对虾生长了解不足可能会导致经济收益减少，例如农作物收获过早。保持对虾生长良好了解的关键是频繁采样。然而，最常用的采样方法，即撒网法，由于昂贵且费力，无法高频次地对虾进行采样。另一种方法是从农场工人每天检查的饲料托盘中取样。这将允许以高频率（每天）收集生长数据。但每天手动测量虾的数量是一项艰巨的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，利用智能眼镜、深度相机、计算机视觉和机器学习来检测饲料托盘中虾的分布和生长。开发了一款智能耳机，让养殖户能够在执行每日饲料托盘检查的同时收集对虾数据。开发并演示了计算机视觉 + 机器学习管道，用于检测 4 个虾池中虾在生长季节的生长趋势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合智能头盔、深度相机、计算机视觉和机器学习的系统，用于高效采集对虾养殖数据并分析生长趋势。
AI.motivation: 传统采样方法成本高且效率低，手动测量对虾生长数据费时费力，亟需自动化方案提升养殖管理效率。
AI.method: 构建智能头盔集成深度相机，通过计算机视觉识别饲料盘中对虾图像，结合机器学习模型分析生长数据，实现高频次自动监测。
AI.result: 在4个虾塘的生长季测试中，系统成功检测到对虾的分布和生长趋势，验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方案通过自动化数据采集与分析，为对虾养殖提供精准的生长监测，有助于优化饲料投放和收获策略。
