search_text: Smart Headset, Computer Vision and Machine Learning for Efficient Prawn Farm Management 智能耳机、计算机视觉和机器学习可实现高效的养虾场管理 Understanding the growth and distribution of the prawns is critical for optimising the feed and harvest strategies. An inadequate understanding of prawn growth can lead to reduced financial gain, for example, crops are harvested too early. The key to maintaining a good understanding of prawn growth is frequent sampling. However, the most commonly adopted sampling practice, the cast net approach, is unable to sample the prawns at a high frequency as it is expensive and laborious. An alternative approach is to sample prawns from feed trays that farm workers inspect each day. This will allow growth data collection at a high frequency (each day). But measuring prawns manually each day is a laborious task. In this article, we propose a new approach that utilises smart glasses, depth camera, computer vision and machine learning to detect prawn distribution and growth from feed trays. A smart headset was built to allow farmers to collect prawn data while performing daily feed tray checks. A computer vision + machine learning pipeline was developed and demonstrated to detect the growth trends of prawns in 4 prawn ponds over a growing season. 了解虾的生长和分布对于优化饲料和收获策略至关重要。对虾生长了解不足可能会导致经济收益减少，例如农作物收获过早。保持对虾生长良好了解的关键是频繁采样。然而，最常用的采样方法，即撒网法，由于昂贵且费力，无法高频次地对虾进行采样。另一种方法是从农场工人每天检查的饲料托盘中取样。这将允许以高频率（每天）收集生长数据。但每天手动测量虾的数量是一项艰巨的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，利用智能眼镜、深度相机、计算机视觉和机器学习来检测饲料托盘中虾的分布和生长。开发了一款智能耳机，让养殖户能够在执行每日饲料托盘检查的同时收集对虾数据。开发并演示了计算机视觉 + 机器学习管道，用于检测 4 个虾池中虾在生长季节的生长趋势。 本文提出一种结合智能头盔、深度相机、计算机视觉和机器学习的系统，用于高效采集对虾养殖数据并分析生长趋势。 Mingze Xi,Ashfaqur Rahman,Chuong Nguyen,Stuart Arnold,John McCulloch cs.CV,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Ryan Griffiths,Jack Naylor,Donald G. Dansereau
title: NOCaL: Calibration-Free Semi-Supervised Learning of Odometry and Camera Intrinsics
title_zh: NOCaL：里程计和相机本质的免校准半监督学习
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables, for associated project page, see https://roboticimaging.org/Projects/NOCaL/
comments: 7 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables, for associated project page, see https://roboticimaging.org/Projects/NOCaL/
abstract: There are a multitude of emerging imaging technologies that could benefit robotics. However the need for bespoke models, calibration and low-level processing represents a key barrier to their adoption. In this work we present NOCaL, Neural odometry and Calibration using Light fields, a semi-supervised learning architecture capable of interpreting previously unseen cameras without calibration. NOCaL learns to estimate camera parameters, relative pose, and scene appearance. It employs a scene-rendering hypernetwork pretrained on a large number of existing cameras and scenes, and adapts to previously unseen cameras using a small supervised training set to enforce metric scale. We demonstrate NOCaL on rendered and captured imagery using conventional cameras, demonstrating calibration-free odometry and novel view synthesis. This work represents a key step toward automating the interpretation of general camera geometries and emerging imaging technologies.
summary: There are a multitude of emerging imaging technologies that could benefit robotics. However the need for bespoke models, calibration and low-level processing represents a key barrier to their adoption. In this work we present NOCaL, Neural odometry and Calibration using Light fields, a semi-supervised learning architecture capable of interpreting previously unseen cameras without calibration. NOCaL learns to estimate camera parameters, relative pose, and scene appearance. It employs a scene-rendering hypernetwork pretrained on a large number of existing cameras and scenes, and adapts to previously unseen cameras using a small supervised training set to enforce metric scale. We demonstrate NOCaL on rendered and captured imagery using conventional cameras, demonstrating calibration-free odometry and novel view synthesis. This work represents a key step toward automating the interpretation of general camera geometries and emerging imaging technologies.
abstract_zh: 有许多新兴的成像技术可以使机器人技术受益。然而，对定制模型、校准和低级处理的需求是其采用的主要障碍。在这项工作中，我们提出了 NOCaL、神经里程计和使用光场的校准，这是一种半监督学习架构，能够解释以前未见过的相机而无需校准。 NOCaL 学习估计相机参数、相对姿势和场景外观。它采用在大量现有摄像机和场景上进行预训练的场景渲染超网络，并使用小型监督训练集来适应以前未见过的摄像机以强制执行度量标准。我们在使用传统相机渲染和捕获的图像上演示了 NOCaL，展示了免校准里程计和新颖的视图合成。这项工作代表了自动解释一般相机几何形状和新兴成像技术的关键一步。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需校准的半监督学习框架，用于同时估计相机参数、相对位姿和场景外观，适用于新兴成像技术。
AI.motivation: 现有相机和成像技术需要复杂的校准和定制模型，限制了其在机器人等领域的广泛应用，因此需要一种无需校准的自动化方法。
AI.method: 基于预训练场景渲染超网络，结合小规模监督数据集进行微调，实现对新相机的自适应，无需手动校准。
AI.result: 在常规相机的渲染和实际图像上验证了方法的有效性，实现了校准自由的里程计和新视角合成。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为自动化处理通用相机几何和新兴成像技术提供了关键进展，减少了对人工校准的依赖。

authors_text: Albert Wilcox,Ashwin Balakrishna,Jules Dedieu,Wyame Benslimane,Daniel S. Brown,Ken Goldberg
title: Monte Carlo Augmented Actor-Critic for Sparse Reward Deep Reinforcement Learning from Suboptimal Demonstrations
title_zh: 蒙特卡罗增强演员批评家从次优演示中获得稀疏奖励深度强化学习
comment: To be published in the 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022). 19 pages. 11 figures
comments: To be published in the 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022). 19 pages. 11 figures
abstract: Providing densely shaped reward functions for RL algorithms is often exceedingly challenging, motivating the development of RL algorithms that can learn from easier-to-specify sparse reward functions. This sparsity poses new exploration challenges. One common way to address this problem is using demonstrations to provide initial signal about regions of the state space with high rewards. However, prior RL from demonstrations algorithms introduce significant complexity and many hyperparameters, making them hard to implement and tune. We introduce Monte Carlo Augmented Actor Critic (MCAC), a parameter free modification to standard actor-critic algorithms which initializes the replay buffer with demonstrations and computes a modified $Q$-value by taking the maximum of the standard temporal distance (TD) target and a Monte Carlo estimate of the reward-to-go. This encourages exploration in the neighborhood of high-performing trajectories by encouraging high $Q$-values in corresponding regions of the state space. Experiments across $5$ continuous control domains suggest that MCAC can be used to significantly increase learning efficiency across $6$ commonly used RL and RL-from-demonstrations algorithms. See https://sites.google.com/view/mcac-rl for code and supplementary material.
summary: Providing densely shaped reward functions for RL algorithms is often exceedingly challenging, motivating the development of RL algorithms that can learn from easier-to-specify sparse reward functions. This sparsity poses new exploration challenges. One common way to address this problem is using demonstrations to provide initial signal about regions of the state space with high rewards. However, prior RL from demonstrations algorithms introduce significant complexity and many hyperparameters, making them hard to implement and tune. We introduce Monte Carlo Augmented Actor Critic (MCAC), a parameter free modification to standard actor-critic algorithms which initializes the replay buffer with demonstrations and computes a modified $Q$-value by taking the maximum of the standard temporal distance (TD) target and a Monte Carlo estimate of the reward-to-go. This encourages exploration in the neighborhood of high-performing trajectories by encouraging high $Q$-values in corresponding regions of the state space. Experiments across $5$ continuous control domains suggest that MCAC can be used to significantly increase learning efficiency across $6$ commonly used RL and RL-from-demonstrations algorithms. See https://sites.google.com/view/mcac-rl for code and supplementary material.
abstract_zh: 为 RL 算法提供密集形状的奖励函数通常极具挑战性，这激励了 RL 算法的开发，这些算法可以从更容易指定的稀疏奖励函数中学习。这种稀疏性带来了新的探索挑战。解决这个问题的一种常见方法是使用演示来提供有关具有高奖励的状态空间区域的初始信号。然而，先前的 RL 演示算法引入了显着的复杂性和许多超参数，使得它们难以实现和调整。我们引入了蒙特卡罗增强演员评论家 (MCAC)，这是对标准演员评论家算法的无参数修改，它通过演示初始化重放缓冲区，并通过取标准时间距离 (TD) 目标的最大值和蒙特卡罗估计的奖励来计算修改后的 $Q$ 值。这通过鼓励状态空间的相应区域中的高 $Q$ 值来鼓励对高性能轨迹附近的探索。 5 美元连续控制域的实验表明，MCAC 可用于显着提高 6 美元常用 RL 和 RL 演示算法的学习效率。有关代码和补充材料，请参阅 https://sites.google.com/view/mcac-rl。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MCAC的无参数方法，通过结合演示数据和蒙特卡洛估计改进稀疏奖励下的深度强化学习。
AI.motivation: 稀疏奖励函数设计困难且传统演示学习方法复杂，需更简洁高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 在标准actor-critic框架中初始化回放缓冲区为演示数据，并通过取TD目标与蒙特卡洛奖励估计的最大值修正Q值。
AI.result: 在5个连续控制任务中，MCAC使6种主流算法的学习效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: MCAC通过简单修改即可有效利用次优演示数据，提升稀疏奖励场景下的强化学习性能。

result: 在5个连续控制任务中，MCAC使6种主流算法的学习效率显著提升。
conclusion: MCAC通过简单修改即可有效利用次优演示数据，提升稀疏奖励场景下的强化学习性能。
search_text: Monte Carlo Augmented Actor-Critic for Sparse Reward Deep Reinforcement Learning from Suboptimal Demonstrations 蒙特卡罗增强演员批评家从次优演示中获得稀疏奖励深度强化学习 Providing densely shaped reward functions for RL algorithms is often exceedingly challenging, motivating the development of RL algorithms that can learn from easier-to-specify sparse reward functions. This sparsity poses new exploration challenges. One common way to address this problem is using demonstrations to provide initial signal about regions of the state space with high rewards. However, prior RL from demonstrations algorithms introduce significant complexity and many hyperparameters, making them hard to implement and tune. We introduce Monte Carlo Augmented Actor Critic (MCAC), a parameter free modification to standard actor-critic algorithms which initializes the replay buffer with demonstrations and computes a modified $Q$-value by taking the maximum of the standard temporal distance (TD) target and a Monte Carlo estimate of the reward-to-go. This encourages exploration in the neighborhood of high-performing trajectories by encouraging high $Q$-values in corresponding regions of the state space. Experiments across $5$ continuous control domains suggest that MCAC can be used to significantly increase learning efficiency across $6$ commonly used RL and RL-from-demonstrations algorithms. See https://sites.google.com/view/mcac-rl for code and supplementary material. 为 RL 算法提供密集形状的奖励函数通常极具挑战性，这激励了 RL 算法的开发，这些算法可以从更容易指定的稀疏奖励函数中学习。这种稀疏性带来了新的探索挑战。解决这个问题的一种常见方法是使用演示来提供有关具有高奖励的状态空间区域的初始信号。然而，先前的 RL 演示算法引入了显着的复杂性和许多超参数，使得它们难以实现和调整。我们引入了蒙特卡罗增强演员评论家 (MCAC)，这是对标准演员评论家算法的无参数修改，它通过演示初始化重放缓冲区，并通过取标准时间距离 (TD) 目标的最大值和蒙特卡罗估计的奖励来计算修改后的 $Q$ 值。这通过鼓励状态空间的相应区域中的高 $Q$ 值来鼓励对高性能轨迹附近的探索。 5 美元连续控制域的实验表明，MCAC 可用于显着提高 6 美元常用 RL 和 RL 演示算法的学习效率。有关代码和补充材料，请参阅 https://sites.google.com/view/mcac-rl。 本文提出一种名为MCAC的无参数方法，通过结合演示数据和蒙特卡洛估计改进稀疏奖励下的深度强化学习。 Albert Wilcox,Ashwin Balakrishna,Jules Dedieu,Wyame Benslimane,Daniel S. Brown,Ken Goldberg cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Kumar Shashwat
title: A comparative study of the performance of different search algorithms on FOON graphs
title_zh: 不同搜索算法在FOON图上的性能比较研究
comment: This was submitted as part of a course I took while studying at USF
comments: This was submitted as part of a course I took while studying at USF
abstract: A robot finds it really hard to learn creatively and adapt to new unseen challenges. This is mainly because of the minimal information it has access to or experience towards. Paulius et al. [1] presented a way to construct functional graphs that encapsulate. Sakib et al. [2] further expanded FOON objects for robotic cooking. This paper presents a comparative study of Breadth First Search (BFS), Greedy Breadth First search (GBFS) with two heuristic functions, and Iterative Depth First Search (IDFS) and provides a comparison of their performance.
summary: A robot finds it really hard to learn creatively and adapt to new unseen challenges. This is mainly because of the minimal information it has access to or experience towards. Paulius et al. [1] presented a way to construct functional graphs that encapsulate. Sakib et al. [2] further expanded FOON objects for robotic cooking. This paper presents a comparative study of Breadth First Search (BFS), Greedy Breadth First search (GBFS) with two heuristic functions, and Iterative Depth First Search (IDFS) and provides a comparison of their performance.
abstract_zh: 机器人发现很难创造性地学习并适应新的看不见的挑战。这主要是因为它能够访问或体验到的信息很少。保利乌斯等人。 [1] 提出了一种构建封装函数图的方法。萨基布等人。 [2] 进一步扩展了用于机器人烹饪的 FOON 对象。本文对广度优先搜索 (BFS)、具有两个启发式函数的贪婪广度优先搜索 (GBFS) 和迭代深度优先搜索 (IDFS) 进行了比较研究，并对它们的性能进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文对BFS、GBFS（两种启发式函数）和IDFS在FOON图上的性能进行了比较研究。
AI.motivation: 机器人因信息有限难以创造性学习和适应新挑战，需通过优化搜索算法提升FOON图处理效率。
AI.method: 在FOON图框架下，对比实验测试BFS、GBFS（两种启发式函数）和IDFS的搜索性能。
AI.result: 不同算法在路径长度、计算时间和搜索效率上表现各异，启发式函数对GBFS性能有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 搜索算法的选择需根据具体任务需求（如图规模、实时性要求）进行权衡，启发式函数设计是关键优化方向。

authors_text: Ademi Adeniji,Amber Xie,Pieter Abbeel
title: Skill-Based Reinforcement Learning with Intrinsic Reward Matching
title_zh: 具有内在奖励匹配的基于技能的强化学习
abstract: While unsupervised skill discovery has shown promise in autonomously acquiring behavioral primitives, there is still a large methodological disconnect between task-agnostic skill pretraining and downstream, task-aware finetuning. We present Intrinsic Reward Matching (IRM), which unifies these two phases of learning via the $\textit{skill discriminator}$, a pretraining model component often discarded during finetuning. Conventional approaches finetune pretrained agents directly at the policy level, often relying on expensive environment rollouts to empirically determine the optimal skill. However, often the most concise yet complete description of a task is the reward function itself, and skill learning methods learn an $\textit{intrinsic}$ reward function via the discriminator that corresponds to the skill policy. We propose to leverage the skill discriminator to $\textit{match}$ the intrinsic and downstream task rewards and determine the optimal skill for an unseen task without environment samples, consequently finetuning with greater sample-efficiency. Furthermore, we generalize IRM to sequence skills for complex, long-horizon tasks and demonstrate that IRM enables us to utilize pretrained skills far more effectively than previous skill selection methods on both the Fetch tabletop and Franka Kitchen robot manipulation benchmarks.
summary: While unsupervised skill discovery has shown promise in autonomously acquiring behavioral primitives, there is still a large methodological disconnect between task-agnostic skill pretraining and downstream, task-aware finetuning. We present Intrinsic Reward Matching (IRM), which unifies these two phases of learning via the $\textit{skill discriminator}$, a pretraining model component often discarded during finetuning. Conventional approaches finetune pretrained agents directly at the policy level, often relying on expensive environment rollouts to empirically determine the optimal skill. However, often the most concise yet complete description of a task is the reward function itself, and skill learning methods learn an $\textit{intrinsic}$ reward function via the discriminator that corresponds to the skill policy. We propose to leverage the skill discriminator to $\textit{match}$ the intrinsic and downstream task rewards and determine the optimal skill for an unseen task without environment samples, consequently finetuning with greater sample-efficiency. Furthermore, we generalize IRM to sequence skills for complex, long-horizon tasks and demonstrate that IRM enables us to utilize pretrained skills far more effectively than previous skill selection methods on both the Fetch tabletop and Franka Kitchen robot manipulation benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 尽管无监督技能发现在自主获取行为原语方面显示出了希望，但与任务无关的技能预训练和下游任务感知微调之间仍然存在很大的方法论脱节。我们提出了内在奖励匹配（IRM），它通过 $\textit{skill discriminator}$（一个在微调过程中经常被丢弃的预训练模型组件）统一了这两个学习阶段。传统方法直接在政策层面对预训练的智能体进行微调，通常依赖于昂贵的环境部署来凭经验确定最佳技能。然而，通常对任务最简洁但完整的描述是奖励函数本身，技能学习方法通​​过与技能策略相对应的判别器学习 $\textit{intrinsic}$ 奖励函数。我们建议利用技能鉴别器来$\textit{match}$内在和下游任务奖励，并在没有环境样本的情况下确定看不见的任务的最佳技能，从而以更高的样本效率进行微调。此外，我们将 IRM 推广到复杂、长期任务的技能排序，并证明 IRM 使我们能够在 Fetch 桌面和 Franka Kitchen 机器人操作基准上比以前的技能选择方法更有效地利用预训练的技能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为内在奖励匹配（IRM）的方法，通过技能判别器统一技能预训练与下游任务微调阶段，提升样本效率。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在微调阶段直接对预训练策略进行调整，依赖环境交互确定最优技能，效率低下。任务描述的本质是奖励函数，但现有技能学习方法未能有效利用这一特性。
AI.method: 通过技能判别器匹配内在奖励与下游任务奖励，无需环境采样即可确定最优技能；并扩展至序列技能以处理复杂长时序任务。
AI.result: 在Fetch桌面和Franka Kitchen机器人基准测试中，IRM相比先前方法更高效地利用预训练技能，显著提升样本效率。
AI.conclusion: IRM通过统一预训练与微调阶段，有效解决了技能学习中的方法论断层问题，为复杂任务提供了更高效的解决方案。

authors_text: YuXuan Liu,Nikhil Mishra,Maximilian Sieb,Yide Shentu,Pieter Abbeel,Xi Chen
title: Autoregressive Uncertainty Modeling for 3D Bounding Box Prediction
title_zh: 用于 3D 边界框预测的自回归不确定性建模
comment: In ECCV 2022. Code and dataset are available at https://bbox.yuxuanliu.com
comments: In ECCV 2022. Code and dataset are available at https://bbox.yuxuanliu.com
abstract: 3D bounding boxes are a widespread intermediate representation in many computer vision applications. However, predicting them is a challenging task, largely due to partial observability, which motivates the need for a strong sense of uncertainty. While many recent methods have explored better architectures for consuming sparse and unstructured point cloud data, we hypothesize that there is room for improvement in the modeling of the output distribution and explore how this can be achieved using an autoregressive prediction head. Additionally, we release a simulated dataset, COB-3D, which highlights new types of ambiguity that arise in real-world robotics applications, where 3D bounding box prediction has largely been underexplored. We propose methods for leveraging our autoregressive model to make high confidence predictions and meaningful uncertainty measures, achieving strong results on SUN-RGBD, Scannet, KITTI, and our new dataset.
summary: 3D bounding boxes are a widespread intermediate representation in many computer vision applications. However, predicting them is a challenging task, largely due to partial observability, which motivates the need for a strong sense of uncertainty. While many recent methods have explored better architectures for consuming sparse and unstructured point cloud data, we hypothesize that there is room for improvement in the modeling of the output distribution and explore how this can be achieved using an autoregressive prediction head. Additionally, we release a simulated dataset, COB-3D, which highlights new types of ambiguity that arise in real-world robotics applications, where 3D bounding box prediction has largely been underexplored. We propose methods for leveraging our autoregressive model to make high confidence predictions and meaningful uncertainty measures, achieving strong results on SUN-RGBD, Scannet, KITTI, and our new dataset.
abstract_zh: 3D 边界框是许多计算机视觉应用中广泛使用的中间表示。然而，预测它们是一项具有挑战性的任务，很大程度上是由于部分可观察性，这激发了对强烈不确定性的需求。虽然许多最近的方法已经探索了更好的架构来消耗稀疏和非结构化的点云数据，但我们假设输出分布的建模还有改进的空间，并探索如何使用自回归预测头来实现这一点。此外，我们还发布了一个模拟数据集 COB-3D，它突出显示了现实世界机器人应用中出现的新型模糊性，其中 3D 边界框预测在很大程度上尚未得到充分探索。我们提出了利用自回归模型进行高置信度预测和有意义的不确定性测量的方法，在 SUN-RGBD、Scannet、KITTI 和我们的新数据集上取得了良好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自回归不确定性的建模方法，用于改进3D边界框预测任务。
AI.motivation: 由于部分可观测性导致3D边界框预测困难，现有方法在输出分布建模方面存在不足，需更精确的不确定性估计。
AI.method: 设计自回归预测头以建模输出分布，并发布包含现实机器人应用新歧义类型的COB-3D数据集。
AI.result: 在SUN-RGBD、Scannet、KITTI及新数据集COB-3D上均取得优异预测性能和不确定性度量结果。
AI.conclusion: 自回归不确定性建模有效提升预测可靠性，新数据集为未来研究提供重要基准。

search_text: Autoregressive Uncertainty Modeling for 3D Bounding Box Prediction 用于 3D 边界框预测的自回归不确定性建模 3D bounding boxes are a widespread intermediate representation in many computer vision applications. However, predicting them is a challenging task, largely due to partial observability, which motivates the need for a strong sense of uncertainty. While many recent methods have explored better architectures for consuming sparse and unstructured point cloud data, we hypothesize that there is room for improvement in the modeling of the output distribution and explore how this can be achieved using an autoregressive prediction head. Additionally, we release a simulated dataset, COB-3D, which highlights new types of ambiguity that arise in real-world robotics applications, where 3D bounding box prediction has largely been underexplored. We propose methods for leveraging our autoregressive model to make high confidence predictions and meaningful uncertainty measures, achieving strong results on SUN-RGBD, Scannet, KITTI, and our new dataset. 3D 边界框是许多计算机视觉应用中广泛使用的中间表示。然而，预测它们是一项具有挑战性的任务，很大程度上是由于部分可观察性，这激发了对强烈不确定性的需求。虽然许多最近的方法已经探索了更好的架构来消耗稀疏和非结构化的点云数据，但我们假设输出分布的建模还有改进的空间，并探索如何使用自回归预测头来实现这一点。此外，我们还发布了一个模拟数据集 COB-3D，它突出显示了现实世界机器人应用中出现的新型模糊性，其中 3D 边界框预测在很大程度上尚未得到充分探索。我们提出了利用自回归模型进行高置信度预测和有意义的不确定性测量的方法，在 SUN-RGBD、Scannet、KITTI 和我们的新数据集上取得了良好的结果。 本文提出一种基于自回归不确定性的建模方法，用于改进3D边界框预测任务。 YuXuan Liu,Nikhil Mishra,Maximilian Sieb,Yide Shentu,Pieter Abbeel,Xi Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Jing Huang,Kevin J Liang,Rama Kovvuri,Tal Hassner
title: Task Grouping for Multilingual Text Recognition
title_zh: 多语言文本识别的任务分组
abstract: Most existing OCR methods focus on alphanumeric characters due to the popularity of English and numbers, as well as their corresponding datasets. On extending the characters to more languages, recent methods have shown that training different scripts with different recognition heads can greatly improve the end-to-end recognition accuracy compared to combining characters from all languages in the same recognition head. However, we postulate that similarities between some languages could allow sharing of model parameters and benefit from joint training. Determining language groupings, however, is not immediately obvious. To this end, we propose an automatic method for multilingual text recognition with a task grouping and assignment module using Gumbel-Softmax, introducing a task grouping loss and weighted recognition loss to allow for simultaneous training of the models and grouping modules. Experiments on MLT19 lend evidence to our hypothesis that there is a middle ground between combining every task together and separating every task that achieves a better configuration of task grouping/separation.
summary: Most existing OCR methods focus on alphanumeric characters due to the popularity of English and numbers, as well as their corresponding datasets. On extending the characters to more languages, recent methods have shown that training different scripts with different recognition heads can greatly improve the end-to-end recognition accuracy compared to combining characters from all languages in the same recognition head. However, we postulate that similarities between some languages could allow sharing of model parameters and benefit from joint training. Determining language groupings, however, is not immediately obvious. To this end, we propose an automatic method for multilingual text recognition with a task grouping and assignment module using Gumbel-Softmax, introducing a task grouping loss and weighted recognition loss to allow for simultaneous training of the models and grouping modules. Experiments on MLT19 lend evidence to our hypothesis that there is a middle ground between combining every task together and separating every task that achieves a better configuration of task grouping/separation.
abstract_zh: 由于英语和数字的流行，大多数现有的 OCR 方法都专注于字母数字字符及其相应的数据集。在将字符扩展到更多语言方面，最近的方法表明，与在同一识别头中组合来自所有语言的字符相比，使用不同的识别头训练不同的文字可以大大提高端到端的识别精度。然而，我们假设某些语言之间的相似性可以允许共享模型参数并从联合训练中受益。然而，确定语言分组并不是立即显而易见的。为此，我们提出了一种使用 Gumbel-Softmax 的任务分组和分配模块的多语言文本自动识别方法，引入任务分组损失和加权识别损失，以允许同时训练模型和分组模块。 MLT19 上的实验为我们的假设提供了证据，即在将每个任务组合在一起和分离每个任务之间存在一个中间立场，以实现更好的任务分组/分离配置。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多语言文本识别的任务分组方法，通过自动分组提升识别准确率
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多语言时要么合并所有语言导致准确率下降，要么完全分离无法共享参数，需找到中间平衡点
AI.method: 设计基于Gumbel-Softmax的任务分组模块，结合任务分组损失与加权识别损失，实现模型与分组模块的联合训练
AI.result: 在MLT19数据集上验证了中间分组策略优于全合并或全分离方案
AI.conclusion: 证明存在平衡参数共享与任务独立性的最优分组策略，为多语言OCR提供新思路

authors_text: Wisdom C. Agboh,Satvik Sharma,Kishore Srinivas,Mallika Parulekar,Gaurav Datta,Tianshuang Qiu,Jeffrey Ichnowski,Eugen Solowjow,Mehmet Dogar,Ken Goldberg
title: Learning to Efficiently Plan Robust Frictional Multi-Object Grasps
title_zh: 学习有效地规划稳健的摩擦多物体抓取
abstract: We consider a decluttering problem where multiple rigid convex polygonal objects rest in randomly placed positions and orientations on a planar surface and must be efficiently transported to a packing box using both single and multi-object grasps. Prior work considered frictionless multi-object grasping. In this paper, we introduce friction to increase the number of potential grasps for a given group of objects, and thus increase picks per hour. We train a neural network using real examples to plan robust multi-object grasps. In physical experiments, we find a 13.7% increase in success rate, a 1.6x increase in picks per hour, and a 6.3x decrease in grasp planning time compared to prior work on multi-object grasping. Compared to single-object grasping, we find a 3.1x increase in picks per hour.
summary: We consider a decluttering problem where multiple rigid convex polygonal objects rest in randomly placed positions and orientations on a planar surface and must be efficiently transported to a packing box using both single and multi-object grasps. Prior work considered frictionless multi-object grasping. In this paper, we introduce friction to increase the number of potential grasps for a given group of objects, and thus increase picks per hour. We train a neural network using real examples to plan robust multi-object grasps. In physical experiments, we find a 13.7% increase in success rate, a 1.6x increase in picks per hour, and a 6.3x decrease in grasp planning time compared to prior work on multi-object grasping. Compared to single-object grasping, we find a 3.1x increase in picks per hour.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑一个整理问题，其中多个刚性凸多边形物体以随机放置的位置和方向放置在平面上，并且必须使用单个和多个物体抓取来有效地运输到包装箱。之前的工作考虑了无摩擦的多物体抓取。在本文中，我们引入摩擦力来增加给定一组物体的潜在抓取次数，从而增加每小时的抓取次数。我们使用真实的例子训练神经网络来规划鲁棒的多对象抓取。在物理实验中，我们发现与之前的多对象抓取工作相比，成功率提高了 13.7%，每小时抓取次数增加了 1.6 倍，抓取规划时间减少了 6.3 倍。与单个物体抓取相比，我们发现每小时抓取次数增加了 3.1 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用摩擦力提升多物体抓取效率的方法，通过神经网络规划鲁棒的多物体抓取策略，以提高分拣成功率和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未考虑摩擦力对多物体抓取的影响，限制了抓取可能性和效率。引入摩擦力可增加潜在抓取方式，从而提升单位时间抓取次数。
AI.method: 训练神经网络使用真实数据规划考虑摩擦力的多物体抓取方案，结合物理实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 相比现有方法，成功率提升13.7%，单位时间抓取次数提升1.6倍，规划时间减少6.3倍；相比单物体抓取，单位时间抓取次数提升3.1倍。
AI.conclusion: 考虑摩擦力的多物体抓取方法显著提升了抓取效率和鲁棒性，为实际分拣任务提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Tengfei Xue,Fan Zhang,Leo R. Zekelman,Chaoyi Zhang,Yuqian Chen,Suheyla Cetin-Karayumak,Steve Pieper,William M. Wells,Yogesh Rathi,Nikos Makris,Weidong Cai,Lauren J. O'Donnell
title: TractoSCR: A Novel Supervised Contrastive Regression Framework for Prediction of Neurocognitive Measures Using Multi-Site Harmonized Diffusion MRI Tractography
title_zh: TractoSCR：一种新颖的监督对比回归框架，用于使用多站点协调扩散 MRI 纤维束成像来预测神经认知测量
abstract: Neuroimaging-based prediction of neurocognitive measures is valuable for studying how the brain's structure relates to cognitive function. However, the accuracy of prediction using popular linear regression models is relatively low. We propose a novel deep regression method, namely TractoSCR, that allows full supervision for contrastive learning in regression tasks using diffusion MRI tractography. TractoSCR performs supervised contrastive learning by using the absolute difference between continuous regression labels (i.e. neurocognitive scores) to determine positive and negative pairs. We apply TractoSCR to analyze a large-scale dataset including multi-site harmonized diffusion MRI and neurocognitive data from 8735 participants in the Adolescent Brain Cognitive Development (ABCD) Study. We extract white matter microstructural measures using a fine parcellation of white matter tractography into fiber clusters. Using these measures, we predict three scores related to domains of higher-order cognition (general cognitive ability, executive function, and learning/memory). To identify important fiber clusters for prediction of these neurocognitive scores, we propose a permutation feature importance method for high-dimensional data. We find that TractoSCR improves the accuracy of neurocognitive score prediction compared to other state-of-the-art methods. We find that the most predictive fiber clusters are predominantly located within the superficial white matter and projection tracts, particularly the superficial frontal white matter and striato-frontal connections. Overall, our results demonstrate the utility of contrastive representation learning methods for regression, and in particular for improving neuroimaging-based prediction of higher-order cognitive abilities.
summary: Neuroimaging-based prediction of neurocognitive measures is valuable for studying how the brain's structure relates to cognitive function. However, the accuracy of prediction using popular linear regression models is relatively low. We propose a novel deep regression method, namely TractoSCR, that allows full supervision for contrastive learning in regression tasks using diffusion MRI tractography. TractoSCR performs supervised contrastive learning by using the absolute difference between continuous regression labels (i.e. neurocognitive scores) to determine positive and negative pairs. We apply TractoSCR to analyze a large-scale dataset including multi-site harmonized diffusion MRI and neurocognitive data from 8735 participants in the Adolescent Brain Cognitive Development (ABCD) Study. We extract white matter microstructural measures using a fine parcellation of white matter tractography into fiber clusters. Using these measures, we predict three scores related to domains of higher-order cognition (general cognitive ability, executive function, and learning/memory). To identify important fiber clusters for prediction of these neurocognitive scores, we propose a permutation feature importance method for high-dimensional data. We find that TractoSCR improves the accuracy of neurocognitive score prediction compared to other state-of-the-art methods. We find that the most predictive fiber clusters are predominantly located within the superficial white matter and projection tracts, particularly the superficial frontal white matter and striato-frontal connections. Overall, our results demonstrate the utility of contrastive representation learning methods for regression, and in particular for improving neuroimaging-based prediction of higher-order cognitive abilities.
abstract_zh: 基于神经影像的神经认知测量预测对于研究大脑结构与认知功能的关系很有价值。然而，使用流行的线性回归模型进行预测的准确性相对较低。我们提出了一种新颖的深度回归方法，即 TractoSCR，它允许使用扩散 MRI 纤维束成像对回归任务中的对比学习进行全面监督。 TractoSCR 通过使用连续回归标签（即神经认知分数）之间的绝对差来确定正负对，从而执行监督对比学习。我们应用 TractoSCR 分析大规模数据集，包括来自青少年大脑认知发展 (ABCD) 研究的 8735 名参与者的多部位协调扩散 MRI 和神经认知数据。我们使用白质纤维束成像的精细分割来提取白质微观结构测量。使用这些措施，我们预测与高阶认知领域（一般认知能力、执行功能和学习/记忆）相关的三个分数。为了识别用于预测这些神经认知评分的重要纤维簇，我们提出了一种用于高维数据的排列特征重要性方法。我们发现，与其他最先进的方法相比，TractoSCR 提高了神经认知评分预测的准确性。我们发现最具预测性的纤维簇主要位于浅层白质和投射束内，特别是浅层额叶白质和纹状体-额叶连接。总的来说，我们的结果证明了对比表示学习方法在回归中的实用性，特别是在改善基于神经影像的高阶认知能力预测方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型监督对比回归框架TractoSCR，用于利用多中心协调扩散MRI纤维追踪数据预测神经认知指标。
AI.motivation: 传统线性回归模型在预测神经认知指标时准确性较低，需开发更高效的深度回归方法以提升预测性能。
AI.method: 基于扩散MRI纤维追踪数据，通过监督对比学习利用连续回归标签的绝对差异构建正负样本对，结合高维数据的置换特征重要性方法筛选关键纤维簇。
AI.result: TractoSCR在预测高级认知能力（一般认知能力、执行功能、学习/记忆）相关分数时优于现有方法，关键预测纤维簇主要位于浅层白质和投射束（如额叶浅层白质和纹状体-额叶连接）。
AI.conclusion: 对比表示学习方法在回归任务中有效，尤其适用于提升基于神经影像的高级认知能力预测精度。

authors_text: Jarosław Pawłowski,Mateusz Krawczyk
title: Identification of quantum entanglement with Siamese convolutional neural networks and semi-supervised learning
title_zh: 用连体卷积神经网络和半监督学习识别量子纠缠
comment: Updated version with improved models; 12 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables
comments: Updated version with improved models; 12 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables
abstract: Quantum entanglement is a fundamental property commonly used in various quantum information protocols and algorithms. Nonetheless, the problem of identifying entanglement has still not reached a general solution for systems larger than $2\times3$. In this study, we use deep convolutional NNs, a type of supervised machine learning, to identify quantum entanglement for any bipartition in a 3-qubit system. We demonstrate that training the model on synthetically generated datasets of random density matrices excluding challenging positive-under-partial-transposition entangled states (PPTES), which cannot be identified (and correctly labeled) in general, leads to good model accuracy even for PPTES states, that were outside the training data. Our aim is to enhance the model's generalization on PPTES. By applying entanglement-preserving symmetry operations through a triple Siamese network trained in a semi-supervised manner, we improve the model's accuracy and ability to recognize PPTES. Moreover, by constructing an ensemble of Siamese models, even better generalization is observed, in analogy with the idea of finding separate types of entanglement witnesses for different classes of states.
summary: Quantum entanglement is a fundamental property commonly used in various quantum information protocols and algorithms. Nonetheless, the problem of identifying entanglement has still not reached a general solution for systems larger than $2\times3$. In this study, we use deep convolutional NNs, a type of supervised machine learning, to identify quantum entanglement for any bipartition in a 3-qubit system. We demonstrate that training the model on synthetically generated datasets of random density matrices excluding challenging positive-under-partial-transposition entangled states (PPTES), which cannot be identified (and correctly labeled) in general, leads to good model accuracy even for PPTES states, that were outside the training data. Our aim is to enhance the model's generalization on PPTES. By applying entanglement-preserving symmetry operations through a triple Siamese network trained in a semi-supervised manner, we improve the model's accuracy and ability to recognize PPTES. Moreover, by constructing an ensemble of Siamese models, even better generalization is observed, in analogy with the idea of finding separate types of entanglement witnesses for different classes of states.
abstract_zh: 量子纠缠是各种量子信息协议和算法中常用的基本属性。尽管如此，对于大于$2\times3$的系统，识别纠缠的问题仍然没有达到通用的解决方案。在这项研究中，我们使用深度卷积神经网络（一种监督机器学习）来识别 3 量子位系统中任何二分的量子纠缠。我们证明，在综合生成的随机密度矩阵数据集上训练模型，排除通常无法识别（和正确标记）的具有挑战性的正下部分转置纠缠态（PPTES），即使对于训练数据之外的 PPTES 态，也能获得良好的模型精度。我们的目标是增强模型在 PPTES 上的泛化能力。通过以半监督方式训练的三连体网络应用保持纠缠的对称操作，我们提高了模型的准确性和识别 PPTES 的能力。此外，通过构建连体模型的集合，可以观察到更好的概括，类似于为不同类别的国家寻找不同类型的纠缠证人的想法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用Siamese卷积神经网络和半监督学习方法，用于识别3量子位系统中的量子纠缠态。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效识别大于2×3系统的量子纠缠态，尤其是难以处理部分转置正（PPTES）纠缠态。
AI.method: 通过合成不含PPTES的密度矩阵数据集训练模型，并利用保持纠缠对称性的三重Siamese网络进行半监督学习，结合模型集成提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 模型在未包含于训练数据的PPTES态上仍表现出较高准确率，验证了方法对复杂纠缠态的识别能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过网络结构设计和半监督学习策略，有效提升了量子纠缠识别的泛化能力，为复杂系统提供了新思路。

authors_text: Akash Nagaraj,Mukund Sood,Chetna Sureka,Gowri Srinivasa
title: Real-time Action Recognition for Fine-Grained Actions and The Hand Wash Dataset
title_zh: 细粒度动作和洗手数据集的实时动作识别
comment: This paper was originally written in early 2020
comments: This paper was originally written in early 2020
abstract: In this paper we present a three-stream algorithm for real-time action recognition and a new dataset of handwash videos, with the intent of aligning action recognition with real-world constraints to yield effective conclusions. A three-stream fusion algorithm is proposed, which runs both accurately and efficiently, in real-time even on low-powered systems such as a Raspberry Pi. The cornerstone of the proposed algorithm is the incorporation of both spatial and temporal information, as well as the information of the objects in a video while using an efficient architecture, and Optical Flow computation to achieve commendable results in real-time. The results achieved by this algorithm are benchmarked on the UCF-101 as well as the HMDB-51 datasets, achieving an accuracy of 92.7% and 64.9% respectively. An important point to note is that the algorithm is novel in the aspect that it is also able to learn the intricate differences between extremely similar actions, which would be difficult even for the human eye. Additionally, noticing a dearth in the number of datasets for the recognition of very similar or fine-grained actions, this paper also introduces a new dataset that is made publicly available, the Hand Wash Dataset with the intent of introducing a new benchmark for fine-grained action recognition tasks in the future.
summary: In this paper we present a three-stream algorithm for real-time action recognition and a new dataset of handwash videos, with the intent of aligning action recognition with real-world constraints to yield effective conclusions. A three-stream fusion algorithm is proposed, which runs both accurately and efficiently, in real-time even on low-powered systems such as a Raspberry Pi. The cornerstone of the proposed algorithm is the incorporation of both spatial and temporal information, as well as the information of the objects in a video while using an efficient architecture, and Optical Flow computation to achieve commendable results in real-time. The results achieved by this algorithm are benchmarked on the UCF-101 as well as the HMDB-51 datasets, achieving an accuracy of 92.7% and 64.9% respectively. An important point to note is that the algorithm is novel in the aspect that it is also able to learn the intricate differences between extremely similar actions, which would be difficult even for the human eye. Additionally, noticing a dearth in the number of datasets for the recognition of very similar or fine-grained actions, this paper also introduces a new dataset that is made publicly available, the Hand Wash Dataset with the intent of introducing a new benchmark for fine-grained action recognition tasks in the future.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于实时动作识别的三流算法和一个新的洗手视频数据集，旨在将动作识别与现实世界的约束相结合，以得出有效的结论。提出了一种三流融合算法，即使在 Raspberry Pi 等低功耗系统上，该算法也能实时准确、高效地运行。该算法的基石是结合空间和时间信息以及视频中对象的信息，同时使用高效的架构和光流计算来实时实现值得称赞的结果。该算法取得的结果在 UCF-101 和 HMDB-51 数据集上进行基准测试，准确率分别达到 92.7% 和 64.9%。需要注意的重要一点是，该算法的新颖之处在于它还能够学习极其相似的动作之间的复杂差异，而这即使对于人眼来说也是困难的。此外，注意到用于识别非常相似或细粒度动作的数据集数量匮乏，本文还引入了一个公开可用的新数据集，即洗手数据集，旨在为未来的细粒度动作识别任务引入新的基准。

AI.motivation: 现有动作识别算法难以满足实时性需求且缺乏精细动作数据集，需结合时空信息与对象特征提升识别精度并填补数据空白。
AI.method: 设计三流融合架构，整合空间信息、时间信息及物体特征，结合光流计算实现低功耗设备上的实时高效识别。
AI.result: 在UCF-101和HMDB-51数据集上分别达到92.7%和64.9%准确率，可区分细微动作差异，并公开Hand Wash数据集作为新基准。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效平衡了实时性与精度，新数据集为未来精细动作识别研究提供了重要基准支持。

search_text: Real-time Action Recognition for Fine-Grained Actions and The Hand Wash Dataset 细粒度动作和洗手数据集的实时动作识别 In this paper we present a three-stream algorithm for real-time action recognition and a new dataset of handwash videos, with the intent of aligning action recognition with real-world constraints to yield effective conclusions. A three-stream fusion algorithm is proposed, which runs both accurately and efficiently, in real-time even on low-powered systems such as a Raspberry Pi. The cornerstone of the proposed algorithm is the incorporation of both spatial and temporal information, as well as the information of the objects in a video while using an efficient architecture, and Optical Flow computation to achieve commendable results in real-time. The results achieved by this algorithm are benchmarked on the UCF-101 as well as the HMDB-51 datasets, achieving an accuracy of 92.7% and 64.9% respectively. An important point to note is that the algorithm is novel in the aspect that it is also able to learn the intricate differences between extremely similar actions, which would be difficult even for the human eye. Additionally, noticing a dearth in the number of datasets for the recognition of very similar or fine-grained actions, this paper also introduces a new dataset that is made publicly available, the Hand Wash Dataset with the intent of introducing a new benchmark for fine-grained action recognition tasks in the future. 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于实时动作识别的三流算法和一个新的洗手视频数据集，旨在将动作识别与现实世界的约束相结合，以得出有效的结论。提出了一种三流融合算法，即使在 Raspberry Pi 等低功耗系统上，该算法也能实时准确、高效地运行。该算法的基石是结合空间和时间信息以及视频中对象的信息，同时使用高效的架构和光流计算来实时实现值得称赞的结果。该算法取得的结果在 UCF-101 和 HMDB-51 数据集上进行基准测试，准确率分别达到 92.7% 和 64.9%。需要注意的重要一点是，该算法的新颖之处在于它还能够学习极其相似的动作之间的复杂差异，而这即使对于人眼来说也是困难的。此外，注意到用于识别非常相似或细粒度动作的数据集数量匮乏，本文还引入了一个公开可用的新数据集，即洗手数据集，旨在为未来的细粒度动作识别任务引入新的基准。 本文提出一种实时动作识别的三流融合算法，并发布用于精细动作识别的Hand Wash数据集。 Akash Nagaraj,Mukund Sood,Chetna Sureka,Gowri Srinivasa cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Akash Nagaraj,Mukund Sood,Bhagya M Patil
title: A Concise Introduction to Reinforcement Learning in Robotics
title_zh: 机器人强化学习简明介绍
comment: This paper was originally written in 2019
comments: This paper was originally written in 2019
abstract: One of the biggest hurdles robotics faces is the facet of sophisticated and hard-to-engineer behaviors. Reinforcement learning offers a set of tools, and a framework to address this problem. In parallel, the misgivings of robotics offer a solid testing ground and evaluation metric for advancements in reinforcement learning. The two disciplines go hand-in-hand, much like the fields of Mathematics and Physics. By means of this survey paper, we aim to invigorate links between the research communities of the two disciplines by focusing on the work done in reinforcement learning for locomotive and control aspects of robotics. Additionally, we aim to highlight not only the notable successes but also the key challenges of the application of Reinforcement Learning in Robotics. This paper aims to serve as a reference guide for researchers in reinforcement learning applied to the field of robotics. The literature survey is at a fairly introductory level, aimed at aspiring researchers. Appropriately, we have covered the most essential concepts required for research in the field of reinforcement learning, with robotics in mind. Through a thorough analysis of this problem, we are able to manifest how reinforcement learning could be applied profitably, and also focus on open-ended questions, as well as the potential for future research.

Through a thorough analysis of this problem, we are able to manifest how reinforcement learning could be applied profitably, and also focus on open-ended questions, as well as the potential for future research.
abstract_zh: 机器人技术面临的最大障碍之一是复杂且难以设计的行为。强化学习提供了一套工具和框架来解决这个问题。与此同时，机器人技术的疑虑为强化学习的进步提供了坚实的测试基础和评估指标。这两个学科齐头并进，就像数学和物理领域一样。通过这篇调查论文，我们的目标是通过重点关注机器人技术的机车和控制方面的强化学习方面所做的工作，来激活两个学科研究界之间的联系。此外，我们的目标不仅是强调强化学习在机器人技术中应用所取得的显着成功，而且还强调其面临的关键挑战。本文旨在为强化学习应用于机器人领域的研究人员提供参考指南。文献调查处于相当介绍性的水平，针对有抱负的研究人员。适当地，我们已经涵盖了强化学习领域研究所需的最基本概念，并考虑到了机器人技术。通过对这个问题的彻底分析，我们能够阐明强化学习如何能够有利可图地应用，并关注开放式问题以及未来研究的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在介绍强化学习在机器人领域的应用，作为参考指南，连接两个研究社区，讨论其成功案例、挑战及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 为解决机器人复杂行为设计难题，并推动强化学习发展，通过相互促进加强两领域联系。
AI.method: 采用文献综述方法，介绍强化学习核心概念，分析其在机器人运动控制中的应用实例，探讨关键挑战与未来研究方向。
AI.result: 明确了强化学习在机器人领域的应用潜力，指出了当前面临的关键挑战及未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习与机器人学相辅相成，需进一步研究解决现有挑战，以推动两领域协同发展。

authors_text: Benjamin Feuer,Ameya Joshi,Chinmay Hegde
title: Caption supervision enables robust learners
title_zh: 字幕监督可以增强学习者的能力
abstract: Vision language (VL) models like CLIP are robust to natural distribution shifts, in part because CLIP learns on unstructured data using a technique called caption supervision; the model inteprets image-linked texts as ground-truth labels. In a carefully controlled comparison study, we show that caption-supervised CNNs trained on a standard cross-entropy loss (with image labels assigned by scanning captions for class names) can exhibit greater distributional robustness than VL models trained on the same data. To facilitate future experiments with high-accuracy caption-supervised models, we introduce CaptionNet (https://github.com/penfever/CaptionNet/), which includes a class-balanced, fully supervised dataset with over 50,000 new human-labeled ImageNet-compliant samples which includes web-scraped captions. In a series of experiments on CaptionNet, we show how the choice of loss function, data filtration and supervision strategy enable robust computer vision. We also provide the codebase necessary to reproduce our experiments at VL Hub (https://github.com/penfever/vlhub/).
summary: Vision language (VL) models like CLIP are robust to natural distribution shifts, in part because CLIP learns on unstructured data using a technique called caption supervision; the model inteprets image-linked texts as ground-truth labels. In a carefully controlled comparison study, we show that caption-supervised CNNs trained on a standard cross-entropy loss (with image labels assigned by scanning captions for class names) can exhibit greater distributional robustness than VL models trained on the same data. To facilitate future experiments with high-accuracy caption-supervised models, we introduce CaptionNet (https://github.com/penfever/CaptionNet/), which includes a class-balanced, fully supervised dataset with over 50,000 new human-labeled ImageNet-compliant samples which includes web-scraped captions. In a series of experiments on CaptionNet, we show how the choice of loss function, data filtration and supervision strategy enable robust computer vision. We also provide the codebase necessary to reproduce our experiments at VL Hub (https://github.com/penfever/vlhub/).
abstract_zh: 像 CLIP 这样的视觉语言 (VL) 模型对于自然分布变化具有鲁棒性，部分原因是 CLIP 使用一种称为标题监督的技术来学习非结构化数据；该模型将图像链接文本解释为真实标签。在一项仔细控制的比较研究中，我们表明，在标准交叉熵损失（通过扫描类名标题分配图像标签）上训练的标题监督 CNN 可以比在相同数据上训练的 VL 模型表现出更好的分布鲁棒性。为了促进未来高精度字幕监督模型的实验，我们引入了 CaptionNet (https://github.com/penfever/CaptionNet/)，其中包括一个类平衡、完全监督的数据集，其中包含超过 50,000 个新的人类标记 ImageNet 兼容样本，其中包括网络抓取的字幕。在 CaptionNet 上的一系列实验中，我们展示了损失函数的选择、数据过滤和监督策略如何实现稳健的计算机视觉。我们还提供了在 VL Hub (https://github.com/penfever/vlhub/) 上重现实验所需的代码库。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过caption supervision（文本描述监督）训练视觉模型的鲁棒性，提出了一种新的数据集CaptionNet并验证了不同训练策略的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（如CLIP）依赖未结构化数据训练，但其分布外鲁棒性可能受限。作者希望通过结构化caption监督方法提升模型鲁棒性，并探索更有效的训练策略。
AI.method: 基于标准交叉熵损失训练caption监督CNN，构建包含5万+人工标注样本的CaptionNet数据集，通过对比实验分析损失函数、数据过滤和监督策略对模型鲁棒性的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，caption监督CNN在分布外数据上优于同数据训练的VL模型，新数据集和代码库为后续研究提供了基础。
AI.conclusion: caption supervision能有效提升视觉模型的分布鲁棒性，合理选择损失函数和数据策略是关键，CaptionNet和代码库为领域发展提供了重要工具。

search_text: Caption supervision enables robust learners 字幕监督可以增强学习者的能力 Vision language (VL) models like CLIP are robust to natural distribution shifts, in part because CLIP learns on unstructured data using a technique called caption supervision; the model inteprets image-linked texts as ground-truth labels. In a carefully controlled comparison study, we show that caption-supervised CNNs trained on a standard cross-entropy loss (with image labels assigned by scanning captions for class names) can exhibit greater distributional robustness than VL models trained on the same data. To facilitate future experiments with high-accuracy caption-supervised models, we introduce CaptionNet (https://github.com/penfever/CaptionNet/), which includes a class-balanced, fully supervised dataset with over 50,000 new human-labeled ImageNet-compliant samples which includes web-scraped captions. In a series of experiments on CaptionNet, we show how the choice of loss function, data filtration and supervision strategy enable robust computer vision. We also provide the codebase necessary to reproduce our experiments at VL Hub (https://github.com/penfever/vlhub/). 像 CLIP 这样的视觉语言 (VL) 模型对于自然分布变化具有鲁棒性，部分原因是 CLIP 使用一种称为标题监督的技术来学习非结构化数据；该模型将图像链接文本解释为真实标签。在一项仔细控制的比较研究中，我们表明，在标准交叉熵损失（通过扫描类名标题分配图像标签）上训练的标题监督 CNN 可以比在相同数据上训练的 VL 模型表现出更好的分布鲁棒性。为了促进未来高精度字幕监督模型的实验，我们引入了 CaptionNet (https://github.com/penfever/CaptionNet/)，其中包括一个类平衡、完全监督的数据集，其中包含超过 50,000 个新的人类标记 ImageNet 兼容样本，其中包括网络抓取的字幕。在 CaptionNet 上的一系列实验中，我们展示了损失函数的选择、数据过滤和监督策略如何实现稳健的计算机视觉。我们还提供了在 VL Hub (https://github.com/penfever/vlhub/) 上重现实验所需的代码库。 本文研究了通过caption supervision（文本描述监督）训练视觉模型的鲁棒性，提出了一种新的数据集CaptionNet并验证了不同训练策略的效果。 Benjamin Feuer,Ameya Joshi,Chinmay Hegde cs.CV

authors_text: Axel Levy,Gordon Wetzstein,Julien Martel,Frederic Poitevin,Ellen D. Zhong
title: Amortized Inference for Heterogeneous Reconstruction in Cryo-EM
title_zh: Cryo-EM 中异质重建的摊销推理
abstract: Cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) is an imaging modality that provides unique insights into the dynamics of proteins and other building blocks of life. The algorithmic challenge of jointly estimating the poses, 3D structure, and conformational heterogeneity of a biomolecule from millions of noisy and randomly oriented 2D projections in a computationally efficient manner, however, remains unsolved. Our method, cryoFIRE, performs ab initio heterogeneous reconstruction with unknown poses in an amortized framework, thereby avoiding the computationally expensive step of pose search while enabling the analysis of conformational heterogeneity. Poses and conformation are jointly estimated by an encoder while a physics-based decoder aggregates the images into an implicit neural representation of the conformational space. We show that our method can provide one order of magnitude speedup on datasets containing millions of images without any loss of accuracy. We validate that the joint estimation of poses and conformations can be amortized over the size of the dataset. For the first time, we prove that an amortized method can extract interpretable dynamic information from experimental datasets.
summary: Cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) is an imaging modality that provides unique insights into the dynamics of proteins and other building blocks of life. The algorithmic challenge of jointly estimating the poses, 3D structure, and conformational heterogeneity of a biomolecule from millions of noisy and randomly oriented 2D projections in a computationally efficient manner, however, remains unsolved. Our method, cryoFIRE, performs ab initio heterogeneous reconstruction with unknown poses in an amortized framework, thereby avoiding the computationally expensive step of pose search while enabling the analysis of conformational heterogeneity. Poses and conformation are jointly estimated by an encoder while a physics-based decoder aggregates the images into an implicit neural representation of the conformational space. We show that our method can provide one order of magnitude speedup on datasets containing millions of images without any loss of accuracy. We validate that the joint estimation of poses and conformations can be amortized over the size of the dataset. For the first time, we prove that an amortized method can extract interpretable dynamic information from experimental datasets.
abstract_zh: 冷冻电子显微镜 (cryo-EM) 是一种成像方式，可为蛋白质和其他生命构建模块的动力学提供独特的见解。然而，以计算有效的方式从数百万个噪声和随机定向的 2D 投影中联合估计生物分子的姿态、3D 结构和构象异质性的算法挑战仍未解决。我们的方法 CryoFIRE 在摊销框架中执行未知姿势的从头开始异质重建，从而避免了计算昂贵的姿势搜索步骤，同时能够分析构象异质性。姿势和构象由编码器联合估计，而基于物理的解码器将图像聚合成构象空间的隐式神经表示。我们表明，我们的方法可以在包含数百万图像的数据集上提供一个数量级的加速，而不会损失任何准确性。我们验证了姿势和构象的联合估计可以在数据集的大小上摊销。我们第一次证明摊销方法可以从实验数据集中提取可解释的动态信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为cryoFIRE的方法，用于在低温电子显微镜（cryo-EM）中高效处理异质性重建问题，通过联合估计分子姿态和构象异质性，避免了传统方法中耗时的姿态搜索步骤。
AI.motivation: cryo-EM在解析生物分子动态结构中具有重要意义，但现有算法难以高效处理海量噪声投影图像的姿态估计与构象异质性分析，计算成本高昂。
AI.method: 基于 amortized 框架设计cryoFIRE方法，利用编码器联合估计姿态和构象，通过物理驱动的解码器将图像聚合为构象空间的隐式神经表示，实现无需显式姿态搜索的高效重建。
AI.result: 在百万级图像数据集上实现10倍加速且精度无损失，首次证明amortized方法可有效提取实验数据中的可解释动态信息，并验证了联合估计的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: amortized推理框架为cryo-EM的大规模异质性重建提供了高效解决方案，推动了生物分子动态结构解析的技术进步。

authors_text: Ruoyao Wang,Peter Jansen,Marc-Alexandre Côté,Prithviraj Ammanabrolu
title: Behavior Cloned Transformers are Neurosymbolic Reasoners
title_zh: 行为克隆变形金刚是神经符号推理机
abstract: In this work, we explore techniques for augmenting interactive agents with information from symbolic modules, much like humans use tools like calculators and GPS systems to assist with arithmetic and navigation. We test our agent's abilities in text games -- challenging benchmarks for evaluating the multi-step reasoning abilities of game agents in grounded, language-based environments. Our experimental study indicates that injecting the actions from these symbolic modules into the action space of a behavior cloned transformer agent increases performance on four text game benchmarks that test arithmetic, navigation, sorting, and common sense reasoning by an average of 22%, allowing an agent to reach the highest possible performance on unseen games. This action injection technique is easily extended to new agents, environments, and symbolic modules.
summary: In this work, we explore techniques for augmenting interactive agents with information from symbolic modules, much like humans use tools like calculators and GPS systems to assist with arithmetic and navigation. We test our agent's abilities in text games -- challenging benchmarks for evaluating the multi-step reasoning abilities of game agents in grounded, language-based environments. Our experimental study indicates that injecting the actions from these symbolic modules into the action space of a behavior cloned transformer agent increases performance on four text game benchmarks that test arithmetic, navigation, sorting, and common sense reasoning by an average of 22%, allowing an agent to reach the highest possible performance on unseen games. This action injection technique is easily extended to new agents, environments, and symbolic modules.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们探索利用符号模块中的信息增强交互式代理的技术，就像人类使用计算器和 GPS 系统等工具来辅助算术和导航一样。我们测试我们的智能体在文本游戏中的能力——具有挑战性的基准，用于评估游戏智能体在基于语言的环境中的多步推理能力。我们的实验研究表明，将这些符号模块中的动作注入到行为克隆 Transformer 代理的动作空间中，可以将测试算术、导航、排序和常识推理的四个文本游戏基准测试的性能平均提高 22%，从而使代理能够在未见过的游戏中达到尽可能高的性能。这种动作注入技术可以轻松扩展到新的代理、环境和符号模块。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过将符号模块的信息注入行为克隆的Transformer代理，提升其在文本游戏中的多步骤推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络代理在需要符号推理的任务（如算术、导航）中表现不足，需结合符号模块增强其推理能力。
AI.method: 在行为克隆的Transformer代理中注入符号模块的行动，扩展其行动空间并训练代理利用符号模块完成复杂任务。
AI.result: 在四类文本游戏基准测试中，代理性能平均提升22%，且能完成未见过的游戏任务。
AI.conclusion: 符号模块与神经网络的结合有效提升了代理的推理能力，且方法具有良好的扩展性。

authors_text: Yanbo Zhang,Sara Imari Walker
title: A Relational Macrostate Theory Guides Artificial Intelligence to Learn Macro and Design Micro
title_zh: 关系宏观状态理论指导人工智能学习宏观和设计微观
abstract: The high-dimesionality, non-linearity and emergent properties of complex systems pose a challenge to identifying general laws in the same manner that has been so successful in simpler physical systems. In Anderson's seminal work on why "more is different" he pointed to how emergent, macroscale patterns break symmetries of the underlying microscale laws. Yet, less recognized is that these large-scale, emergent patterns must also retain some symmetries of the microscale rules. Here we introduce a new, relational macrostate theory (RMT) that defines macrostates in terms of symmetries between two mutually predictive observations, and develop a machine learning architecture, MacroNet, that identifies macrostates. Using this framework, we show how macrostates can be identifed across systems ranging in complexity from the simplicity of the simple harmonic oscillator to the much more complex spatial patterning characteristic of Turing instabilities. Furthermore, we show how our framework can be used for the inverse design of microstates consistent with a given macroscopic property -- in Turing patterns this allows us to design underlying rule with a given specification of spatial patterning, and to identify which rule parameters most control these patterns. By demonstrating a general theory for how macroscopic properties emerge from conservation of symmetries in the mapping between observations, we provide a machine learning framework that allows a unified approach to identifying macrostates in systems from the simple to complex, and allows the design of new examples consistent with a given macroscopic property.

Yet, less recognized is that these large-scale, emergent patterns must also retain some symmetries of the microscale rules. Here we introduce a new, relational macrostate theory (RMT) that defines macrostates in terms of symmetries between two mutually predictive observations, and develop a machine learning architecture, MacroNet, that identifies macrostates. Using this framework, we show how macrostates can be identifed across systems ranging in complexity from the simplicity of the simple harmonic oscillator to the much more complex spatial patterning characteristic of Turing instabilities. Furthermore, we show how our framework can be used for the inverse design of microstates consistent with a given macroscopic property -- in Turing patterns this allows us to design underlying rule with a given specification of spatial patterning, and to identify which rule parameters most control these patterns. By demonstrating a general theory for how macroscopic properties emerge from conservation of symmetries in the mapping between observations, we provide a machine learning framework that allows a unified approach to identifying macrostates in systems from the simple to complex, and allows the design of new examples consistent with a given macroscopic property.
abstract_zh: 复杂系统的高维性、非线性和突现特性对以在简单物理系统中如此成功的相同方式识别一般定律提出了挑战。在安德森关于为什么“更多就是不同”的开创性著作中，他指出了新兴的宏观尺度模式如何打破潜在微观尺度规律的对称性。然而，很少有人认识到，这些大规模的新兴模式也必须保留微观规则的一些对称性。在这里，我们引入了一种新的关系宏观状态理论（RMT），该理论根据两个相互预测观察之间的对称性来定义宏观状态，并开发了一种识别宏观状态的机器学习架构 MacroNet。使用这个框架，我们展示了如何在复杂性范围从简单谐振子的简单性到图灵不稳定性的更复杂的空间模式特征的系统中识别宏观状态。此外，我们展示了我们的框架如何用于与给定宏观属性一致的微观状态的逆向设计——在图灵模式中，这使我们能够使用给定的空间图案规范来设计底层规则，并确定哪些规则参数最能控制这些模式。通过展示宏观属性如何从观察之间映射的对称性守恒中产生的一般理论，我们提供了一个机器学习框架，该框架允许采用统一的方法来识别系统中从简单到复杂的宏观状态，并允许设计与给定宏观属性一致的新示例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出关系宏观状态理论（RMT）及MacroNet架构，通过识别宏观状态的对称性，实现复杂系统宏观规律的学习与微观规则的逆向设计。
AI.motivation: 复杂系统的高维性、非线性及涌现特性使传统方法难以识别宏观规律，需建立统一框架解决宏观-微观映射中的对称性保留问题。
AI.method: 基于RMT定义宏观状态为相互预测观测间的对称性，构建MacroNet机器学习模型，结合正向识别与逆向设计方法验证理论。
AI.result: 成功在谐振子到图灵模式等多尺度系统中识别宏观状态，并实现针对图灵模式的空间规则参数逆向设计与敏感性分析。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架为从简单到复杂系统提供统一宏观状态识别方法，并支持根据宏观性质设计符合要求的微观规则。

authors_text: Pei Sun,Mingxing Tan,Weiyue Wang,Chenxi Liu,Fei Xia,Zhaoqi Leng,Dragomir Anguelov
title: SWFormer: Sparse Window Transformer for 3D Object Detection in Point Clouds
title_zh: SWFormer：用于点云中 3D 对象检测的稀疏窗口转换器
abstract: 3D object detection in point clouds is a core component for modern robotics and autonomous driving systems. A key challenge in 3D object detection comes from the inherent sparse nature of point occupancy within the 3D scene. In this paper, we propose Sparse Window Transformer (SWFormer ), a scalable and accurate model for 3D object detection, which can take full advantage of the sparsity of point clouds. Built upon the idea of window-based Transformers, SWFormer converts 3D points into sparse voxels and windows, and then processes these variable-length sparse windows efficiently using a bucketing scheme. In addition to self-attention within each spatial window, our SWFormer also captures cross-window correlation with multi-scale feature fusion and window shifting operations. To further address the unique challenge of detecting 3D objects accurately from sparse features, we propose a new voxel diffusion technique. Experimental results on the Waymo Open Dataset show our SWFormer achieves state-of-the-art 73.36 L2 mAPH on vehicle and pedestrian for 3D object detection on the official test set, outperforming all previous single-stage and two-stage models, while being much more efficient.
summary: 3D object detection in point clouds is a core component for modern robotics and autonomous driving systems. A key challenge in 3D object detection comes from the inherent sparse nature of point occupancy within the 3D scene. In this paper, we propose Sparse Window Transformer (SWFormer ), a scalable and accurate model for 3D object detection, which can take full advantage of the sparsity of point clouds. Built upon the idea of window-based Transformers, SWFormer converts 3D points into sparse voxels and windows, and then processes these variable-length sparse windows efficiently using a bucketing scheme. In addition to self-attention within each spatial window, our SWFormer also captures cross-window correlation with multi-scale feature fusion and window shifting operations. To further address the unique challenge of detecting 3D objects accurately from sparse features, we propose a new voxel diffusion technique. Experimental results on the Waymo Open Dataset show our SWFormer achieves state-of-the-art 73.36 L2 mAPH on vehicle and pedestrian for 3D object detection on the official test set, outperforming all previous single-stage and two-stage models, while being much more efficient.
abstract_zh: 点云中的 3D 物体检测是现代机器人和自动驾驶系统的核心组件。 3D 对象检测的一个关键挑战来自 3D 场景中点占用的固有稀疏性质。在本文中，我们提出了稀疏窗口变换器（SWFormer），这是一种用于 3D 对象检测的可扩展且准确的模型，可以充分利用点云的稀疏性。 SWFormer 基于基于窗口的 Transformer 的思想构建，将 3D 点转换为稀疏体素和窗口，然后使用分桶方案有效地处理这些可变长度的稀疏窗口。除了每个空间窗口内的自注意力之外，我们的 SWFormer 还通过多尺度特征融合和窗口移位操作捕获跨窗口相关性。为了进一步解决从稀疏特征中准确检测 3D 对象的独特挑战，我们提出了一种新的体素扩散技术。 Waymo 开放数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 SWFormer 在官方测试集上的车辆和行人 3D 物体检测方面实现了最先进的 73.36 L2 mAPH，优于之前所有的单阶段和两阶段模型，同时效率更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SWFormer的稀疏窗口Transformer模型，用于点云中的三维物体检测，通过利用点云的稀疏性提升检测效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 点云的稀疏性导致传统三维物体检测方法在效率和精度上面临挑战，现有模型难以兼顾计算效率与检测性能。
AI.method: 将点云转换为稀疏体素和窗口，采用分桶方案处理可变长度稀疏窗口；结合多尺度特征融合、窗口移动操作及新型体素扩散技术，增强跨窗口特征关联性。
AI.result: 在Waymo Open Dataset上，SWFormer在车辆和行人检测任务中达到73.36 L2 mAPH，超越所有单阶段和两阶段模型，且计算效率显著更高。
AI.conclusion: SWFormer通过创新性稀疏处理机制和跨窗口特征建模，在三维物体检测任务中实现了精度与效率的平衡，为实际应用提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Aleksander B G Christiansen
title: The Power of Multi-Step Vizing Chains
title_zh: 多级可视化链的强大功能
abstract: Recent papers [Ber'2022], [GP'2020], [DHZ'2019] have addressed different variants of the (Δ+ 1)-edge colouring problem by concatenating or gluing together many Vizing chains to form what Bernshteyn [Ber'2022] coined \emph{multi-step Vizing chains}. In this paper, we propose a slightly more general definition of this term. We then apply multi-step Vizing chain constructions to prove combinatorial properties of edge colourings that lead to (improved) algorithms for computing edge colouring across different models of computation. This approach seems especially powerful for constructing augmenting subgraphs which respect some notion of locality. First, we construct strictly local multi-step Vizing chains and use them to show a local version of Vizings Theorem thus confirming a recent conjecture of Bonamy, Delcourt, Lang and Postle [BDLP'2020]. Our proof is constructive and also implies an algorithm for computing such a colouring. Then, we show that for any uncoloured edge there exists an augmenting subgraph of size O(Δ^{7}\log n), answering an open problem of Bernshteyn [Ber'2022]. Chang, He, Li, Pettie and Uitto [CHLPU'2018] show a lower bound of Ω(Δ\log \frac{n}Δ) for the size of such augmenting subgraphs, so the upper bound is tight up to Δand constant factors. These ideas also extend to give a faster deterministic LOCAL algorithm for (Δ+ 1)-edge colouring running in \tilde{O}(\poly(Δ)\log^6 n) rounds. These results improve the recent breakthrough result of Bernshteyn [Ber'2022], who showed the existence of augmenting subgraphs of size O(Δ^6\log^2 n), and used these to give the first (Δ+ 1)-edge colouring algorithm in the LOCAL model running in O(\poly(Δ, \log n)) rounds. ... (see paper for the remaining part of the abstract)

In this paper, we propose a slightly more general definition of this term. We then apply multi-step Vizing chain constructions to prove combinatorial properties of edge colourings that lead to (improved) algorithms for computing edge colouring across different models of computation. This approach seems especially powerful for constructing augmenting subgraphs which respect some notion of locality. First, we construct strictly local multi-step Vizing chains and use them to show a local version of Vizings Theorem thus confirming a recent conjecture of Bonamy, Delcourt, Lang and Postle [BDLP'2020]. Our proof is constructive and also implies an algorithm for computing such a colouring. Then, we show that for any uncoloured edge there exists an augmenting subgraph of size O(Δ^{7}\log n), answering an open problem of Bernshteyn [Ber'2022]. Chang, He, Li, Pettie and Uitto [CHLPU'2018] show a lower bound of Ω(Δ\log \frac{n}Δ) for the size of such augmenting subgraphs, so the upper bound is tight up to Δand constant factors. These results improve the recent breakthrough result of Bernshteyn [Ber'2022], who showed the existence of augmenting subgraphs of size O(Δ^6\log^2 n), and used these to give the first (Δ+ 1)-edge colouring algorithm in the LOCAL model running in O(\poly(Δ, \log n)) rounds. ... abstract_zh: 最近的论文 [Ber'2022]、[GP'2020]、[DHZ'2019] 通过将许多 Vizing 链连接或粘合在一起形成 Bernshteyn [Ber'2022] 创造的 \emph{多步 Vizing 链}，解决了 (Δ+ 1) 边缘着色问题的不同变体。在本文中，我们对该术语提出了一个稍微更一般的定义。然后，我们应用多步骤 Vizing 链结构来证明边缘着色的组合属性，从而产生（改进的）跨不同计算模型计算边缘着色的算法。这种方法对于构建尊重某些局部性概念的增广子图来说似乎特别强大。首先，我们构造严格局部多步 Vizing 链，并使用它们来显示 Vizings 定理的局部版本，从而证实了 Bonamy、Delcourt、Lang 和 Postle 最近的猜想 [BDLP'2020]。我们的证明是有建设性的，并且还暗示了计算这种颜色的算法。然后，我们证明对于任何未着色的边，都存在一个大小为 O(Δ^{7}\log n) 的增广子图，回答了 Bernshteyn [Ber'2022] 的开放问题。 Chang、He、Li、Pettie 和 Uitto [CHLPU'2018] 对于此类增广子图的大小显示了 Ω(Δ\log \frac{n}Δ) 的下界，因此上限仅限于 Δ 和常数因子。这些想法还可以扩展为在 \tilde{O}(\poly(Δ)\log^6 n) 轮中运行的 (Δ+ 1) 边缘着色提供更快的确定性 LOCAL 算法。这些结果改进了 Bernshteyn [Ber'2022] 最近的突破性结果，他证明了大小为 O(Δ^6\log^2 n) 的增广子图的存在，并使用这些结果给出了在 O(\poly(Δ, \log n)) 轮中运行的 LOCAL 模型中的第一个 (Δ+ 1) 边缘着色算法。 ...（请参阅论文以了解摘要的其余部分）

AI.tldr: 本文提出多步Vizing链的广义定义，并利用其证明边着色的组合性质，从而改进不同计算模型下的边着色算法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通过连接Vizing链解决(Δ+1)-边着色问题，但需更通用的定义以提升算法效率并解决局部性问题。
AI.method: 提出广义多步Vizing链定义，构建严格局部链以证明Vizing定理的局部版本，并设计算法构造满足局部性的增广子图。
AI.result: 确认了BDLP猜想，证明任意未着色边存在O(Δ⁷logn)大小的增广子图，改进了LOCAL模型中(Δ+1)-边着色的算法复杂度至~O(poly(Δ)log⁶n)。
AI.conclusion: 多步Vizing链方法有效提升了边着色算法的效率与局部性，为分布式计算提供了新的理论工具。

authors_text: Qiong Liu,Ye Guo,Lirong Deng,Haotian Liu,Dongyu Li,Hongbin Sun
title: Reducing Action Space: Reference-Model-Assisted Deep Reinforcement Learning for Inverter-based Volt-Var Control
title_zh: 减少动作空间：基于逆变器的 Volt-Var 控制的参考模型辅助深度强化学习
abstract: Reference-model-assisted deep reinforcement learning (DRL) for inverter-based Volt-Var Control (IB-VVC) in active distribution networks is proposed. We investigate that a large action space increases the learning difficulties of DRL and degrades the optimization performance in the process of generating data and training neural networks. To reduce the action space of DRL, we design a reference-model-assisted DRL approach. We introduce definitions of the reference model, reference-model-based optimization, and reference actions. The reference-model-assisted DRL learns the residual actions between the reference actions and optimal actions, rather than learning the optimal actions directly. Since the residual actions are considerably smaller than the optimal actions for a reference model, we can design a smaller action space for the reference-model-assisted DRL. It reduces the learning difficulties of DRL and optimises the performance of the reference-model-assisted DRL approach. It is noteworthy that the reference-model-assisted DRL approach is compatible with any policy gradient DRL algorithms for continuous action problems. This work takes the soft actor-critic algorithm as an example and designs a reference-model-assisted soft actor-critic algorithm. Simulations show that 1) large action space degrades the performance of DRL in the whole training stage, and 2) reference-model-assisted DRL requires fewer iteration times and returns a better optimization performance.
summary: Reference-model-assisted deep reinforcement learning (DRL) for inverter-based Volt-Var Control (IB-VVC) in active distribution networks is proposed. We investigate that a large action space increases the learning difficulties of DRL and degrades the optimization performance in the process of generating data and training neural networks. To reduce the action space of DRL, we design a reference-model-assisted DRL approach. We introduce definitions of the reference model, reference-model-based optimization, and reference actions. The reference-model-assisted DRL learns the residual actions between the reference actions and optimal actions, rather than learning the optimal actions directly. Since the residual actions are considerably smaller than the optimal actions for a reference model, we can design a smaller action space for the reference-model-assisted DRL. It reduces the learning difficulties of DRL and optimises the performance of the reference-model-assisted DRL approach. It is noteworthy that the reference-model-assisted DRL approach is compatible with any policy gradient DRL algorithms for continuous action problems. This work takes the soft actor-critic algorithm as an example and designs a reference-model-assisted soft actor-critic algorithm. Simulations show that 1) large action space degrades the performance of DRL in the whole training stage, and 2) reference-model-assisted DRL requires fewer iteration times and returns a better optimization performance.
abstract_zh: 提出了用于主动配电网络中基于逆变器的伏特无功控制（IB-VVC）的参考模型辅助深度强化学习（DRL）。我们研究发现，较大的动作空间增加了 DRL 的学习难度，并降低了生成数据和训练神经网络过程中的优化性能。为了减少 DRL 的操作空间，我们设计了一种参考模型辅助的 DRL 方法。我们介绍参考模型的定义、基于参考模型的优化和参考操作。参考模型辅助的DRL学习参考动作和最优动作之间的残差动作，而不是直接学习最优动作。由于残差动作远小于参考模型的最优动作，因此我们可以为参考模型辅助的 DRL 设计更小的动作空间。它降低了 DRL 的学习难度并优化了参考模型辅助 DRL 方法的性能。值得注意的是，参考模型辅助的 DRL 方法与任何针对连续动作问题的策略梯度 DRL 算法兼容。本工作以软演员批评家算法为例，设计了一种参考模型辅助的软演员批评家算法。仿真表明：1）大的动作空间会降低整个训练阶段 DRL 的性能，2）参考模型辅助的 DRL 需要更少的迭代次数并返回更好的优化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于参考模型的深度强化学习方法，用于减少逆变器型电压-无功控制中的动作空间。
AI.motivation: 传统深度强化学习在处理大动作空间时面临学习困难和优化性能下降的问题，需通过减小动作空间提升效率。
AI.method: 设计参考模型辅助的深度强化学习框架，通过学习参考动作与最优动作的残差动作，构建更小的动作空间，并兼容软演员-评论家算法。
AI.result: 仿真表明大动作空间会降低DRL性能，而参考模型辅助方法减少迭代次数并提升优化效果。
AI.conclusion: 参考模型辅助的DRL有效缩小动作空间，提升优化性能，且适用于连续动作空间的策略梯度算法。

authors_text: Haiyu Wu,Grace Bezold,Manuel Günther,Terrance Boult,Michael C. King,Kevin W. Bowyer
title: Consistency and Accuracy of CelebA Attribute Values
title_zh: CelebA 属性值的一致性和准确性
abstract: We report the first systematic analysis of the experimental foundations of facial attribute classification. Two annotators independently assigning attribute values shows that only 12 of 40 common attributes are assigned values with >= 95% consistency, and three (high cheekbones, pointed nose, oval face) have essentially random consistency. Of 5,068 duplicate face appearances in CelebA, attributes have contradicting values on from 10 to 860 of the 5,068 duplicates. Manual audit of a subset of CelebA estimates error rates as high as 40% for (no beard=false), even though the labeling consistency experiment indicates that no beard could be assigned with >= 95% consistency. Selecting the mouth slightly open (MSO) for deeper analysis, we estimate the error rate for (MSO=true) at about 20% and (MSO=false) at about 2%. A corrected version of the MSO attribute values enables learning a model that achieves higher accuracy than previously reported for MSO. Corrected values for CelebA MSO are available at https://github.com/HaiyuWu/CelebAMSO.
summary: We report the first systematic analysis of the experimental foundations of facial attribute classification. Two annotators independently assigning attribute values shows that only 12 of 40 common attributes are assigned values with >= 95% consistency, and three (high cheekbones, pointed nose, oval face) have essentially random consistency. Of 5,068 duplicate face appearances in CelebA, attributes have contradicting values on from 10 to 860 of the 5,068 duplicates. Manual audit of a subset of CelebA estimates error rates as high as 40% for (no beard=false), even though the labeling consistency experiment indicates that no beard could be assigned with >= 95% consistency. Selecting the mouth slightly open (MSO) for deeper analysis, we estimate the error rate for (MSO=true) at about 20% and (MSO=false) at about 2%. A corrected version of the MSO attribute values enables learning a model that achieves higher accuracy than previously reported for MSO. Corrected values for CelebA MSO are available at https://github.com/HaiyuWu/CelebAMSO.
abstract_zh: 我们报告了对面部属性分类实验基础的首次系统分析。两个注释者独立分配属性值表明，40 个公共属性中只有 12 个的分配值具有 >= 95% 的一致性，其中三个（高颧骨、尖鼻子、椭圆形脸）基本上具有随机一致性。在 CelebA 的 5,068 个重复面孔中，5,068 个重复面孔中有 10 到 860 个的属性值相互矛盾。对 CelebA 子集的手动审核估计（无胡须 = 假）的错误率高达 40%，即使标签一致性实验表明无法分配胡须具有 >= 95% 的一致性。选择稍微张开的嘴 (MSO) 进行更深入的分析，我们估计 (MSO=true) 的错误率约为 20%，(MSO=false) 的错误率约为 2%。 MSO 属性值的修正版本使学习模型能够实现比之前报告的 MSO 更高的准确度。 CelebA MSO 的更正值可在 https://github.com/HaiyuWu/CelebAMSO 上找到。

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了CelebA数据集中面部属性值的一致性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 论文的动机是检查CelebA数据集中面部属性标注的可靠性，以确保其可用于训练和评估机器学习模型。
AI.method: 通过两名标注员独立标注属性值，评估一致性。同时，手动审计部分数据以估计错误率，并对特定属性（如MSO）进行更深入的分析。
AI.result: 结果显示，只有12个属性具有95%以上的一致性，而某些属性的一致性接近随机。手动审计显示某些属性的错误率高达40%。修正MSO属性值后，模型的准确性有所提高。
AI.conclusion: CelebA数据集中的属性标注存在较高的错误率，修正关键属性值可以提升模型性能。

authors_text: Daniel Scarafoni,Irfan Essa,Thomas Ploetz
title: Finding Islands of Predictability in Action Forecasting
title_zh: 寻找行动预测中的可预测性孤岛
abstract: We address dense action forecasting: the problem of predicting future action sequence over long durations based on partial observation. Our key insight is that future action sequences are more accurately modeled with variable, rather than one, levels of abstraction, and that the optimal level of abstraction can be dynamically selected during the prediction process. Our experiments show that most parts of future action sequences can be predicted confidently in fine detail only in small segments of future frames, which are effectively ``islands'' of high model prediction confidence in a ``sea'' of uncertainty. We propose a combination Bayesian neural network and hierarchical convolutional segmentation model to both accurately predict future actions and optimally select abstraction levels. We evaluate this approach on standard datasets against existing state-of-the-art systems and demonstrate that our ``islands of predictability'' approach maintains fine-grained action predictions while also making accurate abstract predictions where systems were previously unable to do so, and thus results in substantial, monotonic increases in accuracy.
summary: We address dense action forecasting: the problem of predicting future action sequence over long durations based on partial observation. Our key insight is that future action sequences are more accurately modeled with variable, rather than one, levels of abstraction, and that the optimal level of abstraction can be dynamically selected during the prediction process. Our experiments show that most parts of future action sequences can be predicted confidently in fine detail only in small segments of future frames, which are effectively ``islands'' of high model prediction confidence in a ``sea'' of uncertainty. We propose a combination Bayesian neural network and hierarchical convolutional segmentation model to both accurately predict future actions and optimally select abstraction levels. We evaluate this approach on standard datasets against existing state-of-the-art systems and demonstrate that our ``islands of predictability'' approach maintains fine-grained action predictions while also making accurate abstract predictions where systems were previously unable to do so, and thus results in substantial, monotonic increases in accuracy.
abstract_zh: 我们解决密集动作预测：基于部分观察来预测长时间内未来动作序列的问题。我们的主要见解是，未来的动作序列可以通过可变的而不是单一的抽象级别进行更准确的建模，并且可以在预测过程中动态选择最佳的抽象级别。我们的实验表明，未来动作序列的大部分部分只能在未来帧的一小部分中进行详细的自信预测，这些部分实际上是不确定性“海洋”中高模型预测置信度的“岛屿”。我们提出了贝叶斯神经网络和分层卷积分割模型的组合，以准确预测未来动作并最佳选择抽象级别。我们在标准数据集上针对现有最先进的系统评估了这种方法，并证明我们的“可预测岛”方法保持了细粒度的动作预测，同时还在系统以前无法做到的地方做出了准确的抽象预测，从而导致准确性的大幅单调提高。

AI.tldr: 解决长时间动作序列预测问题，通过动态选择不同抽象层次提高预测准确性
AI.motivation: 现有方法在预测长期动作序列时因固定抽象层次而难以处理不确定性，需动态选择最优抽象层次以提升预测精度
AI.method: 结合贝叶斯神经网络与分层卷积分割模型，动态选择抽象层次以实现细粒度与抽象预测
AI.result: 在标准数据集上相比现有方法，准确率有显著且持续提升
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效识别动作预测中的可预测区域，在保持细粒度预测的同时提升整体预测准确性

authors_text: Tara N. Sainath,Rohit Prabhavalkar,Ankur Bapna,Yu Zhang,Zhouyuan Huo,Zhehuai Chen,Bo Li,Weiran Wang,Trevor Strohman
title: JOIST: A Joint Speech and Text Streaming Model For ASR
title_zh: JOIST：ASR 联合语音和文本流模型
abstract: We present JOIST, an algorithm to train a streaming, cascaded, encoder end-to-end (E2E) model with both speech-text paired inputs, and text-only unpaired inputs. Unlike previous works, we explore joint training with both modalities, rather than pre-training and fine-tuning. In addition, we explore JOIST using a streaming E2E model with an order of magnitude more data, which are also novelties compared to previous works. Through a series of ablation studies, we explore different types of text modeling, including how to model the length of the text sequence and the appropriate text sub-word unit representation. We find that best text representation for JOIST improves WER across a variety of search and rare-word test sets by 4-14% relative, compared to a model not trained with text. In addition, we quantitatively show that JOIST maintains streaming capabilities, which is important for good user-level experience.
summary: We present JOIST, an algorithm to train a streaming, cascaded, encoder end-to-end (E2E) model with both speech-text paired inputs, and text-only unpaired inputs. Unlike previous works, we explore joint training with both modalities, rather than pre-training and fine-tuning. In addition, we explore JOIST using a streaming E2E model with an order of magnitude more data, which are also novelties compared to previous works. Through a series of ablation studies, we explore different types of text modeling, including how to model the length of the text sequence and the appropriate text sub-word unit representation. We find that best text representation for JOIST improves WER across a variety of search and rare-word test sets by 4-14% relative, compared to a model not trained with text. In addition, we quantitatively show that JOIST maintains streaming capabilities, which is important for good user-level experience.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 JOIST，一种用于训练流式级联编码器端到端 (E2E) 模型的算法，其中包含语音文本配对输入和纯文本不配对输入。与之前的工作不同，我们探索两种模式的联合训练，而不是预训练和微调。此外，我们使用流式E2E模型来探索JOIST，数据量增加了一个数量级，这与之前的工作相比也是新颖的。通过一系列的消融研究，我们探索了不同类型的文本建模，包括如何对文本序列的长度进行建模以及适当的文本子词单元表示。我们发现，与未使用文本训练的模型相比，JOIST 的最佳文本表示将各种搜索和稀有词测试集的 WER 相对提高了 4-14%。此外，我们定量地表明，JOIST 保持了流媒体功能，这对于良好的用户级体验非常重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出JOIST模型，一种结合语音-文本配对输入和纯文本未配对输入的流式端到端（E2E）自动语音识别（ASR）模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多采用预训练后微调的模式，而JOIST通过联合训练两种模态数据，同时利用数量级更多的数据，以提升模型性能并保持流式处理能力。
AI.method: 采用流式E2E架构，联合训练语音-文本配对数据与纯文本未配对数据；通过消融实验探索文本序列长度建模及子词单元表示方法。
AI.result: 最佳文本表示使多个测试集词错率（WER）降低4-14%，且模型保持流式处理能力，显著提升用户交互体验。
AI.conclusion: JOIST通过联合训练与大规模数据应用，有效提升ASR性能，同时维持流式处理优势，为实际应用提供更优解决方案。
