Unlike previous works, we explore joint training with both modalities, rather than pre-training and fine-tuning. In addition, we explore JOIST using a streaming E2E model with an order of magnitude more data, which are also novelties compared to previous works. Through a series of ablation studies, we explore different types of text modeling, including how to model the length of the text sequence and the appropriate text sub-word unit representation. We find that best text representation for JOIST improves WER across a variety of search and rare-word test sets by 4-14% relative, compared to a model not trained with text. In addition, we quantitatively show that JOIST maintains streaming capabilities, which is important for good user-level experience. 我们提出了 JOIST，一种用于训练流式级联编码器端到端 (E2E) 模型的算法，其中包含语音文本配对输入和纯文本不配对输入。与之前的工作不同，我们探索两种模式的联合训练，而不是预训练和微调。此外，我们使用流式E2E模型来探索JOIST，数据量增加了一个数量级，这与之前的工作相比也是新颖的。通过一系列的消融研究，我们探索了不同类型的文本建模，包括如何对文本序列的长度进行建模以及适当的文本子词单元表示。我们发现，与未使用文本训练的模型相比，JOIST 的最佳文本表示将各种搜索和稀有词测试集的 WER 相对提高了 4-14%。此外，我们定量地表明，JOIST 保持了流媒体功能，这对于良好的用户级体验非常重要。 本文提出JOIST模型，一种结合语音-文本配对输入和纯文本未配对输入的流式端到端（E2E）自动语音识别（ASR）模型。 Tara N. Sainath,Rohit Prabhavalkar,Ankur Bapna,Yu Zhang,Zhouyuan Huo,Zhehuai Chen,Bo Li,Weiran Wang,Trevor Strohman cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Zining Zhu,Soroosh Shahtalebi,Frank Rudzicz
title: Predicting Fine-Tuning Performance with Probing
title_zh: 通过探测预测微调性能
abstract: Large NLP models have recently shown impressive performance in language understanding tasks, typically evaluated by their fine-tuned performance. Alternatively, probing has received increasing attention as being a lightweight method for interpreting the intrinsic mechanisms of large NLP models. In probing, post-hoc classifiers are trained on "out-of-domain" datasets that diagnose specific abilities. While probing the language models has led to insightful findings, they appear disjointed from the development of models. This paper explores the utility of probing deep NLP models to extract a proxy signal widely used in model development -- the fine-tuning performance. We find that it is possible to use the accuracies of only three probing tests to predict the fine-tuning performance with errors $40\%$ - $80\%$ smaller than baselines. We further discuss possible avenues where probing can empower the development of deep NLP models.
summary: Large NLP models have recently shown impressive performance in language understanding tasks, typically evaluated by their fine-tuned performance. Alternatively, probing has received increasing attention as being a lightweight method for interpreting the intrinsic mechanisms of large NLP models. In probing, post-hoc classifiers are trained on "out-of-domain" datasets that diagnose specific abilities. While probing the language models has led to insightful findings, they appear disjointed from the development of models. This paper explores the utility of probing deep NLP models to extract a proxy signal widely used in model development -- the fine-tuning performance. We find that it is possible to use the accuracies of only three probing tests to predict the fine-tuning performance with errors $40\%$ - $80\%$ smaller than baselines. We further discuss possible avenues where probing can empower the development of deep NLP models.
abstract_zh: 大型 NLP 模型最近在语言理解任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能，通常通过其微调性能来评估。另外，探测作为解释大型 NLP 模型内在机制的轻量级方法而受到越来越多的关注。在探测中，事后分类器在诊断特定能力的“域外”数据集上进行训练。虽然探索语言模型带来了富有洞察力的发现，但它们似乎与模型的开发脱节。本文探讨了探索深度 NLP 模型以提取模型开发中广泛使用的代理信号的效用——微调性能。我们发现可以仅使用三个探测测试的精度来预测微调性能，误差比基线小 $40\%$ - $80\%$。我们进一步讨论探索可以促进深度 NLP 模型开发的可能途径。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨通过探针方法预测大型自然语言处理模型的微调性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管探针方法在解释模型内在机制方面取得进展，但其与模型开发过程存在脱节，需寻找更紧密关联模型性能的探针信号。
AI.method: 在三个探针测试中提取准确率指标，构建预测模型以估算微调性能，并与基线方法对比误差差异。
AI.result: 仅用三个探针测试的准确率即可预测微调性能，预测误差较基线方法减少40%-80%。
AI.conclusion: 探针方法可作为模型开发的有效工具，通过预测微调性能为模型优化提供指导。

authors_text: Changjiang Li,Ren Pang,Zhaohan Xi,Tianyu Du,Shouling Ji,Yuan Yao,Ting Wang
title: An Embarrassingly Simple Backdoor Attack on Self-supervised Learning
title_zh: 对自我监督学习的极其简单的后门攻击
comment: The 2023 International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV '23)
comments: The 2023 International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV '23)
abstract: As a new paradigm in machine learning, self-supervised learning (SSL) is capable of learning high-quality representations of complex data without relying on labels. In addition to eliminating the need for labeled data, research has found that SSL improves the adversarial robustness over supervised learning since lacking labels makes it more challenging for adversaries to manipulate model predictions. However, the extent to which this robustness superiority generalizes to other types of attacks remains an open question. We explore this question in the context of backdoor attacks. Specifically, we design and evaluate CTRL, an embarrassingly simple yet highly effective self-supervised backdoor attack. By only polluting a tiny fraction of training data (<= 1%) with indistinguishable poisoning samples, CTRL causes any trigger-embedded input to be misclassified to the adversary's designated class with a high probability (>= 99%) at inference time. Our findings suggest that SSL and supervised learning are comparably vulnerable to backdoor attacks. More importantly, through the lens of CTRL, we study the inherent vulnerability of SSL to backdoor attacks. With both empirical and analytical evidence, we reveal that the representation invariance property of SSL, which benefits adversarial robustness, may also be the very reason making \ssl highly susceptible to backdoor attacks. Our findings also imply that the existing defenses against supervised backdoor attacks are not easily retrofitted to the unique vulnerability of SSL.
summary: As a new paradigm in machine learning, self-supervised learning (SSL) is capable of learning high-quality representations of complex data without relying on labels. In addition to eliminating the need for labeled data, research has found that SSL improves the adversarial robustness over supervised learning since lacking labels makes it more challenging for adversaries to manipulate model predictions. However, the extent to which this robustness superiority generalizes to other types of attacks remains an open question. We explore this question in the context of backdoor attacks. Specifically, we design and evaluate CTRL, an embarrassingly simple yet highly effective self-supervised backdoor attack. By only polluting a tiny fraction of training data (<= 1%) with indistinguishable poisoning samples, CTRL causes any trigger-embedded input to be misclassified to the adversary's designated class with a high probability (>= 99%) at inference time. Our findings suggest that SSL and supervised learning are comparably vulnerable to backdoor attacks. More importantly, through the lens of CTRL, we study the inherent vulnerability of SSL to backdoor attacks. With both empirical and analytical evidence, we reveal that the representation invariance property of SSL, which benefits adversarial robustness, may also be the very reason making \ssl highly susceptible to backdoor attacks. Our findings also imply that the existing defenses against supervised backdoor attacks are not easily retrofitted to the unique vulnerability of SSL.
abstract_zh: 作为机器学习的新范式，自监督学习（SSL）能够在不依赖标签的情况下学习复杂数据的高质量表示。除了消除对标记数据的需求之外，研究还发现 SSL 还提高了监督学习的对抗鲁棒性，因为缺乏标签使得对手操纵模型预测更具挑战性。然而，这种鲁棒性优势在多大程度上推广到其他类型的攻击仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。我们在后门攻击的背景下探讨这个问题。具体来说，我们设计并评估了 CTRL，这是一种极其简单但高效的自我监督后门攻击。通过仅用无法区分的中毒样本污染一小部分训练数据 (<= 1%)，CTRL 会导致任何嵌入触发器的输入在推理时以高概率 (>= 99%) 被错误分类到对手的指定类别。我们的研究结果表明 SSL 和监督学习相对容易受到后门攻击。更重要的是，通过 CTRL 的视角，我们研究了 SSL 固有的后门攻击脆弱性。通过经验和分析证据，我们揭示了 SSL 的表示不变性特性有利于对抗鲁棒性，也可能是 \ssl 极易受到后门攻击的原因。我们的研究结果还表明，针对受监督后门攻击的现有防御措施不容易针对 SSL 的独特漏洞进行改造。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对自监督学习（SSL）的简单且高效的后门攻击方法CTRL，揭示了SSL在后门攻击下的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督学习在对抗攻击中表现出更强的鲁棒性，但其对后门攻击的脆弱性尚未明确，需验证其安全性边界。
AI.method: 设计CTRL攻击框架，通过污染极少量（≤1%）训练数据中的不可区分样本，嵌入触发器以实现目标分类的高概率误导。
AI.result: CTRL在推理时使触发输入以≥99%概率被错误分类，证明SSL与监督学习在后门攻击下具有相似的脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: SSL的表示不变性特性既提升对抗鲁棒性，也导致其易受后门攻击，现有防御方法难以直接迁移至SSL场景。

authors_text: Ilker Turker,Serhat Orkun Tan
title: Scientific Impact of Graph-Based Approaches in Deep Learning Studies -- A Bibliometric Comparison
title_zh: 深度学习研究中基于图的方法的科学影响——文献计量比较
abstract: Applying graph-based approaches in deep learning receives more attention over time. This study presents statistical analysis on the use of graph-based approaches in deep learning and examines the scientific impact of the related articles. Processing the data obtained from the Web of Science database, metrics such as the type of the articles, funding availability, indexing type, annual average number of citations and the number of access were analyzed to quantitatively reveal the effects on the scientific audience. It's outlined that deep learning-based studies gained momentum after year 2013, and the rate of graph-based approaches in all deep learning studies increased linearly from 1% to 4% within the following 10 years. Conference publications scanned in the Conference Proceeding Citation Index (CPCI) on the graph-based approaches receive significantly more citations. The citation counts of the SCI-Expanded and Emerging SCI indexed publications of the two streams are close to each other. While the citation performances of the supported and unsupported publications of the two sides were similar, pure deep learning studies received more citations on the journal publication side and graph-based approaches received more citations on the conference side. Despite their similar performance in recent years, graph-based studies show twice more citation performance as they get older, compared to traditional approaches. Annual average citation performance per article for all deep learning studies is 11.051 in 2014, while it is 22.483 for graph-based studies. Also, despite receiving 16% more access, graph-based papers get almost the same overall citation over time with the pure counterpart. This is an indication that graph-based approaches need a greater bunch of attention to follow, while pure deep learning counterpart is relatively simpler to get inside.

Also, despite receiving 16% more access, graph-based papers get almost the same overall citation over time with the pure counterpart. This is an indication that graph-based approaches need a greater bunch of attention to follow, while pure deep learning counterpart is relatively simpler to get inside.
abstract_zh: 随着时间的推移，在深度学习中应用基于图的方法受到越来越多的关注。本研究对深度学习中基于图的方法的使用进行了统计分析，并检验了相关文章的科学影响。处理从 Web of Science 数据库获得的数据，分析文章类型、资金可用性、索引类型、年平均引用次数和访问次数等指标，以定量揭示对科学受众的影响。报告指出，基于深度学习的研究在 2013 年之后开始蓬勃发展，在接下来的 10 年内，所有深度学习研究中基于图的方法的比例从 1% 线性增加到 4%。在会议论文集引文索引 (CPCI) 中扫描的有关基于图表的方法的会议出版物获得的引用显着增加。两个流派的 SCI-Expanded 和 Emerging SCI 索引出版物的引用次数彼此接近。虽然双方受支持和不受支持的出版物的引用表现相似，但纯粹的深度学习研究在期刊出版物方面获得了更多的引用，而基于图的方法在会议方面获得了更多的引用。尽管近年来表现相似，但基于图表的研究显示，随着年龄的增长，与传统方法相比，引文表现要高出两倍。 2014 年，所有深度学习研究的每篇文章的年平均引用率为 11.051，而基于图的研究为 22.483。此外，尽管基于图表的论文的访问量增加了 16%，但随着时间的推移，其整体引用率与纯论文的总体引用率几乎相同。这表明基于图的方法需要更多的关注来遵循，而纯粹的深度学习方法相对更容易进入。

AI.tldr: 本文通过文献计量分析比较图基方法在深度学习研究中的科学影响力。
AI.motivation: 随着图基方法在深度学习中的应用增加，需量化其科学影响并揭示其与传统方法的差异。
AI.method: 基于Web of Science数据库，分析文章类型、引用量、访问量等指标，对比不同索引类型和发表渠道的文献表现。
AI.result: 图基方法引用量随时间增长显著，会议论文引用更高，期刊论文中纯深度学习研究引用更多，但图基方法长期影响力是传统方法的两倍。
AI.conclusion: 图基方法需更多关注，其科学影响力随时间增长显著，但传播度与纯深度学习研究相近。

search_text: Scientific Impact of Graph-Based Approaches in Deep Learning Studies -- A Bibliometric Comparison 深度学习研究中基于图的方法的科学影响——文献计量比较 Applying graph-based approaches in deep learning receives more attention over time. This study presents statistical analysis on the use of graph-based approaches in deep learning and examines the scientific impact of the related articles. Processing the data obtained from the Web of Science database, metrics such as the type of the articles, funding availability, indexing type, annual average number of citations and the number of access were analyzed to quantitatively reveal the effects on the scientific audience. It's outlined that deep learning-based studies gained momentum after year 2013, and the rate of graph-based approaches in all deep learning studies increased linearly from 1% to 4% within the following 10 years. Conference publications scanned in the Conference Proceeding Citation Index (CPCI) on the graph-based approaches receive significantly more citations. The citation counts of the SCI-Expanded and Emerging SCI indexed publications of the two streams are close to each other. While the citation performances of the supported and unsupported publications of the two sides were similar, pure deep learning studies received more citations on the journal publication side and graph-based approaches received more citations on the conference side. Despite their similar performance in recent years, graph-based studies show twice more citation performance as they get older, compared to traditional approaches. Annual average citation performance per article for all deep learning studies is 11.051 in 2014, while it is 22.483 for graph-based studies. Also, despite receiving 16% more access, graph-based papers get almost the same overall citation over time with the pure counterpart. This is an indication that graph-based approaches need a greater bunch of attention to follow, while pure deep learning counterpart is relatively simpler to get inside. 随着时间的推移，在深度学习中应用基于图的方法受到越来越多的关注。本研究对深度学习中基于图的方法的使用进行了统计分析，并检验了相关文章的科学影响。处理从 Web of Science 数据库获得的数据，分析文章类型、资金可用性、索引类型、年平均引用次数和访问次数等指标，以定量揭示对科学受众的影响。报告指出，基于深度学习的研究在 2013 年之后开始蓬勃发展，在接下来的 10 年内，所有深度学习研究中基于图的方法的比例从 1% 线性增加到 4%。在会议论文集引文索引 (CPCI) 中扫描的有关基于图表的方法的会议出版物获得的引用显着增加。两个流派的 SCI-Expanded 和 Emerging SCI 索引出版物的引用次数彼此接近。虽然双方受支持和不受支持的出版物的引用表现相似，但纯粹的深度学习研究在期刊出版物方面获得了更多的引用，而基于图的方法在会议方面获得了更多的引用。尽管近年来表现相似，但基于图表的研究显示，随着年龄的增长，与传统方法相比，引文表现要高出两倍。 2014 年，所有深度学习研究的每篇文章的年平均引用率为 11.051，而基于图的研究为 22.483。此外，尽管基于图表的论文的访问量增加了 16%，但随着时间的推移，其整体引用率与纯论文的总体引用率几乎相同。这表明基于图的方法需要更多的关注来遵循，而纯粹的深度学习方法相对更容易进入。 本文通过文献计量分析比较图基方法在深度学习研究中的科学影响力。 Ilker Turker,Serhat Orkun Tan cs.DL,cs.AI

authors_text: Han Yu,Huiyuan Yang,Akane Sano
title: LEAVES: Learning Views for Time-Series Biobehavioral Data in Contrastive Learning
title_zh: LEAVES：对比学习中时间序列生物行为数据的学习视图
abstract: Contrastive learning has been utilized as a promising self-supervised learning approach to extract meaningful representations from unlabeled data. The majority of these methods take advantage of data-augmentation techniques to create diverse views from the original input. However, optimizing augmentations and their parameters for generating more effective views in contrastive learning frameworks is often resource-intensive and time-consuming. While several strategies have been proposed for automatically generating new views in computer vision, research in other domains, such as time-series biobehavioral data, remains limited. In this paper, we introduce a simple yet powerful module for automatic view generation in contrastive learning frameworks applied to time-series biobehavioral data, which is essential for modern health care, termed learning views for time-series data (LEAVES). This proposed module employs adversarial training to learn augmentation hyperparameters within contrastive learning frameworks. We assess the efficacy of our method on multiple time-series datasets using two well-known contrastive learning frameworks, namely SimCLR and BYOL. Across four diverse biobehavioral datasets, LEAVES requires only approximately 20 learnable parameters -- dramatically fewer than the about 580k parameters demanded by frameworks like ViewMaker, a previously proposed adversarially trained convolutional module in contrastive learning, while achieving competitive and often superior performance to existing baseline methods. Crucially, these efficiency gains are obtained without extensive manual hyperparameter tuning, which makes LEAVES particularly suitable for large-scale or real-time healthcare applications that demand both accuracy and practicality.
summary: Contrastive learning has been utilized as a promising self-supervised learning approach to extract meaningful representations from unlabeled data. The majority of these methods take advantage of data-augmentation techniques to create diverse views from the original input. However, optimizing augmentations and their parameters for generating more effective views in contrastive learning frameworks is often resource-intensive and time-consuming. While several strategies have been proposed for automatically generating new views in computer vision, research in other domains, such as time-series biobehavioral data, remains limited. In this paper, we introduce a simple yet powerful module for automatic view generation in contrastive learning frameworks applied to time-series biobehavioral data, which is essential for modern health care, termed learning views for time-series data (LEAVES). This proposed module employs adversarial training to learn augmentation hyperparameters within contrastive learning frameworks. We assess the efficacy of our method on multiple time-series datasets using two well-known contrastive learning frameworks, namely SimCLR and BYOL. Across four diverse biobehavioral datasets, LEAVES requires only approximately 20 learnable parameters -- dramatically fewer than the about 580k parameters demanded by frameworks like ViewMaker, a previously proposed adversarially trained convolutional module in contrastive learning, while achieving competitive and often superior performance to existing baseline methods. Crucially, these efficiency gains are obtained without extensive manual hyperparameter tuning, which makes LEAVES particularly suitable for large-scale or real-time healthcare applications that demand both accuracy and practicality.
abstract_zh: 对比学习已被用作一种有前途的自我监督学习方法，可以从未标记的数据中提取有意义的表示。这些方法大多数都利用数据增强技术从原始输入创建不同的视图。然而，优化增强及其参数以在对比学习框架中生成更有效的视图通常是资源密集型且耗时的。尽管已经提出了几种在计算机视觉中自动生成新视图的策略，但其他领域（例如时间序列生物行为数据）的研究仍然有限。在本文中，我们介绍了一个简单但功能强大的模块，用于在应用于时间序列生物行为数据的对比学习框架中自动生成视图，这对于现代医疗保健至关重要，称为时间序列数据学习视图（LEAVES）。该模块采用对抗性训练来学习对比学习框架内的增强超参数。我们使用两个著名的对比学习框架（即 SimCLR 和 BYOL）评估我们的方法在多个时间序列数据集上的有效性。在四个不同的生物行为数据集中，LEAVES 仅需要大约 20 个可学习参数，大大少于 ViewMaker（之前提出的对比学习中的对抗训练卷积模块）等框架所需的约 58 万个参数，同时实现了比现有基线方法有竞争力且通常更优越的性能。至关重要的是，这些效率提升是在无需大量手动超参数调整的情况下获得的，这使得 LEAVES 特别适合需要准确性和实用性的大规模或实时医疗保健应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LEAVES模块，用于在对比学习框架中自动生成时间序列生物行为数据的视图，以提高表示学习的效率和效果。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法在生成有效视图时依赖耗时的参数调优，且针对时间序列生物行为数据的自动视图生成研究不足，需开发高效且无需人工干预的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过对抗训练学习对比学习框架中的数据增强超参数，设计轻量级模块LEAVES，在SimCLR和BYOL框架下实现视图生成。
AI.result: LEAVES仅需约20个可学习参数，显著少于ViewMaker的580k参数，在四个生物行为数据集上表现优于基线方法且无需手动调参。
AI.conclusion: LEAVES为大规模或实时医疗应用提供了高效、准确的对比学习方案，兼顾参数效率与性能，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Raj Patel
title: FOON Creation and Traversal for Recipe Generation
title_zh: 用于生成配方的 FOON 创建和遍历
abstract: Task competition by robots is still off from being completely dependable and usable. One way a robot may decipher information given to it and accomplish tasks is by utilizing FOON, which stands for functional object-oriented network. The network first needs to be created by having a human creates action nodes as well as input and output nodes in a .txt file. After the network is sizeable, utilization of this network allows for traversal of the network in a variety of ways such as choosing steps via iterative deepening searching by using the first seen valid option. Another mechanism is heuristics, such as choosing steps based on the highest success rate or lowest amount of input ingredients. Via any of these methods, a program can traverse the network given an output product, and derive the series of steps that need to be taken to produce the output.
summary: Task competition by robots is still off from being completely dependable and usable. One way a robot may decipher information given to it and accomplish tasks is by utilizing FOON, which stands for functional object-oriented network. The network first needs to be created by having a human creates action nodes as well as input and output nodes in a .txt file. After the network is sizeable, utilization of this network allows for traversal of the network in a variety of ways such as choosing steps via iterative deepening searching by using the first seen valid option. Another mechanism is heuristics, such as choosing steps based on the highest success rate or lowest amount of input ingredients. Via any of these methods, a program can traverse the network given an output product, and derive the series of steps that need to be taken to produce the output.
abstract_zh: 机器人的任务竞争还没有完全可靠和可用。机器人破译给它的信息并完成任务的一种方法是利用 FOON，它代表功能面向对象网络。首先需要通过人员在 .txt 文件中创建操作节点以及输入和输出节点来创建网络。当网络规模相当大后，利用该网络允许以多种方式遍历网络，例如使用第一个看到的有效选项通过迭代加深搜索来选择步骤。另一种机制是启发式，例如根据最高成功率或最低输入成分量来选择步骤。通过这些方法中的任何一种，程序都可以遍历给定输出产品的网络，并导出产生输出所需的一系列步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过构建和遍历功能面向对象网络（FOON）来生成食谱步骤，解决机器人任务规划的可靠性问题。
AI.motivation: 当前机器人任务执行存在可靠性不足，需通过结构化知识网络（FOON）实现任务步骤的解析与规划。
AI.method: 由人工创建包含动作及输入输出节点的FOON网络，采用迭代加深搜索或启发式策略（如成功率优先）进行网络遍历。
AI.result: 程序可根据目标产物自动推导出生成该产物的步骤序列，实现食谱生成与任务规划。
AI.conclusion: FOON网络为机器人任务规划提供了可扩展的知识框架，验证了结构化方法在步骤生成中的有效性。

search_text: FOON Creation and Traversal for Recipe Generation 用于生成配方的 FOON 创建和遍历 Task competition by robots is still off from being completely dependable and usable. One way a robot may decipher information given to it and accomplish tasks is by utilizing FOON, which stands for functional object-oriented network. The network first needs to be created by having a human creates action nodes as well as input and output nodes in a .txt file. After the network is sizeable, utilization of this network allows for traversal of the network in a variety of ways such as choosing steps via iterative deepening searching by using the first seen valid option. Another mechanism is heuristics, such as choosing steps based on the highest success rate or lowest amount of input ingredients. Via any of these methods, a program can traverse the network given an output product, and derive the series of steps that need to be taken to produce the output. 机器人的任务竞争还没有完全可靠和可用。机器人破译给它的信息并完成任务的一种方法是利用 FOON，它代表功能面向对象网络。首先需要通过人员在 .txt 文件中创建操作节点以及输入和输出节点来创建网络。当网络规模相当大后，利用该网络允许以多种方式遍历网络，例如使用第一个看到的有效选项通过迭代加深搜索来选择步骤。另一种机制是启发式，例如根据最高成功率或最低输入成分量来选择步骤。通过这些方法中的任何一种，程序都可以遍历给定输出产品的网络，并导出产生输出所需的一系列步骤。 本文提出通过构建和遍历功能面向对象网络（FOON）来生成食谱步骤，解决机器人任务规划的可靠性问题。 Raj Patel cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: MohammadTaghi Hajiaghayi,MohammadReza Khani,Debmalya Panigrahi,Max Springer
title: Online Algorithms for the Santa Claus Problem
title_zh: 圣诞老人问题的在线算法
abstract: The Santa Claus problem is a fundamental problem in fair division: the goal is to partition a set of heterogeneous items among heterogeneous agents so as to maximize the minimum value of items received by any agent. In this paper, we study the online version of this problem where the items are not known in advance and have to be assigned to agents as they arrive over time. If the arrival order of items is arbitrary, then no good assignment rule exists in the worst case. However, we show that, if the arrival order is random, then for $n$ agents and any $\varepsilon > 0$, we can obtain a competitive ratio of $1-\varepsilon$ when the optimal assignment gives value at least $Ω(\log n / \varepsilon^2)$ to every agent (assuming each item has at most unit value). We also show that this result is almost tight: namely, if the optimal solution has value at most $C \ln n / \varepsilon$ for some constant $C$, then there is no $(1-\varepsilon)$-competitive algorithm even for random arrival order.
summary: The Santa Claus problem is a fundamental problem in fair division: the goal is to partition a set of heterogeneous items among heterogeneous agents so as to maximize the minimum value of items received by any agent. In this paper, we study the online version of this problem where the items are not known in advance and have to be assigned to agents as they arrive over time. If the arrival order of items is arbitrary, then no good assignment rule exists in the worst case. However, we show that, if the arrival order is random, then for $n$ agents and any $\varepsilon > 0$, we can obtain a competitive ratio of $1-\varepsilon$ when the optimal assignment gives value at least $Ω(\log n / \varepsilon^2)$ to every agent (assuming each item has at most unit value). We also show that this result is almost tight: namely, if the optimal solution has value at most $C \ln n / \varepsilon$ for some constant $C$, then there is no $(1-\varepsilon)$-competitive algorithm even for random arrival order.
abstract_zh: 圣诞老人问题是公平分配中的一个基本问题：目标是在异构代理之间划分一组异构项目，以便最大化任何代理收到的项目的最小值。在本文中，我们研究了该问题的在线版本，其中物品事先不知道，并且必须在物品随着时间的推移到达时分配给代理。如果项目的到达顺序是任意的，那么在最坏的情况下不存在良好的分配规则。然而，我们表明，如果到达顺序是随机的，那么对于 $n$ 代理和任何 $\varepsilon > 0$，当最佳分配为每个代理提供至少 $Ω(\log n / \varepsilon^2)$ 值时（假设每个项目最多具有单位值），我们可以获得 $1-\varepsilon$ 的竞争比。我们还表明，这个结果几乎是紧的：即，如果对于某个常数 $C$，最优解的值至多为 $C \ln n / \varepsilon$，那么即使对于随机到达顺序，也不存在 $(1-\varepsilon)$ 竞争算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线版本的圣诞老人问题，即在物品随机到达的情况下，设计算法以最大化每个代理获得物品的最小价值。
AI.motivation: 圣诞老人问题在公平分配领域具有重要意义，但传统模型假设所有物品已知。在线版本需应对物品动态到达的挑战，尤其当到达顺序随机时，需设计有效算法保证公平性。
AI.method: 假设物品到达顺序为随机，提出一种在线分配算法，通过动态调整策略确保每个代理获得的物品价值接近最优解。
AI.result: 当最优解为每个代理提供至少Ω(log n / ε²)价值时，算法可达到1-ε竞争比；若最优解低于C ln n / ε，则无法实现该竞争比。
AI.conclusion: 本文为随机到达场景下的圣诞老人问题提供了近似最优的在线算法，并证明了结果的紧性，为在线公平分配研究提供了理论边界。

authors_text: Jee-eun Lee,Jaemin Lee,Tirthankar Bandyopadhyay,Luis Sentis
title: Sample Efficient Dynamics Learning for Symmetrical Legged Robots:Leveraging Physics Invariance and Geometric Symmetries
title_zh: 对称腿机器人的高效动力学学习示例：利用物理不变性和几何对称性
abstract: Model generalization of the underlying dynamics is critical for achieving data efficiency when learning for robot control. This paper proposes a novel approach for learning dynamics leveraging the symmetry in the underlying robotic system, which allows for robust extrapolation from fewer samples. Existing frameworks that represent all data in vector space fail to consider the structured information of the robot, such as leg symmetry, rotational symmetry, and physics invariance. As a result, these schemes require vast amounts of training data to learn the system's redundant elements because they are learned independently. Instead, we propose considering the geometric prior by representing the system in symmetrical object groups and designing neural network architecture to assess invariance and equivariance between the objects. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach by comparing the generalization to unseen data of the proposed model and the existing models. We also implement a controller of a climbing robot based on learned inverse dynamics models. The results show that our method generates accurate control inputs that help the robot reach the desired state while requiring less training data than existing methods.
summary: Model generalization of the underlying dynamics is critical for achieving data efficiency when learning for robot control. This paper proposes a novel approach for learning dynamics leveraging the symmetry in the underlying robotic system, which allows for robust extrapolation from fewer samples. Existing frameworks that represent all data in vector space fail to consider the structured information of the robot, such as leg symmetry, rotational symmetry, and physics invariance. As a result, these schemes require vast amounts of training data to learn the system's redundant elements because they are learned independently. Instead, we propose considering the geometric prior by representing the system in symmetrical object groups and designing neural network architecture to assess invariance and equivariance between the objects. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach by comparing the generalization to unseen data of the proposed model and the existing models. We also implement a controller of a climbing robot based on learned inverse dynamics models. The results show that our method generates accurate control inputs that help the robot reach the desired state while requiring less training data than existing methods.
abstract_zh: 基础动力学的模型泛化对于学习机器人控制时实现数据效率至关重要。本文提出了一种利用底层机器人系统中的对称性来学习动态的新方法，该方法允许从更少的样本中进行稳健的外推。现有的表示向量空间中所有数据的框架未能考虑机器人的结构化信息，例如腿部对称性、旋转对称性和物理不变性。因此，这些方案需要大量的训练数据来学习系统的冗余元素，因为它们是独立学习的。相反，我们建议通过在对称对象组中表示系统并设计神经网络架构来评估对象之间的不变性和等变性来考虑几何先验。最后，我们通过比较所提出的模型和现有模型的未见数据的泛化，证明了我们方法的有效性。我们还实现了基于学习的逆动力学模型的攀爬机器人控制器。结果表明，我们的方法生成准确的控制输入，帮助机器人达到所需状态，同时比现有方法需要更少的训练数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用物理不变性和几何对称性的高效动力学学习方法，以减少对称腿式机器人学习所需的数据量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未考虑机器人结构化信息（如腿对称性、旋转对称性），导致需大量数据学习冗余元素。
AI.method: 通过将系统表示为对称对象组，并设计神经网络架构评估对象间的不变性与等变性，结合几何先验信息进行动力学学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在未见数据上的泛化能力优于现有模型，且基于学习的逆动力学控制器能以更少训练数据实现准确控制。
AI.conclusion: 利用对称性与物理不变性可有效提升腿式机器人动力学学习的数据效率与控制精度。

The results show that our method generates accurate control inputs that help the robot reach the desired state while requiring less training data than existing methods. 基础动力学的模型泛化对于学习机器人控制时实现数据效率至关重要。本文提出了一种利用底层机器人系统中的对称性来学习动态的新方法，该方法允许从更少的样本中进行稳健的外推。现有的表示向量空间中所有数据的框架未能考虑机器人的结构化信息，例如腿部对称性、旋转对称性和物理不变性。因此，这些方案需要大量的训练数据来学习系统的冗余元素，因为它们是独立学习的。相反，我们建议通过在对称对象组中表示系统并设计神经网络架构来评估对象之间的不变性和等变性来考虑几何先验。最后，我们通过比较所提出的模型和现有模型的未见数据的泛化，证明了我们方法的有效性。我们还实现了基于学习的逆动力学模型的攀爬机器人控制器。结果表明，我们的方法生成准确的控制输入，帮助机器人达到所需状态，同时比现有方法需要更少的训练数据。 本文提出一种利用物理不变性和几何对称性的高效动力学学习方法，以减少对称腿式机器人学习所需的数据量。 Jee-eun Lee,Jaemin Lee,Tirthankar Bandyopadhyay,Luis Sentis cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Ilker Turker,Serhat Orkun Tan
title: Machine Learning vs. Deep Learning in 5G Networks -- A Comparison of Scientific Impact
title_zh: 5G 网络中的机器学习与深度学习——科学影响的比较
abstract: Introduction of fifth generation (5G) wireless network technology has matched the crucial need for high capacity and speed needs of the new generation mobile applications. Recent advances in Artificial Intelligence (AI) also empowered 5G cellular networks with two mainstreams as machine learning (ML) and deep learning (DL) techniques. Our study aims to uncover the differences in scientific impact for these two techniques by the means of statistical bibliometrics. The performed analysis includes citation performance with respect to indexing types, funding availability, journal or conference publishing options together with distributions of these metrics along years to evaluate the popularity trends in a detailed manner. Web of Science (WoS) database host 2245 papers for ML and 1407 papers for DL-related studies. DL studies, starting with 9% rate in 2013, has reached to 45% rate in 2022 among all DL and ML-related studies. Results related to scientific impact indicate that DL studies get slightly more average normalized citation (2.256) compared to ML studies (2.118) in 5G, while SCI-Expanded indexed papers in both sides tend to have similar citation performance (3.165 and 3.162 respectively). ML-related studies those are indexed in ESCI show twice citation performance compared to DL. Conference papers in DL domain and journal papers in ML domain are superior in scientific interest to their counterparts with minor differences. Highest citation performance for ML studies is achieved for year 2014, while this peak is observed for 2017 for DL studies. We can conclude that both publication and citation rate for DL-related papers tend to increase and outperform ML-based studies in 5G domain by the means of citation metrics.
summary: Introduction of fifth generation (5G) wireless network technology has matched the crucial need for high capacity and speed needs of the new generation mobile applications. Recent advances in Artificial Intelligence (AI) also empowered 5G cellular networks with two mainstreams as machine learning (ML) and deep learning (DL) techniques. Our study aims to uncover the differences in scientific impact for these two techniques by the means of statistical bibliometrics. The performed analysis includes citation performance with respect to indexing types, funding availability, journal or conference publishing options together with distributions of these metrics along years to evaluate the popularity trends in a detailed manner. Web of Science (WoS) database host 2245 papers for ML and 1407 papers for DL-related studies. DL studies, starting with 9% rate in 2013, has reached to 45% rate in 2022 among all DL and ML-related studies. Results related to scientific impact indicate that DL studies get slightly more average normalized citation (2.256) compared to ML studies (2.118) in 5G, while SCI-Expanded indexed papers in both sides tend to have similar citation performance (3.165 and 3.162 respectively). ML-related studies those are indexed in ESCI show twice citation performance compared to DL. Conference papers in DL domain and journal papers in ML domain are superior in scientific interest to their counterparts with minor differences. Highest citation performance for ML studies is achieved for year 2014, while this peak is observed for 2017 for DL studies. We can conclude that both publication and citation rate for DL-related papers tend to increase and outperform ML-based studies in 5G domain by the means of citation metrics.
abstract_zh: 第五代（5G）无线网络技术的引入满足了新一代移动应用对高容量和高速度的关键需求。人工智能 (AI) 的最新进展也为 5G 蜂窝网络提供了机器学习 (ML) 和深度学习 (DL) 技术两大主流技术。我们的研究旨在通过统计文献计量学的方式揭示这两种技术在科学影响上的差异。所执行的分析包括索引类型、资金可用性、期刊或会议出版选项方面的引文表现以及这些指标多年来的分布，以详细评估流行趋势。 Web of Science (WoS) 数据库包含 2245 篇 ML 论文和 1407 篇 DL 相关研究论文。在所有 DL 和 ML 相关研究中，DL 研究的比率从 2013 年的 9% 开始，到 2022 年已达到 45%。与科学影响相关的结果表明，与 5G 中的 ML 研究 (2.118) 相比，深度学习研究的平均标准化引用 (2.256) 略高，而双方的 SCI-Expanded 索引论文往往具有相似的引用表现（分别为 3.165 和 3.162）。在 ESCI 中索引的 ML 相关研究的引用性能是 DL 的两倍。 DL 领域的会议论文和 ML 领域的期刊论文在科学兴趣上优于同行，但差异较小。 ML 研究的最高引用表现出现在 2014 年，而 DL 研究的这一峰值出现在 2017 年。我们可以得出结论，通过引用指标，深度学习相关论文的发表率和引用率往往会增加，并且优于 5G 领域基于机器学习的研究。

AI.tldr: 通过统计文献计量学方法比较机器学习（ML）与深度学习（DL）在5G网络中的科学影响力差异。
AI.motivation: 5G网络对高容量和高速度的需求推动AI技术应用，需评估ML与DL在该领域的研究影响力差异以指导未来研究方向。
AI.method: 基于Web of Science数据库，分析2245篇ML和1407篇DL论文的引用表现、索引类型、出版渠道及年份分布趋势。
AI.result: DL论文平均引用率（2.256）略高于ML（2.118），SCI-Expanded索引论文引用相近（3.165 vs 3.162），ESCI中ML引用量为DL两倍；DL会议论文和ML期刊论文科学关注度较高，2014年ML和2017年DL分别出现引用峰值。
AI.conclusion: DL在5G领域论文发表量和引用指标持续增长，整体科学影响力已超越ML。

authors_text: Ali Safaya,Engin Erzin
title: Experiments on Turkish ASR with Self-Supervised Speech Representation Learning
title_zh: 使用自监督语音表示学习进行土耳其语 ASR 实验
abstract: While the Turkish language is listed among low-resource languages, literature on Turkish automatic speech recognition (ASR) is relatively old. In this report, we present our findings on Turkish ASR with speech representation learning using HUBERT. We investigate pre-training HUBERT for Turkish with large-scale data curated from online resources. We pre-train our model using 6,500 hours of speech data from YouTube. The results show that the models are not ready for commercial use since they are not robust against disturbances that typically occur in real-world settings such as variations in accents, slang, background noise and interference. We analyze typical errors and the limitations of the models for use in commercial settings.
summary: While the Turkish language is listed among low-resource languages, literature on Turkish automatic speech recognition (ASR) is relatively old. In this report, we present our findings on Turkish ASR with speech representation learning using HUBERT. We investigate pre-training HUBERT for Turkish with large-scale data curated from online resources. We pre-train our model using 6,500 hours of speech data from YouTube. The results show that the models are not ready for commercial use since they are not robust against disturbances that typically occur in real-world settings such as variations in accents, slang, background noise and interference. We analyze typical errors and the limitations of the models for use in commercial settings.
abstract_zh: 虽然土耳其语被列为资源匮乏的语言，但有关土耳其语自动语音识别 (ASR) 的文献相对较旧。在本报告中，我们介绍了使用 HUBERT 进行语音表示学习的土耳其 ASR 的研究结果。我们利用在线资源中收集的大规模数据来研究土耳其语的 HUBERT 预训练。我们使用来自 YouTube 的 6,500 小时的语音数据来预训练我们的模型。结果表明，这些模型尚未准备好用于商业用途，因为它们对于现实环境中通常发生的干扰（例如口音、俚语、背景噪音和干扰的变化）不具有鲁棒性。我们分析了商业环境中使用的模型的典型错误和局限性。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究使用自监督语音表示学习（HUBERT）提升土耳其语自动语音识别（ASR）性能的实验。
AI.motivation: 土耳其语作为低资源语言，现有ASR研究较为陈旧，需探索新方法以提高识别效果。
AI.method: 基于HUBERT模型，利用从YouTube收集的6,500小时土耳其语语音数据进行预训练，并测试其在真实场景中的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 模型在真实环境中对口音、俚语、背景噪声等干扰因素表现脆弱，错误率较高，尚未达到商业应用标准。
AI.conclusion: 当前自监督学习方法在土耳其语ASR中仍存在显著局限性，需进一步优化模型鲁棒性和数据多样性以满足实际需求。

authors_text: Pushyami Kaveti,Shankara Narayanan Vaidyanathan,Arvind Thamilchelvan,Hanumant Singh
title: Design and Evaluation of a Generic Visual SLAM Framework for Multi-Camera Systems
title_zh: 多摄像头系统通用视觉 SLAM 框架的设计和评估
comment: ef:Nov 2023 IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters PP(99):1-8
comments: ef:Nov 2023 IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters PP(99):1-8
abstract: Multi-camera systems have been shown to improve the accuracy and robustness of SLAM estimates, yet state-of-the-art SLAM systems predominantly support monocular or stereo setups. This paper presents a generic sparse visual SLAM framework capable of running on any number of cameras and in any arrangement. Our SLAM system uses the generalized camera model, which allows us to represent an arbitrary multi-camera system as a single imaging device. Additionally, it takes advantage of the overlapping fields of view (FoV) by extracting cross-matched features across cameras in the rig. This limits the linear rise in the number of features with the number of cameras and keeps the computational load in check while enabling an accurate representation of the scene. We evaluate our method in terms of accuracy, robustness, and run time on indoor and outdoor datasets that include challenging real-world scenarios such as narrow corridors, featureless spaces, and dynamic objects. We show that our system can adapt to different camera configurations and allows real-time execution for typical robotic applications. Finally, we benchmark the impact of the critical design parameters - the number of cameras and the overlap between their FoV that define the camera configuration for SLAM. All our software and datasets are freely available for further research.
summary: Multi-camera systems have been shown to improve the accuracy and robustness of SLAM estimates, yet state-of-the-art SLAM systems predominantly support monocular or stereo setups. This paper presents a generic sparse visual SLAM framework capable of running on any number of cameras and in any arrangement. Our SLAM system uses the generalized camera model, which allows us to represent an arbitrary multi-camera system as a single imaging device. Additionally, it takes advantage of the overlapping fields of view (FoV) by extracting cross-matched features across cameras in the rig. This limits the linear rise in the number of features with the number of cameras and keeps the computational load in check while enabling an accurate representation of the scene. We evaluate our method in terms of accuracy, robustness, and run time on indoor and outdoor datasets that include challenging real-world scenarios such as narrow corridors, featureless spaces, and dynamic objects. We show that our system can adapt to different camera configurations and allows real-time execution for typical robotic applications. Finally, we benchmark the impact of the critical design parameters - the number of cameras and the overlap between their FoV that define the camera configuration for SLAM. All our software and datasets are freely available for further research.
abstract_zh: 多摄像头系统已被证明可以提高 SLAM 估计的准确性和鲁棒性，但最先进的 SLAM 系统主要支持单目或立体设置。本文提出了一种通用的稀疏视觉 SLAM 框架，能够在任意数量的摄像机上以任意排列方式运行。我们的 SLAM 系统使用广义相机模型，这使我们能够将任意多相机系统表示为单个成像设备。此外，它还通过提取设备中摄像机之间的交叉匹配特征来利用重叠视场 (FoV)。这限制了特征数量随摄像机数量的线性增加，并在能够准确表示场景的同时控制计算负载。我们根据室内和室外数据集的准确性、鲁棒性和运行时间来评估我们的方法，这些数据集包括具有挑战性的现实场景，例如狭窄的走廊、无特征的空间和动态物体。我们展示了我们的系统可以适应不同的相机配置，并允许实时执行典型的机器人应用。最后，我们对关键设计参数的影响进行基准测试 - 相机数量以及定义 SLAM 相机配置的 FoV 之间的重叠。我们所有的软件和数据集均可免费用于进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并评估了一种适用于多摄像头系统的通用视觉SLAM框架，通过通用相机模型和跨摄像头特征匹配提升系统灵活性与计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有SLAM系统多支持单目或双目设置，难以适应多摄像头系统的复杂配置，而多摄像头可提升定位精度与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用通用相机模型将多摄像头系统抽象为单一设备，利用重叠视野提取跨摄像头匹配特征，控制特征数量增长并优化计算负载。
AI.result: 系统在室内外数据集（含狭窄走廊、无特征区域等挑战场景）中验证了准确性、鲁棒性及实时性，并公开了软件和数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效支持多摄像头配置的SLAM任务，为机器人应用提供实时解决方案，且关键参数对系统性能的影响得到量化分析。

search_text: Design and Evaluation of a Generic Visual SLAM Framework for Multi-Camera Systems 多摄像头系统通用视觉 SLAM 框架的设计和评估 Multi-camera systems have been shown to improve the accuracy and robustness of SLAM estimates, yet state-of-the-art SLAM systems predominantly support monocular or stereo setups. This paper presents a generic sparse visual SLAM framework capable of running on any number of cameras and in any arrangement. Our SLAM system uses the generalized camera model, which allows us to represent an arbitrary multi-camera system as a single imaging device. Additionally, it takes advantage of the overlapping fields of view (FoV) by extracting cross-matched features across cameras in the rig. This limits the linear rise in the number of features with the number of cameras and keeps the computational load in check while enabling an accurate representation of the scene. We evaluate our method in terms of accuracy, robustness, and run time on indoor and outdoor datasets that include challenging real-world scenarios such as narrow corridors, featureless spaces, and dynamic objects. We show that our system can adapt to different camera configurations and allows real-time execution for typical robotic applications. Finally, we benchmark the impact of the critical design parameters - the number of cameras and the overlap between their FoV that define the camera configuration for SLAM. All our software and datasets are freely available for further research. 多摄像头系统已被证明可以提高 SLAM 估计的准确性和鲁棒性，但最先进的 SLAM 系统主要支持单目或立体设置。本文提出了一种通用的稀疏视觉 SLAM 框架，能够在任意数量的摄像机上以任意排列方式运行。我们的 SLAM 系统使用广义相机模型，这使我们能够将任意多相机系统表示为单个成像设备。此外，它还通过提取设备中摄像机之间的交叉匹配特征来利用重叠视场 (FoV)。这限制了特征数量随摄像机数量的线性增加，并在能够准确表示场景的同时控制计算负载。我们根据室内和室外数据集的准确性、鲁棒性和运行时间来评估我们的方法，这些数据集包括具有挑战性的现实场景，例如狭窄的走廊、无特征的空间和动态物体。我们展示了我们的系统可以适应不同的相机配置，并允许实时执行典型的机器人应用。最后，我们对关键设计参数的影响进行基准测试 - 相机数量以及定义 SLAM 相机配置的 FoV 之间的重叠。我们所有的软件和数据集均可免费用于进一步研究。 本文设计并评估了一种适用于多摄像头系统的通用视觉SLAM框架，通过通用相机模型和跨摄像头特征匹配提升系统灵活性与计算效率。 Pushyami Kaveti,Shankara Narayanan Vaidyanathan,Arvind Thamilchelvan,Hanumant Singh cs.RO

authors_text: Md Masudur Rahman,Yexiang Xue
title: Bootstrap Advantage Estimation for Policy Optimization in Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 强化学习中策略优化的 Bootstrap 优势估计
abstract: This paper proposes an advantage estimation approach based on data augmentation for policy optimization. Unlike using data augmentation on the input to learn value and policy function as existing methods use, our method uses data augmentation to compute a bootstrap advantage estimation. This Bootstrap Advantage Estimation (BAE) is then used for learning and updating the gradient of policy and value function. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, we conducted experiments on several environments. These environments are from three benchmarks: Procgen, Deepmind Control, and Pybullet, which include both image and vector-based observations; discrete and continuous action spaces. We observe that our method reduces the policy and the value loss better than the Generalized advantage estimation (GAE) method and eventually improves cumulative return. Furthermore, our method performs better than two recently proposed data augmentation techniques (RAD and DRAC). Overall, our method performs better empirically than baselines in sample efficiency and generalization, where the agent is tested in unseen environments.
summary: This paper proposes an advantage estimation approach based on data augmentation for policy optimization. Unlike using data augmentation on the input to learn value and policy function as existing methods use, our method uses data augmentation to compute a bootstrap advantage estimation. This Bootstrap Advantage Estimation (BAE) is then used for learning and updating the gradient of policy and value function. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, we conducted experiments on several environments. These environments are from three benchmarks: Procgen, Deepmind Control, and Pybullet, which include both image and vector-based observations; discrete and continuous action spaces. We observe that our method reduces the policy and the value loss better than the Generalized advantage estimation (GAE) method and eventually improves cumulative return. Furthermore, our method performs better than two recently proposed data augmentation techniques (RAD and DRAC). Overall, our method performs better empirically than baselines in sample efficiency and generalization, where the agent is tested in unseen environments.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于数据增强的策略优化优势估计方法。与现有方法使用的输入数据增强来学习价值和策略函数不同，我们的方法使用数据增强来计算引导优势估计。然后使用该引导优势估计（BAE）来学习和更新策略和价值函数的梯度。为了证明我们方法的有效性，我们在多个环境中进行了实验。这些环境来自三个基准：Procgen、Deepmind Control 和 Pybullet，其中包括基于图像和矢量的观察；离散和连续的动作空间。我们观察到，我们的方法比广义优势估计（GAE）方法更好地减少了策略和价值损失，并最终提高了累积回报。此外，我们的方法比最近提出的两种数据增强技术（RAD 和 DRAC）表现更好。总的来说，我们的方法在样本效率和泛化方面比基线表现得更好，其中代理是在看不见的环境中进行测试的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于数据增强的引导优势估计（BAE）方法，用于强化学习中的策略优化，通过改进优势估计提升策略和值函数的学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在输入数据上使用数据增强学习策略和值函数，但未充分挖掘数据增强在优势估计中的潜力，导致样本效率和泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 利用数据增强生成多样化样本，计算引导优势估计（BAE），并基于BAE更新策略和值函数的梯度，替代传统GAE方法。
AI.result: 在Procgen、Deepmind Control和Pybullet基准测试中，BAE方法在样本效率和泛化能力上优于GAE、RAD和DRAC等基线方法，提升累积回报并降低策略与值损失。
AI.conclusion: BAE方法通过数据增强改进优势估计，有效提升了策略优化的样本效率和跨环境泛化能力，为强化学习提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Yuan Luo
title: SHINE: SubHypergraph Inductive Neural nEtwork
title_zh: SHINE：子超图归纳神经网络
comment: 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Hypergraph neural networks can model multi-way connections among nodes of the graphs, which are common in real-world applications such as genetic medicine. In particular, genetic pathways or gene sets encode molecular functions driven by multiple genes, naturally represented as hyperedges. Thus, hypergraph-guided embedding can capture functional relations in learned representations. Existing hypergraph neural network models often focus on node-level or graph-level inference. There is an unmet need in learning powerful representations of subgraphs of hypergraphs in real-world applications. For example, a cancer patient can be viewed as a subgraph of genes harboring mutations in the patient, while all the genes are connected by hyperedges that correspond to pathways representing specific molecular functions. For accurate inductive subgraph prediction, we propose SubHypergraph Inductive Neural nEtwork (SHINE). SHINE uses informative genetic pathways that encode molecular functions as hyperedges to connect genes as nodes. SHINE jointly optimizes the objectives of end-to-end subgraph classification and hypergraph nodes' similarity regularization. SHINE simultaneously learns representations for both genes and pathways using strongly dual attention message passing. The learned representations are aggregated via a subgraph attention layer and used to train a multilayer perceptron for inductive subgraph inferencing. We evaluated SHINE against a wide array of state-of-the-art (hyper)graph neural networks, XGBoost, NMF and polygenic risk score models, using large scale NGS and curated datasets. SHINE outperformed all comparison models significantly, and yielded interpretable disease models with functional insights.
summary: Hypergraph neural networks can model multi-way connections among nodes of the graphs, which are common in real-world applications such as genetic medicine. In particular, genetic pathways or gene sets encode molecular functions driven by multiple genes, naturally represented as hyperedges. Thus, hypergraph-guided embedding can capture functional relations in learned representations. Existing hypergraph neural network models often focus on node-level or graph-level inference. There is an unmet need in learning powerful representations of subgraphs of hypergraphs in real-world applications. For example, a cancer patient can be viewed as a subgraph of genes harboring mutations in the patient, while all the genes are connected by hyperedges that correspond to pathways representing specific molecular functions. For accurate inductive subgraph prediction, we propose SubHypergraph Inductive Neural nEtwork (SHINE). SHINE uses informative genetic pathways that encode molecular functions as hyperedges to connect genes as nodes. SHINE jointly optimizes the objectives of end-to-end subgraph classification and hypergraph nodes' similarity regularization. SHINE simultaneously learns representations for both genes and pathways using strongly dual attention message passing. The learned representations are aggregated via a subgraph attention layer and used to train a multilayer perceptron for inductive subgraph inferencing. We evaluated SHINE against a wide array of state-of-the-art (hyper)graph neural networks, XGBoost, NMF and polygenic risk score models, using large scale NGS and curated datasets. SHINE outperformed all comparison models significantly, and yielded interpretable disease models with functional insights.
abstract_zh: 超图神经网络可以对图节点之间的多路连接进行建模，这在遗传医学等现实应用中很常见。特别是，遗传途径或基因集编码由多个基因驱动的分子功能，自然地表现为超边。因此，超图引导的嵌入可以捕获学习表示中的函数关系。现有的超图神经网络模型通常侧重于节点级或图级推理。在现实应用中学习超图子图的强大表示的需求尚未得到满足。例如，癌症患者可以被视为患者体内携带突变的基因的子图，而所有基因都通过与代表特定分子功能的通路相对应的超边连接。为了准确的归纳子图预测，我们提出了子超图归纳神经网络（SHINE）。 SHINE 使用信息丰富的遗传途径，将分子功能编码为超边，将基因连接为节点。 SHINE联合优化了端到端子图分类和超图节点相似度正则化的目标。 SHINE 使用强双重注意力消息传递同时学习基因和通路的表示。学习到的表示通过子图注意力层进行聚合，并用于训练多层感知器进行归纳子图推理。我们使用大规模 NGS 和精选数据集，针对各种最先进的（超）图神经网络、XGBoost、NMF 和多基因风险评分模型对 SHINE 进行了评估。 SHINE 显着优于所有比较模型，并产生了具有功能见解的可解释疾病模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SHINE模型，用于通过超图神经网络实现子超图的归纳预测，特别针对基因医学中的功能关系建模。
AI.motivation: 现有超图神经网络多关注节点或图级推理，缺乏对子图表示学习的有效方法，而实际应用（如癌症患者基因突变分析）需要精准的子图预测。
AI.method: SHINE将基因作为节点、功能通路作为超边，通过双注意力消息传递联合优化子图分类与节点相似性正则化目标，并利用子图注意力层聚合表示以训练多层感知机。
AI.result: 在大规模NGS数据和 curated 数据集上，SHINE显著优于现有超图神经网络、XGBoost、NMF等模型，且生成可解释的疾病功能模型。
AI.conclusion: SHINE通过联合学习基因与通路表示，有效解决了子超图归纳预测问题，在性能和可解释性上均表现优异。

search_text: SHINE: SubHypergraph Inductive Neural nEtwork SHINE：子超图归纳神经网络 Hypergraph neural networks can model multi-way connections among nodes of the graphs, which are common in real-world applications such as genetic medicine. In particular, genetic pathways or gene sets encode molecular functions driven by multiple genes, naturally represented as hyperedges. Thus, hypergraph-guided embedding can capture functional relations in learned representations. Existing hypergraph neural network models often focus on node-level or graph-level inference. There is an unmet need in learning powerful representations of subgraphs of hypergraphs in real-world applications. For example, a cancer patient can be viewed as a subgraph of genes harboring mutations in the patient, while all the genes are connected by hyperedges that correspond to pathways representing specific molecular functions. For accurate inductive subgraph prediction, we propose SubHypergraph Inductive Neural nEtwork (SHINE). SHINE uses informative genetic pathways that encode molecular functions as hyperedges to connect genes as nodes. SHINE jointly optimizes the objectives of end-to-end subgraph classification and hypergraph nodes' similarity regularization. SHINE simultaneously learns representations for both genes and pathways using strongly dual attention message passing. The learned representations are aggregated via a subgraph attention layer and used to train a multilayer perceptron for inductive subgraph inferencing. We evaluated SHINE against a wide array of state-of-the-art (hyper)graph neural networks, XGBoost, NMF and polygenic risk score models, using large scale NGS and curated datasets. SHINE outperformed all comparison models significantly, and yielded interpretable disease models with functional insights. 超图神经网络可以对图节点之间的多路连接进行建模，这在遗传医学等现实应用中很常见。特别是，遗传途径或基因集编码由多个基因驱动的分子功能，自然地表现为超边。因此，超图引导的嵌入可以捕获学习表示中的函数关系。现有的超图神经网络模型通常侧重于节点级或图级推理。在现实应用中学习超图子图的强大表示的需求尚未得到满足。例如，癌症患者可以被视为患者体内携带突变的基因的子图，而所有基因都通过与代表特定分子功能的通路相对应的超边连接。为了准确的归纳子图预测，我们提出了子超图归纳神经网络（SHINE）。 SHINE 使用信息丰富的遗传途径，将分子功能编码为超边，将基因连接为节点。 SHINE联合优化了端到端子图分类和超图节点相似度正则化的目标。 SHINE 使用强双重注意力消息传递同时学习基因和通路的表示。学习到的表示通过子图注意力层进行聚合，并用于训练多层感知器进行归纳子图推理。我们使用大规模 NGS 和精选数据集，针对各种最先进的（超）图神经网络、XGBoost、NMF 和多基因风险评分模型对 SHINE 进行了评估。 SHINE 显着优于所有比较模型，并产生了具有功能见解的可解释疾病模型。 本文提出SHINE模型，用于通过超图神经网络实现子超图的归纳预测，特别针对基因医学中的功能关系建模。 Yuan Luo cs.LG,cs.AI,q-bio.GN,q-bio.MN

authors_text: Jaehoon Ko,Kyusun Cho,Daewon Choi,Kwangrok Ryoo,Seungryong Kim
title: 3D GAN Inversion with Pose Optimization
title_zh: 具有姿势优化的 3D GAN 反演
abstract: With the recent advances in NeRF-based 3D aware GANs quality, projecting an image into the latent space of these 3D-aware GANs has a natural advantage over 2D GAN inversion: not only does it allow multi-view consistent editing of the projected image, but it also enables 3D reconstruction and novel view synthesis when given only a single image. However, the explicit viewpoint control acts as a main hindrance in the 3D GAN inversion process, as both camera pose and latent code have to be optimized simultaneously to reconstruct the given image. Most works that explore the latent space of the 3D-aware GANs rely on ground-truth camera viewpoint or deformable 3D model, thus limiting their applicability. In this work, we introduce a generalizable 3D GAN inversion method that infers camera viewpoint and latent code simultaneously to enable multi-view consistent semantic image editing. The key to our approach is to leverage pre-trained estimators for better initialization and utilize the pixel-wise depth calculated from NeRF parameters to better reconstruct the given image. We conduct extensive experiments on image reconstruction and editing both quantitatively and qualitatively, and further compare our results with 2D GAN-based editing to demonstrate the advantages of utilizing the latent space of 3D GANs. Additional results and visualizations are available at https://3dgan-inversion.github.io .
summary: With the recent advances in NeRF-based 3D aware GANs quality, projecting an image into the latent space of these 3D-aware GANs has a natural advantage over 2D GAN inversion: not only does it allow multi-view consistent editing of the projected image, but it also enables 3D reconstruction and novel view synthesis when given only a single image. However, the explicit viewpoint control acts as a main hindrance in the 3D GAN inversion process, as both camera pose and latent code have to be optimized simultaneously to reconstruct the given image. Most works that explore the latent space of the 3D-aware GANs rely on ground-truth camera viewpoint or deformable 3D model, thus limiting their applicability. In this work, we introduce a generalizable 3D GAN inversion method that infers camera viewpoint and latent code simultaneously to enable multi-view consistent semantic image editing. The key to our approach is to leverage pre-trained estimators for better initialization and utilize the pixel-wise depth calculated from NeRF parameters to better reconstruct the given image. We conduct extensive experiments on image reconstruction and editing both quantitatively and qualitatively, and further compare our results with 2D GAN-based editing to demonstrate the advantages of utilizing the latent space of 3D GANs. Additional results and visualizations are available at https://3dgan-inversion.github.io .
abstract_zh: 随着基于 NeRF 的 3D 感知 GAN 质量的最新进展，将图像投影到这些 3D 感知 GAN 的潜在空间中比 2D GAN 反转具有天然的优势：它不仅允许对投影图像进行多视图一致编辑，而且在仅给出单个图像时还可以实现 3D 重建和新颖的视图合成。然而，显式视点控制是 3D GAN 反演过程中的主要障碍，因为必须同时优化相机姿态和潜在代码才能重建给定图像。大多数探索 3D 感知 GAN 潜在空间的作品都依赖于地面实况相机视点或可变形 3D 模型，从而限制了它们的适用性。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种可推广的 3D GAN 反演方法，该方法可同时推断相机视点和潜在代码，以实现多视图一致的语义图像编辑。我们方法的关键是利用预先训练的估计器来更好地初始化，并利用根据 NeRF 参数计算出的像素深度来更好地重建给定图像。我们对图像重建和编辑进行了大量的定量和定性实验，并进一步将我们的结果与基于 2D GAN 的编辑进行比较，以证明利用 3D GAN 潜在空间的优势。其他结果和可视化可在 https://3dgan-inversion.github.io 上获得。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可同时推断相机视角和潜在码的3D GAN反演方法，实现多视角一致的语义图像编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有3D GAN反演方法依赖真实相机视角或可变形3D模型，限制了适用性，需解决视角控制与潜在码优化的同步问题。
AI.method: 利用预训练估计器初始化，结合NeRF参数计算的像素级深度，联合优化相机姿态和潜在码实现图像重建。
AI.result: 在图像重建和编辑任务中取得定量与定性实验优势，相比2D GAN编辑展示了3D GAN潜在空间的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过联合优化视角与潜在码，提升了3D GAN反演的通用性与多视角编辑一致性。

authors_text: Frans van der Sluis
title: A Conversationalist Approach to Information Quality in Information Interaction and Retrieval
title_zh: 信息交互和检索中信息质量的会话主义方法
comment: ACM CHIIR 2022 Workshop on Information Quality in Information Interaction and Retrieval, March 14--18, Regensburg, Germany
comments: ACM CHIIR 2022 Workshop on Information Quality in Information Interaction and Retrieval, March 14--18, Regensburg, Germany
abstract: Rather than using (proxies of) end user or expert judgment to decide on the ranking of information, this paper asks whether conversations about information quality might offer a feasible and valuable addition for ranking information. We introduce a theoretical framework for information quality, outlining how information interaction should be perceived as a conversation and quality be evaluated as a conversational contribution. Next, an overview is given of different systems of social alignment and their value for assessing quality and ranking information. We propose that a collaborative approach to quality assessment is preferable and raise key questions about the feasibility and value of such an approach for ranking information. We conclude that information quality is an inherently interactive concept, which involves an interaction between users of different backgrounds and in different situations as well as of quality signals on users' search behavior and experience.
summary: Rather than using (proxies of) end user or expert judgment to decide on the ranking of information, this paper asks whether conversations about information quality might offer a feasible and valuable addition for ranking information. We introduce a theoretical framework for information quality, outlining how information interaction should be perceived as a conversation and quality be evaluated as a conversational contribution. Next, an overview is given of different systems of social alignment and their value for assessing quality and ranking information. We propose that a collaborative approach to quality assessment is preferable and raise key questions about the feasibility and value of such an approach for ranking information. We conclude that information quality is an inherently interactive concept, which involves an interaction between users of different backgrounds and in different situations as well as of quality signals on users' search behavior and experience.
abstract_zh: 本文不是使用最终用户（的代理）或专家判断来决定信息的排名，而是询问有关信息质量的对话是否可以为信息排名提供可行且有价值的补充。我们介绍了信息质量的理论框架，概述了如何将信息交互视为对话，以及如何将质量评估为对话贡献。接下来，概述不同的社会一致性系统及其对于评估质量和排名信息的价值。我们建议采用协作方法进行质量评估，并提出了有关这种信息排名方法的可行性和价值的关键问题。我们的结论是，信息质量是一个本质上交互的概念，它涉及不同背景、不同情况的用户之间的交互以及用户搜索行为和体验的质量信号。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过对话方式评估信息质量，将其视为信息交互与检索中的核心要素，并探讨协作评估方法对信息排名的潜在价值。
AI.motivation: 传统信息质量评估依赖用户或专家判断，但存在局限性。本文旨在探索对话机制能否提供更动态、互动的质量评估框架。
AI.method: 构建理论框架，将信息交互视为对话过程，分析社会对齐系统在质量评估中的作用，并提出协作评估的可行性问题。
AI.result: 得出信息质量是交互性概念的结论，强调用户背景差异、情境因素及质量信号对搜索行为的影响。
AI.conclusion: 信息质量评估需融合多用户交互与情境化体验，协作方法可能成为改进信息排名的有效途径。

method: 构建理论框架，将信息交互视为对话过程，分析社会对齐系统在质量评估中的作用，并提出协作评估的可行性问题。
result: 得出信息质量是交互性概念的结论，强调用户背景差异、情境因素及质量信号对搜索行为的影响。
conclusion: 信息质量评估需融合多用户交互与情境化体验，协作方法可能成为改进信息排名的有效途径。
search_text: A Conversationalist Approach to Information Quality in Information Interaction and Retrieval 信息交互和检索中信息质量的会话主义方法 Rather than using (proxies of) end user or expert judgment to decide on the ranking of information, this paper asks whether conversations about information quality might offer a feasible and valuable addition for ranking information. We introduce a theoretical framework for information quality, outlining how information interaction should be perceived as a conversation and quality be evaluated as a conversational contribution. Next, an overview is given of different systems of social alignment and their value for assessing quality and ranking information. We propose that a collaborative approach to quality assessment is preferable and raise key questions about the feasibility and value of such an approach for ranking information. We conclude that information quality is an inherently interactive concept, which involves an interaction between users of different backgrounds and in different situations as well as of quality signals on users' search behavior and experience. 本文不是使用最终用户（的代理）或专家判断来决定信息的排名，而是询问有关信息质量的对话是否可以为信息排名提供可行且有价值的补充。我们介绍了信息质量的理论框架，概述了如何将信息交互视为对话，以及如何将质量评估为对话贡献。接下来，概述不同的社会一致性系统及其对于评估质量和排名信息的价值。我们建议采用协作方法进行质量评估，并提出了有关这种信息排名方法的可行性和价值的关键问题。我们的结论是，信息质量是一个本质上交互的概念，它涉及不同背景、不同情况的用户之间的交互以及用户搜索行为和体验的质量信号。 本文提出通过对话方式评估信息质量，将其视为信息交互与检索中的核心要素，并探讨协作评估方法对信息排名的潜在价值。 Frans van der Sluis cs.IR,cs.HC

authors_text: Khashayar Namdar,Matthias W. Wagner,Kareem Kudus,Cynthia Hawkins,Uri Tabori,Brigit Ertl-Wagner,Farzad Khalvati
title: Improving Deep Learning Models for Pediatric Low-Grade Glioma Tumors Molecular Subtype Identification Using 3D Probability Distributions of Tumor Location
title_zh: 使用肿瘤位置的 3D 概率分布改进儿童低级别胶质瘤肿瘤分子亚型识别的深度学习模型
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.14776
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.14776
abstract: Background and Purpose: Pediatric low-grade glioma (pLGG) is the most common type of brain tumor in children, and identification of molecular markers for pLGG is crucial for successful treatment planning. Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models for pLGG subtype identification rely on tumor segmentation. We hypothesize tumor segmentations are suboptimal and thus, we propose to augment the CNN models using tumor location probability in MRI data. Materials and Methods: Our REB-approved retrospective study included MRI Fluid-Attenuated Inversion Recovery (FLAIR) sequences of 143 BRAF fused and 71 BRAF V600E mutated tumors. Tumor segmentations (regions of interest (ROIs)) were provided by a pediatric neuroradiology fellow and verified by a senior pediatric neuroradiologist. In each experiment, we randomly split the data into development and test with an 80/20 ratio. We combined the 3D binary ROI masks for each class in the development dataset to derive the probability density functions (PDF) of tumor location, and developed three pipelines: location-based, CNN-based, and hybrid. Results: We repeated the experiment with different model initializations and data splits 100 times and calculated the Area Under Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve (AUC). The location-based classifier achieved an AUC of 77.90, 95% confidence interval (CI) (76.76, 79.03). CNN-based classifiers achieved AUC of 86.11, CI (84.96, 87.25), while the tumor-location-guided CNNs outperformed the formers with an average AUC of 88.64 CI (87.57, 89.72), which was statistically significant (Student's t-test p-value 0.0018). Conclusion: We achieved statistically significant improvements by incorporating tumor location into the CNN models. Our results suggest that manually segmented ROIs may not be optimal.

Materials and Methods: Our REB-approved retrospective study included MRI Fluid-Attenuated Inversion Recovery (FLAIR) sequences of 143 BRAF fused and 71 BRAF V600E mutated tumors. Tumor segmentations (regions of interest (ROIs)) were provided by a pediatric neuroradiology fellow and verified by a senior pediatric neuroradiologist. In each experiment, we randomly split the data into development and test with an 80/20 ratio. We combined the 3D binary ROI masks for each class in the development dataset to derive the probability density functions (PDF) of tumor location, and developed three pipelines: location-based, CNN-based, and hybrid. Results: We repeated the experiment with different model initializations and data splits 100 times and calculated the Area Under Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve (AUC). The location-based classifier achieved an AUC of 77.90, 95% confidence interval (CI) (76.76, 79.03). CNN-based classifiers achieved AUC of 86.11, CI (84.96, 87.25), while the tumor-location-guided CNNs outperformed the formers with an average AUC of 88.64 CI (87.57, 89.72), which was statistically significant (Student's t-test p-value 0.0018). Conclusion: We achieved statistically significant improvements by incorporating tumor location into the CNN models. Our results suggest that manually segmented ROIs may not be optimal.
abstract_zh: 背景和目的：小儿低级别胶质瘤（pLGG）是儿童最常见的脑肿瘤类型，pLGG 分子标记物的鉴定对于成功的治疗计划至关重要。用于 pLGG 亚型识别的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 模型依赖于肿瘤分割。我们假设肿瘤分割不是最优的，因此，我们建议使用 MRI 数据中的肿瘤位置概率来增强 CNN 模型。材料和方法：我们的 REB 批准的回顾性研究包括 143 个 BRAF 融合肿瘤和 71 个 BRAF V600E 突变肿瘤的 MRI 流体衰减反转恢复 (FLAIR) 序列。肿瘤分割（感兴趣区域 (ROI)）由儿科神经放射学研究员提供，并由高级儿科神经放射学家验证。在每个实验中，我们以 80/20 的比例将数据随机分为开发和测试。我们结合了开发数据集中每个类别的 3D 二进制 ROI 掩模来导出肿瘤位置的概率密度函数 (PDF)，并开发了三种管道：基于位置、基于 CNN 和混合。结果：我们使用不同的模型初始化和数据分割重复实验 100 次，并计算了接收者操作特征曲线下的面积 (AUC)。基于位置的分类器的 AUC 为 77.90，置信区间 (CI) 为 95%（76.76，79.03）。基于 CNN 的分类器的 AUC 为 86.11，CI（84.96，87.25），而肿瘤定位引导的 CNN 优于前者，平均 AUC 为 88.64 CI（87.57，89.72），具有统计显着性（学生 t 检验 p 值 0.0018）。结论：通过将肿瘤定位纳入 CNN 模型，我们取得了统计学上的显着改进。我们的结果表明，手动分割的 ROI 可能不是最佳的。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过结合肿瘤位置的概率分布，改进深度学习模型对儿童低级别胶质瘤分子亚型的识别。
AI.motivation: 现有卷积神经网络（CNN）模型依赖肿瘤分割结果，但手动分割可能存在偏差，因此提出利用MRI数据中的肿瘤位置概率分布优化模型。
AI.method: 基于伦理批准的回顾性研究，收集143例BRAF融合和71例BRAF V600E突变肿瘤的MRI数据，通过分割区域生成三维概率密度函数，并构建基于位置、CNN和混合三种管道进行对比实验。
AI.result: 位置引导的CNN模型平均AUC达88.64（95%CI 87.57-89.72），显著优于纯CNN（86.11）和位置分类器（77.90）（p=0.0018）。
AI.conclusion: 将肿瘤位置信息整合至CNN模型可显著提升分子亚型识别性能，提示手动分割的ROI可能并非最优方案。

authors_text: Arnab Sen Sharma,Mohammad Ruhul Amin,Muztaba Fuad
title: Augmenting Online Classes with an Attention Tracking Tool May Improve Student Engagement
title_zh: 使用注意力跟踪工具增强在线课程可以提高学生的参与度
abstract: Online remote learning has certain advantages, such as higher flexibility and greater inclusiveness. However, a caveat is the teachers' limited ability to monitor student interaction during an online class, especially while teachers are sharing their screens. We have taken feedback from 12 teachers experienced in teaching undergraduate-level online classes on the necessity of an attention tracking tool to understand student engagement during an online class. This paper outlines the design of such a monitoring tool that automatically tracks the attentiveness of the whole class by tracking students' gazes on the screen and alerts the teacher when the attention score goes below a certain threshold. We assume the benefits are twofold; 1) teachers will be able to ascertain if the students are attentive or being engaged with the lecture contents and 2) the students will become more attentive in online classes because of this passive monitoring system. In this paper, we present the preliminary design and feasibility of using the proposed tool and discuss its applicability in augmenting online classes. Finally, we surveyed 31 students asking their opinion on the usability as well as the ethical and privacy concerns of using such a monitoring tool.
summary: Online remote learning has certain advantages, such as higher flexibility and greater inclusiveness. However, a caveat is the teachers' limited ability to monitor student interaction during an online class, especially while teachers are sharing their screens. We have taken feedback from 12 teachers experienced in teaching undergraduate-level online classes on the necessity of an attention tracking tool to understand student engagement during an online class. This paper outlines the design of such a monitoring tool that automatically tracks the attentiveness of the whole class by tracking students' gazes on the screen and alerts the teacher when the attention score goes below a certain threshold. We assume the benefits are twofold; 1) teachers will be able to ascertain if the students are attentive or being engaged with the lecture contents and 2) the students will become more attentive in online classes because of this passive monitoring system. In this paper, we present the preliminary design and feasibility of using the proposed tool and discuss its applicability in augmenting online classes. Finally, we surveyed 31 students asking their opinion on the usability as well as the ethical and privacy concerns of using such a monitoring tool.
abstract_zh: 在线远程学习具有一定的优势，例如更高的灵活性和更大的包容性。然而，需要注意的是，教师在在线课堂上监控学生互动的能力有限，尤其是当教师共享屏幕时。我们收集了 12 位具有本科在线课程教学经验的教师的反馈，认为有必要使用注意力跟踪工具来了解学生在在线课程中的参与情况。本文概述了这样一个监控工具的设计，该工具通过跟踪学生在屏幕上的注视来自动跟踪全班的注意力，并在注意力分数低于某个阈值时向老师发出警报。我们假设好处是双重的； 1）教师将能够确定学生是否专心或专注于讲座内容；2）由于这种被动监控系统，学生在在线课程中会变得更加专心。在本文中，我们介绍了使用该工具的初步设计和可行性，并讨论了其在增强在线课程方面的适用性。最后，我们对 31 名学生进行了调查，询问他们对使用此类监控工具的可用性以及道德和隐私问题的看法。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种通过追踪学生屏幕注视来提高在线课堂学生参与度的注意力监测工具，并探讨其可行性与伦理问题。
AI.motivation: 在线教学中教师难以实时监控学生互动，尤其在屏幕共享时无法判断学生是否专注，需通过技术手段辅助监测学生注意力。
AI.method: 基于12名教师反馈设计注意力追踪工具，通过追踪学生注视屏幕的行为并设置阈值触发警报；同时调研31名学生评估工具可用性及隐私伦理问题。
AI.result: 初步验证了工具的可行性，学生调研显示工具在提升专注度方面有潜力，但存在隐私担忧等伦理争议。
AI.conclusion: 该工具可作为增强在线教学的辅助手段，但需进一步平衡功能需求与隐私保护，以确保实际应用的可接受性。

result: 初步验证了工具的可行性，学生调研显示工具在提升专注度方面有潜力，但存在隐私担忧等伦理争议。
conclusion: 该工具可作为增强在线教学的辅助手段，但需进一步平衡功能需求与隐私保护，以确保实际应用的可接受性。
search_text: Augmenting Online Classes with an Attention Tracking Tool May Improve Student Engagement 使用注意力跟踪工具增强在线课程可以提高学生的参与度 Online remote learning has certain advantages, such as higher flexibility and greater inclusiveness. However, a caveat is the teachers' limited ability to monitor student interaction during an online class, especially while teachers are sharing their screens. We have taken feedback from 12 teachers experienced in teaching undergraduate-level online classes on the necessity of an attention tracking tool to understand student engagement during an online class. This paper outlines the design of such a monitoring tool that automatically tracks the attentiveness of the whole class by tracking students' gazes on the screen and alerts the teacher when the attention score goes below a certain threshold. We assume the benefits are twofold; 1) teachers will be able to ascertain if the students are attentive or being engaged with the lecture contents and 2) the students will become more attentive in online classes because of this passive monitoring system. In this paper, we present the preliminary design and feasibility of using the proposed tool and discuss its applicability in augmenting online classes. Finally, we surveyed 31 students asking their opinion on the usability as well as the ethical and privacy concerns of using such a monitoring tool. 在线远程学习具有一定的优势，例如更高的灵活性和更大的包容性。然而，需要注意的是，教师在在线课堂上监控学生互动的能力有限，尤其是当教师共享屏幕时。我们收集了 12 位具有本科在线课程教学经验的教师的反馈，认为有必要使用注意力跟踪工具来了解学生在在线课程中的参与情况。本文概述了这样一个监控工具的设计，该工具通过跟踪学生在屏幕上的注视来自动跟踪全班的注意力，并在注意力分数低于某个阈值时向老师发出警报。我们假设好处是双重的； 1）教师将能够确定学生是否专心或专注于讲座内容；2）由于这种被动监控系统，学生在在线课程中会变得更加专心。在本文中，我们介绍了使用该工具的初步设计和可行性，并讨论了其在增强在线课程方面的适用性。最后，我们对 31 名学生进行了调查，询问他们对使用此类监控工具的可用性以及道德和隐私问题的看法。 本文设计了一种通过追踪学生屏幕注视来提高在线课堂学生参与度的注意力监测工具，并探讨其可行性与伦理问题。 Arnab Sen Sharma,Mohammad Ruhul Amin,Muztaba Fuad cs.HC

authors_text: Nikolaos Stathoulopoulos,Anton Koval,George Nikolakopoulos
title: 3DEG: Data-Driven Descriptor Extraction for Global re-localization in subterranean environments
title_zh: 3DEG：数据驱动的描述符提取，用于地下环境中的全局重新定位
abstract: Current global re-localization algorithms are built on top of localization and mapping methods andheavily rely on scan matching and direct point cloud feature extraction and therefore are vulnerable infeatureless demanding environments like caves and tunnels. In this article, we propose a novel globalre-localization framework that: a) does not require an initial guess, like most methods do, while b)it has the capability to offer the top-kcandidates to choose from and last but not least provides anevent-based re-localization trigger module for enabling, and c) supporting completely autonomousrobotic missions. With the focus on subterranean environments with low features, we opt to usedescriptors based on range images from 3D LiDAR scans in order to maintain the depth informationof the environment. In our novel approach, we make use of a state-of-the-art data-driven descriptorextraction framework for place recognition and orientation regression and enhance it with the additionof a junction detection module that also utilizes the descriptors for classification purposes.
summary: Current global re-localization algorithms are built on top of localization and mapping methods andheavily rely on scan matching and direct point cloud feature extraction and therefore are vulnerable infeatureless demanding environments like caves and tunnels. In this article, we propose a novel globalre-localization framework that: a) does not require an initial guess, like most methods do, while b)it has the capability to offer the top-kcandidates to choose from and last but not least provides anevent-based re-localization trigger module for enabling, and c) supporting completely autonomousrobotic missions. With the focus on subterranean environments with low features, we opt to usedescriptors based on range images from 3D LiDAR scans in order to maintain the depth informationof the environment. In our novel approach, we make use of a state-of-the-art data-driven descriptorextraction framework for place recognition and orientation regression and enhance it with the additionof a junction detection module that also utilizes the descriptors for classification purposes.
abstract_zh: 当前的全局重定位算法建立在定位和建图方法之上，严重依赖扫描匹配和直接点云特征提取，因此在洞穴和隧道等无特征的高要求环境中很容易受到攻击。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的全局重新定位框架：a）像大多数方法一样不需要初始猜测，而b）它有能力提供top-k候选者以供选择，最后但并非最不重要的是提供基于事件的重新定位触发模块来启用，以及c）支持完全自主的机器人任务。由于关注特征较低的地下环境，我们选择使用基于 3D LiDAR 扫描的距离图像的描述符，以保持环境的深度信息。在我们的新颖方法中，我们利用最先进的数据驱动描述符提取框架来进行地点识别和方向回归，并通过添加连接点检测模块来增强它，该模块也利用描述符进行分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为3DEG的全局重定位框架，旨在解决地下等特征稀少环境下的机器人自主定位问题。
AI.motivation: 现有全局重定位算法依赖扫描匹配和点云特征提取，在洞穴、隧道等特征缺失环境中表现脆弱，难以满足完全自主的地下任务需求。
AI.method: 基于3D激光雷达点云生成范围图像，结合数据驱动的描述子提取框架进行地点识别和方向回归，并引入关节点检测模块增强分类能力，无需初始猜测且支持事件触发的重定位机制。
AI.result: 在低特征地下环境中实现了鲁棒的全局重定位，可提供Top-k候选位置并支持完全自主机器人任务。
AI.conclusion: 3DEG框架通过融合深度信息与数据驱动描述子，有效解决了传统方法在地下环境中的局限性，为自主地下探索提供了可靠方案。

authors_text: Muhammed Murat Özbek,Süleyman Yıldırım,Muhammet Aksoy,Eric Kernin,Emre Koyuncu
title: Harfang3D Dog-Fight Sandbox: A Reinforcement Learning Research Platform for the Customized Control Tasks of Fighter Aircrafts
title_zh: Harfang3D缠斗沙箱：战斗机定制控制任务的强化学习研究平台
abstract: The advent of deep learning (DL) gave rise to significant breakthroughs in Reinforcement Learning (RL) research. Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithms have reached super-human level skills when applied to vision-based control problems as such in Atari 2600 games where environment states were extracted from pixel information. Unfortunately, these environments are far from being applicable to highly dynamic and complex real-world tasks as in autonomous control of a fighter aircraft since these environments only involve 2D representation of a visual world. Here, we present a semi-realistic flight simulation environment Harfang3D Dog-Fight Sandbox for fighter aircrafts. It is aimed to be a flexible toolbox for the investigation of main challenges in aviation studies using Reinforcement Learning. The program provides easy access to flight dynamics model, environment states, and aerodynamics of the plane enabling user to customize any specific task in order to build intelligent decision making (control) systems via RL. The software also allows deployment of bot aircrafts and development of multi-agent tasks. This way, multiple groups of aircrafts can be configured to be competitive or cooperative agents to perform complicated tasks including Dog Fight. During the experiments, we carried out training for two different scenarios: navigating to a designated location and within visual range (WVR) combat, shortly Dog Fight. Using Deep Reinforcement Learning techniques for both scenarios, we were able to train competent agents that exhibit human-like behaviours. Based on this results, it is confirmed that Harfang3D Dog-Fight Sandbox can be utilized as a 3D realistic RL research platform.
summary: The advent of deep learning (DL) gave rise to significant breakthroughs in Reinforcement Learning (RL) research. Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithms have reached super-human level skills when applied to vision-based control problems as such in Atari 2600 games where environment states were extracted from pixel information. Unfortunately, these environments are far from being applicable to highly dynamic and complex real-world tasks as in autonomous control of a fighter aircraft since these environments only involve 2D representation of a visual world. Here, we present a semi-realistic flight simulation environment Harfang3D Dog-Fight Sandbox for fighter aircrafts. It is aimed to be a flexible toolbox for the investigation of main challenges in aviation studies using Reinforcement Learning. The program provides easy access to flight dynamics model, environment states, and aerodynamics of the plane enabling user to customize any specific task in order to build intelligent decision making (control) systems via RL. The software also allows deployment of bot aircrafts and development of multi-agent tasks. This way, multiple groups of aircrafts can be configured to be competitive or cooperative agents to perform complicated tasks including Dog Fight. During the experiments, we carried out training for two different scenarios: navigating to a designated location and within visual range (WVR) combat, shortly Dog Fight. Using Deep Reinforcement Learning techniques for both scenarios, we were able to train competent agents that exhibit human-like behaviours. Based on this results, it is confirmed that Harfang3D Dog-Fight Sandbox can be utilized as a 3D realistic RL research platform.
abstract_zh: 深度学习（DL）的出现给强化学习（RL）研究带来了重大突破。当深度强化学习 (DRL) 算法应用于基于视觉的控制问题（例如从像素信息提取环境状态的 Atari 2600 游戏）时，其技能已达到超人类水平。不幸的是，这些环境远远不适用于高度动态和复杂的现实世界任务，如战斗机的自主控制，因为这些环境仅涉及视觉世界的 2D 表示。在这里，我们展示了一个用于战斗机的半真实飞行模拟环境 Harfang3D Dog-Fight Sandbox。它的目标是成为一个灵活的工具箱，用于使用强化学习来调查航空研究中的主要挑战。该程序可以轻松访问飞机的飞行动力学模型、环境状态和空气动力学，使用户能够自定义任何特定任务，以便通过 RL 构建智能决策（控制）系统。该软件还允许部署机器人飞机和开发多代理任务。这样，多组飞机可以配置为竞争或合作代理来执行复杂的任务，包括狗斗。在实验过程中，我们针对两种不同的场景进行了训练：导航到指定位置和视距内（WVR）战斗，即“狗斗”。在这两种情况下使用深度强化学习技术，我们能够训练出表现出类人行为的有能力的代理。基于此结果，证实 Harfang3D Dog-Fight Sandbox 可以用作 3D 现实 RL 研究平台。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为Harfang3D Dog-Fight Sandbox的半现实飞行模拟环境，旨在为战斗机控制任务提供强化学习研究平台。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习环境多为2D视觉任务，难以满足战斗机等复杂动态现实场景的研究需求。
AI.method: 构建包含飞行动力学模型、环境状态及空气动力学数据的3D模拟平台，支持用户自定义任务与多智能体对抗/协作模式。
AI.result: 通过深度强化学习训练出具备人类行为特征的智能体，成功完成导航与近距离空战两种场景任务。
AI.conclusion: Harfang3D Dog-Fight Sandbox验证了作为3D现实强化学习研究平台的有效性，可支持航空领域智能决策系统开发。
