Based on this results, it is confirmed that Harfang3D Dog-Fight Sandbox can be utilized as a 3D realistic RL research platform. 深度学习（DL）的出现给强化学习（RL）研究带来了重大突破。当深度强化学习 (DRL) 算法应用于基于视觉的控制问题（例如从像素信息提取环境状态的 Atari 2600 游戏）时，其技能已达到超人类水平。不幸的是，这些环境远远不适用于高度动态和复杂的现实世界任务，如战斗机的自主控制，因为这些环境仅涉及视觉世界的 2D 表示。在这里，我们展示了一个用于战斗机的半真实飞行模拟环境 Harfang3D Dog-Fight Sandbox。它的目标是成为一个灵活的工具箱，用于使用强化学习来调查航空研究中的主要挑战。该程序可以轻松访问飞机的飞行动力学模型、环境状态和空气动力学，使用户能够自定义任何特定任务，以便通过 RL 构建智能决策（控制）系统。该软件还允许部署机器人飞机和开发多代理任务。这样，多组飞机可以配置为竞争或合作代理来执行复杂的任务，包括狗斗。在实验过程中，我们针对两种不同的场景进行了训练：导航到指定位置和视距内（WVR）战斗，即“狗斗”。在这两种情况下使用深度强化学习技术，我们能够训练出表现出类人行为的有能力的代理。基于此结果，证实 Harfang3D Dog-Fight Sandbox 可以用作 3D 现实 RL 研究平台。 本文提出一个名为Harfang3D Dog-Fight Sandbox的半现实飞行模拟环境，旨在为战斗机控制任务提供强化学习研究平台。 Muhammed Murat Özbek,Süleyman Yıldırım,Muhammet Aksoy,Eric Kernin,Emre Koyuncu cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Mahmoud Assran,Randall Balestriero,Quentin Duval,Florian Bordes,Ishan Misra,Piotr Bojanowski,Pascal Vincent,Michael Rabbat,Nicolas Ballas
title: The Hidden Uniform Cluster Prior in Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 自监督学习中的隐藏均匀簇先验
abstract: A successful paradigm in representation learning is to perform self-supervised pretraining using tasks based on mini-batch statistics (e.g., SimCLR, VICReg, SwAV, MSN). We show that in the formulation of all these methods is an overlooked prior to learn features that enable uniform clustering of the data. While this prior has led to remarkably semantic representations when pretraining on class-balanced data, such as ImageNet, we demonstrate that it can hamper performance when pretraining on class-imbalanced data. By moving away from conventional uniformity priors and instead preferring power-law distributed feature clusters, we show that one can improve the quality of the learned representations on real-world class-imbalanced datasets. To demonstrate this, we develop an extension of the Masked Siamese Networks (MSN) method to support the use of arbitrary features priors.
summary: A successful paradigm in representation learning is to perform self-supervised pretraining using tasks based on mini-batch statistics (e.g., SimCLR, VICReg, SwAV, MSN). We show that in the formulation of all these methods is an overlooked prior to learn features that enable uniform clustering of the data. While this prior has led to remarkably semantic representations when pretraining on class-balanced data, such as ImageNet, we demonstrate that it can hamper performance when pretraining on class-imbalanced data. By moving away from conventional uniformity priors and instead preferring power-law distributed feature clusters, we show that one can improve the quality of the learned representations on real-world class-imbalanced datasets. To demonstrate this, we develop an extension of the Masked Siamese Networks (MSN) method to support the use of arbitrary features priors.
abstract_zh: 表示学习的一个成功范例是使用基于小批量统计的任务（例如 SimCLR、VICReg、SwAV、MSN）来执行自监督预训练。我们表明，在所有这些方法的制定中，有一个被忽视的先学习特征，该特征能够实现数据的统一聚类。虽然这一先验在对类平衡数据（例如 ImageNet）进行预训练时产生了显着的语义表示，但我们证明，在对类不平衡数据进行预训练时，它会影响性能。通过摆脱传统的均匀性先验，而是更喜欢幂律分布式特征簇，我们表明可以提高现实世界类不平衡数据集上学习表示的质量。为了证明这一点，我们开发了 Masked Siamese Networks (MSN) 方法的扩展，以支持使用任意特征先验。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了自监督学习中隐藏的均匀聚类先验问题，并提出改进方法以提升类别不平衡数据集的表示质量。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法在类别平衡数据（如ImageNet）表现优异，但其隐含的均匀聚类先验在类别不平衡数据上可能降低性能。
AI.method: 扩展Masked Siamese Networks（MSN）方法，支持自定义特征先验，采用幂律分布聚类替代均匀性先验。
AI.result: 改进方法在真实世界类别不平衡数据集上显著提升了特征表示质量。
AI.conclusion: 均匀聚类先验适用于类别平衡场景，而幂律分布先验更适应现实中的类别不平衡数据，为自监督学习提供新方向。

authors_text: Jixian Li,Danielle Van Boxel,Joshua A. Levine
title: Autoencoder-Aided Visualization of Collections of Morse Complexes
title_zh: 自动编码器辅助莫尔斯复数集合的可视化
abstract: Though analyzing a single scalar field using Morse complexes is well studied, there are few techniques for visualizing a collection of Morse complexes. We focus on analyses that are enabled by looking at a Morse complex as an embedded domain decomposition. Specifically, we target 2D scalar fields, and we encode the Morse complex through binary images of the boundaries of decomposition. Then we use image-based autoencoders to create a feature space for the Morse complexes. We apply additional dimensionality reduction methods to construct a scatterplot as a visual interface of the feature space. This allows us to investigate individual Morse complexes, as they relate to the collection, through interaction with the scatterplot. We demonstrate our approach using a synthetic data set, microscopy images, and time-varying vorticity magnitude fields of flow. Through these, we show that our method can produce insights about structures within the collection of Morse complexes.
summary: Though analyzing a single scalar field using Morse complexes is well studied, there are few techniques for visualizing a collection of Morse complexes. We focus on analyses that are enabled by looking at a Morse complex as an embedded domain decomposition. Specifically, we target 2D scalar fields, and we encode the Morse complex through binary images of the boundaries of decomposition. Then we use image-based autoencoders to create a feature space for the Morse complexes. We apply additional dimensionality reduction methods to construct a scatterplot as a visual interface of the feature space. This allows us to investigate individual Morse complexes, as they relate to the collection, through interaction with the scatterplot. We demonstrate our approach using a synthetic data set, microscopy images, and time-varying vorticity magnitude fields of flow. Through these, we show that our method can produce insights about structures within the collection of Morse complexes.
abstract_zh: 尽管使用莫尔斯复数分析单个标量场已得到充分研究，但用于可视化莫尔斯复数集合的技术却很少。我们重点关注通过将莫尔斯复数视为嵌入式域分解来实现的分析。具体来说，我们以二维标量场为目标，并通过分解边界的二进制图像对莫尔斯复数进行编码。然后我们使用基于图像的自动编码器为莫尔斯复数创建特征空间。我们应用额外的降维方法来构建散点图作为特征空间的可视化界面。这使我们能够通过与散点图的交互来研究与集合相关的各个莫尔斯复合体。我们使用合成数据集、显微镜图像和随时间变化的流涡量场来演示我们的方法。通过这些，我们表明我们的方法可以产生关于莫尔斯复合体集合中的结构的见解。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于自编码器的可视化方法，用于分析多个Morse复形集合的结构特征。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效可视化多个Morse复形，需探索新方法以揭示其集合中的结构关联。
AI.method: 将Morse复形转化为二值图像边界，利用图像自编码器构建特征空间，并通过降维生成散点图进行可视化。
AI.result: 成功生成可视化散点图，揭示了多个Morse复形集合中的结构特征，并在多种数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效支持对多个Morse复形集合的结构分析，为复杂数据可视化提供了新工具。

authors_text: Jingkang Yang,Pengyun Wang,Dejian Zou,Zitang Zhou,Kunyuan Ding,Wenxuan Peng,Haoqi Wang,Guangyao Chen,Bo Li,Yiyou Sun,Xuefeng Du,Kaiyang Zhou,Wayne Zhang,Dan Hendrycks,Yixuan Li,Ziwei Liu
title: OpenOOD: Benchmarking Generalized Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: OpenOOD：通用分布外检测基准测试
comment: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022 Datasets and Benchmarks Track. Codebase: https://github.com/Jingkang50/OpenOOD
comments: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022 Datasets and Benchmarks Track. Codebase: https://github.com/Jingkang50/OpenOOD
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is vital to safety-critical machine learning applications and has thus been extensively studied, with a plethora of methods developed in the literature. However, the field currently lacks a unified, strictly formulated, and comprehensive benchmark, which often results in unfair comparisons and inconclusive results. From the problem setting perspective, OOD detection is closely related to neighboring fields including anomaly detection (AD), open set recognition (OSR), and model uncertainty, since methods developed for one domain are often applicable to each other. To help the community to improve the evaluation and advance, we build a unified, well-structured codebase called OpenOOD, which implements over 30 methods developed in relevant fields and provides a comprehensive benchmark under the recently proposed generalized OOD detection framework. With a comprehensive comparison of these methods, we are gratified that the field has progressed significantly over the past few years, where both preprocessing methods and the orthogonal post-hoc methods show strong potential.
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is vital to safety-critical machine learning applications and has thus been extensively studied, with a plethora of methods developed in the literature. However, the field currently lacks a unified, strictly formulated, and comprehensive benchmark, which often results in unfair comparisons and inconclusive results. From the problem setting perspective, OOD detection is closely related to neighboring fields including anomaly detection (AD), open set recognition (OSR), and model uncertainty, since methods developed for one domain are often applicable to each other. To help the community to improve the evaluation and advance, we build a unified, well-structured codebase called OpenOOD, which implements over 30 methods developed in relevant fields and provides a comprehensive benchmark under the recently proposed generalized OOD detection framework. With a comprehensive comparison of these methods, we are gratified that the field has progressed significantly over the past few years, where both preprocessing methods and the orthogonal post-hoc methods show strong potential.
abstract_zh: 分布外 (OOD) 检测对于安全关键型机器学习应用至关重要，因此已得到广泛研究，文献中开发了多种方法。然而，该领域目前缺乏统一的、严格制定的、全面的基准，这往往会导致不公平的比较和不确定的结果。从问题设置的角度来看，OOD 检测与异常检测（AD）、开放集识别（OSR）和模型不确定性等邻近领域密切相关，因为为一个领域开发的方法通常可以彼此适用。为了帮助社区改进评估和进步，我们构建了一个统一的、结构良好的代码库，称为 OpenOOD，它实现了相关领域开发的 30 多种方法，并在最近提出的广义 OOD 检测框架下提供了全面的基准。通过对这些方法的全面比较，我们很高兴地看到该领域在过去几年中取得了显着进展，预处理方法和正交事后方法都显示出强大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一个名为OpenOOD的统一基准测试平台，用于评估广义分布外检测方法。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏统一、严格制定和全面的基准测试，导致在分布外检测领域中的比较不公平且结果不明确。
AI.method: 构建了一个名为OpenOOD的统一代码库，实现了30多种相关领域的方法，并在广义分布外检测框架下提供全面的基准测试。
AI.result: 通过全面比较这些方法，发现过去几年该领域取得了显著进展，预处理方法和正交后处理方法均显示出强大的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该论文为社区改进评估和推动分布外检测领域的发展提供了重要支持。

method: 构建了一个名为OpenOOD的统一代码库，实现了30多种相关领域的方法，并在广义分布外检测框架下提供全面的基准测试。
result: 通过全面比较这些方法，发现过去几年该领域取得了显著进展，预处理方法和正交后处理方法均显示出强大的潜力。
conclusion: 该论文为社区改进评估和推动分布外检测领域的发展提供了重要支持。
search_text: OpenOOD: Benchmarking Generalized Out-of-Distribution Detection OpenOOD：通用分布外检测基准测试 Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is vital to safety-critical machine learning applications and has thus been extensively studied, with a plethora of methods developed in the literature. However, the field currently lacks a unified, strictly formulated, and comprehensive benchmark, which often results in unfair comparisons and inconclusive results. From the problem setting perspective, OOD detection is closely related to neighboring fields including anomaly detection (AD), open set recognition (OSR), and model uncertainty, since methods developed for one domain are often applicable to each other. To help the community to improve the evaluation and advance, we build a unified, well-structured codebase called OpenOOD, which implements over 30 methods developed in relevant fields and provides a comprehensive benchmark under the recently proposed generalized OOD detection framework. With a comprehensive comparison of these methods, we are gratified that the field has progressed significantly over the past few years, where both preprocessing methods and the orthogonal post-hoc methods show strong potential. 分布外 (OOD) 检测对于安全关键型机器学习应用至关重要，因此已得到广泛研究，文献中开发了多种方法。然而，该领域目前缺乏统一的、严格制定的、全面的基准，这往往会导致不公平的比较和不确定的结果。从问题设置的角度来看，OOD 检测与异常检测（AD）、开放集识别（OSR）和模型不确定性等邻近领域密切相关，因为为一个领域开发的方法通常可以彼此适用。为了帮助社区改进评估和进步，我们构建了一个统一的、结构良好的代码库，称为 OpenOOD，它实现了相关领域开发的 30 多种方法，并在最近提出的广义 OOD 检测框架下提供了全面的基准。通过对这些方法的全面比较，我们很高兴地看到该领域在过去几年中取得了显着进展，预处理方法和正交事后方法都显示出强大的潜力。 该论文提出一个名为OpenOOD的统一基准测试平台，用于评估广义分布外检测方法。 Jingkang Yang,Pengyun Wang,Dejian Zou,Zitang Zhou,Kunyuan Ding,Wenxuan Peng,Haoqi Wang,Guangyao Chen,Bo Li,Yiyou Sun,Xuefeng Du,Kaiyang Zhou,Wayne Zhang,Dan Hendrycks,Yixuan Li,Ziwei Liu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yanjie Ze,Nicklas Hansen,Yinbo Chen,Mohit Jain,Xiaolong Wang
title: Visual Reinforcement Learning with Self-Supervised 3D Representations
title_zh: 具有自监督 3D 表示的视觉强化学习
comment: Accepted in RA-L 2023 and IROS 2023. Project page: https://yanjieze.com/3d4rl/
comments: Accepted in RA-L 2023 and IROS 2023. Project page: https://yanjieze.com/3d4rl/
abstract: A prominent approach to visual Reinforcement Learning (RL) is to learn an internal state representation using self-supervised methods, which has the potential benefit of improved sample-efficiency and generalization through additional learning signal and inductive biases. However, while the real world is inherently 3D, prior efforts have largely been focused on leveraging 2D computer vision techniques as auxiliary self-supervision. In this work, we present a unified framework for self-supervised learning of 3D representations for motor control. Our proposed framework consists of two phases: a pretraining phase where a deep voxel-based 3D autoencoder is pretrained on a large object-centric dataset, and a finetuning phase where the representation is jointly finetuned together with RL on in-domain data. We empirically show that our method enjoys improved sample efficiency in simulated manipulation tasks compared to 2D representation learning methods. Additionally, our learned policies transfer zero-shot to a real robot setup with only approximate geometric correspondence, and successfully solve motor control tasks that involve grasping and lifting from a single, uncalibrated RGB camera. Code and videos are available at https://yanjieze.com/3d4rl/ .
summary: A prominent approach to visual Reinforcement Learning (RL) is to learn an internal state representation using self-supervised methods, which has the potential benefit of improved sample-efficiency and generalization through additional learning signal and inductive biases. However, while the real world is inherently 3D, prior efforts have largely been focused on leveraging 2D computer vision techniques as auxiliary self-supervision. In this work, we present a unified framework for self-supervised learning of 3D representations for motor control. Our proposed framework consists of two phases: a pretraining phase where a deep voxel-based 3D autoencoder is pretrained on a large object-centric dataset, and a finetuning phase where the representation is jointly finetuned together with RL on in-domain data. We empirically show that our method enjoys improved sample efficiency in simulated manipulation tasks compared to 2D representation learning methods. Additionally, our learned policies transfer zero-shot to a real robot setup with only approximate geometric correspondence, and successfully solve motor control tasks that involve grasping and lifting from a single, uncalibrated RGB camera. Code and videos are available at https://yanjieze.com/3d4rl/ .
abstract_zh: 视觉强化学习 (RL) 的一个重要方法是使用自监督方法学习内部状态表示，这具有通过额外的学习信号和归纳偏差提高样本效率和泛化能力的潜在好处。然而，虽然现实世界本质上是 3D 的，但之前的努力主要集中在利用 2D 计算机视觉技术作为辅助自我监督。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个用于运动控制 3D 表示自监督学习的统一框架。我们提出的框架由两个阶段组成：预训练阶段，基于深度体素的 3D 自动编码器在大型以对象为中心的数据集上进行预训练；微调阶段，表示与 RL 一起对域内数据进行联合微调。我们的经验表明，与 2D 表示学习方法相比，我们的方法在模拟操作任务中具有更高的样本效率。此外，我们学习的策略将零镜头转移到仅具有近似几何对应关系的真实机器人设置，并成功解决了涉及从单个未校准的 RGB 相机抓取和举起的电机控制任务。代码和视频可在 https://yanjieze.com/3d4rl/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于视觉强化学习的自监督3D表示学习框架，以提高样本效率和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管现实世界是三维的，但以往的工作主要依赖于2D计算机视觉技术作为辅助自监督，这可能限制了样本效率和泛化能力。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种统一的框架，包括预训练阶段和微调阶段。预训练阶段使用基于体素的3D自编码器在大规模物体中心数据集上进行预训练，微调阶段则在领域内数据上联合微调表示和强化学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，与2D表示学习方法相比，本文方法在模拟操作任务中具有更高的样本效率，并且可以零样本转移到真实机器人设置，成功解决涉及抓取和提升的任务。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的3D表示学习框架能够有效提升视觉强化学习的样本效率和泛化能力，适用于真实机器人任务。

authors_text: Hanan Gani,Muzammal Naseer,Mohammad Yaqub
title: How to Train Vision Transformer on Small-scale Datasets?
title_zh: 如何在小规模数据集上训练 Vision Transformer？
abstract: Vision Transformer (ViT), a radically different architecture than convolutional neural networks offers multiple advantages including design simplicity, robustness and state-of-the-art performance on many vision tasks. However, in contrast to convolutional neural networks, Vision Transformer lacks inherent inductive biases. Therefore, successful training of such models is mainly attributed to pre-training on large-scale datasets such as ImageNet with 1.2M or JFT with 300M images. This hinders the direct adaption of Vision Transformer for small-scale datasets. In this work, we show that self-supervised inductive biases can be learned directly from small-scale datasets and serve as an effective weight initialization scheme for fine-tuning. This allows to train these models without large-scale pre-training, changes to model architecture or loss functions. We present thorough experiments to successfully train monolithic and non-monolithic Vision Transformers on five small datasets including CIFAR10/100, CINIC10, SVHN, Tiny-ImageNet and two fine-grained datasets: Aircraft and Cars. Our approach consistently improves the performance of Vision Transformers while retaining their properties such as attention to salient regions and higher robustness. Our codes and pre-trained models are available at: https://github.com/hananshafi/vits-for-small-scale-datasets.
summary: Vision Transformer (ViT), a radically different architecture than convolutional neural networks offers multiple advantages including design simplicity, robustness and state-of-the-art performance on many vision tasks. However, in contrast to convolutional neural networks, Vision Transformer lacks inherent inductive biases. Therefore, successful training of such models is mainly attributed to pre-training on large-scale datasets such as ImageNet with 1.2M or JFT with 300M images. This hinders the direct adaption of Vision Transformer for small-scale datasets. In this work, we show that self-supervised inductive biases can be learned directly from small-scale datasets and serve as an effective weight initialization scheme for fine-tuning. This allows to train these models without large-scale pre-training, changes to model architecture or loss functions. We present thorough experiments to successfully train monolithic and non-monolithic Vision Transformers on five small datasets including CIFAR10/100, CINIC10, SVHN, Tiny-ImageNet and two fine-grained datasets: Aircraft and Cars. Our approach consistently improves the performance of Vision Transformers while retaining their properties such as attention to salient regions and higher robustness. Our codes and pre-trained models are available at: https://github.com/hananshafi/vits-for-small-scale-datasets.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformer (ViT) 是一种与卷积神经网络完全不同的架构，具有多种优势，包括设计简单性、鲁棒性以及在许多视觉任务上的最先进的性能。然而，与卷积神经网络相比，Vision Transformer 缺乏固有的归纳偏差。因此，此类模型的成功训练主要归功于大规模数据集的预训练，例如具有1.2M图像的ImageNet或具有300M图像的JFT。这阻碍了 Vision Transformer 对小规模数据集的直接适应。在这项工作中，我们证明了自监督归纳偏差可以直接从小规模数据集中学习，并作为微调的有效权重初始化方案。这使得无需大规模预训练、更改模型架构或损失函数即可训练这些模型。我们进行了彻底的实验，在五个小型数据集（包括 CIFAR10/100、CINIC10、SVHN、Tiny-ImageNet）和两个细粒度数据集（飞机和汽车）上成功训练整体和非整体视觉 Transformer。我们的方法不断提高视觉变压器的性能，同时保留其特性，例如关注显着区域和更高的鲁棒性。我们的代码和预训练模型可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/hananshafi/vits-for-small-scale-datasets。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需大规模预训练即可在小规模数据集上训练视觉Transformer（ViT）的方法。
AI.motivation: ViT虽性能优越但缺乏内在归纳偏置，传统训练依赖大规模数据集（如ImageNet），限制了其在小数据集上的应用。
AI.method: 通过自监督学习直接从小规模数据集中学习归纳偏置，作为微调的初始化方案，无需修改模型结构或损失函数。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10/100、Tiny-ImageNet等5个小型数据集及2个细粒度数据集上验证，方法提升ViT性能并保持其关注显著区域和鲁棒性特点。
AI.conclusion: 自监督归纳偏置能有效替代大规模预训练，使ViT在小数据集上实现良好性能，无需架构或损失函数调整。

Our approach consistently improves the performance of Vision Transformers while retaining their properties such as attention to salient regions and higher robustness. Our codes and pre-trained models are available at: https://github.com/hananshafi/vits-for-small-scale-datasets. Vision Transformer (ViT) 是一种与卷积神经网络完全不同的架构，具有多种优势，包括设计简单性、鲁棒性以及在许多视觉任务上的最先进的性能。然而，与卷积神经网络相比，Vision Transformer 缺乏固有的归纳偏差。因此，此类模型的成功训练主要归功于大规模数据集的预训练，例如具有1.2M图像的ImageNet或具有300M图像的JFT。这阻碍了 Vision Transformer 对小规模数据集的直接适应。在这项工作中，我们证明了自监督归纳偏差可以直接从小规模数据集中学习，并作为微调的有效权重初始化方案。这使得无需大规模预训练、更改模型架构或损失函数即可训练这些模型。我们进行了彻底的实验，在五个小型数据集（包括 CIFAR10/100、CINIC10、SVHN、Tiny-ImageNet）和两个细粒度数据集（飞机和汽车）上成功训练整体和非整体视觉 Transformer。我们的方法不断提高视觉变压器的性能，同时保留其特性，例如关注显着区域和更高的鲁棒性。我们的代码和预训练模型可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/hananshafi/vits-for-small-scale-datasets。 本文提出一种无需大规模预训练即可在小规模数据集上训练视觉Transformer（ViT）的方法。 Hanan Gani,Muzammal Naseer,Mohammad Yaqub cs.CV

authors_text: Menelaos Kanakis,Thomas E. Huang,David Bruggemann,Fisher Yu,Luc Van Gool
title: Composite Learning for Robust and Effective Dense Predictions
title_zh: 用于稳健且有效的密集预测的复合学习
comment: Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV), 2023
comments: Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV), 2023
abstract: Multi-task learning promises better model generalization on a target task by jointly optimizing it with an auxiliary task. However, the current practice requires additional labeling efforts for the auxiliary task, while not guaranteeing better model performance. In this paper, we find that jointly training a dense prediction (target) task with a self-supervised (auxiliary) task can consistently improve the performance of the target task, while eliminating the need for labeling auxiliary tasks. We refer to this joint training as Composite Learning (CompL). Experiments of CompL on monocular depth estimation, semantic segmentation, and boundary detection show consistent performance improvements in fully and partially labeled datasets. Further analysis on depth estimation reveals that joint training with self-supervision outperforms most labeled auxiliary tasks. We also find that CompL can improve model robustness when the models are evaluated in new domains. These results demonstrate the benefits of self-supervision as an auxiliary task, and establish the design of novel task-specific self-supervised methods as a new axis of investigation for future multi-task learning research.
summary: Multi-task learning promises better model generalization on a target task by jointly optimizing it with an auxiliary task. However, the current practice requires additional labeling efforts for the auxiliary task, while not guaranteeing better model performance. In this paper, we find that jointly training a dense prediction (target) task with a self-supervised (auxiliary) task can consistently improve the performance of the target task, while eliminating the need for labeling auxiliary tasks. We refer to this joint training as Composite Learning (CompL). Experiments of CompL on monocular depth estimation, semantic segmentation, and boundary detection show consistent performance improvements in fully and partially labeled datasets. Further analysis on depth estimation reveals that joint training with self-supervision outperforms most labeled auxiliary tasks. We also find that CompL can improve model robustness when the models are evaluated in new domains. These results demonstrate the benefits of self-supervision as an auxiliary task, and establish the design of novel task-specific self-supervised methods as a new axis of investigation for future multi-task learning research.
abstract_zh: 多任务学习通过与辅助任务联合优化目标任务来保证更好的模型泛化。然而，当前的实践需要对辅助任务进行额外的标记工作，同时不能保证更好的模型性能。在本文中，我们发现联合训练密集预测（目标）任务和自监督（辅助）任务可以持续提高目标任务的性能，同时消除标记辅助任务的需要。我们将这种联合训练称为复合学习（CompL）。 CompL 在单目深度估计、语义分割和边界检测方面的实验表明，在完全和部分标记的数据集中，性能得到了一致的改进。对深度估计的进一步分析表明，具有自我监督的联合训练优于大多数标记的辅助任务。我们还发现，当在新领域评估模型时，CompL 可以提高模型的鲁棒性。这些结果证明了自我监督作为辅助任务的好处，并将新颖的特定任务自我监督方法的设计作为未来多任务学习研究的新研究轴。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为复合学习（CompL）的方法，通过将密集预测任务与自监督辅助任务联合训练，提升目标任务性能并减少对辅助任务标注的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统多任务学习需要额外标注辅助任务数据且效果不确定，而自监督学习无需标注数据，但未被充分用于提升目标任务性能。
AI.method: 设计复合学习框架（CompL），将目标任务（如深度估计）与自监督辅助任务（如对比学习）联合训练，无需辅助任务标注。
AI.result: 在单目深度估计、语义分割和边界检测任务中，CompL在全标注和部分标注数据集上均取得性能提升，且在新领域评估中表现出更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 自监督辅助任务能有效提升目标任务性能，为多任务学习提供了新的研究方向，即设计任务特定的自监督方法。

authors_text: Kuan-Lin Chen,Harinath Garudadri,Bhaskar D. Rao
title: Improved Bounds on Neural Complexity for Representing Piecewise Linear Functions
title_zh: 改进表示分段线性函数的神经复杂性界限
abstract: A deep neural network using rectified linear units represents a continuous piecewise linear (CPWL) function and vice versa. Recent results in the literature estimated that the number of neurons needed to exactly represent any CPWL function grows exponentially with the number of pieces or exponentially in terms of the factorial of the number of distinct linear components. Moreover, such growth is amplified linearly with the input dimension. These existing results seem to indicate that the cost of representing a CPWL function is expensive. In this paper, we propose much tighter bounds and establish a polynomial time algorithm to find a network satisfying these bounds for any given CPWL function. We prove that the number of hidden neurons required to exactly represent any CPWL function is at most a quadratic function of the number of pieces. In contrast to all previous results, this upper bound is invariant to the input dimension. Besides the number of pieces, we also study the number of distinct linear components in CPWL functions. When such a number is also given, we prove that the quadratic complexity turns into bilinear, which implies a lower neural complexity because the number of distinct linear components is always not greater than the minimum number of pieces in a CPWL function. When the number of pieces is unknown, we prove that, in terms of the number of distinct linear components, the neural complexities of any CPWL function are at most polynomial growth for low-dimensional inputs and factorial growth for the worst-case scenario, which are significantly better than existing results in the literature.
summary: A deep neural network using rectified linear units represents a continuous piecewise linear (CPWL) function and vice versa. Recent results in the literature estimated that the number of neurons needed to exactly represent any CPWL function grows exponentially with the number of pieces or exponentially in terms of the factorial of the number of distinct linear components. Moreover, such growth is amplified linearly with the input dimension. These existing results seem to indicate that the cost of representing a CPWL function is expensive. In this paper, we propose much tighter bounds and establish a polynomial time algorithm to find a network satisfying these bounds for any given CPWL function. We prove that the number of hidden neurons required to exactly represent any CPWL function is at most a quadratic function of the number of pieces. In contrast to all previous results, this upper bound is invariant to the input dimension. Besides the number of pieces, we also study the number of distinct linear components in CPWL functions. When such a number is also given, we prove that the quadratic complexity turns into bilinear, which implies a lower neural complexity because the number of distinct linear components is always not greater than the minimum number of pieces in a CPWL function. When the number of pieces is unknown, we prove that, in terms of the number of distinct linear components, the neural complexities of any CPWL function are at most polynomial growth for low-dimensional inputs and factorial growth for the worst-case scenario, which are significantly better than existing results in the literature.
abstract_zh: 使用修正线性单元的深度神经网络表示连续分段线性 (CPWL) 函数，反之亦然。文献中的最新结果估计，精确表示任何 CPWL 函数所需的神经元数量随着片段数量呈指数增长，或者根据不同线性分量数量的阶乘呈指数增长。此外，这种增长随着输入维度线性放大。这些现有结果似乎表明表示 CPWL 函数的成本非常昂贵。在本文中，我们提出了更严格的边界，并建立了多项式时间算法来找到对于任何给定 CPWL 函数满足这些边界的网络。我们证明，精确表示任何 CPWL 函数所需的隐藏神经元数量至多是块数的二次函数。与之前的所有结果相比，这个上限对于输入维度是不变的。除了块数之外，我们还研究 CPWL 函数中不同线性分量的数量。当也给出这样的数字时，我们证明二次复杂度变成双线性，这意味着较低的神经复杂度，因为不同线性分量的数量始终不大于 CPWL 函数中的最小块数。当块数未知时，我们证明，就不同线性分量的数量而言，任何 CPWL 函数的神经复杂度对于低维输入至多是多项式增长，对于最坏情况场景是阶乘增长，这明显优于文献中的现有结果。

AI.tldr: 本文改进了神经网络表示分段线性函数所需的神经元数量的上界，并提出了多项式时间算法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明表示分段线性函数所需神经元数量随分段数或输入维度呈指数级增长，导致计算成本高昂，需寻找更紧致的上界。
AI.method: 通过分析分段线性函数的结构特性，提出新的数学证明方法并设计多项式时间算法构造满足新上界的神经网络。
AI.result: 证明所需隐藏神经元数量最多为分段数的二次函数，且与输入维度无关；当考虑线性组件数量时，复杂度进一步降低至双线性或多项式增长。
AI.conclusion: 新结果显著优于现有理论，为高效表示分段线性函数提供了更优的神经网络设计依据。

authors_text: Andrés Prados-Torreblanca,José M. Buenaposada,Luis Baumela
title: Shape Preserving Facial Landmarks with Graph Attention Networks
title_zh: 使用图注意网络保留面部标志的形状
abstract: Top-performing landmark estimation algorithms are based on exploiting the excellent ability of large convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to represent local appearance. However, it is well known that they can only learn weak spatial relationships. To address this problem, we propose a model based on the combination of a CNN with a cascade of Graph Attention Network regressors. To this end, we introduce an encoding that jointly represents the appearance and location of facial landmarks and an attention mechanism to weigh the information according to its reliability. This is combined with a multi-task approach to initialize the location of graph nodes and a coarse-to-fine landmark description scheme. Our experiments confirm that the proposed model learns a global representation of the structure of the face, achieving top performance in popular benchmarks on head pose and landmark estimation. The improvement provided by our model is most significant in situations involving large changes in the local appearance of landmarks.
summary: Top-performing landmark estimation algorithms are based on exploiting the excellent ability of large convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to represent local appearance. However, it is well known that they can only learn weak spatial relationships. To address this problem, we propose a model based on the combination of a CNN with a cascade of Graph Attention Network regressors. To this end, we introduce an encoding that jointly represents the appearance and location of facial landmarks and an attention mechanism to weigh the information according to its reliability. This is combined with a multi-task approach to initialize the location of graph nodes and a coarse-to-fine landmark description scheme. Our experiments confirm that the proposed model learns a global representation of the structure of the face, achieving top performance in popular benchmarks on head pose and landmark estimation. The improvement provided by our model is most significant in situations involving large changes in the local appearance of landmarks.
abstract_zh: 性能最佳的地标估计算法基于利用大型卷积神经网络 (CNN) 表示局部外观的出色能力。然而，众所周知，它们只能学习微弱的空间关系。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于 CNN 与级联图注意力网络回归器相结合的模型。为此，我们引入了一种联合表示面部标志的外观和位置的编码，以及一种根据信息的可靠性来衡量信息的注意机制。这与初始化图节点位置的多任务方法和从粗到细的地标描述方案相结合。我们的实验证实，所提出的模型学习了面部结构的全局表示，在头部姿势和地标估计的流行基准中实现了最佳性能。我们的模型提供的改进在涉及地标局部外观发生较大变化的情况下最为显着。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）与图注意力网络（GAT）的级联模型，用于提升面部特征点检测的形状保持能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN的特征点检测算法虽擅长局部外观建模，但难以捕捉全局空间关系，导致在局部外观变化较大时性能下降。
AI.method: 设计联合编码器表征面部特征点的外观与位置信息，引入图注意力机制动态加权节点可靠性，并结合多任务学习与粗到细的预测策略。
AI.result: 在头部姿态估计与特征点检测基准测试中取得最优性能，尤其在局部外观显著变化场景下提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过图注意力网络有效学习面部全局结构表示，显著提升了复杂场景下的特征点检测鲁棒性。

search_text: Shape Preserving Facial Landmarks with Graph Attention Networks 使用图注意网络保留面部标志的形状 Top-performing landmark estimation algorithms are based on exploiting the excellent ability of large convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to represent local appearance. However, it is well known that they can only learn weak spatial relationships. To address this problem, we propose a model based on the combination of a CNN with a cascade of Graph Attention Network regressors. To this end, we introduce an encoding that jointly represents the appearance and location of facial landmarks and an attention mechanism to weigh the information according to its reliability. This is combined with a multi-task approach to initialize the location of graph nodes and a coarse-to-fine landmark description scheme. Our experiments confirm that the proposed model learns a global representation of the structure of the face, achieving top performance in popular benchmarks on head pose and landmark estimation. The improvement provided by our model is most significant in situations involving large changes in the local appearance of landmarks. 性能最佳的地标估计算法基于利用大型卷积神经网络 (CNN) 表示局部外观的出色能力。然而，众所周知，它们只能学习微弱的空间关系。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于 CNN 与级联图注意力网络回归器相结合的模型。为此，我们引入了一种联合表示面部标志的外观和位置的编码，以及一种根据信息的可靠性来衡量信息的注意机制。这与初始化图节点位置的多任务方法和从粗到细的地标描述方案相结合。我们的实验证实，所提出的模型学习了面部结构的全局表示，在头部姿势和地标估计的流行基准中实现了最佳性能。我们的模型提供的改进在涉及地标局部外观发生较大变化的情况下最为显着。 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）与图注意力网络（GAT）的级联模型，用于提升面部特征点检测的形状保持能力。 Andrés Prados-Torreblanca,José M. authors_text: Yuhang Zang,Wei Li,Kaiyang Zhou,Chen Huang,Chen Change Loy
title: Unified Vision and Language Prompt Learning
title_zh: 统一视觉和语言即时学习
abstract: Prompt tuning, a parameter- and data-efficient transfer learning paradigm that tunes only a small number of parameters in a model's input space, has become a trend in the vision community since the emergence of large vision-language models like CLIP. We present a systematic study on two representative prompt tuning methods, namely text prompt tuning and visual prompt tuning. A major finding is that none of the unimodal prompt tuning methods performs consistently well: text prompt tuning fails on data with high intra-class visual variances while visual prompt tuning cannot handle low inter-class variances. To combine the best from both worlds, we propose a simple approach called Unified Prompt Tuning (UPT), which essentially learns a tiny neural network to jointly optimize prompts across different modalities. Extensive experiments on over 11 vision datasets show that UPT achieves a better trade-off than the unimodal counterparts on few-shot learning benchmarks, as well as on domain generalization benchmarks. Code and models will be released to facilitate future research.
summary: Prompt tuning, a parameter- and data-efficient transfer learning paradigm that tunes only a small number of parameters in a model's input space, has become a trend in the vision community since the emergence of large vision-language models like CLIP. We present a systematic study on two representative prompt tuning methods, namely text prompt tuning and visual prompt tuning. A major finding is that none of the unimodal prompt tuning methods performs consistently well: text prompt tuning fails on data with high intra-class visual variances while visual prompt tuning cannot handle low inter-class variances. To combine the best from both worlds, we propose a simple approach called Unified Prompt Tuning (UPT), which essentially learns a tiny neural network to jointly optimize prompts across different modalities. Extensive experiments on over 11 vision datasets show that UPT achieves a better trade-off than the unimodal counterparts on few-shot learning benchmarks, as well as on domain generalization benchmarks. Code and models will be released to facilitate future research.
abstract_zh: 自从 CLIP 等大型视觉语言模型出现以来，即时调优是一种参数和数据高效的迁移学习范例，仅调整模型输入空间中的少量参数，已成为视觉界的趋势。我们对两种有代表性的提示调整方法进行了系统的研究，即文本提示调整和视觉提示调整。一个主要发现是，没有一种单峰提示调整方法始终表现良好：文本提示调整在具有高类内视觉差异的数据上失败，而视觉提示调整无法处理低类间差异。为了结合两个领域的优点，我们提出了一种称为统一提示调整（UPT）的简单方法，它本质上是学习一个微型神经网络来联合优化不同模式的提示。对超过 11 个视觉数据集的广泛实验表明，UPT 在少样本学习基准以及领域泛化基准上比单峰对应物实现了更好的权衡。将发布代码和模型以方便将来的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的视觉与语言提示调优方法（UPT），通过跨模态联合优化提示来解决单模态提示调优的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有单模态提示调优方法（文本或视觉）在处理视觉类内方差或类间方差时存在性能瓶颈，需结合两者优势以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计一个轻量级神经网络，联合学习跨模态提示表示，实现文本与视觉提示的协同优化。
AI.result: 在11个视觉数据集的少样本学习和领域泛化任务中，UPT均优于单模态方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: UPT通过跨模态联合优化有效融合了文本与视觉提示的优势，为多模态提示学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ronghang Hu,Shoubhik Debnath,Saining Xie,Xinlei Chen
title: Exploring Long-Sequence Masked Autoencoders
title_zh: 探索长序列屏蔽自动编码器
abstract: Masked Autoencoding (MAE) has emerged as an effective approach for pre-training representations across multiple domains. In contrast to discrete tokens in natural languages, the input for image MAE is continuous and subject to additional specifications. We systematically study each input specification during the pre-training stage, and find sequence length is a key axis that further scales MAE. Our study leads to a long-sequence version of MAE with minimal changes to the original recipe, by just decoupling the mask size from the patch size. For object detection and semantic segmentation, our long-sequence MAE shows consistent gains across all the experimental setups without extra computation cost during the transfer. While long-sequence pre-training is discerned most beneficial for detection and segmentation, we also achieve strong results on ImageNet-1K classification by keeping a standard image size and only increasing the sequence length. We hope our findings can provide new insights and avenues for scaling in computer vision.
summary: Masked Autoencoding (MAE) has emerged as an effective approach for pre-training representations across multiple domains. In contrast to discrete tokens in natural languages, the input for image MAE is continuous and subject to additional specifications. We systematically study each input specification during the pre-training stage, and find sequence length is a key axis that further scales MAE. Our study leads to a long-sequence version of MAE with minimal changes to the original recipe, by just decoupling the mask size from the patch size. For object detection and semantic segmentation, our long-sequence MAE shows consistent gains across all the experimental setups without extra computation cost during the transfer. While long-sequence pre-training is discerned most beneficial for detection and segmentation, we also achieve strong results on ImageNet-1K classification by keeping a standard image size and only increasing the sequence length. We hope our findings can provide new insights and avenues for scaling in computer vision.
abstract_zh: 掩码自动编码（MAE）已成为跨多个领域预训练表示的有效方法。与自然语言中的离散标记相比，图像 MAE 的输入是连续的，并且受附加规范的约束。我们在预训练阶段系统地研究了每个输入规范，发现序列长度是进一步扩展 MAE 的关键轴。我们的研究通过将掩模尺寸与贴片尺寸解耦，得出了 MAE 的长序列版本，对原始配方进行了最小的改变。对于对象检测和语义分割，我们的长序列 MAE 在所有实验设置中显示出一致的增益，而在传输过程中无需额外的计算成本。虽然长序列预训练被认为对检测和分割最有利，但我们通过保持标准图像大小并仅增加序列长度，在 ImageNet-1K 分类上也取得了很好的结果。我们希望我们的发现能够为计算机视觉的扩展提供新的见解和途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种长序列掩码自编码器（MAE），通过解耦掩码尺寸与图像块尺寸，实现计算机视觉任务的预训练表示扩展。
AI.motivation: 传统MAE在图像处理中受限于连续输入和固定序列长度，难以有效扩展。研究发现序列长度是影响MAE性能的关键因素，需探索其规模化潜力。
AI.method: 通过解耦掩码区域与图像块尺寸，仅调整序列长度而不改变原有MAE架构，实现长序列预训练。保持标准图像尺寸，仅增加序列长度进行多任务迁移。
AI.result: 在目标检测和语义分割任务中均取得一致性能提升，且无额外计算成本；在ImageNet-1K分类任务中保持标准图像尺寸下也取得强性能。
AI.conclusion: 序列长度是MAE规模化的核心轴，解耦设计为计算机视觉任务提供了高效且通用的预训练扩展方法，为后续研究提供新方向。

result: 在目标检测和语义分割任务中均取得一致性能提升，且无额外计算成本；在ImageNet-1K分类任务中保持标准图像尺寸下也取得强性能。
conclusion: 序列长度是MAE规模化的核心轴，解耦设计为计算机视觉任务提供了高效且通用的预训练扩展方法，为后续研究提供新方向。
search_text: Exploring Long-Sequence Masked Autoencoders 探索长序列屏蔽自动编码器 Masked Autoencoding (MAE) has emerged as an effective approach for pre-training representations across multiple domains. In contrast to discrete tokens in natural languages, the input for image MAE is continuous and subject to additional specifications. We systematically study each input specification during the pre-training stage, and find sequence length is a key axis that further scales MAE. Our study leads to a long-sequence version of MAE with minimal changes to the original recipe, by just decoupling the mask size from the patch size. For object detection and semantic segmentation, our long-sequence MAE shows consistent gains across all the experimental setups without extra computation cost during the transfer. While long-sequence pre-training is discerned most beneficial for detection and segmentation, we also achieve strong results on ImageNet-1K classification by keeping a standard image size and only increasing the sequence length. We hope our findings can provide new insights and avenues for scaling in computer vision. 掩码自动编码（MAE）已成为跨多个领域预训练表示的有效方法。与自然语言中的离散标记相比，图像 MAE 的输入是连续的，并且受附加规范的约束。我们在预训练阶段系统地研究了每个输入规范，发现序列长度是进一步扩展 MAE 的关键轴。我们的研究通过将掩模尺寸与贴片尺寸解耦，得出了 MAE 的长序列版本，对原始配方进行了最小的改变。对于对象检测和语义分割，我们的长序列 MAE 在所有实验设置中显示出一致的增益，而在传输过程中无需额外的计算成本。虽然长序列预训练被认为对检测和分割最有利，但我们通过保持标准图像大小并仅增加序列长度，在 ImageNet-1K 分类上也取得了很好的结果。我们希望我们的发现能够为计算机视觉的扩展提供新的见解和途径。 本文提出一种长序列掩码自编码器（MAE），通过解耦掩码尺寸与图像块尺寸，实现计算机视觉任务的预训练表示扩展。 Ronghang Hu,Shoubhik Debnath,Saining Xie,Xinlei Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Yunbum Kook,Yin Tat Lee,Ruoqi Shen,Santosh S. Vempala
title: Condition-number-independent convergence rate of Riemannian Hamiltonian Monte Carlo with numerical integrators
title_zh: 具有数值积分器的黎曼哈密顿蒙特卡罗的与条件数无关的收敛速度
abstract: We study the convergence rate of discretized Riemannian Hamiltonian Monte Carlo on sampling from distributions in the form of $e^{-f(x)}$ on a convex body $\mathcal{M}\subset\mathbb{R}^{n}$. We show that for distributions in the form of $e^{-α^{\top}x}$ on a polytope with $m$ constraints, the convergence rate of a family of commonly-used integrators is independent of $\left\Vert α\right\Vert _{2}$ and the geometry of the polytope. In particular, the implicit midpoint method (IMM) and the generalized Leapfrog method (LM) have a mixing time of $\widetilde{O}\left(mn^{3}\right)$ to achieve $ε$ total variation distance to the target distribution. These guarantees are based on a general bound on the convergence rate for densities of the form $e^{-f(x)}$ in terms of parameters of the manifold and the integrator. Our theoretical guarantee complements the empirical results of [KLSV22], which shows that RHMC with IMM can sample ill-conditioned, non-smooth and constrained distributions in very high dimension efficiently in practice.
summary: We study the convergence rate of discretized Riemannian Hamiltonian Monte Carlo on sampling from distributions in the form of $e^{-f(x)}$ on a convex body $\mathcal{M}\subset\mathbb{R}^{n}$. We show that for distributions in the form of $e^{-α^{\top}x}$ on a polytope with $m$ constraints, the convergence rate of a family of commonly-used integrators is independent of $\left\Vert α\right\Vert _{2}$ and the geometry of the polytope. In particular, the implicit midpoint method (IMM) and the generalized Leapfrog method (LM) have a mixing time of $\widetilde{O}\left(mn^{3}\right)$ to achieve $ε$ total variation distance to the target distribution. These guarantees are based on a general bound on the convergence rate for densities of the form $e^{-f(x)}$ in terms of parameters of the manifold and the integrator. Our theoretical guarantee complements the empirical results of [KLSV22], which shows that RHMC with IMM can sample ill-conditioned, non-smooth and constrained distributions in very high dimension efficiently in practice.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了在凸体 $\mathcal{M}\subset\mathbb{R}^{n}$ 上以 $e^{-f(x)}$ 形式的分布采样的离散黎曼哈密顿蒙特卡罗的收敛速度。我们证明，对于具有 $m$ 约束的多面体上 $e^{-α^{\top}x}$ 形式的分布，常用积分器系列的收敛速度独立于 $\left\Vert α\right\Vert _{2}$ 和多面体的几何形状。特别是，隐式中点法（IMM）和广义蛙跳法（LM）的混合时间为$\widetilde{O}\left(mn^{3}\right)$，以实现到目标分布的$ε$总变异距离。这些保证基于 $e^{-f(x)}$ 形式的密度收敛速度的一般界限，就流形和积分器的参数而言。我们的理论保证补充了 [KLSV22] 的经验结果，这表明带有 IMM 的 RHMC 在实践中可以有效地对非常高维度的病态、非平滑和约束分布进行采样。

AI.tldr: 研究离散化黎曼哈密顿蒙特卡洛方法在凸体上的分布采样收敛速度，证明其收敛率与条件数无关。
AI.motivation: 传统采样方法的收敛速度常受条件数影响，难以高效处理高维、非光滑或约束分布。本文旨在为黎曼哈密顿蒙特卡洛方法提供与条件数无关的收敛性保证。
AI.method: 通过分析流形参数和积分器特性，推导出针对形式为$e^{-f(x)}$的密度函数的通用收敛率界，并验证隐式中点法和广义蛙跳法的混合时间。
AI.result: 隐式中点法和广义蛙跳法在$mn^3$时间内达到目标分布的ε总变分距离，且收敛率与α的2范数及多面体几何无关。
AI.conclusion: 理论结果验证了RHMC在处理高维、非光滑分布时的高效性，补充了先前实验研究的结论，证明数值积分器的实用性。

authors_text: Nikola Jovanović,Mislav Balunović,Dimitar I. Dimitrov,Martin Vechev
title: FARE: Provably Fair Representation Learning with Practical Certificates
title_zh: FARE：通过实用证书证明公平的表征学习
abstract: Fair representation learning (FRL) is a popular class of methods aiming to produce fair classifiers via data preprocessing. Recent regulatory directives stress the need for FRL methods that provide practical certificates, i.e., provable upper bounds on the unfairness of any downstream classifier trained on preprocessed data, which directly provides assurance in a practical scenario. Creating such FRL methods is an important challenge that remains unsolved. In this work, we address that challenge and introduce FARE (Fairness with Restricted Encoders), the first FRL method with practical fairness certificates. FARE is based on our key insight that restricting the representation space of the encoder enables the derivation of practical guarantees, while still permitting favorable accuracy-fairness tradeoffs for suitable instantiations, such as one we propose based on fair trees. To produce a practical certificate, we develop and apply a statistical procedure that computes a finite sample high-confidence upper bound on the unfairness of any downstream classifier trained on FARE embeddings. In our comprehensive experimental evaluation, we demonstrate that FARE produces practical certificates that are tight and often even comparable with purely empirical results obtained by prior methods, which establishes the practical value of our approach.
summary: Fair representation learning (FRL) is a popular class of methods aiming to produce fair classifiers via data preprocessing. Recent regulatory directives stress the need for FRL methods that provide practical certificates, i.e., provable upper bounds on the unfairness of any downstream classifier trained on preprocessed data, which directly provides assurance in a practical scenario. Creating such FRL methods is an important challenge that remains unsolved. In this work, we address that challenge and introduce FARE (Fairness with Restricted Encoders), the first FRL method with practical fairness certificates. FARE is based on our key insight that restricting the representation space of the encoder enables the derivation of practical guarantees, while still permitting favorable accuracy-fairness tradeoffs for suitable instantiations, such as one we propose based on fair trees. To produce a practical certificate, we develop and apply a statistical procedure that computes a finite sample high-confidence upper bound on the unfairness of any downstream classifier trained on FARE embeddings. In our comprehensive experimental evaluation, we demonstrate that FARE produces practical certificates that are tight and often even comparable with purely empirical results obtained by prior methods, which establishes the practical value of our approach.
abstract_zh: 公平表示学习（FRL）是一类流行的方法，旨在通过数据预处理产生公平的分类器。最近的监管指令强调需要提供实用证书的 FRL 方法，即任何在预处理数据上训练的下游分类器的不公平性的可证明上限，这直接在实际场景中提供保证。创建这样的 FRL 方法是一个尚未解决的重要挑战。在这项工作中，我们解决了这一挑战并引入了 FARE（受限编码器公平性），这是第一个具有实用公平性证书的 FRL 方法。 FARE 基于我们的关键见解，即限制编码器的表示空间能够获得实际保证，同时仍然允许对合适的实例进行有利的准确性-公平性权衡，例如我们基于公平树提出的实例。为了生成实用的证书，我们开发并应用了一种统计程序，该程序可以计算任何接受 FARE 嵌入训练的下游分类器的不公平性的有限样本高置信度上限。在我们全面的实验评估中，我们证明 FARE 产生的实用证书是严格的，甚至通常可以与先前方法获得的纯经验结果相媲美，这确立了我们方法的实用价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FARE方法，通过限制编码器表示空间实现公平表示学习，并提供可证明的实用公平性证书。
AI.motivation: 现有公平表示学习方法缺乏可验证的公平性保证，而监管要求需要可量化的公平性上界以确保下游分类器的公平性。
AI.method: 通过限制编码器表示空间推导理论保证，结合统计程序计算下游分类器不公平性的有限样本置信上界，并提出基于公平树的实例化方法。
AI.result: 实验表明FARE生成的证书紧致有效，且与经验结果相当，验证了方法的实用性与理论保证的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: FARE是首个兼具理论保证与实用价值的公平表示学习方法，在保持准确率的同时提供了可验证的公平性上界。

authors_text: Dipam Goswami,René Schuster,Joost van de Weijer,Didier Stricker
title: Attribution-aware Weight Transfer: A Warm-Start Initialization for Class-Incremental Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 归因感知权重转移：类增量语义分割的热启动初始化
abstract: In class-incremental semantic segmentation (CISS), deep learning architectures suffer from the critical problems of catastrophic forgetting and semantic background shift. Although recent works focused on these issues, existing classifier initialization methods do not address the background shift problem and assign the same initialization weights to both background and new foreground class classifiers. We propose to address the background shift with a novel classifier initialization method which employs gradient-based attribution to identify the most relevant weights for new classes from the classifier's weights for the previous background and transfers these weights to the new classifier. This warm-start weight initialization provides a general solution applicable to several CISS methods. Furthermore, it accelerates learning of new classes while mitigating forgetting. Our experiments demonstrate significant improvement in mIoU compared to the state-of-the-art CISS methods on the Pascal-VOC 2012, ADE20K and Cityscapes datasets.
summary: In class-incremental semantic segmentation (CISS), deep learning architectures suffer from the critical problems of catastrophic forgetting and semantic background shift. Although recent works focused on these issues, existing classifier initialization methods do not address the background shift problem and assign the same initialization weights to both background and new foreground class classifiers. We propose to address the background shift with a novel classifier initialization method which employs gradient-based attribution to identify the most relevant weights for new classes from the classifier's weights for the previous background and transfers these weights to the new classifier. This warm-start weight initialization provides a general solution applicable to several CISS methods. Furthermore, it accelerates learning of new classes while mitigating forgetting. Our experiments demonstrate significant improvement in mIoU compared to the state-of-the-art CISS methods on the Pascal-VOC 2012, ADE20K and Cityscapes datasets.
abstract_zh: 在类增量语义分割（CISS）中，深度学习架构面临灾难性遗忘和语义背景转移的关键问题。尽管最近的工作集中在这些问题上，但现有的分类器初始化方法没有解决背景偏移问题，也没有为背景和新的前景类分类器分配相同的初始化权重。我们建议使用一种新颖的分类器初始化方法来解决背景偏移问题，该方法采用基于梯度的归因从分类器先前背景的权重中识别新类别的最相关权重，并将这些权重转移到新分类器。这种热启动权重初始化提供了适用于多种 CISS 方法的通用解决方案。此外，它还能加速新课程的学习，同时减少遗忘。我们的实验表明，与 Pascal-VOC 2012、ADE20K 和 Cityscapes 数据集上最先进的 CISS 方法相比，mIoU 有了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于梯度归因的权重迁移方法，用于类增量语义分割任务中的分类器暖启动初始化。
AI.motivation: 现有类增量语义分割方法在处理灾难性遗忘和语义背景偏移时存在不足，传统初始化方法未区分背景与新类别权重导致性能下降。
AI.method: 通过梯度归因定位旧分类器中与新类别相关的权重，将这些权重迁移至新分类器作为初始化，实现暖启动。
AI.result: 在Pascal-VOC 2012、ADE20K和Cityscapes数据集上，相比现有方法mIoU指标显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解背景偏移问题，加速新类学习并减少遗忘，为多种类增量分割方法提供通用解决方案。

search_text: Attribution-aware Weight Transfer: A Warm-Start Initialization for Class-Incremental Semantic Segmentation 归因感知权重转移：类增量语义分割的热启动初始化 In class-incremental semantic segmentation (CISS), deep learning architectures suffer from the critical problems of catastrophic forgetting and semantic background shift. Although recent works focused on these issues, existing classifier initialization methods do not address the background shift problem and assign the same initialization weights to both background and new foreground class classifiers. We propose to address the background shift with a novel classifier initialization method which employs gradient-based attribution to identify the most relevant weights for new classes from the classifier's weights for the previous background and transfers these weights to the new classifier. This warm-start weight initialization provides a general solution applicable to several CISS methods. Furthermore, it accelerates learning of new classes while mitigating forgetting. Our experiments demonstrate significant improvement in mIoU compared to the state-of-the-art CISS methods on the Pascal-VOC 2012, ADE20K and Cityscapes datasets. 在类增量语义分割（CISS）中，深度学习架构面临灾难性遗忘和语义背景转移的关键问题。尽管最近的工作集中在这些问题上，但现有的分类器初始化方法没有解决背景偏移问题，也没有为背景和新的前景类分类器分配相同的初始化权重。我们建议使用一种新颖的分类器初始化方法来解决背景偏移问题，该方法采用基于梯度的归因从分类器先前背景的权重中识别新类别的最相关权重，并将这些权重转移到新分类器。这种热启动权重初始化提供了适用于多种 CISS 方法的通用解决方案。此外，它还能加速新课程的学习，同时减少遗忘。我们的实验表明，与 Pascal-VOC 2012、ADE20K 和 Cityscapes 数据集上最先进的 CISS 方法相比，mIoU 有了显着改进。 本文提出一种基于梯度归因的权重迁移方法，用于类增量语义分割任务中的分类器暖启动初始化。 Dipam Goswami,René Schuster,Joost van de Weijer,Didier Stricker cs.CV

authors_text: Kaifeng Zhang,Yang Fu,Shubhankar Borse,Hong Cai,Fatih Porikli,Xiaolong Wang
title: Self-Supervised Geometric Correspondence for Category-Level 6D Object Pose Estimation in the Wild
title_zh: 用于野外类别级 6D 物体姿态估计的自监督几何对应
abstract: While 6D object pose estimation has wide applications across computer vision and robotics, it remains far from being solved due to the lack of annotations. The problem becomes even more challenging when moving to category-level 6D pose, which requires generalization to unseen instances. Current approaches are restricted by leveraging annotations from simulation or collected from humans. In this paper, we overcome this barrier by introducing a self-supervised learning approach trained directly on large-scale real-world object videos for category-level 6D pose estimation in the wild. Our framework reconstructs the canonical 3D shape of an object category and learns dense correspondences between input images and the canonical shape via surface embedding. For training, we propose novel geometrical cycle-consistency losses which construct cycles across 2D-3D spaces, across different instances and different time steps. The learned correspondence can be applied for 6D pose estimation and other downstream tasks such as keypoint transfer. Surprisingly, our method, without any human annotations or simulators, can achieve on-par or even better performance than previous supervised or semi-supervised methods on in-the-wild images. Our project page is: https://kywind.github.io/self-pose .
summary: While 6D object pose estimation has wide applications across computer vision and robotics, it remains far from being solved due to the lack of annotations. The problem becomes even more challenging when moving to category-level 6D pose, which requires generalization to unseen instances. Current approaches are restricted by leveraging annotations from simulation or collected from humans. In this paper, we overcome this barrier by introducing a self-supervised learning approach trained directly on large-scale real-world object videos for category-level 6D pose estimation in the wild. Our framework reconstructs the canonical 3D shape of an object category and learns dense correspondences between input images and the canonical shape via surface embedding. For training, we propose novel geometrical cycle-consistency losses which construct cycles across 2D-3D spaces, across different instances and different time steps. The learned correspondence can be applied for 6D pose estimation and other downstream tasks such as keypoint transfer. Surprisingly, our method, without any human annotations or simulators, can achieve on-par or even better performance than previous supervised or semi-supervised methods on in-the-wild images. Our project page is: https://kywind.github.io/self-pose .
abstract_zh: 虽然 6D 物体姿态估计在计算机视觉和机器人领域有着广泛的应用，但由于缺乏注释，它仍然远未得到解决。当转向类别级 6D 姿势时，问题变得更具挑战性，这需要泛化到未见过的实例。当前的方法受到利用模拟或从人类收集的注释的限制。在本文中，我们通过引入直接在大规模现实世界对象视频上训练的自监督学习方法来克服这一障碍，以在野外进行类别级 6D 姿态估计。我们的框架重建了对象类别的规范 3D 形状，并通过表面嵌入学习输入图像和规范形状之间的密集对应关系。对于训练，我们提出了新颖的几何循环一致性损失，它可以跨 2D-3D 空间、跨不同实例和不同时间步构建循环。学习到的对应关系可以应用于 6D 姿态估计和其他下游任务，例如关键点转移。令人惊讶的是，我们的方法在没有任何人工注释或模拟器的情况下，可以在野外图像上实现与之前的监督或半监督方法相当甚至更好的性能。我们的项目页面是：https://kywind.github.io/self-pose 。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需人工标注的自监督学习方法，用于在真实场景中进行类别级6D目标姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖模拟数据或人工标注，难以泛化到未见过的实例。本文旨在通过真实世界视频数据解决标注缺失问题。
AI.method: 通过重建类别级3D形状并利用表面嵌入学习图像与3D形状的密集对应关系，提出几何循环一致性损失以跨2D-3D空间和时间步长构建循环。
AI.result: 在无任何人工标注或模拟器的情况下，方法在真实场景图像上达到与监督/半监督方法相当甚至更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: 自监督方法有效解决了标注依赖问题，展示了在真实场景中进行类别级姿态估计的潜力，并可扩展到关键点迁移等下游任务。

authors_text: Arsene Fansi Tchango,Rishab Goel,Julien Martel,Zhi Wen,Gaetan Marceau Caron,Joumana Ghosn
title: Towards Trustworthy Automatic Diagnosis Systems by Emulating Doctors' Reasoning with Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习模拟医生的推理，打造值得信赖的自动诊断系统
abstract: The automation of the medical evidence acquisition and diagnosis process has recently attracted increasing attention in order to reduce the workload of doctors and democratize access to medical care. However, most works proposed in the machine learning literature focus solely on improving the prediction accuracy of a patient's pathology. We argue that this objective is insufficient to ensure doctors' acceptability of such systems. In their initial interaction with patients, doctors do not only focus on identifying the pathology a patient is suffering from; they instead generate a differential diagnosis (in the form of a short list of plausible diseases) because the medical evidence collected from patients is often insufficient to establish a final diagnosis. Moreover, doctors explicitly explore severe pathologies before potentially ruling them out from the differential, especially in acute care settings. Finally, for doctors to trust a system's recommendations, they need to understand how the gathered evidences led to the predicted diseases. In particular, interactions between a system and a patient need to emulate the reasoning of doctors. We therefore propose to model the evidence acquisition and automatic diagnosis tasks using a deep reinforcement learning framework that considers three essential aspects of a doctor's reasoning, namely generating a differential diagnosis using an exploration-confirmation approach while prioritizing severe pathologies. We propose metrics for evaluating interaction quality based on these three aspects. We show that our approach performs better than existing models while maintaining competitive pathology prediction accuracy.
summary: The automation of the medical evidence acquisition and diagnosis process has recently attracted increasing attention in order to reduce the workload of doctors and democratize access to medical care. However, most works proposed in the machine learning literature focus solely on improving the prediction accuracy of a patient's pathology. We argue that this objective is insufficient to ensure doctors' acceptability of such systems. In their initial interaction with patients, doctors do not only focus on identifying the pathology a patient is suffering from; they instead generate a differential diagnosis (in the form of a short list of plausible diseases) because the medical evidence collected from patients is often insufficient to establish a final diagnosis. Moreover, doctors explicitly explore severe pathologies before potentially ruling them out from the differential, especially in acute care settings. Finally, for doctors to trust a system's recommendations, they need to understand how the gathered evidences led to the predicted diseases. In particular, interactions between a system and a patient need to emulate the reasoning of doctors. We therefore propose to model the evidence acquisition and automatic diagnosis tasks using a deep reinforcement learning framework that considers three essential aspects of a doctor's reasoning, namely generating a differential diagnosis using an exploration-confirmation approach while prioritizing severe pathologies. We propose metrics for evaluating interaction quality based on these three aspects. We show that our approach performs better than existing models while maintaining competitive pathology prediction accuracy.
abstract_zh: 为了减少医生的工作量和实现医疗保健的民主化，医疗证据获取和诊断过程的自动化最近引起了越来越多的关注。然而，机器学习文献中提出的大多数工作仅专注于提高患者病理的预测准确性。我们认为这一目标不足以确保医生接受此类系统。在与患者的最初互动中，医生不仅关注确定患者所患有的病理，还关注患者所患的疾病。相反，它们会进行鉴别诊断（以可能疾病的简短清单的形式），因为从患者那里收集的医学证据通常不足以建立最终诊断。此外，医生在可能将其排除在鉴别诊断之外之前，会明确探索严重的病理，尤其是在急性护理环境中。最后，为了让医生相信系统的建议，他们需要了解收集的证据如何导致预测的疾病。特别是，系统和患者之间的交互需要模仿医生的推理。因此，我们建议使用深度强化学习框架对证据获取和自动诊断任务进行建模，该框架考虑医生推理的三个基本方面，即使用探索确认方法生成鉴别诊断，同时优先考虑严重的病理。我们根据这三个方面提出了评估交互质量的指标。我们表明，我们的方法比现有模型表现更好，同时保持有竞争力的病理学预测准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的框架，通过模拟医生的推理过程来构建可信的自动诊断系统。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗AI系统仅关注疾病预测准确率，忽视了医生在诊断过程中生成鉴别诊断、优先排查严重疾病及需要可解释性的需求，导致系统难以被医生接受。
AI.method: 设计深度强化学习框架，模拟医生三个核心推理环节：1) 通过探索-确认策略生成鉴别诊断；2) 优先排查严重疾病；3) 基于交互质量指标评估系统表现。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持疾病预测准确率竞争力的同时，优于现有模型在鉴别诊断生成和严重疾病优先级处理方面的表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模医生实际推理逻辑，该框架提升了自动诊断系统的可信度和临床实用性，为医疗AI与医生协作提供了新方向。

ai_content.result: 实验表明该方法在保持疾病预测准确率竞争力的同时，优于现有模型在鉴别诊断生成和严重疾病优先级处理方面的表现。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过建模医生实际推理逻辑，该框架提升了自动诊断系统的可信度和临床实用性，为医疗AI与医生协作提供了新方向。

search_text: Towards Trustworthy Automatic Diagnosis Systems by Emulating Doctors' Reasoning with Deep Reinforcement Learning 通过深度强化学习模拟医生的推理，打造值得信赖的自动诊断系统 The automation of the medical evidence acquisition and diagnosis process has recently attracted increasing attention in order to reduce the workload of doctors and democratize access to medical care. However, most works proposed in the machine learning literature focus solely on improving the prediction accuracy of a patient's pathology. We argue that this objective is insufficient to ensure doctors' acceptability of such systems. In their initial interaction with patients, doctors do not only focus on identifying the pathology a patient is suffering from; they instead generate a differential diagnosis (in the form of a short list of plausible diseases) because the medical evidence collected from patients is often insufficient to establish a final diagnosis. Moreover, doctors explicitly explore severe pathologies before potentially ruling them out from the differential, especially in acute care settings. Finally, for doctors to trust a system's recommendations, they need to understand how the gathered evidences led to the predicted diseases. In particular, interactions between a system and a patient need to emulate the reasoning of doctors. We therefore propose to model the evidence acquisition and automatic diagnosis tasks using a deep reinforcement learning framework that considers three essential aspects of a doctor's reasoning, namely generating a differential diagnosis using an exploration-confirmation approach while prioritizing severe pathologies. We propose metrics for evaluating interaction quality based on these three aspects. We show that our approach performs better than existing models while maintaining competitive pathology prediction accuracy. 为了减少医生的工作量和实现医疗保健的民主化，医疗证据获取和诊断过程的自动化最近引起了越来越多的关注。然而，机器学习文献中提出的大多数工作仅专注于提高患者病理的预测准确性。我们认为这一目标不足以确保医生接受此类系统。在与患者的最初互动中，医生不仅关注确定患者所患有的病理，还关注患者所患的疾病。相反，它们会进行鉴别诊断（以可能疾病的简短清单的形式），因为从患者那里收集的医学证据通常不足以建立最终诊断。此外，医生在可能将其排除在鉴别诊断之外之前，会明确探索严重的病理，尤其是在急性护理环境中。最后，为了让医生相信系统的建议，他们需要了解收集的证据如何导致预测的疾病。特别是，系统和患者之间的交互需要模仿医生的推理。因此，我们建议使用深度强化学习框架对证据获取和自动诊断任务进行建模，该框架考虑医生推理的三个基本方面，即使用探索确认方法生成鉴别诊断，同时优先考虑严重的病理。我们根据这三个方面提出了评估交互质量的指标。我们表明，我们的方法比现有模型表现更好，同时保持有竞争力的病理学预测准确性。 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的框架，通过模拟医生的推理过程来构建可信的自动诊断系统。 Arsene Fansi Tchango,Rishab Goel,Julien Martel,Zhi Wen,Gaetan Marceau Caron,Joumana Ghosn cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Vincent Russo,Andrea Mari,Nathan Shammah,Ryan LaRose,William J. Zeng
title: Testing platform-independent quantum error mitigation on noisy quantum computers
title_zh: 在嘈杂的量子计算机上测试独立于平台的量子误差缓解
comment: ef:2023 IEEE Transactions on Quantum Engineering
comments: ef:2023 IEEE Transactions on Quantum Engineering
abstract: We apply quantum error mitigation techniques to a variety of benchmark problems and quantum computers to evaluate the performance of quantum error mitigation in practice. To do so, we define an empirically motivated, resource-normalized metric of the improvement of error mitigation which we call the improvement factor, and calculate this metric for each experiment we perform. The experiments we perform consist of zero-noise extrapolation and probabilistic error cancellation applied to two benchmark problems run on IBM, IonQ, and Rigetti quantum computers, as well as noisy quantum computer simulators. Our results show that error mitigation is on average more beneficial than no error mitigation - even when normalized by the additional resources used - but also emphasize that the performance of quantum error mitigation depends on the underlying computer.
summary: We apply quantum error mitigation techniques to a variety of benchmark problems and quantum computers to evaluate the performance of quantum error mitigation in practice. To do so, we define an empirically motivated, resource-normalized metric of the improvement of error mitigation which we call the improvement factor, and calculate this metric for each experiment we perform. The experiments we perform consist of zero-noise extrapolation and probabilistic error cancellation applied to two benchmark problems run on IBM, IonQ, and Rigetti quantum computers, as well as noisy quantum computer simulators. Our results show that error mitigation is on average more beneficial than no error mitigation - even when normalized by the additional resources used - but also emphasize that the performance of quantum error mitigation depends on the underlying computer.
abstract_zh: 我们将量子误差缓解技术应用于各种基准问题和量子计算机，以评估量子误差缓解在实践中的性能。为此，我们定义了一个基于经验的、资源标准化的误差缓解改进指标，我们称之为改进因子，并为我们执行的每个实验计算该指标。我们执行的实验包括零噪声外推和概率误差消除，应用于 IBM、IonQ 和 Rigetti 量子计算机以及噪声量子计算机模拟器上运行的两个基准问题。我们的结果表明，平均而言，错误缓解比没有错误缓解更有利 - 即使通过使用的额外资源进行标准化 - 但也强调量子错误缓解的性能取决于底层计算机。

AI.tldr: 评估量子错误缓解技术在不同平台和模拟器上的实际效果
AI.motivation: 验证量子错误缓解技术的有效性，并比较其在不同量子计算机上的性能差异
AI.method: 定义改进因子作为评估指标，应用零噪声外推和概率误差消除技术，在IBM、IonQ、Rigetti量子计算机及模拟器上进行实验
AI.result: 错误缓解在平均情况下优于无缓解，但效果依赖于底层量子计算机的性能
AI.conclusion: 量子错误缓解有效但效果依赖于硬件平台，需针对性优化

authors_text: Anne Theurkauf,Qi Heng Ho,Roland Ilyes,Nisar Ahmed,Morteza Lahijanian
title: Chance-Constrained Motion Planning with Event-Triggered Estimation
title_zh: 具有事件触发估计的机会约束运动规划
comment: 8 pages, to appear in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2023
comments: 8 pages, to appear in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2023
abstract: We consider the problem of autonomous navigation using limited information from a remote sensor network. Because the remote sensors are power and bandwidth limited, we use event-triggered (ET) estimation to manage communication costs. We introduce a fast and efficient sampling-based planner which computes motion plans coupled with ET communication strategies that minimize communication costs, while satisfying constraints on the probability of reaching the goal region and the point-wise probability of collision. We derive a novel method for offline propagation of the expected state distribution, and corresponding bounds on this distribution. These bounds are used to evaluate the chance constraints in the algorithm. Case studies establish the validity of our approach, demonstrating fast computation of optimal plans.
summary: We consider the problem of autonomous navigation using limited information from a remote sensor network. Because the remote sensors are power and bandwidth limited, we use event-triggered (ET) estimation to manage communication costs. We introduce a fast and efficient sampling-based planner which computes motion plans coupled with ET communication strategies that minimize communication costs, while satisfying constraints on the probability of reaching the goal region and the point-wise probability of collision. We derive a novel method for offline propagation of the expected state distribution, and corresponding bounds on this distribution. These bounds are used to evaluate the chance constraints in the algorithm. Case studies establish the validity of our approach, demonstrating fast computation of optimal plans.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑使用来自远程传感器网络的有限信息进行自主导航的问题。由于远程传感器的功率和带宽有限，因此我们使用事件触发 (ET) 估计来管理通信成本。我们引入了一种快速高效的基于采样的规划器，它计算运动计划，并结合 ET 通信策略，最大限度地减少通信成本，同时满足到达目标区域的概率和逐点碰撞概率的约束。我们推导出一种新颖的方法来离线传播预期状态分布以及该分布的相应界限。这些界限用于评估算法中的机会约束。案例研究证实了我们方法的有效性，证明了最佳计划的快速计算。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合事件触发估计与机会约束的运动规划方法，用于在远程传感器网络资源受限的情况下实现自主导航。
AI.motivation: 远程传感器网络存在电源和带宽限制，需通过事件触发机制降低通信成本，同时确保路径规划满足概率约束与安全要求。
AI.method: 设计基于采样的快速规划器，结合事件触发通信策略，并提出离线传播状态分布的新方法以计算概率约束的分布界限。
AI.result: 案例验证了方法的有效性，能够在满足到达目标概率与碰撞概率约束的前提下，高效生成最优路径并减少通信开销。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在资源受限环境中实现了兼顾通信效率与安全约束的运动规划，为自主导航提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Yen Meng,Hsuan-Jui Chen,Jiatong Shi,Shinji Watanabe,Paola Garcia,Hung-yi Lee,Hao Tang
title: On Compressing Sequences for Self-Supervised Speech Models
title_zh: 关于自监督语音模型的压缩序列
abstract: Compressing self-supervised models has become increasingly necessary, as self-supervised models become larger. While previous approaches have primarily focused on compressing the model size, shortening sequences is also effective in reducing the computational cost. In this work, we study fixed-length and variable-length subsampling along the time axis in self-supervised learning. We explore how individual downstream tasks are sensitive to input frame rates. Subsampling while training self-supervised models not only improves the overall performance on downstream tasks under certain frame rates, but also brings significant speed-up in inference. Variable-length subsampling performs particularly well under low frame rates. In addition, if we have access to phonetic boundaries, we find no degradation in performance for an average frame rate as low as 10 Hz.
summary: Compressing self-supervised models has become increasingly necessary, as self-supervised models become larger. While previous approaches have primarily focused on compressing the model size, shortening sequences is also effective in reducing the computational cost. In this work, we study fixed-length and variable-length subsampling along the time axis in self-supervised learning. We explore how individual downstream tasks are sensitive to input frame rates. Subsampling while training self-supervised models not only improves the overall performance on downstream tasks under certain frame rates, but also brings significant speed-up in inference. Variable-length subsampling performs particularly well under low frame rates. In addition, if we have access to phonetic boundaries, we find no degradation in performance for an average frame rate as low as 10 Hz.
abstract_zh: 随着自监督模型变得越来越大，压缩自监督模型变得越来越必要。虽然以前的方法主要集中在压缩模型大小，但缩短序列也可以有效降低计算成本。在这项工作中，我们研究了自监督学习中沿时间轴的固定长度和可变长度子采样。我们探索各个下游任务如何对输入帧速率敏感。训练自监督模型时进行二次采样不仅可以提高一定帧率下下游任务的整体性能，还可以显着提高推理速度。可变长度子采样在低帧速率下表现特别好。此外，如果我们能够访问语音边界，我们发现平均帧速率低至 10 Hz 时性能不会下降。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过时间轴上的固定长度和可变长度子采样方法压缩自监督语音模型的序列，以降低计算成本并保持性能。
AI.motivation: 随着自监督模型规模增大，传统压缩方法聚焦模型大小，而序列压缩（如降低帧率）作为减少计算成本的有效手段尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 在自监督学习中引入时间轴子采样（固定/可变长度），分析下游任务对输入帧率的敏感性，并评估训练时子采样的性能影响。
AI.result: 子采样在特定帧率下提升下游任务性能并加速推理；可变长度子采样在低帧率表现优异；音素边界存在时，10Hz低帧率无性能损失。
AI.conclusion: 时间轴子采样是有效的模型压缩方法，尤其在低帧率与音素边界信息可用场景下，为自监督模型优化提供新思路。

search_text: On Compressing Sequences for Self-Supervised Speech Models 关于自监督语音模型的压缩序列 Compressing self-supervised models has become increasingly necessary, as self-supervised models become larger. While previous approaches have primarily focused on compressing the model size, shortening sequences is also effective in reducing the computational cost. In this work, we study fixed-length and variable-length subsampling along the time axis in self-supervised learning. We explore how individual downstream tasks are sensitive to input frame rates. Subsampling while training self-supervised models not only improves the overall performance on downstream tasks under certain frame rates, but also brings significant speed-up in inference. Variable-length subsampling performs particularly well under low frame rates. In addition, if we have access to phonetic boundaries, we find no degradation in performance for an average frame rate as low as 10 Hz. 随着自监督模型变得越来越大，压缩自监督模型变得越来越必要。虽然以前的方法主要集中在压缩模型大小，但缩短序列也可以有效降低计算成本。在这项工作中，我们研究了自监督学习中沿时间轴的固定长度和可变长度子采样。我们探索各个下游任务如何对输入帧速率敏感。训练自监督模型时进行二次采样不仅可以提高一定帧率下下游任务的整体性能，还可以显着提高推理速度。可变长度子采样在低帧速率下表现特别好。此外，如果我们能够访问语音边界，我们发现平均帧速率低至 10 Hz 时性能不会下降。 本文研究通过时间轴上的固定长度和可变长度子采样方法压缩自监督语音模型的序列，以降低计算成本并保持性能。 Yen Meng,Hsuan-Jui Chen,Jiatong Shi,Shinji Watanabe,Paola Garcia,Hung-yi Lee,Hao Tang cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Guan-Ting Lin,Chi-Luen Feng,Wei-Ping Huang,Yuan Tseng,Tzu-Han Lin,Chen-An Li,Hung-yi Lee,Nigel G. Ward
title: On the Utility of Self-supervised Models for Prosody-related Tasks
title_zh: 关于自监督模型在韵律相关任务中的实用性
abstract: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) from speech data has produced models that have achieved remarkable performance in many tasks, and that are known to implicitly represent many aspects of information latently present in speech signals. However, relatively little is known about the suitability of such models for prosody-related tasks or the extent to which they encode prosodic information. We present a new evaluation framework, SUPERB-prosody, consisting of three prosody-related downstream tasks and two pseudo tasks. We find that 13 of the 15 SSL models outperformed the baseline on all the prosody-related tasks. We also show good performance on two pseudo tasks: prosody reconstruction and future prosody prediction. We further analyze the layerwise contributions of the SSL models. Overall we conclude that SSL speech models are highly effective for prosody-related tasks.
summary: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) from speech data has produced models that have achieved remarkable performance in many tasks, and that are known to implicitly represent many aspects of information latently present in speech signals. However, relatively little is known about the suitability of such models for prosody-related tasks or the extent to which they encode prosodic information. We present a new evaluation framework, SUPERB-prosody, consisting of three prosody-related downstream tasks and two pseudo tasks. We find that 13 of the 15 SSL models outperformed the baseline on all the prosody-related tasks. We also show good performance on two pseudo tasks: prosody reconstruction and future prosody prediction. We further analyze the layerwise contributions of the SSL models. Overall we conclude that SSL speech models are highly effective for prosody-related tasks.
abstract_zh: 基于语音数据的自监督学习 (SSL) 产生的模型在许多任务中取得了显着的性能，并且已知可以隐式地表示语音信号中潜在存在的信息的许多方面。然而，人们对此类模型是否适用于韵律相关任务或它们编码韵律信息的程度知之甚少。我们提出了一个新的评估框架 SUPERB-prosody，由三个与韵律相关的下游任务和两个伪任务组成。我们发现 15 个 SSL 模型中有 13 个在所有与韵律相关的任务上都优于基线。我们还在两个伪任务上表现出了良好的性能：韵律重建和未来韵律预测。我们进一步分析 SSL 模型的分层贡献。总的来说，我们得出的结论是 SSL 语音模型对于韵律相关任务非常有效。

AI.tldr: 评估自监督模型在韵律相关任务中的有效性
AI.motivation: 探讨自监督学习模型在韵律相关任务中的适用性及编码韵律信息的能力
AI.method: 提出SUPERB-prosody评估框架，包含三个韵律相关下游任务和两个伪任务，评估15个SSL模型
AI.result: 13个SSL模型在韵律任务和伪任务中均优于基线，且各层贡献分析显示模型有效编码韵律信息
AI.conclusion: SSL语音模型在韵律相关任务中具有高度有效性

authors_text: Nelson Vadori,Leo Ardon,Sumitra Ganesh,Thomas Spooner,Selim Amrouni,Jared Vann,Mengda Xu,Zeyu Zheng,Tucker Balch,Manuela Veloso
title: Towards Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning driven Over-The-Counter Market Simulations
title_zh: 迈向多代理强化学习驱动的场外市场模拟
abstract: We study a game between liquidity provider and liquidity taker agents interacting in an over-the-counter market, for which the typical example is foreign exchange. We show how a suitable design of parameterized families of reward functions coupled with shared policy learning constitutes an efficient solution to this problem. By playing against each other, our deep-reinforcement-learning-driven agents learn emergent behaviors relative to a wide spectrum of objectives encompassing profit-and-loss, optimal execution and market share. In particular, we find that liquidity providers naturally learn to balance hedging and skewing, where skewing refers to setting their buy and sell prices asymmetrically as a function of their inventory. We further introduce a novel RL-based calibration algorithm which we found performed well at imposing constraints on the game equilibrium. On the theoretical side, we are able to show convergence rates for our multi-agent policy gradient algorithm under a transitivity assumption, closely related to generalized ordinal potential games.
summary: We study a game between liquidity provider and liquidity taker agents interacting in an over-the-counter market, for which the typical example is foreign exchange. We show how a suitable design of parameterized families of reward functions coupled with shared policy learning constitutes an efficient solution to this problem. By playing against each other, our deep-reinforcement-learning-driven agents learn emergent behaviors relative to a wide spectrum of objectives encompassing profit-and-loss, optimal execution and market share. In particular, we find that liquidity providers naturally learn to balance hedging and skewing, where skewing refers to setting their buy and sell prices asymmetrically as a function of their inventory. We further introduce a novel RL-based calibration algorithm which we found performed well at imposing constraints on the game equilibrium. On the theoretical side, we are able to show convergence rates for our multi-agent policy gradient algorithm under a transitivity assumption, closely related to generalized ordinal potential games.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了场外市场中流动性提供者和流动性接受者之间的博弈，典型的例子就是外汇。我们展示了参数化奖励函数族的适当设计与共享策略学习如何构成该问题的有效解决方案。通过相互竞争，我们的深度强化学习驱动的代理可以学习与各种目标相关的紧急行为，包括损益、最佳执行和市场份额。特别是，我们发现流动性提供者自然会学会平衡对冲和倾斜，其中倾斜是指根据库存的函数不对称地设置买入和卖出价格。我们进一步介绍了一种新颖的基于强化学习的校准算法，我们发现该算法在对游戏平衡施加约束方面表现良好。在理论方面，我们能够在传递性假设下显示多智能体策略梯度算法的收敛率，与广义序数潜在博弈密切相关。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用多智能体强化学习模拟场外市场，研究流动性提供者与流动性接受者之间的博弈行为及策略优化。
AI.motivation: 现有市场模拟方法难以有效处理多智能体间的复杂交互与动态策略调整，需借助强化学习实现更真实的市场行为建模。
AI.method: 通过设计参数化奖励函数与共享策略学习机制，结合深度强化学习训练流动性提供者与接受者的对抗策略，并提出基于RL的校准算法约束均衡，同时理论分析算法收敛性。
AI.result: 实验表明流动性提供者能自主平衡对冲与价格偏斜策略，新校准算法有效控制博弈均衡，理论分析证实算法在转置性假设下的收敛性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究验证了多智能体强化学习在模拟复杂金融市场中的有效性，为交易策略优化与市场机制设计提供了新方法。
