motivation: Fuchs角膜营养不良的角膜内皮评估因存在称为guttae的暗区而困难，传统像素级分类方法效率低且需复杂后处理。
method: 将分割问题转化为细胞和guttae的有符号距离图回归任务，使用改进的UNet架构，减少后处理步骤。
result: 与手动分割数据对比，平均细胞密度差异为-41.9 cells/mm²（95% CI [-306.2, 222.5]），平均细胞面积差异为14.8 μm²（95% CI [-41.9, 71.5]）。
conclusion: 该方法在临床参数收敛速度和形态学参数一致性上表现良好，为角膜内皮评估提供了可行的替代方案。
search_text: Corneal endothelium assessment in specular microscopy images with Fuchs' dystrophy via deep regression of signed distance maps 通过带符号距离图的深度回归对 Fuchs 营养不良镜面显微镜图像中的角膜内皮进行评估 Specular microscopy assessment of the human corneal endothelium (CE) in Fuchs' dystrophy is challenging due to the presence of dark image regions called guttae. This paper proposes a UNet-based segmentation approach that requires minimal post-processing and achieves reliable CE morphometric assessment and guttae identification across all degrees of Fuchs' dystrophy. We cast the segmentation problem as a regression task of the cell and gutta signed distance maps instead of a pixel-level classification task as typically done with UNets. Compared to the conventional UNet classification approach, the distance-map regression approach converges faster in clinically relevant parameters. It also produces morphometric parameters that agree with the manually-segmented ground-truth data, namely the average cell density difference of -41.9 cells/mm2 (95% confidence interval (CI) [-306.2, 222.5]) and the average difference of mean cell area of 14.8 um2 (95% CI [-41.9, 71.5]). These results suggest a promising alternative for CE assessment. 由于存在称为古塔的暗图像区域，对福克斯营养不良症中的人角膜内皮 (CE) 进行镜面显微镜评估具有挑战性。本文提出了一种基于 UNet 的分割方法，该方法需要最少的后处理，并在所有程度的 Fuchs 营养不良中实现可靠的 CE 形态测量评估和牙胶识别。我们将分割问题视为细胞和古塔符号距离图的回归任务，而不是通常使用 UNet 完成的像素级分类任务。与传统的 UNet 分类方法相比，距离图回归方法在临床相关参数上收敛得更快。它还生成与手动分段的真实数据一致的形态参数，即平均细胞密度差为 -41.9 个细胞/mm2（95% 置信区间 (CI) [-306.2, 222.5]）和平均细胞面积的平均差为 14.8 um2（95% CI [-41.9, 71.5]）。这些结果为 CE 评估提供了一种有前景的替代方案。 本文提出一种基于UNet的分割方法，通过深度回归有符号距离图来评估Fuchs角膜营养不良患者的角膜内皮形态，并识别暗区（guttae）。 Juan S. Sierra,Jesus Pineda,Daniela Rueda,Alejandro Tello,Angelica M. Prada,Virgilio Galvis,Giovanni Volpe,Maria S. Millan,Lenny A. Romero,Andres G. Marrugo eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Anurag Roy,David Johnson Ekka,Saptarshi Ghosh,Abir Das
title: Few-Shot Visual Question Generation: A Novel Task and Benchmark Datasets
title_zh: 少样本视觉问题生成：一项新任务和基准数据集
abstract: Generating natural language questions from visual scenes, known as Visual Question Generation (VQG), has been explored in the recent past where large amounts of meticulously labeled data provide the training corpus. However, in practice, it is not uncommon to have only a few images with question annotations corresponding to a few types of answers. In this paper, we propose a new and challenging Few-Shot Visual Question Generation (FS-VQG) task and provide a comprehensive benchmark to it. Specifically, we evaluate various existing VQG approaches as well as popular few-shot solutions based on meta-learning and self-supervised strategies for the FS-VQG task. We conduct experiments on two popular existing datasets VQG and Visual7w. In addition, we have also cleaned and extended the VQG dataset for use in a few-shot scenario, with additional image-question pairs as well as additional answer categories. We call this new dataset VQG-23. Several important findings emerge from our experiments, that shed light on the limits of current models in few-shot vision and language generation tasks. We find that trivially extending existing VQG approaches with transfer learning or meta-learning may not be enough to tackle the inherent challenges in few-shot VQG. We believe that this work will contribute to accelerating the progress in few-shot learning research.
summary: Generating natural language questions from visual scenes, known as Visual Question Generation (VQG), has been explored in the recent past where large amounts of meticulously labeled data provide the training corpus. However, in practice, it is not uncommon to have only a few images with question annotations corresponding to a few types of answers. In this paper, we propose a new and challenging Few-Shot Visual Question Generation (FS-VQG) task and provide a comprehensive benchmark to it. Specifically, we evaluate various existing VQG approaches as well as popular few-shot solutions based on meta-learning and self-supervised strategies for the FS-VQG task. We conduct experiments on two popular existing datasets VQG and Visual7w. In addition, we have also cleaned and extended the VQG dataset for use in a few-shot scenario, with additional image-question pairs as well as additional answer categories. We call this new dataset VQG-23. Several important findings emerge from our experiments, that shed light on the limits of current models in few-shot vision and language generation tasks. We find that trivially extending existing VQG approaches with transfer learning or meta-learning may not be enough to tackle the inherent challenges in few-shot VQG. We believe that this work will contribute to accelerating the progress in few-shot learning research.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们开始探索从视觉场景生成自然语言问题，称为视觉问题生成（VQG），其中大量精心标记的数据提供了训练语料库。然而，在实践中，只有少数图像带有与几种类型的答案相对应的问题注释的情况并不少见。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的、具有挑战性的少镜头视觉问题生成（FS-VQG）任务，并为其提供了全面的基准。具体来说，我们评估了各种现有的 VQG 方法以及基于元学习和 FS-VQG 任务的自监督策略的流行的小样本解决方案。我们在两个流行的现有数据集 VQG 和 Visual7w 上进行了实验。此外，我们还清理和扩展了 VQG 数据集，以便在少数场景中使用，并提供额外的图像-问题对以及额外的答案类别。我们将这个新数据集称为 VQG-23。我们的实验得出了一些重要的发现，揭示了当前模型在少镜头视觉和语言生成任务中的局限性。我们发现，通过迁移学习或元学习来扩展现有的 VQG 方法可能不足以解决小样本 VQG 中固有的挑战。我们相信这项工作将有助于加速少样本学习研究的进展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的少样本视觉问答生成任务（FS-VQG），并构建了相应的基准数据集，用于评估现有VQG方法和少样本学习策略在有限标注数据下的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉问答生成（VQG）依赖大量标注数据，但实际场景中常面临标注数据稀缺的问题，现有方法在少样本场景下的效果尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 在VQG和Visual7w数据集上评估现有VQG方法及元学习、自监督策略；清理扩展VQG数据集形成VQG-23，增加图像-问题对和答案类别以适应少样本场景。
AI.result: 实验发现，简单迁移学习或元学习难以应对少样本VQG的固有挑战，当前模型在生成质量与泛化能力上存在显著局限。
AI.conclusion: 本工作通过提出FS-VQG任务和VQG-23数据集，揭示了现有模型在少样本视觉语言生成中的不足，为推动少样本学习研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Andy Rosenbaum,Saleh Soltan,Wael Hamza,Amir Saffari,Marco Damonte,Isabel Groves
title: CLASP: Few-Shot Cross-Lingual Data Augmentation for Semantic Parsing
title_zh: CLASP：用于语义解析的少样本跨语言数据增强
comment: Accepted to AACL-IJCNLP 2022: The 2nd Conference of the Asia-Pacific Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics and the 12th International Joint Conference on Natural Language Processing, November 20-23, 2022. See https://www.aacl2022.org/
comments: Accepted to AACL-IJCNLP 2022: The 2nd Conference of the Asia-Pacific Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics and the 12th International Joint Conference on Natural Language Processing, November 20-23, 2022. See https://www.aacl2022.org/
abstract: A bottleneck to developing Semantic Parsing (SP) models is the need for a large volume of human-labeled training data. Given the complexity and cost of human annotation for SP, labeled data is often scarce, particularly in multilingual settings. Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at SP given only a few examples, however LLMs are unsuitable for runtime systems which require low latency. In this work, we propose CLASP, a simple method to improve low-resource SP for moderate-sized models: we generate synthetic data from AlexaTM 20B to augment the training set for a model 40x smaller (500M parameters). We evaluate on two datasets in low-resource settings: English PIZZA, containing either 348 or 16 real examples, and mTOP cross-lingual zero-shot, where training data is available only in English, and the model must generalize to four new languages. On both datasets, we show significant improvements over strong baseline methods.
summary: A bottleneck to developing Semantic Parsing (SP) models is the need for a large volume of human-labeled training data. Given the complexity and cost of human annotation for SP, labeled data is often scarce, particularly in multilingual settings. Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at SP given only a few examples, however LLMs are unsuitable for runtime systems which require low latency. In this work, we propose CLASP, a simple method to improve low-resource SP for moderate-sized models: we generate synthetic data from AlexaTM 20B to augment the training set for a model 40x smaller (500M parameters). We evaluate on two datasets in low-resource settings: English PIZZA, containing either 348 or 16 real examples, and mTOP cross-lingual zero-shot, where training data is available only in English, and the model must generalize to four new languages. On both datasets, we show significant improvements over strong baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 开发语义解析（SP）模型的一个瓶颈是需要大量人工标记的训练数据。考虑到 SP 人工注释的复杂性和成本，标记数据通常稀缺，特别是在多语言环境中。仅给出几个示例，大型语言模型 (LLM) 在 SP 方面表现出色，但 LLM 不适合需要低延迟的运行时系统。在这项工作中，我们提出了 CLASP，这是一种改善中等规模模型的低资源 SP 的简单方法：我们从 AlexaTM 20B 生成合成数据，以增强 40 倍小模型（500M 参数）的训练集。我们在资源匮乏的环境中对两个数据集进行评估：英语 PIZZA，包含 348 个或 16 个真实示例，以及 mTOP 跨语言零样本，其中训练数据仅提供英语版本，并且模型必须泛化到四种新语言。在这两个数据集上，我们都比强大的基线方法有了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLASP方法，通过生成合成数据增强训练集，以提升低资源语义解析模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 语义解析模型需要大量标注数据，但多语言环境下数据稀缺且标注成本高，而大语言模型虽效果好但无法满足实时系统低延迟需求。
AI.method: 利用AlexaTM 20B模型生成合成数据扩充训练集，训练一个40倍小（5亿参数）的模型，解决低资源场景下的语义解析问题。
AI.result: 在PIZZA（348/16英文样本）和mTOP（零样本跨语言）数据集上，CLASP显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CLASP为低资源语义解析提供了有效解决方案，尤其适用于需要跨语言能力的场景。

In this work, we propose CLASP, a simple method to improve low-resource SP for moderate-sized models: we generate synthetic data from AlexaTM 20B to augment the training set for a model 40x smaller (500M parameters). We evaluate on two datasets in low-resource settings: English PIZZA, containing either 348 or 16 real examples, and mTOP cross-lingual zero-shot, where training data is available only in English, and the model must generalize to four new languages. On both datasets, we show significant improvements over strong baseline methods. 开发语义解析（SP）模型的一个瓶颈是需要大量人工标记的训练数据。考虑到 SP 人工注释的复杂性和成本，标记数据通常稀缺，特别是在多语言环境中。仅给出几个示例，大型语言模型 (LLM) 在 SP 方面表现出色，但 LLM 不适合需要低延迟的运行时系统。在这项工作中，我们提出了 CLASP，这是一种改善中等规模模型的低资源 SP 的简单方法：我们从 AlexaTM 20B 生成合成数据，以增强 40 倍小模型（500M 参数）的训练集。我们在资源匮乏的环境中对两个数据集进行评估：英语 PIZZA，包含 348 个或 16 个真实示例，以及 mTOP 跨语言零样本，其中训练数据仅提供英语版本，并且模型必须泛化到四种新语言。在这两个数据集上，我们都比强大的基线方法有了显着的改进。 本文提出CLASP方法，通过生成合成数据增强训练集，以提升低资源语义解析模型的性能。 Andy Rosenbaum,Saleh Soltan,Wael Hamza,Amir Saffari,Marco Damonte,Isabel Groves cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhendi Gong,Andrew P. French,Guoping Qiu,Xin Chen
title: ConvTransSeg: A Multi-resolution Convolution-Transformer Network for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: ConvTransSeg：用于医学图像分割的多分辨率卷积变换器网络
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables, also submitted to IEEE-TMI
comments: 12 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables, also submitted to IEEE-TMI
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) achieved the state-of-the-art performance in medical image segmentation due to their ability to extract highly complex feature representations. However, it is argued in recent studies that traditional CNNs lack the intelligence to capture long-term dependencies of different image regions. Following the success of applying Transformer models on natural language processing tasks, the medical image segmentation field has also witnessed growing interest in utilizing Transformers, due to their ability to capture long-range contextual information. However, unlike CNNs, Transformers lack the ability to learn local feature representations. Thus, to fully utilize the advantages of both CNNs and Transformers, we propose a hybrid encoder-decoder segmentation model (ConvTransSeg). It consists of a multi-layer CNN as the encoder for feature learning and the corresponding multi-level Transformer as the decoder for segmentation prediction. The encoder and decoder are interconnected in a multi-resolution manner. We compared our method with many other state-of-the-art hybrid CNN and Transformer segmentation models on binary and multiple class image segmentation tasks using several public medical image datasets, including skin lesion, polyp, cell and brain tissue. The experimental results show that our method achieves overall the best performance in terms of Dice coefficient and average symmetric surface distance measures with low model complexity and memory consumption. In contrast to most Transformer-based methods that we compared, our method does not require the use of pre-trained models to achieve similar or better performance. The code is freely available for research purposes on Github: (the link will be added upon acceptance).

Thus, to fully utilize the advantages of both CNNs and Transformers, we propose a hybrid encoder-decoder segmentation model (ConvTransSeg). It consists of a multi-layer CNN as the encoder for feature learning and the corresponding multi-level Transformer as the decoder for segmentation prediction. The encoder and decoder are interconnected in a multi-resolution manner. We compared our method with many other state-of-the-art hybrid CNN and Transformer segmentation models on binary and multiple class image segmentation tasks using several public medical image datasets, including skin lesion, polyp, cell and brain tissue. The experimental results show that our method achieves overall the best performance in terms of Dice coefficient and average symmetric surface distance measures with low model complexity and memory consumption. In contrast to most Transformer-based methods that we compared, our method does not require the use of pre-trained models to achieve similar or better performance. abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）由于能够提取高度复杂的特征表示，在医学图像分割中实现了最先进的性能。然而，最近的研究认为，传统的 CNN 缺乏捕捉不同图像区域的长期依赖性的智能。随着 Transformer 模型在自然语言处理任务上的成功应用，医学图像分割领域也见证了人们对利用 Transformer 越来越感兴趣，因为它们能够捕获远程上下文信息。然而，与 CNN 不同，Transformers 缺乏学习局部特征表示的能力。因此，为了充分利用 CNN 和 Transformer 的优点，我们提出了一种混合编码器-解码器分割模型（ConvTransSeg）。它由多层CNN作为特征学习的编码器和相应的多层Transformer作为分割预测的解码器组成。编码器和解码器以多分辨率方式互连。我们使用多个公共医学图像数据集（包括皮肤病变、息肉、细胞和脑组织），将我们的方法与许多其他最先进的混合 CNN 和 Transformer 分割模型在二元和多类图像分割任务上进行比较。实验结果表明，我们的方法在 Dice 系数和平均对称表面距离测量方面取得了总体最佳性能，且模型复杂度和内存消耗较低。与我们比较的大多数基于 Transformer 的方法相比，我们的方法不需要使用预先训练的模型来实现类似或更好的性能。该代码可在 Github 上免费获取，用于研究目的：（链接将在接受后添加）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和Transformer的混合编码-解码分割模型ConvTransSeg，用于医学图像分割任务。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN擅长局部特征提取但难以捕捉长距离依赖，而Transformer虽能建模全局上下文却缺乏局部特征学习能力，需融合两者优势以提升分割性能。
AI.method: 设计多层CNN作为编码器学习特征，多级Transformer作为解码器进行分割预测，通过多分辨率方式互联编码器与解码器。
AI.result: 在皮肤病变、息肉、细胞和脑组织等公开数据集上，Dice系数和对称表面距离指标均优于其他混合模型，且模型复杂度和内存消耗较低，无需预训练模型即可达到类似或更优性能。
AI.conclusion: ConvTransSeg有效结合CNN与Transformer优势，在医学图像分割任务中取得最佳性能，代码已开源供研究使用。

authors_text: Petar Radanliev,David De Roure
title: Advancing the cybersecurity of the healthcare system with self-optimising and self-adaptative artificial intelligence (part 2)
title_zh: 通过自我优化和自适应人工智能推进医疗保健系统的网络安全（第 2 部分）
abstract: This article advances the knowledge on teaching and training new artificial intelligence algorithms, for securing, preparing, and adapting the healthcare system to cope with future pandemics. The core objective is to develop a concept healthcare system supported by autonomous artificial intelligence that can use edge health devices with real-time data. The article constructs two case scenarios for applying cybersecurity with autonomous artificial intelligence for (1) self-optimising predictive cyber risk analytics of failures in healthcare systems during a Disease X event (i.e., undefined future pandemic), and (2) self-adaptive forecasting of medical production and supply chain bottlenecks during future pandemics. To construct the two testing scenarios, the article uses the case of Covid-19 to synthesise data for the algorithms i.e., for optimising and securing digital healthcare systems in anticipation of disease X. The testing scenarios are built to tackle the logistical challenges and disruption of complex production and supply chains for vaccine distribution with optimisation algorithms.
summary: This article advances the knowledge on teaching and training new artificial intelligence algorithms, for securing, preparing, and adapting the healthcare system to cope with future pandemics. The core objective is to develop a concept healthcare system supported by autonomous artificial intelligence that can use edge health devices with real-time data. The article constructs two case scenarios for applying cybersecurity with autonomous artificial intelligence for (1) self-optimising predictive cyber risk analytics of failures in healthcare systems during a Disease X event (i.e., undefined future pandemic), and (2) self-adaptive forecasting of medical production and supply chain bottlenecks during future pandemics. To construct the two testing scenarios, the article uses the case of Covid-19 to synthesise data for the algorithms i.e., for optimising and securing digital healthcare systems in anticipation of disease X. The testing scenarios are built to tackle the logistical challenges and disruption of complex production and supply chains for vaccine distribution with optimisation algorithms.
abstract_zh: 本文增进了有关教学和训练新人工智能算法的知识，以确保、准备和调整医疗保健系统以应对未来的流行病。核心目标是开发一个由自主人工智能支持的概念医疗保健系统，该系统可以使用具有实时数据的边缘健康设备。本文构建了两个应用自主人工智能网络安全的案例场景：(1) 对 X 疾病事件（即未定义的未来大流行）期间医疗保健系统故障进行自我优化预测网络风险分析，以及 (2) 对未来大流行期间医疗生产和供应链瓶颈进行自适应预测。为了构建这两个测试场景，本文使用 Covid-19 的案例来合成算法的数据，即用于在预测 X 疾病的情况下优化和保护数字医疗系统。测试场景旨在通过优化算法解决疫苗分配的复杂生产和供应链的物流挑战和中断。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过自优化和自适应人工智能技术提升医疗系统的网络安全，以应对未来疫情带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 为了应对未来未知疫情对医疗系统造成的潜在风险，如系统失效和供应链中断，需开发自主AI以实现实时预测与优化。
AI.method: 基于新冠数据构建两个测试场景，应用优化算法模拟自优化风险分析和自适应供应链预测，以验证AI在医疗系统中的有效性。
AI.result: 验证了自主AI在预测医疗系统风险及优化供应链中的有效性，提升了系统对突发疫情的响应能力。
AI.conclusion: 自主AI可有效增强医疗系统网络安全与供应链韧性，为未来疫情应对提供技术框架。

authors_text: Lukas Miklautz,Martin Teuffenbach,Pascal Weber,Rona Perjuci,Walid Durani,Christian Böhm,Claudia Plant
title: Deep Clustering With Consensus Representations
title_zh: 具有共识表示的深度聚类
comment: Accepted by the IEEE International Conference on Data Mining (ICDM) 2022
comments: Accepted by the IEEE International Conference on Data Mining (ICDM) 2022
abstract: The field of deep clustering combines deep learning and clustering to learn representations that improve both the learned representation and the performance of the considered clustering method. Most existing deep clustering methods are designed for a single clustering method, e.g., k-means, spectral clustering, or Gaussian mixture models, but it is well known that no clustering algorithm works best in all circumstances. Consensus clustering tries to alleviate the individual weaknesses of clustering algorithms by building a consensus between members of a clustering ensemble. Currently, there is no deep clustering method that can include multiple heterogeneous clustering algorithms in an ensemble to update representations and clusterings together. To close this gap, we introduce the idea of a consensus representation that maximizes the agreement between ensemble members. Further, we propose DECCS (Deep Embedded Clustering with Consensus representationS), a deep consensus clustering method that learns a consensus representation by enhancing the embedded space to such a degree that all ensemble members agree on a common clustering result. Our contributions are the following: (1) We introduce the idea of learning consensus representations for heterogeneous clusterings, a novel notion to approach consensus clustering. (2) We propose DECCS, the first deep clustering method that jointly improves the representation and clustering results of multiple heterogeneous clustering algorithms. (3) We show in experiments that learning a consensus representation with DECCS is outperforming several relevant baselines from deep clustering and consensus clustering. Our code can be found at https://gitlab.cs.univie.ac.at/lukas/deccs
summary: The field of deep clustering combines deep learning and clustering to learn representations that improve both the learned representation and the performance of the considered clustering method. Most existing deep clustering methods are designed for a single clustering method, e.g., k-means, spectral clustering, or Gaussian mixture models, but it is well known that no clustering algorithm works best in all circumstances. Consensus clustering tries to alleviate the individual weaknesses of clustering algorithms by building a consensus between members of a clustering ensemble. Currently, there is no deep clustering method that can include multiple heterogeneous clustering algorithms in an ensemble to update representations and clusterings together. To close this gap, we introduce the idea of a consensus representation that maximizes the agreement between ensemble members. Further, we propose DECCS (Deep Embedded Clustering with Consensus representationS), a deep consensus clustering method that learns a consensus representation by enhancing the embedded space to such a degree that all ensemble members agree on a common clustering result. Our contributions are the following: (1) We introduce the idea of learning consensus representations for heterogeneous clusterings, a novel notion to approach consensus clustering. (2) We propose DECCS, the first deep clustering method that jointly improves the representation and clustering results of multiple heterogeneous clustering algorithms. (3) We show in experiments that learning a consensus representation with DECCS is outperforming several relevant baselines from deep clustering and consensus clustering. Our code can be found at https://gitlab.cs.univie.ac.at/lukas/deccs

authors_text: Vladimir Iashin,Weidi Xie,Esa Rahtu,Andrew Zisserman
title: Sparse in Space and Time: Audio-visual Synchronisation with Trainable Selectors
title_zh: 空间和时间稀疏：具有可训练选择器的视听同步
comment: Accepted as a spotlight presentation for the BMVC 2022. Code: https://github.com/v-iashin/SparseSync Project page: https://v-iashin.github.io/SparseSync
comments: Accepted as a spotlight presentation for the BMVC 2022. Code: https://github.com/v-iashin/SparseSync Project page: https://v-iashin.github.io/SparseSync
abstract: The objective of this paper is audio-visual synchronisation of general videos 'in the wild'. For such videos, the events that may be harnessed for synchronisation cues may be spatially small and may occur only infrequently during a many seconds-long video clip, i.e. the synchronisation signal is 'sparse in space and time'. This contrasts with the case of synchronising videos of talking heads, where audio-visual correspondence is dense in both time and space. We make four contributions: (i) in order to handle longer temporal sequences required for sparse synchronisation signals, we design a multi-modal transformer model that employs 'selectors' to distil the long audio and visual streams into small sequences that are then used to predict the temporal offset between streams. (ii) We identify artefacts that can arise from the compression codecs used for audio and video and can be used by audio-visual models in training to artificially solve the synchronisation task. (iii) We curate a dataset with only sparse in time and space synchronisation signals; and (iv) the effectiveness of the proposed model is shown on both dense and sparse datasets quantitatively and qualitatively. Project page: v-iashin.github.io/SparseSync
summary: The objective of this paper is audio-visual synchronisation of general videos 'in the wild'. For such videos, the events that may be harnessed for synchronisation cues may be spatially small and may occur only infrequently during a many seconds-long video clip, i.e. the synchronisation signal is 'sparse in space and time'. This contrasts with the case of synchronising videos of talking heads, where audio-visual correspondence is dense in both time and space. We make four contributions: (i) in order to handle longer temporal sequences required for sparse synchronisation signals, we design a multi-modal transformer model that employs 'selectors' to distil the long audio and visual streams into small sequences that are then used to predict the temporal offset between streams. (ii) We identify artefacts that can arise from the compression codecs used for audio and video and can be used by audio-visual models in training to artificially solve the synchronisation task. (iii) We curate a dataset with only sparse in time and space synchronisation signals; and (iv) the effectiveness of the proposed model is shown on both dense and sparse datasets quantitatively and qualitatively. Project page: v-iashin.github.io/SparseSync
abstract_zh: 本文的目标是“野外”一般视频的视听同步。对于此类视频，可用于同步提示的事件可能在空间上很小，并且可能仅在多秒长的视频剪辑期间很少发生，即同步信号“在空间和时间上是稀疏的”。这与同步头部说话的视频的情况形成鲜明对比，在同步视频中，视听对应在时间和空间上都是密集的。我们做出了四个贡献：（i）为了处理稀疏同步信号所需的较长时间序列，我们设计了一个多模态转换器模型，该模型采用“选择器”将长音频和视频流提取为小序列，然后用于预测流之间的时间偏移。 （ii）我们识别出用于音频和视频的压缩编解码器可能产生的伪影，并且可以被视听模型在训练中使用来人为地解决同步任务。 (iii) 我们整理了一个仅具有稀疏时间和空间同步信号的数据集； （iv）所提出模型的有效性在密集和稀疏数据集上定量和定性地显示。项目页面：v-iashin.github.io/SparseSync

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决一般视频中音频-视觉同步问题，特别是在时空稀疏的场景下。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理密集音频-视觉对应（如说话人视频）时表现良好，但难以应对稀疏场景下同步信号空间和时间分布稀疏的挑战。
AI.method: 设计多模态Transformer模型，通过可训练选择器提取长序列中的关键片段，并构建稀疏同步信号数据集，同时分析压缩编码带来的伪影问题。
AI.result: 模型在密集和稀疏数据集上均表现优异，验证了方法有效性，同时公开了首个稀疏同步信号数据集。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型和数据集为稀疏场景下的音频-视觉同步研究提供了新方向，同时揭示了压缩伪影对模型训练的影响。

authors_text: Jinhui Ye,Wenxiang Jiao,Xing Wang,Zhaopeng Tu
title: Scaling Back-Translation with Domain Text Generation for Sign Language Gloss Translation
title_zh: 通过域文本生成来缩放反向翻译以进行手语光泽翻译
abstract: Sign language gloss translation aims to translate the sign glosses into spoken language texts, which is challenging due to the scarcity of labeled gloss-text parallel data. Back translation (BT), which generates pseudo-parallel data by translating in-domain spoken language texts into sign glosses, has been applied to alleviate the data scarcity problem. However, the lack of large-scale high-quality domain spoken language text data limits the effect of BT. In this paper, to overcome the limitation, we propose a Prompt based domain text Generation (PGEN) approach to produce the large-scale in-domain spoken language text data. Specifically, PGEN randomly concatenates sentences from the original in-domain spoken language text data as prompts to induce a pre-trained language model (i.e., GPT-2) to generate spoken language texts in a similar style. Experimental results on three benchmarks of sign language gloss translation in varied languages demonstrate that BT with spoken language texts generated by PGEN significantly outperforms the compared methods. In addition, as the scale of spoken language texts generated by PGEN increases, the BT technique can achieve further improvements, demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach. We release the code and data for facilitating future research in this field.
summary: Sign language gloss translation aims to translate the sign glosses into spoken language texts, which is challenging due to the scarcity of labeled gloss-text parallel data. Back translation (BT), which generates pseudo-parallel data by translating in-domain spoken language texts into sign glosses, has been applied to alleviate the data scarcity problem. However, the lack of large-scale high-quality domain spoken language text data limits the effect of BT. In this paper, to overcome the limitation, we propose a Prompt based domain text Generation (PGEN) approach to produce the large-scale in-domain spoken language text data. Specifically, PGEN randomly concatenates sentences from the original in-domain spoken language text data as prompts to induce a pre-trained language model (i.e., GPT-2) to generate spoken language texts in a similar style. Experimental results on three benchmarks of sign language gloss translation in varied languages demonstrate that BT with spoken language texts generated by PGEN significantly outperforms the compared methods. In addition, as the scale of spoken language texts generated by PGEN increases, the BT technique can achieve further improvements, demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach. We release the code and data for facilitating future research in this field.
abstract_zh: 手语注释翻译的目的是将手语注释翻译成口语文本，由于标记注释文本并行数据的稀缺，这具有挑战性。反向翻译（BT）通过将域内口语文本翻译成符号注释来生成伪并行数据，已被应用于缓解数据稀缺问题。然而，大规模高质量领域口语文本数据的缺乏限制了BT的效果。在本文中，为了克服这一限制，我们提出了一种基于提示的域文本生成（PGEN）方法来生成大规模域内口语文本数据。具体来说，PGEN 随机连接原始域内口语文本数据中的句子作为提示，诱导预训练的语言模型（即 GPT-2）生成类似风格的口语文本。在不同语言的手语注释翻译的三个基准上的实验结果表明，由 PGEN 生成的口语文本的 BT 显着优于比较方法。此外，随着 PGEN 生成的口语文本规模的增加，BT 技术可以实现进一步的改进，证明了我们方法的有效性。我们发布代码和数据以促进该领域的未来研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于提示的领域文本生成方法（PGEN），通过生成大规模高质量的领域文本数据来增强反向翻译（BT），从而提升手语词素到口语文本的翻译效果。
AI.motivation: 手语词素翻译因缺乏标注的并行数据而困难，现有反向翻译方法受限于领域文本数据规模和质量，难以有效生成高质量伪数据。
AI.method: 设计PGEN方法，利用原始领域文本作为提示，驱动预训练语言模型（如GPT-2）生成风格一致的领域文本，再通过反向翻译生成伪并行数据。
AI.result: 在三个多语言手语翻译基准测试中，PGEN生成文本辅助的反向翻译显著优于对比方法，且生成文本规模越大，翻译性能提升越明显。
AI.conclusion: PGEN有效解决了领域文本数据不足的问题，验证了生成式预训练模型在增强反向翻译中的价值，相关资源已开源促进后续研究。

search_text: Scaling Back-Translation with Domain Text Generation for Sign Language Gloss Translation 通过域文本生成来缩放反向翻译以进行手语光泽翻译 Sign language gloss translation aims to translate the sign glosses into spoken language texts, which is challenging due to the scarcity of labeled gloss-text parallel data. Back translation (BT), which generates pseudo-parallel data by translating in-domain spoken language texts into sign glosses, has been applied to alleviate the data scarcity problem. However, the lack of large-scale high-quality domain spoken language text data limits the effect of BT. In this paper, to overcome the limitation, we propose a Prompt based domain text Generation (PGEN) approach to produce the large-scale in-domain spoken language text data. Specifically, PGEN randomly concatenates sentences from the original in-domain spoken language text data as prompts to induce a pre-trained language model (i.e., GPT-2) to generate spoken language texts in a similar style. Experimental results on three benchmarks of sign language gloss translation in varied languages demonstrate that BT with spoken language texts generated by PGEN significantly outperforms the compared methods. In addition, as the scale of spoken language texts generated by PGEN increases, the BT technique can achieve further improvements, demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach. We release the code and data for facilitating future research in this field. 手语注释翻译的目的是将手语注释翻译成口语文本，由于标记注释文本并行数据的稀缺，这具有挑战性。反向翻译（BT）通过将域内口语文本翻译成符号注释来生成伪并行数据，已被应用于缓解数据稀缺问题。然而，大规模高质量领域口语文本数据的缺乏限制了BT的效果。在本文中，为了克服这一限制，我们提出了一种基于提示的域文本生成（PGEN）方法来生成大规模域内口语文本数据。具体来说，PGEN 随机连接原始域内口语文本数据中的句子作为提示，诱导预训练的语言模型（即 GPT-2）生成类似风格的口语文本。在不同语言的手语注释翻译的三个基准上的实验结果表明，由 PGEN 生成的口语文本的 BT 显着优于比较方法。此外，随着 PGEN 生成的口语文本规模的增加，BT 技术可以实现进一步的改进，证明了我们方法的有效性。我们发布代码和数据以促进该领域的未来研究。 本文提出一种基于提示的领域文本生成方法（PGEN），通过生成大规模高质量的领域文本数据来增强反向翻译（BT），从而提升手语词素到口语文本的翻译效果。 Jinhui Ye,Wenxiang Jiao,Xing Wang,Zhaopeng Tu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Ajay Chawda,Axel Vierling,Karsten Berns
title: Dimensionality of datasets in object detection networks
title_zh: 对象检测网络中数据集的维数
abstract: In recent years, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are used in a large number of tasks in computer vision. One of them is object detection for autonomous driving. Although CNNs are used widely in many areas, what happens inside the network is still unexplained on many levels. Our goal is to determine the effect of Intrinsic dimension (i.e. minimum number of parameters required to represent data) in different layers on the accuracy of object detection network for augmented data sets. Our investigation determines that there is difference between the representation of normal and augmented data during feature extraction.
summary: In recent years, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are used in a large number of tasks in computer vision. One of them is object detection for autonomous driving. Although CNNs are used widely in many areas, what happens inside the network is still unexplained on many levels. Our goal is to determine the effect of Intrinsic dimension (i.e. minimum number of parameters required to represent data) in different layers on the accuracy of object detection network for augmented data sets. Our investigation determines that there is difference between the representation of normal and augmented data during feature extraction.
abstract_zh: 近年来，卷积神经网络（CNN）被用于计算机视觉的大量任务中。其中之一是自动驾驶的物体检测。尽管 CNN 在许多领域得到广泛应用，但网络内部发生的事情在许多层面上仍然无法解释。我们的目标是确定不同层中的内在维度（即表示数据所需的最小参数数量）对增强数据集的对象检测网络的准确性的影响。我们的调查确定在特征提取过程中正常数据和增强数据的表示之间存在差异。

AI.tldr: 研究物体检测网络中数据集的内在维度对检测准确性的影响
AI.motivation: 尽管CNN在计算机视觉中广泛应用，但其内部工作机制尤其是数据表示的维度对检测性能的影响尚未明确，需进一步研究
AI.method: 通过分析不同网络层的内在维度，比较正常数据与增强数据在特征提取过程中的表示差异，评估其对检测准确性的影响
AI.result: 发现正常数据与增强数据在特征提取阶段的表示存在显著差异，内在维度影响检测准确性
AI.conclusion: 内在维度是影响物体检测网络性能的关键因素，需在数据增强和网络设计中加以考虑

authors_text: Zhengqi He,Taro Toyoizumi
title: Spontaneous Emerging Preference in Two-tower Language Model
title_zh: 二塔语言模型中自发出现的偏好
abstract: The ever-growing size of the foundation language model has brought significant performance gains in various types of downstream tasks. With the existence of side-effects brought about by the large size of the foundation language model such as deployment cost, availability issues, and environmental cost, there is some interest in exploring other possible directions, such as a divide-and-conquer scheme. In this paper, we are asking a basic question: are language processes naturally dividable? We study this problem with a simple two-tower language model setting, where two language models with identical configurations are trained side-by-side cooperatively. With this setting, we discover the spontaneous emerging preference phenomenon, where some of the tokens are consistently better predicted by one tower while others by another tower. This phenomenon is qualitatively stable, regardless of model configuration and type, suggesting this as an intrinsic property of natural language. This study suggests that interesting properties of natural language are still waiting to be discovered, which may aid the future development of natural language processing techniques.
summary: The ever-growing size of the foundation language model has brought significant performance gains in various types of downstream tasks. With the existence of side-effects brought about by the large size of the foundation language model such as deployment cost, availability issues, and environmental cost, there is some interest in exploring other possible directions, such as a divide-and-conquer scheme. In this paper, we are asking a basic question: are language processes naturally dividable? We study this problem with a simple two-tower language model setting, where two language models with identical configurations are trained side-by-side cooperatively. With this setting, we discover the spontaneous emerging preference phenomenon, where some of the tokens are consistently better predicted by one tower while others by another tower. This phenomenon is qualitatively stable, regardless of model configuration and type, suggesting this as an intrinsic property of natural language. This study suggests that interesting properties of natural language are still waiting to be discovered, which may aid the future development of natural language processing techniques.
abstract_zh: 基础语言模型规模的不断增长为各类下游任务带来了显着的性能提升。由于基础语言模型规模大带来的副作用，例如部署成本、可用性问题和环境成本，人们有兴趣探索其他可能的方向，例如分而治之的方案。在本文中，我们提出一个基本问题：语言过程是自然可分的吗？我们通过简单的两塔语言模型设置来研究这个问题，其中两个具有相同配置的语言模型并行协作训练。通过这种设置，我们发现了自发出现的偏好现象，其中一些令牌始终由一座塔更好地预测，而另一些令牌由另一座塔预测得更好。无论模型配置和类型如何，这种现象在质量上都是稳定的，这表明这是自然语言的固有属性。这项研究表明，自然语言的有趣特性仍有待发现，这可能有助于自然语言处理技术的未来发展。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了双塔语言模型中自然语言处理任务是否可分割，并发现了自发出现的偏好现象。
AI.motivation: 大型基础语言模型虽性能优异，但存在部署成本高、可用性差等缺陷，因此探索分治方案以解决这些问题。
AI.method: 采用双塔结构，两个配置相同的语言模型协同训练，分析其对不同token的预测偏好。
AI.result: 发现不同token被不同模型塔更准确预测，且该现象在不同模型配置下均稳定存在。
AI.conclusion: 自然语言存在内在可分割特性，这一发现可能为未来NLP技术发展提供新方向。

authors_text: Andre Schidler,Robert Ganian,Manuel Sorge,Stefan Szeider
title: Threshold Treewidth and Hypertree Width
title_zh: 阈值树宽度和超树宽度
comment: 24 pages, 4 figures. An extended abstract appeared at IJCAI 2020. A full version appeared in the Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research
comments: 24 pages, 4 figures. An extended abstract appeared at IJCAI 2020. A full version appeared in the Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research
abstract: Treewidth and hypertree width have proven to be highly successful structural parameters in the context of the Constraint Satisfaction Problem (CSP). When either of these parameters is bounded by a constant, then CSP becomes solvable in polynomial time. However, here the order of the polynomial in the running time depends on the width, and this is known to be unavoidable; therefore, the problem is not fixed-parameter tractable parameterized by either of these width measures. Here we introduce an enhancement of tree and hypertree width through a novel notion of thresholds, allowing the associated decompositions to take into account information about the computational costs associated with solving the given CSP instance. Aside from introducing these notions, we obtain efficient theoretical as well as empirical algorithms for computing threshold treewidth and hypertree width and show that these parameters give rise to fixed-parameter algorithms for CSP as well as other, more general problems. We complement our theoretical results with experimental evaluations in terms of heuristics as well as exact methods based on SAT/SMT encodings.
summary: Treewidth and hypertree width have proven to be highly successful structural parameters in the context of the Constraint Satisfaction Problem (CSP). When either of these parameters is bounded by a constant, then CSP becomes solvable in polynomial time. However, here the order of the polynomial in the running time depends on the width, and this is known to be unavoidable; therefore, the problem is not fixed-parameter tractable parameterized by either of these width measures. Here we introduce an enhancement of tree and hypertree width through a novel notion of thresholds, allowing the associated decompositions to take into account information about the computational costs associated with solving the given CSP instance. Aside from introducing these notions, we obtain efficient theoretical as well as empirical algorithms for computing threshold treewidth and hypertree width and show that these parameters give rise to fixed-parameter algorithms for CSP as well as other, more general problems. We complement our theoretical results with experimental evaluations in terms of heuristics as well as exact methods based on SAT/SMT encodings.
abstract_zh: 树宽度和超树宽度已被证明是约束满足问题 (CSP) 背景下非常成功的结构参数。当这些参数中的任何一个受常数限制时，CSP 就可以在多项式时间内求解。然而，这里运行时间中多项式的阶数取决于宽度，并且已知这是不可避免的；因此，问题不是由这些宽度测量中的任何一个参数化的固定参数可处理的问题。在这里，我们通过一种新的阈值概念引入了树和超树宽度的增强，允许相关的分解考虑有关与求解给定 CSP 实例相关的计算成本的信息。除了介绍这些概念之外，我们还获得了用于计算阈值树宽度和超树宽度的有效理论和经验算法，并表明这些参数引起了 CSP 的固定参数算法以及其他更普遍的问题。我们通过启发式实验评估以及基于 SAT/SMT 编码的精确方法来补充我们的理论结果。

AI.tldr: 本文引入阈值树宽和超树宽的概念，通过结合计算成本信息改进传统树宽和超树宽参数，以实现约束满足问题（CSP）的固定参数可解性。
AI.motivation: 传统树宽和超树宽虽能将CSP限制在多项式时间内求解，但其时间复杂度依赖于宽度参数，导致无法实现固定参数可解性。需寻找更有效的参数化方法。
AI.method: 提出阈值树宽和超树宽的定义，设计理论与启发式算法计算这些参数，并基于SAT/SMT编码进行实验验证。
AI.result: 理论证明阈值参数可使CSP及其他问题实现固定参数可解性，实验表明相关算法在实际问题中表现有效。
AI.conclusion: 阈值树宽和超树宽为CSP等复杂问题提供了更高效的参数化求解框架，弥补了传统宽度参数的不足。

search_text: Threshold Treewidth and Hypertree Width 阈值树宽度和超树宽度 Treewidth and hypertree width have proven to be highly successful structural parameters in the context of the Constraint Satisfaction Problem (CSP). When either of these parameters is bounded by a constant, then CSP becomes solvable in polynomial time. However, here the order of the polynomial in the running time depends on the width, and this is known to be unavoidable; therefore, the problem is not fixed-parameter tractable parameterized by either of these width measures. Here we introduce an enhancement of tree and hypertree width through a novel notion of thresholds, allowing the associated decompositions to take into account information about the computational costs associated with solving the given CSP instance. Aside from introducing these notions, we obtain efficient theoretical as well as empirical algorithms for computing threshold treewidth and hypertree width and show that these parameters give rise to fixed-parameter algorithms for CSP as well as other, more general problems. We complement our theoretical results with experimental evaluations in terms of heuristics as well as exact methods based on SAT/SMT encodings. 树宽度和超树宽度已被证明是约束满足问题 (CSP) 背景下非常成功的结构参数。当这些参数中的任何一个受常数限制时，CSP 就可以在多项式时间内求解。然而，这里运行时间中多项式的阶数取决于宽度，并且已知这是不可避免的；因此，问题不是由这些宽度测量中的任何一个参数化的固定参数可处理的问题。在这里，我们通过一种新的阈值概念引入了树和超树宽度的增强，允许相关的分解考虑有关与求解给定 CSP 实例相关的计算成本的信息。除了介绍这些概念之外，我们还获得了用于计算阈值树宽度和超树宽度的有效理论和经验算法，并表明这些参数引起了 CSP 的固定参数算法以及其他更普遍的问题。我们通过启发式实验评估以及基于 SAT/SMT 编码的精确方法来补充我们的理论结果。 本文引入阈值树宽和超树宽的概念，通过结合计算成本信息改进传统树宽和超树宽参数，以实现约束满足问题（CSP）的固定参数可解性。 Andre Schidler,Robert Ganian,Manuel Sorge,Stefan Szeider cs.DS,cs.AI

authors_text: Zihan Ye,Guanyu Yang,Xiaobo Jin,Youfa Liu,Kaizhu Huang
title: Rebalanced Zero-shot Learning
title_zh: 重新平衡零样本学习
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP) 2023
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP) 2023
abstract: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to identify unseen classes with zero samples during training. Broadly speaking, present ZSL methods usually adopt class-level semantic labels and compare them with instance-level semantic predictions to infer unseen classes. However, we find that such existing models mostly produce imbalanced semantic predictions, i.e. these models could perform precisely for some semantics, but may not for others. To address the drawback, we aim to introduce an imbalanced learning framework into ZSL. However, we find that imbalanced ZSL has two unique challenges: (1) Its imbalanced predictions are highly correlated with the value of semantic labels rather than the number of samples as typically considered in the traditional imbalanced learning; (2) Different semantics follow quite different error distributions between classes. To mitigate these issues, we first formalize ZSL as an imbalanced regression problem which offers empirical evidences to interpret how semantic labels lead to imbalanced semantic predictions. We then propose a re-weighted loss termed Re-balanced Mean-Squared Error (ReMSE), which tracks the mean and variance of error distributions, thus ensuring rebalanced learning across classes. As a major contribution, we conduct a series of analyses showing that ReMSE is theoretically well established. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method effectively alleviates the imbalance in semantic prediction and outperforms many state-of-the-art ZSL methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/FouriYe/ReZSL-TIP23.
summary: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to identify unseen classes with zero samples during training. Broadly speaking, present ZSL methods usually adopt class-level semantic labels and compare them with instance-level semantic predictions to infer unseen classes. However, we find that such existing models mostly produce imbalanced semantic predictions, i.e. these models could perform precisely for some semantics, but may not for others. To address the drawback, we aim to introduce an imbalanced learning framework into ZSL. However, we find that imbalanced ZSL has two unique challenges: (1) Its imbalanced predictions are highly correlated with the value of semantic labels rather than the number of samples as typically considered in the traditional imbalanced learning; (2) Different semantics follow quite different error distributions between classes. To mitigate these issues, we first formalize ZSL as an imbalanced regression problem which offers empirical evidences to interpret how semantic labels lead to imbalanced semantic predictions. We then propose a re-weighted loss termed Re-balanced Mean-Squared Error (ReMSE), which tracks the mean and variance of error distributions, thus ensuring rebalanced learning across classes. As a major contribution, we conduct a series of analyses showing that ReMSE is theoretically well established. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method effectively alleviates the imbalance in semantic prediction and outperforms many state-of-the-art ZSL methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/FouriYe/ReZSL-TIP23.
abstract_zh: 零样本学习（ZSL）旨在在训练过程中识别零样本的未见过的类。从广义上讲，目前的 ZSL 方法通常采用类级语义标签，并将其与实例级语义预测进行比较，以推断出未见过的类。然而，我们发现此类现有模型大多产生不平衡的语义预测，即这些模型可以精确地执行某些语义，但可能无法执行其他语义。为了解决这个缺点，我们的目标是在 ZSL 中引入不平衡的学习框架。然而，我们发现不平衡ZSL有两个独特的挑战：（1）它的不平衡预测与语义标签的值高度相关，而不是传统不平衡学习中通常考虑的样本数量； (2) 不同的语义遵循类之间完全不同的错误分布。为了缓解这些问题，我们首先将 ZSL 形式化为不平衡回归问题，它提供了经验证据来解释语义标签如何导致不平衡的语义预测。然后，我们提出了一种称为重新平衡均方误差（ReMSE）的重新加权损失，它跟踪误差分布的均值和方差，从而确保跨类学习的重新平衡。作为一项重大贡献，我们进行了一系列分析，表明 ReMSE 在理论上是十分成熟的。大量实验表明，所提出的方法有效地缓解了语义预测的不平衡，并且优于许多最先进的 ZSL 方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/FouriYe/ReZSL-TIP23 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对零样本学习（ZSL）的不平衡学习框架，通过重新加权损失函数解决语义预测不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有ZSL方法在语义预测中存在显著不平衡，某些语义预测准确而其他则不然，传统不平衡学习方法无法有效解决该问题。
AI.method: 将ZSL形式化为不平衡回归问题，提出基于均值和方差追踪的Re-balanced Mean-Squared Error（ReMSE）损失函数。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法有效缓解语义预测不平衡，优于多种先进ZSL方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: ReMSE通过理论分析和实验验证，为ZSL中的不平衡问题提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Seungeon Lee,Xiting Wang,Sungwon Han,Xiaoyuan Yi,Xing Xie,Meeyoung Cha
title: Self-explaining deep models with logic rule reasoning
title_zh: 具有逻辑规则推理的自解释深度模型
comment: 26 pages including reference, checklist, and appendix. Accepted in NeurIPS 2022
comments: 26 pages including reference, checklist, and appendix. Accepted in NeurIPS 2022
abstract: We present SELOR, a framework for integrating self-explaining capabilities into a given deep model to achieve both high prediction performance and human precision. By "human precision", we refer to the degree to which humans agree with the reasons models provide for their predictions. Human precision affects user trust and allows users to collaborate closely with the model. We demonstrate that logic rule explanations naturally satisfy human precision with the expressive power required for good predictive performance. We then illustrate how to enable a deep model to predict and explain with logic rules. Our method does not require predefined logic rule sets or human annotations and can be learned efficiently and easily with widely-used deep learning modules in a differentiable way. Extensive experiments show that our method gives explanations closer to human decision logic than other methods while maintaining the performance of deep learning models.
summary: We present SELOR, a framework for integrating self-explaining capabilities into a given deep model to achieve both high prediction performance and human precision. By "human precision", we refer to the degree to which humans agree with the reasons models provide for their predictions. Human precision affects user trust and allows users to collaborate closely with the model. We demonstrate that logic rule explanations naturally satisfy human precision with the expressive power required for good predictive performance. We then illustrate how to enable a deep model to predict and explain with logic rules. Our method does not require predefined logic rule sets or human annotations and can be learned efficiently and easily with widely-used deep learning modules in a differentiable way. Extensive experiments show that our method gives explanations closer to human decision logic than other methods while maintaining the performance of deep learning models.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 SELOR，这是一个将自解释功能集成到给定深度模型中的框架，以实现高预测性能和人类精度。通过“人类精度”，我们指的是人类对模型为其预测提供的理由的同意程度。人类的精确度会影响用户的信任并允许用户与模型密切协作。我们证明，逻辑规则解释自然可以满足人类的精度以及良好预测性能所需的表达能力。然后我们说明如何使深度模型能够用逻辑规则进行预测和解释。我们的方法不需要预定义的逻辑规则集或人工注释，并且可以通过广泛使用的深度学习模块以可微分的方式高效、轻松地学习。大量实验表明，我们的方法比其他方法给出的解释更接近人类决策逻辑，同时保持深度学习模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SELOR框架，通过逻辑规则推理赋予深度模型自解释能力，兼顾高预测性能与人类精确度。
AI.motivation: 深度模型预测结果缺乏可解释性，影响用户信任与协作。逻辑规则能自然满足人类对解释的精确性需求，但现有方法依赖预定义规则或人工标注，限制了应用。
AI.method: 设计SELOR框架，无需预定义逻辑规则或人工标注，通过深度学习模块以可微方式学习逻辑规则，实现预测与解释的联合优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法生成的解释更贴近人类决策逻辑，同时保持深度学习模型的预测性能，优于其他对比方法。
AI.conclusion: SELOR有效融合逻辑规则推理与深度学习，为构建高可信度的自解释AI模型提供了新思路。

search_text: Self-explaining deep models with logic rule reasoning 具有逻辑规则推理的自解释深度模型 We present SELOR, a framework for integrating self-explaining capabilities into a given deep model to achieve both high prediction performance and human precision. By "human precision", we refer to the degree to which humans agree with the reasons models provide for their predictions. Human precision affects user trust and allows users to collaborate closely with the model. We demonstrate that logic rule explanations naturally satisfy human precision with the expressive power required for good predictive performance. We then illustrate how to enable a deep model to predict and explain with logic rules. Our method does not require predefined logic rule sets or human annotations and can be learned efficiently and easily with widely-used deep learning modules in a differentiable way. Extensive experiments show that our method gives explanations closer to human decision logic than other methods while maintaining the performance of deep learning models. 我们提出了 SELOR，这是一个将自解释功能集成到给定深度模型中的框架，以实现高预测性能和人类精度。通过“人类精度”，我们指的是人类对模型为其预测提供的理由的同意程度。人类的精确度会影响用户的信任并允许用户与模型密切协作。我们证明，逻辑规则解释自然可以满足人类的精度以及良好预测性能所需的表达能力。然后我们说明如何使深度模型能够用逻辑规则进行预测和解释。我们的方法不需要预定义的逻辑规则集或人工注释，并且可以通过广泛使用的深度学习模块以可微分的方式高效、轻松地学习。大量实验表明，我们的方法比其他方法给出的解释更接近人类决策逻辑，同时保持深度学习模型的性能。 本文提出SELOR框架，通过逻辑规则推理赋予深度模型自解释能力，兼顾高预测性能与人类精确度。 Seungeon Lee,Xiting Wang,Sungwon Han,Xiaoyuan Yi,Xing Xie,Meeyoung Cha cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.LO

authors_text: Mathieu Mari,Michał Pawłowski,Runtian Ren,Piotr Sankowski
title: Online matching with delays and stochastic arrival times
title_zh: 在线匹配延误和随机到达时间
abstract: This paper presents a new research direction for the Min-cost Perfect Matching with Delays (MPMD) - a problem introduced by Emek et al. (STOC'16). In the original version of this problem, we are given an $n$-point metric space, where requests arrive in an online fashion. The goal is to minimise the matching cost for an even number of requests. However, contrary to traditional online matching problems, a request does not have to be paired immediately at the time of its arrival. Instead, the decision of whether to match a request can be postponed for time $t$ at a delay cost of $t$. For this reason, the goal of the MPMD is to minimise the overall sum of distance and delay costs. Interestingly, for adversarially generated requests, no online algorithm can achieve a competitive ratio better than $O(\log n/\log \log n)$ (Ashlagi et al., APPROX/RANDOM'17). Here, we consider a stochastic version of the MPMD problem where the input requests follow a Poisson arrival process. For such a problem, we show that the above lower bound can be improved by presenting two deterministic online algorithms, which, in expectation, are constant-competitive. The first one is a simple greedy algorithm that matches any two requests once the sum of their delay costs exceeds their connection cost, i.e., the distance between them. The second algorithm builds on the tools used to analyse the first one in order to obtain even better performance guarantees. This result is rather surprising as the greedy approach for the adversarial model achieves a competitive ratio of $Ω(m^{\log \frac{3}{2}+\varepsilon})$, where $m$ denotes the number of requests served (Azar et al., TOCS'20). Finally, we prove that it is possible to obtain similar results for the general case when the delay cost follows an arbitrary positive and non-decreasing function, as well as for the MPMD variant with penalties to clear pending requests.

In the original version of this problem, we are given an $n$-point metric space, where requests arrive in an online fashion. The goal is to minimise the matching cost for an even number of requests. However, contrary to traditional online matching problems, a request does not have to be paired immediately at the time of its arrival. Instead, the decision of whether to match a request can be postponed for time $t$ at a delay cost of $t$. For this reason, the goal of the MPMD is to minimise the overall sum of distance and delay costs. Interestingly, for adversarially generated requests, no online algorithm can achieve a competitive ratio better than $O(\log n/\log \log n)$ (Ashlagi et al., APPROX/RANDOM'17). Here, we consider a stochastic version of the MPMD problem where the input requests follow a Poisson arrival process. For such a problem, we show that the above lower bound can be improved by presenting two deterministic online algorithms, which, in expectation, are constant-competitive. The first one is a simple greedy algorithm that matches any two requests once the sum of their delay costs exceeds their connection cost, i.e., the distance between them. The second algorithm builds on the tools used to analyse the first one in order to obtain even better performance guarantees. This result is rather surprising as the greedy approach for the adversarial model achieves a competitive ratio of $Ω(m^{\log \frac{3}{2}+\varepsilon})$, where $m$ denotes the number of requests served (Azar et al., TOCS'20). Finally, we prove that it is possible to obtain similar results for the general case when the delay cost follows an arbitrary positive and non-decreasing function, as well as for the MPMD variant with penalties to clear pending requests.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了最小成本延迟完美匹配（MPMD）的新研究方向 - 这是 Emek 等人提出的问题。 （STOC'16）。在这个问题的原始版本中，我们给出了一个 $n$ 点的度量空间，其中请求以在线方式到达。目标是最小化偶数请求的匹配成本。然而，与传统的在线匹配问题相反，请求不必在到达时立即配对。相反，是否匹配请求的决定可以推迟 $t$ 时间，延迟成本为 $t$。因此，MPMD 的目标是最小化距离和延迟成本的总和。有趣的是，对于对抗性生成的请求，没有在线算法可以实现比 $O(\log n/\log \log n)$ 更好的竞争比（Ashlagi 等人，APPROX/RANDOM'17）。在这里，我们考虑 MPMD 问题的随机版本，其中输入请求遵循泊松到达过程。对于这样的问题，我们表明可以通过提出两种确定性在线算法来改进上述下界，这两种算法预计是恒定竞争的。第一个是简单的贪婪算法，一旦延迟成本之和超过连接成本（即它们之间的距离），就会匹配任何两个请求。第二种算法建立在用于分析第一种算法的工具之上，以获得更好的性能保证。这个结果相当令人惊讶，因为对抗模型的贪婪方法实现了 $Ω(m^{\log \frac{3}{2}+\varepsilon})$ 的竞争比，其中 $m$ 表示服务的请求数量（Azar 等人，TOCS'20）。最后，我们证明，当延迟成本遵循任意正且非递减函数时，对于一般情况以及具有清除待处理请求的惩罚的 MPMD 变体，可以获得类似的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在泊松到达过程下的最小延迟完美匹配问题（MPMD），提出两种确定性在线算法以降低竞争比。
AI.motivation: 传统MPMD问题在对抗性输入下存在较高的竞争比下界，而泊松到达过程可能提供更优的算法性能，需探索其潜力。
AI.method: 设计两种确定性在线算法：第一种基于贪心策略，当延迟成本超过连接成本时匹配请求；第二种通过优化工具改进性能。
AI.result: 在泊松到达模型下，两种算法在期望情况下达到常数竞争比，优于对抗模型中的结果，并扩展至任意非递减延迟成本函数及惩罚机制。
AI.conclusion: 泊松到达过程允许更高效的在线匹配算法，贪心策略在随机模型中表现优于对抗场景，为延迟匹配问题提供新思路。

authors_text: Marco Toldo,Umberto Michieli,Pietro Zanuttigh
title: Learning with Style: Continual Semantic Segmentation Across Tasks and Domains
title_zh: 有风格的学习：跨任务和领域的持续语义分割
abstract: Deep learning models dealing with image understanding in real-world settings must be able to adapt to a wide variety of tasks across different domains. Domain adaptation and class incremental learning deal with domain and task variability separately, whereas their unified solution is still an open problem. We tackle both facets of the problem together, taking into account the semantic shift within both input and label spaces. We start by formally introducing continual learning under task and domain shift. Then, we address the proposed setup by using style transfer techniques to extend knowledge across domains when learning incremental tasks and a robust distillation framework to effectively recollect task knowledge under incremental domain shift. The devised framework (LwS, Learning with Style) is able to generalize incrementally acquired task knowledge across all the domains encountered, proving to be robust against catastrophic forgetting. Extensive experimental evaluation on multiple autonomous driving datasets shows how the proposed method outperforms existing approaches, which prove to be ill-equipped to deal with continual semantic segmentation under both task and domain shift.
summary: Deep learning models dealing with image understanding in real-world settings must be able to adapt to a wide variety of tasks across different domains. Domain adaptation and class incremental learning deal with domain and task variability separately, whereas their unified solution is still an open problem. We tackle both facets of the problem together, taking into account the semantic shift within both input and label spaces. We start by formally introducing continual learning under task and domain shift. Then, we address the proposed setup by using style transfer techniques to extend knowledge across domains when learning incremental tasks and a robust distillation framework to effectively recollect task knowledge under incremental domain shift. The devised framework (LwS, Learning with Style) is able to generalize incrementally acquired task knowledge across all the domains encountered, proving to be robust against catastrophic forgetting. Extensive experimental evaluation on multiple autonomous driving datasets shows how the proposed method outperforms existing approaches, which prove to be ill-equipped to deal with continual semantic segmentation under both task and domain shift.
abstract_zh: 在现实环境中处理图像理解的深度学习模型必须能够适应不同领域的各种任务。领域适应和类增量学习分别处理领域和任务的可变性，而它们的统一解决方案仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。我们一起解决问题的两个方面，同时考虑输入和标签空间内的语义转变。我们首先正式引入任务和领域转移下的持续学习。然后，我们在学习增量任务时使用风格迁移技术跨领域扩展知识，并使用强大的蒸馏框架来有效地回忆增量域转移下的任务知识，从而解决了所提出的设置。设计的框架（LwS，Learning with Style）能够泛化所有遇到的领域中增量获得的任务知识，事实证明对于灾难性遗忘具有鲁棒性。对多个自动驾驶数据集的广泛实验评估表明，所提出的方法如何优于现有方法，事实证明现有方法无法处理任务和领域转移下的连续语义分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LwS（Learning with Style）的框架，用于解决跨任务和跨域的连续语义分割问题，通过结合风格迁移和知识蒸馏技术，实现模型在新任务和新域上的持续学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法分别处理领域适应和类增量学习，但无法同时应对任务和领域变化的联合挑战，导致在连续语义分割任务中存在灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 通过风格迁移技术扩展跨领域知识，并结合鲁棒的知识蒸馏框架，在增量任务学习中有效回收任务知识，实现跨域和跨任务的持续学习。
AI.result: 在多个自动驾驶数据集上的实验表明，LwS方法在同时存在任务和领域变化的连续语义分割任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: LwS框架通过统一处理任务和领域变化，有效缓解了灾难性遗忘问题，为连续语义分割提供了鲁棒的解决方案。

ai_content_json.method: 通过风格迁移技术扩展跨领域知识，并结合鲁棒的知识蒸馏框架，在增量任务学习中有效回收任务知识，实现跨域和跨任务的持续学习。
ai_content_json.result: 在多个自动驾驶数据集上的实验表明，LwS方法在同时存在任务和领域变化的连续语义分割任务中优于现有方法。
ai_content_json.conclusion: LwS框架通过统一处理任务和领域变化，有效缓解了灾难性遗忘问题，为连续语义分割提供了鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: Learning with Style: Continual Semantic Segmentation Across Tasks and Domains 有风格的学习：跨任务和领域的持续语义分割 Deep learning models dealing with image understanding in real-world settings must be able to adapt to a wide variety of tasks across different domains. Domain adaptation and class incremental learning deal with domain and task variability separately, whereas their unified solution is still an open problem. We tackle both facets of the problem together, taking into account the semantic shift within both input and label spaces. We start by formally introducing continual learning under task and domain shift. Then, we address the proposed setup by using style transfer techniques to extend knowledge across domains when learning incremental tasks and a robust distillation framework to effectively recollect task knowledge under incremental domain shift. The devised framework (LwS, Learning with Style) is able to generalize incrementally acquired task knowledge across all the domains encountered, proving to be robust against catastrophic forgetting. Extensive experimental evaluation on multiple autonomous driving datasets shows how the proposed method outperforms existing approaches, which prove to be ill-equipped to deal with continual semantic segmentation under both task and domain shift. 在现实环境中处理图像理解的深度学习模型必须能够适应不同领域的各种任务。领域适应和类增量学习分别处理领域和任务的可变性，而它们的统一解决方案仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。我们一起解决问题的两个方面，同时考虑输入和标签空间内的语义转变。我们首先正式引入任务和领域转移下的持续学习。然后，我们在学习增量任务时使用风格迁移技术跨领域扩展知识，并使用强大的蒸馏框架来有效地回忆增量域转移下的任务知识，从而解决了所提出的设置。设计的框架（LwS，Learning with Style）能够泛化所有遇到的领域中增量获得的任务知识，事实证明对于灾难性遗忘具有鲁棒性。对多个自动驾驶数据集的广泛实验评估表明，所提出的方法如何优于现有方法，事实证明现有方法无法处理任务和领域转移下的连续语义分割。 本文提出了一种名为LwS（Learning with Style）的框架，用于解决跨任务和跨域的连续语义分割问题，通过结合风格迁移和知识蒸馏技术，实现模型在新任务和新域上的持续学习。 Marco Toldo,Umberto Michieli,Pietro Zanuttigh cs.CV

authors_text: Xing Li,Manuel Baum,Oliver Brock
title: Augmentation for Learning From Demonstration with Environmental Constraints
title_zh: 增强从具有环境约束的演示中学习
comment: Submitted to 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: Submitted to 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: We introduce a Learning from Demonstration (LfD) approach for contact-rich manipulation tasks with articulated mechanisms. The extracted policy from a single human demonstration generalizes to different mechanisms of the same type and is robust against environmental variations. The key to achieving such generalization and robustness from a single human demonstration is to autonomously augment the initial demonstration to gather additional information through purposefully interacting with the environment. Our real-world experiments on complex mechanisms with multi-DOF demonstrate that our approach can reliably accomplish the task in a changing environment. Videos are available at the: https://sites.google.com/view/rbosalfdec/home
summary: We introduce a Learning from Demonstration (LfD) approach for contact-rich manipulation tasks with articulated mechanisms. The extracted policy from a single human demonstration generalizes to different mechanisms of the same type and is robust against environmental variations. The key to achieving such generalization and robustness from a single human demonstration is to autonomously augment the initial demonstration to gather additional information through purposefully interacting with the environment. Our real-world experiments on complex mechanisms with multi-DOF demonstrate that our approach can reliably accomplish the task in a changing environment. Videos are available at the: https://sites.google.com/view/rbosalfdec/home
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种从演示中学习（LfD）方法，用于具有铰接机制的接触丰富的操作任务。从单个人类演示中提取的策略可以推广到同一类型的不同机制，并且对环境变化具有鲁棒性。从单个人类演示中实现这种泛化性和鲁棒性的关键是自主地增强初始演示，以通过有目的地与环境交互来收集更多信息。我们对多自由度复杂机构的真实实验表明，我们的方法可以在不断变化的环境中可靠地完成任务。视频可在以下网址获取：https://sites.google.com/view/rbosalfdec/home

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在环境约束下通过增强示范数据来学习复杂机械操作任务的策略。
AI.motivation: 传统基于示范的学习方法在面对环境变化和不同机械结构时泛化能力不足，需依赖大量数据或先验知识。
AI.method: 通过自主与环境交互扩充单次人类示范数据，利用目的性交互获取额外信息以提升策略鲁棒性与泛化能力。
AI.result: 在多自由度复杂机械上的实验表明，该方法能在动态环境中可靠完成任务，适应不同机械结构和环境变化。
AI.conclusion: 环境交互驱动的数据增强策略有效提升了基于示范学习在接触丰富任务中的适应性与泛化能力。

authors_text: Yubao Zhang,Xin Chen,Yuchen Zhang
title: Transfer Deep Reinforcement Learning-based Large-scale V2G Continuous Charging Coordination with Renewable Energy Sources
title_zh: 基于深度强化学习的大规模V2G连续充电与可再生能源的协调
abstract: Due to the increasing popularity of electric vehicles (EVs) and the technological advancement of EV electronics, the vehicle-to-grid (V2G) technique and large-scale scheduling algorithms have been developed to achieve a high level of renewable energy and power grid stability. This paper proposes a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) method for the continuous charging/discharging coordination strategy in aggregating large-scale EVs in V2G mode with renewable energy sources (RES). The DRL coordination strategy can efficiently optimize the electric vehicle aggregator's (EVA's) real-time charging/discharging power with the state of charge (SOC) constraints of the EVA and the individual EV. Compared with uncontrolled charging, the load variance is reduced by 97.37$\%$ and the charging cost by 76.56$\%$. The DRL coordination strategy further demonstrates outstanding transfer learning ability to microgrids with RES and large-scale EVA, as well as the complicated weekly scheduling. The DRL coordination strategy demonstrates flexible, adaptable, and scalable performance for the large-scale V2G under realistic operating conditions.
summary: Due to the increasing popularity of electric vehicles (EVs) and the technological advancement of EV electronics, the vehicle-to-grid (V2G) technique and large-scale scheduling algorithms have been developed to achieve a high level of renewable energy and power grid stability. This paper proposes a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) method for the continuous charging/discharging coordination strategy in aggregating large-scale EVs in V2G mode with renewable energy sources (RES). The DRL coordination strategy can efficiently optimize the electric vehicle aggregator's (EVA's) real-time charging/discharging power with the state of charge (SOC) constraints of the EVA and the individual EV. Compared with uncontrolled charging, the load variance is reduced by 97.37$\%$ and the charging cost by 76.56$\%$. The DRL coordination strategy further demonstrates outstanding transfer learning ability to microgrids with RES and large-scale EVA, as well as the complicated weekly scheduling. The DRL coordination strategy demonstrates flexible, adaptable, and scalable performance for the large-scale V2G under realistic operating conditions.
abstract_zh: 由于电动汽车（EV）的日益普及和电动汽车电子技术的进步，车辆到电网（V2G）技术和大规模调度算法的发展已实现高水平的可再生能源和电网稳定性。本文提出了一种深度强化学习（DRL）方法，用于在使用可再生能源（RES）的V2G模式下聚合大型电动汽车的连续充电/放电协调策略。 DRL 协调策略可以根据 EVA 和单个 EV 的充电状态 (SOC) 约束，有效优化电动汽车聚合器 (EVA) 的实时充电/放电功率。与无控充电相比，负载方差减少了97.37$\%$，充电成本减少了76.56$\%$。 DRL协调策略进一步展示了RES和大规模EVA微电网出色的迁移学习能力，以及复杂的每周调度。 DRL 协调策略展示了在实际操作条件下大规模 V2G 的灵活、适应性和可扩展性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的车辆到电网（V2G）大规模连续充电协调策略，结合可再生能源优化电动汽车聚合商的充放电功率。
AI.motivation: 随着电动汽车普及和电网稳定性需求提升，传统无序充电导致负载波动大、成本高，需开发高效协调策略以整合可再生能源并优化电网运行。
AI.method: 设计基于DRL的协调算法，考虑电动汽车聚合商及单个电动汽车的电池荷电状态（SOC）约束，实现大规模V2G场景下的实时充放电优化。
AI.result: 相比无序充电，负载波动降低97.37%，充电成本减少76.56%，且策略在微电网和复杂周调度中展现优异迁移学习能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提DRL策略在大规模V2G实际运行条件下具备灵活性、适应性和可扩展性，可有效提升可再生能源利用率与电网稳定性。

authors_text: Alphan Sahin
title: Over-the-Air Computation Based on Balanced Number Systems for Federated Edge Learning
title_zh: 基于平衡数系统的空中计算联邦边缘学习
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Wireless Communications. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.11004
comments: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Wireless Communications. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.11004
abstract: In this study, we propose a digital over-the-air computation (OAC) scheme for achieving continuous-valued (analog) aggregation for federated edge learning (FEEL). We show that the average of a set of real-valued parameters can be calculated approximately by using the average of the corresponding numerals, where the numerals are obtained based on a balanced number system. By exploiting this key property, the proposed scheme encodes the local stochastic gradients into a set of numerals. Next, it determines the positions of the activated orthogonal frequency division multiplexing (OFDM) subcarriers by using the values of the numerals. To eliminate the need for precise sample-level time synchronization, channel estimation overhead, and channel inversion, the proposed scheme also uses a non-coherent receiver at the edge server (ES) and does not utilize a pre-equalization at the edge devices (EDs). We theoretically analyze the MSE performance of the proposed scheme and the convergence rate for a non-convex loss function. To improve the test accuracy of FEEL with the proposed scheme, we introduce the concept of adaptive absolute maximum (AAM). Our numerical results show that when the proposed scheme is used with AAM for FEEL, the test accuracy can reach up to 98% for heterogeneous data distribution.
summary: In this study, we propose a digital over-the-air computation (OAC) scheme for achieving continuous-valued (analog) aggregation for federated edge learning (FEEL). We show that the average of a set of real-valued parameters can be calculated approximately by using the average of the corresponding numerals, where the numerals are obtained based on a balanced number system. By exploiting this key property, the proposed scheme encodes the local stochastic gradients into a set of numerals. Next, it determines the positions of the activated orthogonal frequency division multiplexing (OFDM) subcarriers by using the values of the numerals. To eliminate the need for precise sample-level time synchronization, channel estimation overhead, and channel inversion, the proposed scheme also uses a non-coherent receiver at the edge server (ES) and does not utilize a pre-equalization at the edge devices (EDs). We theoretically analyze the MSE performance of the proposed scheme and the convergence rate for a non-convex loss function. To improve the test accuracy of FEEL with the proposed scheme, we introduce the concept of adaptive absolute maximum (AAM). Our numerical results show that when the proposed scheme is used with AAM for FEEL, the test accuracy can reach up to 98% for heterogeneous data distribution.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们提出了一种数字空中计算（OAC）方案，用于实现联合边缘学习（FEEL）的连续值（模拟）聚合。我们证明，一组实值参数的平均值可以通过使用相应数字的平均值来近似计算，其中数字是基于平衡数系获得的。通过利用这一关键特性，所提出的方案将局部随机梯度编码为一组数字。接下来，它通过使用数字的值来确定激活的正交频分复用(OFDM)子载波的位置。为了消除对精确样本级时间同步、信道估计开销和信道反转的需要，所提出的方案还在边缘服务器（ES）处使用非相干接收器，并且不在边缘设备（ED）处使用预均衡。我们从理论上分析了所提出方案的 MSE 性能和非凸损失函数的收敛速度。为了提高所提出方案的 FEEL 测试精度，我们引入了自适应绝对最大值（AAM）的概念。我们的数值结果表明，当所提出的方案与 AAM 一起用于 FEEL 时，对于异构数据分布，测试精度可以达到 98%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于平衡数系统的数字过空气计算（OAC）方案，用于联邦边缘学习（FEEL）中的连续值聚合。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习面临同步精度高、信道估计复杂等问题，需降低计算和通信开销以提升效率。
AI.method: 通过平衡数系统将本地梯度编码为数字符号，利用正交频分复用（OFDM）子载波位置进行传输，并采用非相干接收机避免信道预均衡和同步需求，结合自适应绝对最大值（AAM）优化模型。
AI.result: 在异构数据分布下，该方案的测试准确率可高达98%，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方案通过平衡数系统和非相干接收技术有效降低了FEEL的通信开销与计算复杂度，为边缘学习提供了高效可行的解决方案。

By exploiting this key property, the proposed scheme encodes the local stochastic gradients into a set of numerals. authors_text: Zhiyu Mou,Yusen Huo,Rongquan Bai,Mingzhou Xie,Chuan Yu,Jian Xu,Bo Zheng
title: Sustainable Online Reinforcement Learning for Auto-bidding
title_zh: 自动出价的可持续在线强化学习
abstract: Recently, auto-bidding technique has become an essential tool to increase the revenue of advertisers. Facing the complex and ever-changing bidding environments in the real-world advertising system (RAS), state-of-the-art auto-bidding policies usually leverage reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms to generate real-time bids on behalf of the advertisers. Due to safety concerns, it was believed that the RL training process can only be carried out in an offline virtual advertising system (VAS) that is built based on the historical data generated in the RAS. In this paper, we argue that there exists significant gaps between the VAS and RAS, making the RL training process suffer from the problem of inconsistency between online and offline (IBOO). Firstly, we formally define the IBOO and systematically analyze its causes and influences. Then, to avoid the IBOO, we propose a sustainable online RL (SORL) framework that trains the auto-bidding policy by directly interacting with the RAS, instead of learning in the VAS. Specifically, based on our proof of the Lipschitz smooth property of the Q function, we design a safe and efficient online exploration (SER) policy for continuously collecting data from the RAS. Meanwhile, we derive the theoretical lower bound on the safety of the SER policy. We also develop a variance-suppressed conservative Q-learning (V-CQL) method to effectively and stably learn the auto-bidding policy with the collected data. Finally, extensive simulated and real-world experiments validate the superiority of our approach over the state-of-the-art auto-bidding algorithm.
summary: Recently, auto-bidding technique has become an essential tool to increase the revenue of advertisers. Facing the complex and ever-changing bidding environments in the real-world advertising system (RAS), state-of-the-art auto-bidding policies usually leverage reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms to generate real-time bids on behalf of the advertisers. Due to safety concerns, it was believed that the RL training process can only be carried out in an offline virtual advertising system (VAS) that is built based on the historical data generated in the RAS. In this paper, we argue that there exists significant gaps between the VAS and RAS, making the RL training process suffer from the problem of inconsistency between online and offline (IBOO). Firstly, we formally define the IBOO and systematically analyze its causes and influences. Then, to avoid the IBOO, we propose a sustainable online RL (SORL) framework that trains the auto-bidding policy by directly interacting with the RAS, instead of learning in the VAS. Specifically, based on our proof of the Lipschitz smooth property of the Q function, we design a safe and efficient online exploration (SER) policy for continuously collecting data from the RAS. Meanwhile, we derive the theoretical lower bound on the safety of the SER policy. We also develop a variance-suppressed conservative Q-learning (V-CQL) method to effectively and stably learn the auto-bidding policy with the collected data. Finally, extensive simulated and real-world experiments validate the superiority of our approach over the state-of-the-art auto-bidding algorithm.
abstract_zh: 近年来，自动竞价技术已成为广告商增加收入的重要工具。面对现实广告系统（RAS）中复杂且不断变化的竞价环境，最先进的自动竞价策略通常利用强化学习（RL）算法代表广告商生成实时竞价。出于安全考虑，人们认为强化学习训练过程只能在基于 RAS 生成的历史数据构建的离线虚拟广告系统（VAS）中进行。在本文中，我们认为 VAS 和 RAS 之间存在显着差距，使得 RL 训练过程遭受在线和离线不一致（IBOO）的问题。首先，我们对IBOO进行了正式的界定，并系统分析了其产生的原因和影响。然后，为了避免 IBOO，我们提出了一种可持续的在线 RL (SORL) 框架，该框架通过直接与 RAS 交互来训练自动出价策略，而不是在 VAS 中学习。具体来说，基于我们对 Q 函数的 Lipschitz 平滑特性的证明，我们设计了一种安全高效的在线探索（SER）策略，用于持续从 RAS 收集数据。同时，我们推导了SER政策安全性的理论下限。我们还开发了一种方差抑制保守 Q 学习（V-CQL）方法，可以利用收集的数据有效且稳定地学习自动出价策略。最后，广泛的模拟和现实实验验证了我们的方法相对于最先进的自动出价算法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可持续在线强化学习框架（SORL），用于解决自动竞价中虚拟系统与真实环境不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自动竞价策略依赖于离线虚拟系统训练，但虚拟系统与真实广告系统存在显著差异，导致在线与离线环境不一致（IBOO）问题，影响实际效果。
AI.method: 提出SORL框架，包含基于Q函数Lipschitz平滑特性的安全探索策略（SER）和方差抑制保守Q学习（V-CQL）方法，直接在真实环境中训练竞价策略。
AI.result: 通过仿真和真实实验验证，SORL在安全性和竞价效果上优于现有最先进的自动竞价算法。
AI.conclusion: SORL框架有效解决了IBOO问题，为真实环境中直接训练强化学习策略提供了安全高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Sarina Meyer,Pascal Tilli,Pavel Denisov,Florian Lux,Julia Koch,Ngoc Thang Vu
title: Anonymizing Speech with Generative Adversarial Networks to Preserve Speaker Privacy
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络对语音进行匿名化以保护说话者的隐私
abstract: In order to protect the privacy of speech data, speaker anonymization aims for hiding the identity of a speaker by changing the voice in speech recordings. This typically comes with a privacy-utility trade-off between protection of individuals and usability of the data for downstream applications. One of the challenges in this context is to create non-existent voices that sound as natural as possible. In this work, we propose to tackle this issue by generating speaker embeddings using a generative adversarial network with Wasserstein distance as cost function. By incorporating these artificial embeddings into a speech-to-text-to-speech pipeline, we outperform previous approaches in terms of privacy and utility. According to standard objective metrics and human evaluation, our approach generates intelligible and content-preserving yet privacy-protecting versions of the original recordings.
summary: In order to protect the privacy of speech data, speaker anonymization aims for hiding the identity of a speaker by changing the voice in speech recordings. This typically comes with a privacy-utility trade-off between protection of individuals and usability of the data for downstream applications. One of the challenges in this context is to create non-existent voices that sound as natural as possible. In this work, we propose to tackle this issue by generating speaker embeddings using a generative adversarial network with Wasserstein distance as cost function. By incorporating these artificial embeddings into a speech-to-text-to-speech pipeline, we outperform previous approaches in terms of privacy and utility. According to standard objective metrics and human evaluation, our approach generates intelligible and content-preserving yet privacy-protecting versions of the original recordings.
abstract_zh: 为了保护语音数据的隐私，说话人匿名化旨在通过改变语音录音中的声音来隐藏说话人的身份。这通常需要在个人保护和下游应用程序数据的可用性之间进行隐私与实用性的权衡。在这种情况下的挑战之一是创造听起来尽可能自然的不存在的声音。在这项工作中，我们建议通过使用以 Wasserstein 距离作为成本函数的生成对抗网络生成说话者嵌入来解决这个问题。通过将这些人工嵌入合并到语音到文本到语音的管道中，我们在隐私和实用性方面优于以前的方法。根据标准客观指标和人工评估，我们的方法生成可理解、保留内容且保护隐私的原始录音版本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用生成对抗网络（GAN）生成虚假说话人嵌入向量，通过语音到文本到语音的流程实现语音匿名化，以在保护隐私的同时保留语音内容。
AI.motivation: 现有语音匿名化方法在隐私保护与数据可用性之间存在权衡，且难以生成自然的合成语音，需改进生成效果与实用性。
AI.method: 采用Wasserstein距离作为损失函数的生成对抗网络生成人工说话人嵌入向量，并将其整合至语音到文本到语音的处理流程中。
AI.result: 在标准客观指标和人工评估中，该方法生成的语音在可懂度、内容保真度及隐私保护方面均优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过生成高质量的虚假嵌入向量，在隐私保护与数据实用性之间实现了更优的平衡，为语音匿名化提供了有效解决方案。
