search_text: Anonymizing Speech with Generative Adversarial Networks to Preserve Speaker Privacy 使用生成对抗网络对语音进行匿名化以保护说话者的隐私 In order to protect the privacy of speech data, speaker anonymization aims for hiding the identity of a speaker by changing the voice in speech recordings. This typically comes with a privacy-utility trade-off between protection of individuals and usability of the data for downstream applications. One of the challenges in this context is to create non-existent voices that sound as natural as possible. In this work, we propose to tackle this issue by generating speaker embeddings using a generative adversarial network with Wasserstein distance as cost function. By incorporating these artificial embeddings into a speech-to-text-to-speech pipeline, we outperform previous approaches in terms of privacy and utility. According to standard objective metrics and human evaluation, our approach generates intelligible and content-preserving yet privacy-protecting versions of the original recordings. 为了保护语音数据的隐私，说话人匿名化旨在通过改变语音录音中的声音来隐藏说话人的身份。这通常需要在个人保护和下游应用程序数据的可用性之间进行隐私与实用性的权衡。在这种情况下的挑战之一是创造听起来尽可能自然的不存在的声音。在这项工作中，我们建议通过使用以 Wasserstein 距离作为成本函数的生成对抗网络生成说话者嵌入来解决这个问题。通过将这些人工嵌入合并到语音到文本到语音的管道中，我们在隐私和实用性方面优于以前的方法。根据标准客观指标和人工评估，我们的方法生成可理解、保留内容且保护隐私的原始录音版本。 本文提出利用生成对抗网络（GAN）生成虚假说话人嵌入向量，通过语音到文本到语音的流程实现语音匿名化，以在保护隐私的同时保留语音内容。 Sarina Meyer,Pascal Tilli,Pavel Denisov,Florian Lux,Julia Koch,Ngoc Thang Vu cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Zeyang Sha,Zheng Li,Ning Yu,Yang Zhang
title: DE-FAKE: Detection and Attribution of Fake Images Generated by Text-to-Image Generation Models
title_zh: DE-FAKE：文本到图像生成模型生成的假图像的检测和归因
abstract: Text-to-image generation models that generate images based on prompt descriptions have attracted an increasing amount of attention during the past few months. Despite their encouraging performance, these models raise concerns about the misuse of their generated fake images. To tackle this problem, we pioneer a systematic study on the detection and attribution of fake images generated by text-to-image generation models. Concretely, we first build a machine learning classifier to detect the fake images generated by various text-to-image generation models. We then attribute these fake images to their source models, such that model owners can be held responsible for their models' misuse. We further investigate how prompts that generate fake images affect detection and attribution. We conduct extensive experiments on four popular text-to-image generation models, including DALL$\cdot$E 2, Stable Diffusion, GLIDE, and Latent Diffusion, and two benchmark prompt-image datasets. Empirical results show that (1) fake images generated by various models can be distinguished from real ones, as there exists a common artifact shared by fake images from different models; (2) fake images can be effectively attributed to their source models, as different models leave unique fingerprints in their generated images; (3) prompts with the ``person'' topic or a length between 25 and 75 enable models to generate fake images with higher authenticity. All findings contribute to the community's insight into the threats caused by text-to-image generation models. We appeal to the community's consideration of the counterpart solutions, like ours, against the rapidly-evolving fake image generation.
summary: Text-to-image generation models that generate images based on prompt descriptions have attracted an increasing amount of attention during the past few months. Despite their encouraging performance, these models raise concerns about the misuse of their generated fake images. To tackle this problem, we pioneer a systematic study on the detection and attribution of fake images generated by text-to-image generation models. Concretely, we first build a machine learning classifier to detect the fake images generated by various text-to-image generation models. We then attribute these fake images to their source models, such that model owners can be held responsible for their models' misuse. We further investigate how prompts that generate fake images affect detection and attribution. We conduct extensive experiments on four popular text-to-image generation models, including DALL$\cdot$E 2, Stable Diffusion, GLIDE, and Latent Diffusion, and two benchmark prompt-image datasets. Empirical results show that (1) fake images generated by various models can be distinguished from real ones, as there exists a common artifact shared by fake images from different models; (2) fake images can be effectively attributed to their source models, as different models leave unique fingerprints in their generated images; (3) prompts with the ``person'' topic or a length between 25 and 75 enable models to generate fake images with higher authenticity. All findings contribute to the community's insight into the threats caused by text-to-image generation models. We appeal to the community's consideration of the counterpart solutions, like ours, against the rapidly-evolving fake image generation.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几个月里，根据提示描述生成图像的文本到图像生成模型吸引了越来越多的关注。尽管它们的表现令人鼓舞，但这些模型引起了人们对其生成的假图像的滥用的担忧。为了解决这个问题，我们开创了对文本到图像生成模型生成的假图像的检测和归因的系统研究。具体来说，我们首先构建一个机器学习分类器来检测各种文本到图像生成模型生成的假图像。然后，我们将这些假图像归因于其源模型，这样模型所有者就可以对其模型的滥用负责。我们进一步研究生成虚假图像的提示如何影响检测和归因。我们对四种流行的文本到图像生成模型进行了广泛的实验，包括 DALL$\cdot$E 2、Stable Diffusion、GLIDE 和 Latent Diffusion，以及两个基准提示图像数据集。实证结果表明：（1）不同模型生成的假图像可以与真实图像区分开来，因为不同模型的假图像存在共同的伪影； （2）假图像可以有效地归因于其源模型，因为不同的模型在其生成的图像中留下了独特的指纹； (3)带有“人物”主题或长度在25到75之间的提示使得模型能够生成具有更高真实性的假图像。所有发现都有助于社区深入了解文本到图像生成模型造成的威胁。我们呼吁社区考虑像我们这样的对应解决方案，以应对快速发展的虚假图像生成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DE-FAKE方法，用于检测和归因由文本到图像生成模型生成的假图像。
AI.motivation: 文本到图像生成模型的广泛应用引发了假图像滥用的担忧，亟需有效检测和归因技术以应对潜在威胁。
AI.method: 构建机器学习分类器检测假图像，通过模型指纹实现来源归因，并分析提示词对生成效果的影响，基于四个主流模型和两个数据集进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明：1）不同模型生成的假图像存在共性伪影，可与真实图像区分；2）模型生成图像具有独特指纹，可实现有效归因；3）包含‘人物’主题或长度25-75的提示词生成更逼真的假图像。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了文本到图像生成模型的潜在风险，呼吁学术界重视检测与归因技术的开发以应对生成式AI的挑战。

authors_text: Mariella Dreissig,Florian Piewak,Joschka Boedecker
title: On the calibration of underrepresented classes in LiDAR-based semantic segmentation
title_zh: 基于激光雷达的语义分割中代表性不足的类别的校准
abstract: The calibration of deep learning-based perception models plays a crucial role in their reliability. Our work focuses on a class-wise evaluation of several model's confidence performance for LiDAR-based semantic segmentation with the aim of providing insights into the calibration of underrepresented classes. Those classes often include VRUs and are thus of particular interest for safety reasons. With the help of a metric based on sparsification curves we compare the calibration abilities of three semantic segmentation models with different architectural concepts, each in a in deterministic and a probabilistic version. By identifying and describing the dependency between the predictive performance of a class and the respective calibration quality we aim to facilitate the model selection and refinement for safety-critical applications.
summary: The calibration of deep learning-based perception models plays a crucial role in their reliability. Our work focuses on a class-wise evaluation of several model's confidence performance for LiDAR-based semantic segmentation with the aim of providing insights into the calibration of underrepresented classes. Those classes often include VRUs and are thus of particular interest for safety reasons. With the help of a metric based on sparsification curves we compare the calibration abilities of three semantic segmentation models with different architectural concepts, each in a in deterministic and a probabilistic version. By identifying and describing the dependency between the predictive performance of a class and the respective calibration quality we aim to facilitate the model selection and refinement for safety-critical applications.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的感知模型的校准对其可靠性起着至关重要的作用。我们的工作重点是对基于 LiDAR 的语义分割的多个模型的置信度性能进行类别评估，旨在为代表性不足的类别的校准提供见解。这些类别通常包括 VRU，因此出于安全原因特别受关注。借助基于稀疏曲线的度量，我们比较了具有不同架构概念的三个语义分割模型的校准能力，每个模型都有确定性版本和概率版本。通过识别和描述类别的预测性能与相应校准质量之间的依赖性，我们的目标是促进安全关键应用的模型选择和细化。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于LiDAR的语义分割中对代表性不足类别（如VRUs）的模型置信度校准问题，旨在提升安全关键场景下的模型可靠性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型的校准能力直接影响其可靠性，而安全关键场景中代表性不足的类别（如弱势道路使用者）的预测误差可能引发严重风险，现有研究对此关注不足。
AI.method: 提出基于稀疏化曲线的评估指标，对比三种不同架构的语义分割模型（确定性和概率版本），分析类别预测性能与校准质量间的依赖关系。
AI.result: 发现不同模型在校准能力上存在显著差异，确定性模型与概率模型表现不同，且预测性能与校准质量呈现非线性关联。
AI.conclusion: 通过量化校准特性与预测性能的关系，为安全关键应用中的模型选择与优化提供了理论依据，强调了少数类别校准的重要性。

search_text: On the calibration of underrepresented classes in LiDAR-based semantic segmentation 基于激光雷达的语义分割中代表性不足的类别的校准 The calibration of deep learning-based perception models plays a crucial role in their reliability. Our work focuses on a class-wise evaluation of several model's confidence performance for LiDAR-based semantic segmentation with the aim of providing insights into the calibration of underrepresented classes. Those classes often include VRUs and are thus of particular interest for safety reasons. With the help of a metric based on sparsification curves we compare the calibration abilities of three semantic segmentation models with different architectural concepts, each in a in deterministic and a probabilistic version. By identifying and describing the dependency between the predictive performance of a class and the respective calibration quality we aim to facilitate the model selection and refinement for safety-critical applications. 基于深度学习的感知模型的校准对其可靠性起着至关重要的作用。我们的工作重点是对基于 LiDAR 的语义分割的多个模型的置信度性能进行类别评估，旨在为代表性不足的类别的校准提供见解。这些类别通常包括 VRU，因此出于安全原因特别受关注。借助基于稀疏曲线的度量，我们比较了具有不同架构概念的三个语义分割模型的校准能力，每个模型都有确定性版本和概率版本。通过识别和描述类别的预测性能与相应校准质量之间的依赖性，我们的目标是促进安全关键应用的模型选择和细化。 本文研究了基于LiDAR的语义分割中对代表性不足类别（如VRUs）的模型置信度校准问题，旨在提升安全关键场景下的模型可靠性。 Mariella Dreissig,Florian Piewak,Joschka Boedecker cs.CV

authors_text: Gunhee Nam,Taesoo Kim,Sanghyup Lee,Thijs Kooi
title: OOOE: Only-One-Object-Exists Assumption to Find Very Small Objects in Chest Radiographs
title_zh: OOOE：仅存在一个物体的假设，在胸部 X 光照片中发现非常小的物体
abstract: The accurate localization of inserted medical tubes and parts of human anatomy is a common problem when analyzing chest radiographs and something deep neural networks could potentially automate. However, many foreign objects like tubes and various anatomical structures are small in comparison to the entire chest X-ray, which leads to severely unbalanced data and makes training deep neural networks difficult. In this paper, we present a simple yet effective `Only-One-Object-Exists' (OOOE) assumption to improve the deep network's ability to localize small landmarks in chest radiographs. The OOOE enables us to recast the localization problem as a classification problem and we can replace commonly used continuous regression techniques with a multi-class discrete objective. We validate our approach using a large scale proprietary dataset of over 100K radiographs as well as publicly available RANZCR-CLiP Kaggle Challenge dataset and show that our method consistently outperforms commonly used regression-based detection models as well as commonly used pixel-wise classification methods. Additionally, we find that the method using the OOOE assumption generalizes to multiple detection problems in chest X-rays and the resulting model shows state-of-the-art performance on detecting various tube tips inserted to the patient as well as patient anatomy.
summary: The accurate localization of inserted medical tubes and parts of human anatomy is a common problem when analyzing chest radiographs and something deep neural networks could potentially automate. However, many foreign objects like tubes and various anatomical structures are small in comparison to the entire chest X-ray, which leads to severely unbalanced data and makes training deep neural networks difficult. In this paper, we present a simple yet effective `Only-One-Object-Exists' (OOOE) assumption to improve the deep network's ability to localize small landmarks in chest radiographs. The OOOE enables us to recast the localization problem as a classification problem and we can replace commonly used continuous regression techniques with a multi-class discrete objective. We validate our approach using a large scale proprietary dataset of over 100K radiographs as well as publicly available RANZCR-CLiP Kaggle Challenge dataset and show that our method consistently outperforms commonly used regression-based detection models as well as commonly used pixel-wise classification methods. Additionally, we find that the method using the OOOE assumption generalizes to multiple detection problems in chest X-rays and the resulting model shows state-of-the-art performance on detecting various tube tips inserted to the patient as well as patient anatomy.
abstract_zh: 在分析胸部X光片和深度神经网络可能实现自动化的东西时，插入的医疗管和人体解剖部分的准确定位是一个常见问题。然而，与整个胸部X光片相比，许多管子和各种解剖结构等异物很小，这导致数据严重不平衡，并使深度神经网络的训练变得困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的“仅存在一个对象”（OOOE）假设，以提高深度网络定位胸部 X 光照片中小标志的能力。 OOOE 使我们能够将定位问题重新转换为分类问题，并且我们可以用多类离散目标替换常用的连续回归技术。我们使用超过 100K 射线照片的大规模专有数据集以及公开的 RANZCR-CLiP Kaggle Challenge 数据集来验证我们的方法，并表明我们的方法始终优于常用的基于回归的检测模型以及常用的逐像素分类方法。此外，我们发现使用 OOOE 假设的方法可推广到胸部 X 射线中的多个检测问题，并且所得模型在检测插入患者的各种管尖以及患者解剖结构方面显示出最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于'仅存在一个物体'（OOOE）假设的方法，用于在胸部X光片中定位非常小的物体。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在处理胸部X光片中的小物体（如医疗导管和解剖结构）时面临数据不平衡问题，导致定位困难。
AI.method: 通过OOOE假设将定位问题转化为分类问题，使用多类别离散目标替代传统连续回归技术。
AI.result: 在10万张私有数据集和RANZCR-CLiP数据集上验证，该方法优于现有回归检测模型和像素级分类方法，且在导管尖端和解剖结构检测中达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: OOOE方法可泛化到多种胸部X光检测任务，为小物体定位提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Ioannis Dadiotis,Arturo Laurenzi,Nikos Tsagarakis
title: Trajectory Optimization for Quadruped Mobile Manipulators that Carry Heavy Payload
title_zh: 承载重负载的四足移动机械手的轨迹优化
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures, 2 tables, accepted article at the 2022 IEEE-RAS International Conference on Humanoid Robots (Humanoids 2022)
comments: 8 pages, 9 figures, 2 tables, accepted article at the 2022 IEEE-RAS International Conference on Humanoid Robots (Humanoids 2022)
abstract: This paper presents a simplified model-based trajectory optimization (TO) formulation for motion planning on quadruped mobile manipulators that carry heavy payload of known mass. The proposed payload-aware formulation simultaneously plans locomotion, payload manipulation and considers both robot and payload model dynamics while remaining computationally efficient. At the presence of heavy payload, the approach exhibits reduced leg outstretching (thus increased manipulability) in kinematically demanding motions due to the contribution of payload manipulation in the optimization. The framework's computational efficiency and performance is validated through a number of simulation and experimental studies with the bi-manual quadruped CENTAURO robot carrying on its arms a payload that exceeds 15 % of its mass and traversing non-flat terrain.
summary: This paper presents a simplified model-based trajectory optimization (TO) formulation for motion planning on quadruped mobile manipulators that carry heavy payload of known mass. The proposed payload-aware formulation simultaneously plans locomotion, payload manipulation and considers both robot and payload model dynamics while remaining computationally efficient. At the presence of heavy payload, the approach exhibits reduced leg outstretching (thus increased manipulability) in kinematically demanding motions due to the contribution of payload manipulation in the optimization. The framework's computational efficiency and performance is validated through a number of simulation and experimental studies with the bi-manual quadruped CENTAURO robot carrying on its arms a payload that exceeds 15 % of its mass and traversing non-flat terrain.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于简化模型的轨迹优化（TO）公式，用于四足移动机械臂的运动规划，该机械臂携带已知质量的重负载。所提出的有效负载感知公式同时规划运动、有效负载操作，并考虑机器人和有效负载模型动力学，同时保持计算效率。在存在重有效载荷的情况下，由于有效载荷操纵在优化中的贡献，该方法在运动学要求高的运动中表现出减少的腿部伸展（从而增加了可操纵性）。该框架的计算效率和性能通过大量模拟和实验研究得到了验证，双臂四足 CENTAURO 机器人的手臂上携带超过其质量 15% 的有效载荷并穿越非平坦地形。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型的轨迹优化方法，用于四足移动机械臂在携带重载时的运动规划。
AI.motivation: 四足移动机械臂在携带重载时，需要同时考虑腿部运动和负载操作，同时保持计算效率，这对传统方法提出了挑战。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种简化的基于模型的轨迹优化方法，同时规划腿部运动和负载操作，并考虑机器人和负载的动力学模型。
AI.result: 通过仿真和实验验证了该方法的计算效率和性能，展示了在非平坦地形上携带超过其质量15%的负载时的优异表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在计算效率和性能方面表现出色，适用于四足移动机械臂在复杂地形中携带重载的任务。

authors_text: Yehong Jiang
title: SDW-ASL: A Dynamic System to Generate Large Scale Dataset for Continuous American Sign Language
title_zh: SDW-ASL：为连续美国手语生成大规模数据集的动态系统
comment: There are 9 pages, 3 figures and 1 table. The ASL dataset viewing system is at https://adeddb94ac1d.ngrok.io
comments: There are 9 pages, 3 figures and 1 table. The ASL dataset viewing system is at https://adeddb94ac1d.ngrok.io
abstract: Despite tremendous progress in natural language processing using deep learning techniques in recent years, sign language production and comprehension has advanced very little. One critical barrier is the lack of largescale datasets available to the public due to the unbearable cost of labeled data generation. Efforts to provide public data for American Sign Language (ASL) comprehension have yielded two datasets, comprising more than thousand video clips. These datasets are large enough to enable a meaningful start to deep learning research on sign languages but are far too small to lead to any solution that can be practically deployed. So far, there is still no suitable dataset for ASL production. We proposed a system that can generate large scale ASL datasets for continuous ASL. It is suitable for general ASL processing and is particularly useful for ASL production. The continuous ASL dataset contains English labeled human articulations in condensed body pose data formats. To better serve the research community, we are releasing the first version of our ASL dataset, which contains 30k sentences, 416k words, a vocabulary of 18k words, in a total of 104 hours. This is the largest continuous sign language dataset published to date in terms of video duration. We also describe a system that can evolve and expand the dataset to incorporate better data processing techniques and more contents when available. It is our hope that the release of this ASL dataset and the sustainable dataset generation system to the public will propel better deep-learning research in ASL natural language processing.

One critical barrier is the lack of largescale datasets available to the public due to the unbearable cost of labeled data generation. Efforts to provide public data for American Sign Language (ASL) comprehension have yielded two datasets, comprising more than thousand video clips. These datasets are large enough to enable a meaningful start to deep learning research on sign languages but are far too small to lead to any solution that can be practically deployed. abstract_zh: 尽管近年来使用深度学习技术的自然语言处理取得了巨大进步，但手语的产生和理解却进展甚微。一个关键障碍是由于标记数据生成的成本难以承受，缺乏可供公众使用的大规模数据集。为美国手语 (ASL) 理解提供公共数据的努力已经产生了两个数据集，其中包含一千多个视频剪辑。这些数据集足够大，足以为手语深度学习研究提供有意义的开端，但它们太小，无法产生任何可以实际部署的解决方案。到目前为止，仍然没有合适的 ASL 制作数据集。我们提出了一个可以为连续 ASL 生成大规模 ASL 数据集的系统。它适用于一般 ASL 处理，特别适用于 ASL 生产。连续 ASL 数据集包含采用压缩身体姿势数据格式的英语标记的人体关节。为了更好地服务研究社区，我们发布了 ASL 数据集的第一个版本，该数据集包含 30k 句子、416k 单词、18k 单词词汇，总共 104 小时。这是迄今为止发布的视频时长最大的连续手语数据集。我们还描述了一个可以发展和扩展数据集的系统，以合并更好的数据处理技术和更多可用的内容。我们希望向公众发布这个 ASL 数据集和可持续数据集生成系统将推动 ASL 自然语言处理方面更好的深度学习研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SDW-ASL系统，用于生成大规模连续美国手语（ASL）数据集，以推动手语自然语言处理的深度学习研究。
AI.motivation: 现有ASL数据集规模不足，无法支持实际部署的解决方案，尤其是ASL生成领域缺乏合适数据集，亟需大规模标注数据推动研究进展。
AI.method: 开发动态系统生成连续ASL数据集，采用压缩身体姿态数据格式并附带英文标签，通过可扩展架构持续优化数据处理技术与内容。
AI.result: 发布包含3万句、41.6万个词、104小时视频时长的ASL数据集，成为当前视频时长最长的连续手语数据集。
AI.conclusion: 公开该数据集及可持续生成系统将显著促进ASL自然语言处理的深度学习研究，为学术界提供关键资源支持。

authors_text: Hitoshi Teshima,Naoki Wake,Diego Thomas,Yuta Nakashima,Hiroshi Kawasaki,Katsushi Ikeuchi
title: Deep Gesture Generation for Social Robots Using Type-Specific Libraries
title_zh: 使用特定于类型的库为社交机器人生成深度手势
abstract: Body language such as conversational gesture is a powerful way to ease communication. Conversational gestures do not only make a speech more lively but also contain semantic meaning that helps to stress important information in the discussion. In the field of robotics, giving conversational agents (humanoid robots or virtual avatars) the ability to properly use gestures is critical, yet remain a task of extraordinary difficulty. This is because given only a text as input, there are many possibilities and ambiguities to generate an appropriate gesture. Different to previous works we propose a new method that explicitly takes into account the gesture types to reduce these ambiguities and generate human-like conversational gestures. Key to our proposed system is a new gesture database built on the TED dataset that allows us to map a word to one of three types of gestures: "Imagistic" gestures, which express the content of the speech, "Beat" gestures, which emphasize words, and "No gestures." We propose a system that first maps the words in the input text to their corresponding gesture type, generate type-specific gestures and combine the generated gestures into one final smooth gesture. In our comparative experiments, the effectiveness of the proposed method was confirmed in user studies for both avatar and humanoid robot.
summary: Body language such as conversational gesture is a powerful way to ease communication. Conversational gestures do not only make a speech more lively but also contain semantic meaning that helps to stress important information in the discussion. In the field of robotics, giving conversational agents (humanoid robots or virtual avatars) the ability to properly use gestures is critical, yet remain a task of extraordinary difficulty. This is because given only a text as input, there are many possibilities and ambiguities to generate an appropriate gesture. Different to previous works we propose a new method that explicitly takes into account the gesture types to reduce these ambiguities and generate human-like conversational gestures. Key to our proposed system is a new gesture database built on the TED dataset that allows us to map a word to one of three types of gestures: "Imagistic" gestures, which express the content of the speech, "Beat" gestures, which emphasize words, and "No gestures." We propose a system that first maps the words in the input text to their corresponding gesture type, generate type-specific gestures and combine the generated gestures into one final smooth gesture. In our comparative experiments, the effectiveness of the proposed method was confirmed in user studies for both avatar and humanoid robot.
abstract_zh: 肢体语言（例如对话手势）是缓解沟通的有效方式。会话手势不仅使演讲更加生动，而且还包含语义，有助于在讨论中强调重要信息。在机器人领域，赋予对话代理（人形机器人或虚拟化身）正确使用手势的能力至关重要，但仍然是一项极其困难的任务。这是因为仅给出文本作为输入，生成适当的手势有很多可能性和模糊性。与之前的工作不同，我们提出了一种新方法，该方法明确考虑手势类型，以减少这些歧义并生成类似人类的对话手势。我们提出的系统的关键是一个基于 TED 数据集的新手势数据库，它允许我们将单词映射到三种类型的手势之一：表达演讲内容的“意象”手势、强调单词的“节拍”手势和“无手势”。我们提出了一种系统，该系统首先将输入文本中的单词映射到其相应的手势类型，生成特定于类型的手势并将生成的手势组合成一个最终的平滑手势。在我们的比较实验中，所提出方法的有效性在阿凡达和人形机器人的用户研究中得到了证实。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于类型特定库的深度手势生成方法，用于社交机器人生成自然的对话手势。
AI.motivation: 对话手势对机器人沟通至关重要，但仅凭文本输入生成合适手势存在歧义和复杂性，需新方法解决类型模糊问题。
AI.method: 构建基于TED数据集的手势数据库，将词语映射到三种手势类型（图像化/强调/无手势），生成并组合类型特定手势为最终动作。
AI.result: 用户实验验证了方法在虚拟人和人形机器人上的有效性，生成手势更符合人类自然表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过类型约束降低生成歧义，提升机器人手势表现力，未来可扩展更多手势类型和应用场景。

authors_text: Andres Palechor,Annesha Bhoumik,Manuel Günther
title: Large-Scale Open-Set Classification Protocols for ImageNet
title_zh: ImageNet 的大规模开放集分类协议
comment: This is a pre-print of the original paper accepted at the Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
comments: This is a pre-print of the original paper accepted at the Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
abstract: Open-Set Classification (OSC) intends to adapt closed-set classification models to real-world scenarios, where the classifier must correctly label samples of known classes while rejecting previously unseen unknown samples. Only recently, research started to investigate on algorithms that are able to handle these unknown samples correctly. Some of these approaches address OSC by including into the training set negative samples that a classifier learns to reject, expecting that these data increase the robustness of the classifier on unknown classes. Most of these approaches are evaluated on small-scale and low-resolution image datasets like MNIST, SVHN or CIFAR, which makes it difficult to assess their applicability to the real world, and to compare them among each other. We propose three open-set protocols that provide rich datasets of natural images with different levels of similarity between known and unknown classes. The protocols consist of subsets of ImageNet classes selected to provide training and testing data closer to real-world scenarios. Additionally, we propose a new validation metric that can be employed to assess whether the training of deep learning models addresses both the classification of known samples and the rejection of unknown samples. We use the protocols to compare the performance of two baseline open-set algorithms to the standard SoftMax baseline and find that the algorithms work well on negative samples that have been seen during training, and partially on out-of-distribution detection tasks, but drop performance in the presence of samples from previously unseen unknown classes.
summary: Open-Set Classification (OSC) intends to adapt closed-set classification models to real-world scenarios, where the classifier must correctly label samples of known classes while rejecting previously unseen unknown samples. Only recently, research started to investigate on algorithms that are able to handle these unknown samples correctly. Some of these approaches address OSC by including into the training set negative samples that a classifier learns to reject, expecting that these data increase the robustness of the classifier on unknown classes. Most of these approaches are evaluated on small-scale and low-resolution image datasets like MNIST, SVHN or CIFAR, which makes it difficult to assess their applicability to the real world, and to compare them among each other. We propose three open-set protocols that provide rich datasets of natural images with different levels of similarity between known and unknown classes. The protocols consist of subsets of ImageNet classes selected to provide training and testing data closer to real-world scenarios. Additionally, we propose a new validation metric that can be employed to assess whether the training of deep learning models addresses both the classification of known samples and the rejection of unknown samples. We use the protocols to compare the performance of two baseline open-set algorithms to the standard SoftMax baseline and find that the algorithms work well on negative samples that have been seen during training, and partially on out-of-distribution detection tasks, but drop performance in the presence of samples from previously unseen unknown classes.
abstract_zh: 开集分类（OSC）旨在使闭集分类模型适应现实场景，其中分类器必须正确标记已知类别的样本，同时拒绝以前未见过的未知样本。直到最近，研究才开始研究能够正确处理这些未知样本的算法。其中一些方法通过将分类器学习拒绝的负样本包含到训练集中来解决 OSC，期望这些数据增加分类器对未知类的鲁棒性。这些方法大多数都是在小规模、低分辨率的图像数据集（如 MNIST、SVHN 或 CIFAR）上进行评估，这使得评估它们在现实世界中的适用性以及相互比较变得困难。我们提出了三种开放集协议，它们提供丰富的自然图像数据集，在已知和未知类之间具有不同程度的相似性。这些协议由 ImageNet 类的子集组成，这些类被选择来提供更接近真实场景的训练和测试数据。此外，我们提出了一种新的验证指标，可用于评估深度学习模型的训练是否解决了已知样本的分类和未知样本的拒绝问题。我们使用这些协议将两种基线开放集算法的性能与标准 SoftMax 基线进行比较，发现这些算法在训练期间看到的负样本上运行良好，部分在分布外检测任务上运行良好，但在存在来自以前未见过的未知类的样本时性能会下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对ImageNet的大规模开放集分类协议及评估指标，以改进现实场景中的未知样本检测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有开放集分类方法多在小型数据集（如MNIST/CIFAR）上验证，难以评估其在真实场景中的表现及算法间的可比性。
AI.method: 设计三种基于ImageNet子集的开放集协议，包含不同已知/未知类相似度的数据集，并提出新的验证指标评估模型对已知样本分类与未知样本拒绝的双重能力。
AI.result: 基线算法在训练过的负样本上表现良好，但在未见过的未知样本上性能下降，表明现有方法对真实未知样本的检测能力有限。
AI.conclusion: 当前开放集分类算法需进一步优化以应对真实世界中完全未知的样本，所提协议可作为更可靠的评估基准。

search_text: Large-Scale Open-Set Classification Protocols for ImageNet ImageNet 的大规模开放集分类协议 Open-Set Classification (OSC) intends to adapt closed-set classification models to real-world scenarios, where the classifier must correctly label samples of known classes while rejecting previously unseen unknown samples. Only recently, research started to investigate on algorithms that are able to handle these unknown samples correctly. Some of these approaches address OSC by including into the training set negative samples that a classifier learns to reject, expecting that these data increase the robustness of the classifier on unknown classes. Most of these approaches are evaluated on small-scale and low-resolution image datasets like MNIST, SVHN or CIFAR, which makes it difficult to assess their applicability to the real world, and to compare them among each other. We propose three open-set protocols that provide rich datasets of natural images with different levels of similarity between known and unknown classes. The protocols consist of subsets of ImageNet classes selected to provide training and testing data closer to real-world scenarios. Additionally, we propose a new validation metric that can be employed to assess whether the training of deep learning models addresses both the classification of known samples and the rejection of unknown samples. We use the protocols to compare the performance of two baseline open-set algorithms to the standard SoftMax baseline and find that the algorithms work well on negative samples that have been seen during training, and partially on out-of-distribution detection tasks, but drop performance in the presence of samples from previously unseen unknown classes. 开集分类（OSC）旨在使闭集分类模型适应现实场景，其中分类器必须正确标记已知类别的样本，同时拒绝以前未见过的未知样本。直到最近，研究才开始研究能够正确处理这些未知样本的算法。其中一些方法通过将分类器学习拒绝的负样本包含到训练集中来解决 OSC，期望这些数据增加分类器对未知类的鲁棒性。这些方法大多数都是在小规模、低分辨率的图像数据集（如 MNIST、SVHN 或 CIFAR）上进行评估，这使得评估它们在现实世界中的适用性以及相互比较变得困难。我们提出了三种开放集协议，它们提供丰富的自然图像数据集，在已知和未知类之间具有不同程度的相似性。这些协议由 ImageNet 类的子集组成，这些类被选择来提供更接近真实场景的训练和测试数据。此外，我们提出了一种新的验证指标，可用于评估深度学习模型的训练是否解决了已知样本的分类和未知样本的拒绝问题。我们使用这些协议将两种基线开放集算法的性能与标准 SoftMax 基线进行比较，发现这些算法在训练期间看到的负样本上运行良好，部分在分布外检测任务上运行良好，但在存在来自以前未见过的未知类的样本时性能会下降。 本文提出针对ImageNet的大规模开放集分类协议及评估指标，以改进现实场景中的未知样本检测能力。 Andres Palechor,Annesha Bhoumik,Manuel Günther cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Eugene Lim,Harold Soh
title: Observed Adversaries in Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 深度强化学习中观察到的对手
abstract: In this work, we point out the problem of observed adversaries for deep policies. Specifically, recent work has shown that deep reinforcement learning is susceptible to adversarial attacks where an observed adversary acts under environmental constraints to invoke natural but adversarial observations. This setting is particularly relevant for HRI since HRI-related robots are expected to perform their tasks around and with other agents. In this work, we demonstrate that this effect persists even with low-dimensional observations. We further show that these adversarial attacks transfer across victims, which potentially allows malicious attackers to train an adversary without access to the target victim.
summary: In this work, we point out the problem of observed adversaries for deep policies. Specifically, recent work has shown that deep reinforcement learning is susceptible to adversarial attacks where an observed adversary acts under environmental constraints to invoke natural but adversarial observations. This setting is particularly relevant for HRI since HRI-related robots are expected to perform their tasks around and with other agents. In this work, we demonstrate that this effect persists even with low-dimensional observations. We further show that these adversarial attacks transfer across victims, which potentially allows malicious attackers to train an adversary without access to the target victim.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们指出了深层政策观察对手的问题。具体来说，最近的工作表明，深度强化学习很容易受到对抗性攻击，其中被观察的对手在环境限制下采取行动，以调用自然但对抗性的观察。此设置与 HRI 特别相关，因为 HRI 相关的机器人需要在其他代理周围或与其他代理一起执行任务。在这项工作中，我们证明即使在低维观测中这种效应仍然存在。我们进一步表明，这些对抗性攻击在受害者之间转移，这可能允许恶意攻击者在无法接触目标受害者的情况下训练对手。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了深度强化学习中观测到的对抗性攻击问题，指出即使在低维观测下，对抗性观察仍能通过环境约束引发自然但有害的行为，尤其在人机交互场景中具有重要意义。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在人机交互（HRI）中面临安全挑战，需验证对抗攻击在低维观测下的有效性及跨目标的可迁移性，以揭示潜在的安全隐患。
AI.method: 通过设计符合环境约束的对抗性观察，测试深度策略在低维观测下的鲁棒性，并验证对抗攻击在不同目标模型间的迁移能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，对抗性攻击在低维观测中依然有效，且攻击方法可跨不同受害者迁移，无需直接访问目标模型即可训练对抗者。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习策略对观测对抗攻击高度敏感，尤其在HRI场景中需警惕攻击迁移带来的安全风险，未来需加强防御机制研究。

authors_text: Jules Bourcier,Gohar Dashyan,Jocelyn Chanussot,Karteek Alahari
title: Evaluating the Label Efficiency of Contrastive Self-Supervised Learning for Multi-Resolution Satellite Imagery
title_zh: 评估多分辨率卫星图像对比自监督学习的标签效率
comment: ef:Image and Signal Processing for Remote Sensing XXVIII, SPIE, Sep 2022, Berlin, Germany
comments: ef:Image and Signal Processing for Remote Sensing XXVIII, SPIE, Sep 2022, Berlin, Germany
abstract: The application of deep neural networks to remote sensing imagery is often constrained by the lack of ground-truth annotations. Adressing this issue requires models that generalize efficiently from limited amounts of labeled data, allowing us to tackle a wider range of Earth observation tasks. Another challenge in this domain is developing algorithms that operate at variable spatial resolutions, e.g., for the problem of classifying land use at different scales. Recently, self-supervised learning has been applied in the remote sensing domain to exploit readily-available unlabeled data, and was shown to reduce or even close the gap with supervised learning. In this paper, we study self-supervised visual representation learning through the lens of label efficiency, for the task of land use classification on multi-resolution/multi-scale satellite images. We benchmark two contrastive self-supervised methods adapted from Momentum Contrast (MoCo) and provide evidence that these methods can be perform effectively given little downstream supervision, where randomly initialized networks fail to generalize. Moreover, they outperform out-of-domain pretraining alternatives. We use the large-scale fMoW dataset to pretrain and evaluate the networks, and validate our observations with transfer to the RESISC45 dataset.
summary: The application of deep neural networks to remote sensing imagery is often constrained by the lack of ground-truth annotations. Adressing this issue requires models that generalize efficiently from limited amounts of labeled data, allowing us to tackle a wider range of Earth observation tasks. Another challenge in this domain is developing algorithms that operate at variable spatial resolutions, e.g., for the problem of classifying land use at different scales. Recently, self-supervised learning has been applied in the remote sensing domain to exploit readily-available unlabeled data, and was shown to reduce or even close the gap with supervised learning. In this paper, we study self-supervised visual representation learning through the lens of label efficiency, for the task of land use classification on multi-resolution/multi-scale satellite images. We benchmark two contrastive self-supervised methods adapted from Momentum Contrast (MoCo) and provide evidence that these methods can be perform effectively given little downstream supervision, where randomly initialized networks fail to generalize. Moreover, they outperform out-of-domain pretraining alternatives. We use the large-scale fMoW dataset to pretrain and evaluate the networks, and validate our observations with transfer to the RESISC45 dataset.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在遥感图像中的应用常常受到缺乏地面实况注释的限制。解决这个问题需要能够从有限数量的标记数据中有效概括的模型，使我们能够处理更广泛的地球观测任务。该领域的另一个挑战是开发在可变空间分辨率下运行的算法，例如针对不同尺度的土地利用分类问题。最近，自监督学习已应用于遥感领域，以利用易于获得的未标记数据，并被证明可以减少甚至缩小与监督学习的差距。在本文中，我们从标签效率的角度研究自监督视觉表示学习，用于多分辨率/多尺度卫星图像的土地利用分类任务。我们对两种改编自动量对比（MoCo）的对比自监督方法进行了基准测试，并提供证据表明，在下游监督很少的情况下，这些方法可以有效执行，而随机初始化的网络无法泛化。此外，它们的性能优于域外预训练替代方案。我们使用大规模 fMoW 数据集来预训练和评估网络，并通过传输到 RESISC45 数据集来验证我们的观察结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究对比自监督学习在多分辨率卫星图像土地利用分类任务中的标签效率。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像应用中缺乏真实标注数据，且需处理多尺度分辨率问题，传统监督学习依赖大量标注数据，而自监督学习可利用未标注数据提升模型性能。
AI.method: 基于Momentum Contrast（MoCo）框架，提出两种对比自监督学习方法，通过大规模fMoW数据集预训练并在RESISC45数据集验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，对比自监督方法在少量下游监督下表现优于随机初始化网络，且优于领域外预训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 对比自监督学习能有效提升多分辨率卫星图像分类的标签效率，为遥感任务提供少样本学习解决方案。

ai_content.method: 基于Momentum Contrast（MoCo）框架，提出两种对比自监督学习方法，通过大规模fMoW数据集预训练并在RESISC45数据集验证。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，对比自监督方法在少量下游监督下表现优于随机初始化网络，且优于领域外预训练方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 对比自监督学习能有效提升多分辨率卫星图像分类的标签效率，为遥感任务提供少样本学习解决方案。

ai_content_json.method: 基于Momentum Contrast（MoCo）框架，提出两种对比自监督学习方法，通过大规模fMoW数据集预训练并在RESISC45数据集验证。
ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，对比自监督方法在少量下游监督下表现优于随机初始化网络，且优于领域外预训练方法。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 对比自监督学习能有效提升多分辨率卫星图像分类的标签效率，为遥感任务提供少样本学习解决方案。

search_text: Evaluating the Label Efficiency of Contrastive Self-Supervised Learning for Multi-Resolution Satellite Imagery 评估多分辨率卫星图像对比自监督学习的标签效率 The application of deep neural networks to remote sensing imagery is often constrained by the lack of ground-truth annotations. Adressing this issue requires models that generalize efficiently from limited amounts of labeled data, allowing us to tackle a wider range of Earth observation tasks. Another challenge in this domain is developing algorithms that operate at variable spatial resolutions, e.g., for the problem of classifying land use at different scales. Recently, self-supervised learning has been applied in the remote sensing domain to exploit readily-available unlabeled data, and was shown to reduce or even close the gap with supervised learning. In this paper, we study self-supervised visual representation learning through the lens of label efficiency, for the task of land use classification on multi-resolution/multi-scale satellite images. We benchmark two contrastive self-supervised methods adapted from Momentum Contrast (MoCo) and provide evidence that these methods can be perform effectively given little downstream supervision, where randomly initialized networks fail to generalize. Moreover, they outperform out-of-domain pretraining alternatives. We use the large-scale fMoW dataset to pretrain and evaluate the networks, and validate our observations with transfer to the RESISC45 dataset. 深度神经网络在遥感图像中的应用常常受到缺乏地面实况注释的限制。解决这个问题需要能够从有限数量的标记数据中有效概括的模型，使我们能够处理更广泛的地球观测任务。该领域的另一个挑战是开发在可变空间分辨率下运行的算法，例如针对不同尺度的土地利用分类问题。最近，自监督学习已应用于遥感领域，以利用易于获得的未标记数据，并被证明可以减少甚至缩小与监督学习的差距。在本文中，我们从标签效率的角度研究自监督视觉表示学习，用于多分辨率/多尺度卫星图像的土地利用分类任务。我们对两种改编自动量对比（MoCo）的对比自监督方法进行了基准测试，并提供证据表明，在下游监督很少的情况下，这些方法可以有效执行，而随机初始化的网络无法泛化。此外，它们的性能优于域外预训练替代方案。我们使用大规模 fMoW 数据集来预训练和评估网络，并通过传输到 RESISC45 数据集来验证我们的观察结果。 本文研究对比自监督学习在多分辨率卫星图像土地利用分类任务中的标签效率。 Jules Bourcier,Gohar Dashyan,Jocelyn Chanussot,Karteek Alahari eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Thomas Mullor,David Vigouroux,Louis Bethune
title: Efficient circuit implementation for coined quantum walks on binary trees and application to reinforcement learning
title_zh: 二叉树上创造的量子行走的高效电路实现及其在强化学习中的应用
comment: ef:ACM/IEEE International Workshop on Quantum Computing, Dec 2022, Seattle, United States
comments: ef:ACM/IEEE International Workshop on Quantum Computing, Dec 2022, Seattle, United States
abstract: Quantum walks on binary trees are used in many quantum algorithms to achieve important speedup over classical algorithms. The formulation of this kind of algorithms as quantum circuit presents the advantage of being easily readable, executable on circuit based quantum computers and simulators and optimal on the usage of resources. We propose a strategy to compose quantum circuit that performs quantum walk on binary trees following universal gate model quantum computation principles. We give a particular attention to NAND formula evaluation algorithm as it could have many applications in game theory and reinforcement learning. We therefore propose an application of this algorithm and show how it can be used to train a quantum reinforcement learning agent in a two player game environment.
summary: Quantum walks on binary trees are used in many quantum algorithms to achieve important speedup over classical algorithms. The formulation of this kind of algorithms as quantum circuit presents the advantage of being easily readable, executable on circuit based quantum computers and simulators and optimal on the usage of resources. We propose a strategy to compose quantum circuit that performs quantum walk on binary trees following universal gate model quantum computation principles. We give a particular attention to NAND formula evaluation algorithm as it could have many applications in game theory and reinforcement learning. We therefore propose an application of this algorithm and show how it can be used to train a quantum reinforcement learning agent in a two player game environment.
abstract_zh: 二叉树上的量子行走被用于许多量子算法中，以实现比经典算法显着的加速。将这种算法表述为量子电路具有易于读取、在基于电路的量子计算机和模拟器上可执行以及资源使用最优的优点。我们提出了一种构建量子电路的策略，该电路按照通用门模型量子计算原理在二叉树上执行量子行走。我们特别关注 NAND 公式评估算法，因为它在博弈论和强化学习中有很多应用。因此，我们提出了该算法的应用，并展示了如何使用它在两人游戏环境中训练量子强化学习代理。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计一种高效的量子电路实现二叉树上的量子行走，并探索其在强化学习中的应用。
AI.motivation: 量子行走能提升算法效率，但需转化为电路以优化资源使用；NAND公式评估在强化学习中的应用潜力促使研究其电路实现。
AI.method: 提出基于通用门模型的量子电路构建策略，重点优化二叉树量子行走的NAND公式评估算法。
AI.result: 成功展示了该算法在双人博弈环境中训练量子强化学习代理的应用实例。
AI.conclusion: 证明了该电路实现的有效性，为量子强化学习提供了新方法，未来可优化电路或拓展应用场景。

authors_text: Yuanwei Liu,Nian Liu,Xiwen Yao,Junwei Han
title: Intermediate Prototype Mining Transformer for Few-Shot Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于少样本语义分割的中间原型挖掘变压器
abstract: Few-shot semantic segmentation aims to segment the target objects in query under the condition of a few annotated support images. Most previous works strive to mine more effective category information from the support to match with the corresponding objects in query. However, they all ignored the category information gap between query and support images. If the objects in them show large intra-class diversity, forcibly migrating the category information from the support to the query is ineffective. To solve this problem, we are the first to introduce an intermediate prototype for mining both deterministic category information from the support and adaptive category knowledge from the query. Specifically, we design an Intermediate Prototype Mining Transformer (IPMT) to learn the prototype in an iterative way. In each IPMT layer, we propagate the object information in both support and query features to the prototype and then use it to activate the query feature map. By conducting this process iteratively, both the intermediate prototype and the query feature can be progressively improved. At last, the final query feature is used to yield precise segmentation prediction. Extensive experiments on both PASCAL-5i and COCO-20i datasets clearly verify the effectiveness of our IPMT and show that it outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods by a large margin. Code is available at https://github.com/LIUYUANWEI98/IPMT
summary: Few-shot semantic segmentation aims to segment the target objects in query under the condition of a few annotated support images. Most previous works strive to mine more effective category information from the support to match with the corresponding objects in query. However, they all ignored the category information gap between query and support images. If the objects in them show large intra-class diversity, forcibly migrating the category information from the support to the query is ineffective. To solve this problem, we are the first to introduce an intermediate prototype for mining both deterministic category information from the support and adaptive category knowledge from the query. Specifically, we design an Intermediate Prototype Mining Transformer (IPMT) to learn the prototype in an iterative way. In each IPMT layer, we propagate the object information in both support and query features to the prototype and then use it to activate the query feature map. By conducting this process iteratively, both the intermediate prototype and the query feature can be progressively improved. At last, the final query feature is used to yield precise segmentation prediction. Extensive experiments on both PASCAL-5i and COCO-20i datasets clearly verify the effectiveness of our IPMT and show that it outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods by a large margin. Code is available at https://github.com/LIUYUANWEI98/IPMT
abstract_zh: Few-shot语义分割旨在在少量带注释的支持图像的情况下分割查询中的目标对象。之前的大多数工作都致力于从支持中挖掘更有效的类别信息，以与查询中的相应对象进行匹配。然而，他们都忽略了查询图像和支持图像之间的类别信息差距。如果其中的对象表现出较大的类内多样性，则强制将类别信息从支持迁移到查询是无效的。为了解决这个问题，我们首先引入了一个中间原型，用于从支持中挖掘确定性类别信息，并从查询中挖掘自适应类别知识。具体来说，我们设计了一个中间原型挖掘变压器（IPMT）来以迭代方式学习原型。在每个 IPMT 层中，我们将支持和查询特征中的对象信息传播到原型，然后使用它来激活查询特征图。通过迭代地进行这个过程，中间原型和查询功能都可以逐步改进。最后，使用最终的查询特征来产生精确的分割预测。 PASCAL-5i 和 COCO-20i 数据集上的大量实验清楚地验证了我们的 IPMT 的有效性，并表明它大大优于以前最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/LIUYUANWEI98/IPMT 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于少样本语义分割的中间原型挖掘Transformer（IPMT），通过解决查询与支持图像之间的类别信息差距来提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在少样本语义分割中忽视了查询图像与支持图像间的类别信息差异，导致类别内部多样性较大时迁移效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计IPMT模块通过迭代方式学习中间原型，在每一层中传播支持与查询特征中的物体信息至原型，并利用其激活查询特征图，逐步优化原型与查询特征。
AI.result: 在PASCAL-5i和COCO-20i数据集上的实验表明，IPMT显著优于现有最先进方法，分割精度大幅提升。
AI.conclusion: IPMT通过引入中间原型有效弥合了查询与支持图像的类别信息差距，为少样本语义分割提供了新思路。

authors_text: Weichen Yu,Hongyuan Yu,Yan Huang,Liang Wang
title: Generalized Inter-class Loss for Gait Recognition
title_zh: 步态识别的广义类间损失
abstract: Gait recognition is a unique biometric technique that can be performed at a long distance non-cooperatively and has broad applications in public safety and intelligent traffic systems. Previous gait works focus more on minimizing the intra-class variance while ignoring the significance in constraining inter-class variance. To this end, we propose a generalized inter-class loss which resolves the inter-class variance from both sample-level feature distribution and class-level feature distribution. Instead of equal penalty strength on pair scores, the proposed loss optimizes sample-level inter-class feature distribution by dynamically adjusting the pairwise weight. Further, in class-level distribution, generalized inter-class loss adds a constraint on the uniformity of inter-class feature distribution, which forces the feature representations to approximate a hypersphere and keep maximal inter-class variance. In addition, the proposed method automatically adjusts the margin between classes which enables the inter-class feature distribution to be more flexible. The proposed method can be generalized to different gait recognition networks and achieves significant improvements. We conduct a series of experiments on CASIA-B and OUMVLP, and the experimental results show that the proposed loss can significantly improve the performance and achieves the state-of-the-art performances.
summary: Gait recognition is a unique biometric technique that can be performed at a long distance non-cooperatively and has broad applications in public safety and intelligent traffic systems. Previous gait works focus more on minimizing the intra-class variance while ignoring the significance in constraining inter-class variance. To this end, we propose a generalized inter-class loss which resolves the inter-class variance from both sample-level feature distribution and class-level feature distribution. Instead of equal penalty strength on pair scores, the proposed loss optimizes sample-level inter-class feature distribution by dynamically adjusting the pairwise weight. Further, in class-level distribution, generalized inter-class loss adds a constraint on the uniformity of inter-class feature distribution, which forces the feature representations to approximate a hypersphere and keep maximal inter-class variance. In addition, the proposed method automatically adjusts the margin between classes which enables the inter-class feature distribution to be more flexible. The proposed method can be generalized to different gait recognition networks and achieves significant improvements. We conduct a series of experiments on CASIA-B and OUMVLP, and the experimental results show that the proposed loss can significantly improve the performance and achieves the state-of-the-art performances.
abstract_zh: 步态识别是一种独特的生物识别技术，可以远距离非合作地执行，在公共安全和智能交通系统中具有广泛的应用。以前的步态工作更多地关注最小化类内方差，而忽略了约束类间方差的重要性。为此，我们提出了一种广义的类间损失，它解决了样本级特征分布和类级特征分布的类间方差。所提出的损失不是通过对分数进行相等的惩罚强度，而是通过动态调整成对权重来优化样本级别的类间特征分布。此外，在类级分布中，广义类间损失增加了对类间特征分布均匀性的约束，这迫使特征表示逼近超球面并保持最大类间方差。此外，该方法自动调整类之间的间隔，使得类间特征分布更加灵活。所提出的方法可以推广到不同的步态识别网络并取得显着的改进。我们在CASIA-B和OUMVLP上进行了一系列实验，实验结果表明所提出的损失可以显着提高性能并达到state-of-the-art的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种广义的类间损失函数，用于改进步态识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的步态识别方法主要关注减少类内方差，而忽视了类间方差的约束，这限制了模型的识别能力。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种广义的类间损失函数，通过动态调整样本对的权重优化样本级类间特征分布，并在类级分布中加入均匀性约束，使特征表示逼近超球面，保持最大类间方差。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在CASIA-B和OUMVLP数据集上显著提升了步态识别性能，达到了最先进的水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可以推广到不同的步态识别网络，并有效提升了步态识别的性能。

search_text: Generalized Inter-class Loss for Gait Recognition 步态识别的广义类间损失 Gait recognition is a unique biometric technique that can be performed at a long distance non-cooperatively and has broad applications in public safety and intelligent traffic systems. Previous gait works focus more on minimizing the intra-class variance while ignoring the significance in constraining inter-class variance. To this end, we propose a generalized inter-class loss which resolves the inter-class variance from both sample-level feature distribution and class-level feature distribution. Instead of equal penalty strength on pair scores, the proposed loss optimizes sample-level inter-class feature distribution by dynamically adjusting the pairwise weight. Further, in class-level distribution, generalized inter-class loss adds a constraint on the uniformity of inter-class feature distribution, which forces the feature representations to approximate a hypersphere and keep maximal inter-class variance. In addition, the proposed method automatically adjusts the margin between classes which enables the inter-class feature distribution to be more flexible. The proposed method can be generalized to different gait recognition networks and achieves significant improvements. We conduct a series of experiments on CASIA-B and OUMVLP, and the experimental results show that the proposed loss can significantly improve the performance and achieves the state-of-the-art performances. 步态识别是一种独特的生物识别技术，可以远距离非合作地执行，在公共安全和智能交通系统中具有广泛的应用。以前的步态工作更多地关注最小化类内方差，而忽略了约束类间方差的重要性。为此，我们提出了一种广义的类间损失，它解决了样本级特征分布和类级特征分布的类间方差。所提出的损失不是通过对分数进行相等的惩罚强度，而是通过动态调整成对权重来优化样本级别的类间特征分布。此外，在类级分布中，广义类间损失增加了对类间特征分布均匀性的约束，这迫使特征表示逼近超球面并保持最大类间方差。此外，该方法自动调整类之间的间隔，使得类间特征分布更加灵活。所提出的方法可以推广到不同的步态识别网络并取得显着的改进。我们在CASIA-B和OUMVLP上进行了一系列实验，实验结果表明所提出的损失可以显着提高性能并达到state-of-the-art的性能。 本文提出了一种广义的类间损失函数，用于改进步态识别的性能。 Weichen Yu,Hongyuan Yu,Yan Huang,Liang Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Shubhankar Borse,Marvin Klingner,Varun Ravi Kumar,Hong Cai,Abdulaziz Almuzairee,Senthil Yogamani,Fatih Porikli
title: X-Align: Cross-Modal Cross-View Alignment for Bird's-Eye-View Segmentation
title_zh: X-Align：用于鸟瞰图分割的跨模式跨视图对齐
abstract: Bird's-eye-view (BEV) grid is a common representation for the perception of road components, e.g., drivable area, in autonomous driving. Most existing approaches rely on cameras only to perform segmentation in BEV space, which is fundamentally constrained by the absence of reliable depth information. Latest works leverage both camera and LiDAR modalities, but sub-optimally fuse their features using simple, concatenation-based mechanisms. In this paper, we address these problems by enhancing the alignment of the unimodal features in order to aid feature fusion, as well as enhancing the alignment between the cameras' perspective view (PV) and BEV representations. We propose X-Align, a novel end-to-end cross-modal and cross-view learning framework for BEV segmentation consisting of the following components: (i) a novel Cross-Modal Feature Alignment (X-FA) loss, (ii) an attention-based Cross-Modal Feature Fusion (X-FF) module to align multi-modal BEV features implicitly, and (iii) an auxiliary PV segmentation branch with Cross-View Segmentation Alignment (X-SA) losses to improve the PV-to-BEV transformation. We evaluate our proposed method across two commonly used benchmark datasets, i.e., nuScenes and KITTI-360. Notably, X-Align significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art by 3 absolute mIoU points on nuScenes. We also provide extensive ablation studies to demonstrate the effectiveness of the individual components.
summary: Bird's-eye-view (BEV) grid is a common representation for the perception of road components, e.g., drivable area, in autonomous driving. Most existing approaches rely on cameras only to perform segmentation in BEV space, which is fundamentally constrained by the absence of reliable depth information. Latest works leverage both camera and LiDAR modalities, but sub-optimally fuse their features using simple, concatenation-based mechanisms. In this paper, we address these problems by enhancing the alignment of the unimodal features in order to aid feature fusion, as well as enhancing the alignment between the cameras' perspective view (PV) and BEV representations. We propose X-Align, a novel end-to-end cross-modal and cross-view learning framework for BEV segmentation consisting of the following components: (i) a novel Cross-Modal Feature Alignment (X-FA) loss, (ii) an attention-based Cross-Modal Feature Fusion (X-FF) module to align multi-modal BEV features implicitly, and (iii) an auxiliary PV segmentation branch with Cross-View Segmentation Alignment (X-SA) losses to improve the PV-to-BEV transformation. We evaluate our proposed method across two commonly used benchmark datasets, i.e., nuScenes and KITTI-360. Notably, X-Align significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art by 3 absolute mIoU points on nuScenes. We also provide extensive ablation studies to demonstrate the effectiveness of the individual components.
abstract_zh: 鸟瞰 (BEV) 网格是自动驾驶中道路组件（例如可驾驶区域）感知的常见表示。大多数现有方法仅依赖相机在 BEV 空间中执行分割，这从根本上受到缺乏可靠深度信息的限制。最新的作品利用了相机和激光雷达模式，但使用简单的、基于串联的机制来次优地融合它们的功能。在本文中，我们通过增强单峰特征的对齐以帮助特征融合以及增强相机的透视图（PV）和 BEV 表示之间的对齐来解决这些问题。我们提出了 X-Align，一种用于 BEV 分割的新颖的端到端跨模态和跨视图学习框架，由以下组件组成：（i）新颖的跨模态特征对齐（X-FA）损失，（ii）基于注意力的跨模态特征融合（X-FF）模块，用于隐式对齐多模态 BEV 特征，以及（iii）具有跨视图分割对齐（X-SA）损失的辅助 PV 分割分支，以改善PV 到 BEV 的转变。我们在两个常用的基准数据集（即 nuScenes 和 KITTI-360）上评估了我们提出的方法。值得注意的是，X-Align 在 nuScene 上的表现明显优于最先进的技术 3 个绝对 mIoU 点。我们还提供广泛的消融研究，以证明各个组件的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出X-Align框架，通过跨模态与跨视角对齐提升鸟瞰图（BEV）分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有BEV分割方法依赖单一摄像头或简单融合多模态特征，导致深度信息不足和特征对齐不足，影响分割精度。
AI.method: 设计包含跨模态特征对齐损失（X-FA）、基于注意力的跨模态融合模块（X-FF）以及辅助视角分割分支与跨视角对齐损失（X-SA）的端到端框架。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和KITTI-360数据集上，X-Align相较最先进方法提升3个绝对mIoU点，消融实验证明各组件有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨模态与跨视角对齐机制，X-Align显著提升了BEV分割性能，验证了多模态特征协同优化的有效性。

authors_text: Haoxuan Qu,Yanchao Li,Lin Geng Foo,Jason Kuen,Jiuxiang Gu,Jun Liu
title: Improving the Reliability for Confidence Estimation
title_zh: 提高置信度估计的可靠性
abstract: Confidence estimation, a task that aims to evaluate the trustworthiness of the model's prediction output during deployment, has received lots of research attention recently, due to its importance for the safe deployment of deep models. Previous works have outlined two important qualities that a reliable confidence estimation model should possess, i.e., the ability to perform well under label imbalance and the ability to handle various out-of-distribution data inputs. In this work, we propose a meta-learning framework that can simultaneously improve upon both qualities in a confidence estimation model. Specifically, we first construct virtual training and testing sets with some intentionally designed distribution differences between them. Our framework then uses the constructed sets to train the confidence estimation model through a virtual training and testing scheme leading it to learn knowledge that generalizes to diverse distributions. We show the effectiveness of our framework on both monocular depth estimation and image classification.
summary: Confidence estimation, a task that aims to evaluate the trustworthiness of the model's prediction output during deployment, has received lots of research attention recently, due to its importance for the safe deployment of deep models. Previous works have outlined two important qualities that a reliable confidence estimation model should possess, i.e., the ability to perform well under label imbalance and the ability to handle various out-of-distribution data inputs. In this work, we propose a meta-learning framework that can simultaneously improve upon both qualities in a confidence estimation model. Specifically, we first construct virtual training and testing sets with some intentionally designed distribution differences between them. Our framework then uses the constructed sets to train the confidence estimation model through a virtual training and testing scheme leading it to learn knowledge that generalizes to diverse distributions. We show the effectiveness of our framework on both monocular depth estimation and image classification.
abstract_zh: 置信度估计是一项旨在评估模型在部署过程中预测输出的可信度的任务，由于其对于深度模型的安全部署的重要性，最近受到了广泛的研究关注。先前的工作概述了可靠的置信估计模型应具备的两个重要品质，即在标签不平衡下表现良好的能力和处理各种分布外数据输入的能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个元学习框架，可以同时改进置信估计模型中的这两个质量。具体来说，我们首先构建虚拟训练和测试集，并在它们之间有意设计一些分布差异。然后，我们的框架使用构建的集合通过虚拟训练和测试方案来训练置信估计模型，使其学习泛化到不同分布的知识。我们展示了我们的框架在单目深度估计和图像分类方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种元学习框架，通过构建虚拟训练测试集提升置信度估计模型在标签不平衡和分布外数据场景下的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有置信度估计模型在面对标签不平衡和分布外数据时可靠性不足，需同时提升模型对这两种场景的适应能力以确保深度模型安全部署。
AI.method: 设计具有分布差异的虚拟训练/测试集，通过元学习框架训练模型学习跨分布的通用知识，增强其泛化能力。
AI.result: 该框架在单目深度估计和图像分类任务中均有效提升了模型在标签不平衡和分布外数据下的置信度估计性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的元学习方法通过虚拟分布差异训练，成功增强了置信度估计模型的可靠性和跨场景适应能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种元学习框架，通过构建虚拟训练测试集提升置信度估计模型在标签不平衡和分布外数据场景下的可靠性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有置信度估计模型在面对标签不平衡和分布外数据时可靠性不足，需同时提升模型对这两种场景的适应能力以确保深度模型安全部署。
ai_content.method: 设计具有分布差异的虚拟训练/测试集，通过元学习框架训练模型学习跨分布的通用知识，增强其泛化能力。
ai_content.result: 该框架在单目深度估计和图像分类任务中均有效提升了模型在标签不平衡和分布外数据下的置信度估计性能。
ai_content.conclusion: 提出的元学习方法通过虚拟分布差异训练，成功增强了置信度估计模型的可靠性和跨场景适应能力。

search_text: Improving the Reliability for Confidence Estimation 提高置信度估计的可靠性 Confidence estimation, a task that aims to evaluate the trustworthiness of the model's prediction output during deployment, has received lots of research attention recently, due to its importance for the safe deployment of deep models. Previous works have outlined two important qualities that a reliable confidence estimation model should possess, i.e., the ability to perform well under label imbalance and the ability to handle various out-of-distribution data inputs. In this work, we propose a meta-learning framework that can simultaneously improve upon both qualities in a confidence estimation model. Specifically, we first construct virtual training and testing sets with some intentionally designed distribution differences between them. Our framework then uses the constructed sets to train the confidence estimation model through a virtual training and testing scheme leading it to learn knowledge that generalizes to diverse distributions. We show the effectiveness of our framework on both monocular depth estimation and image classification. 置信度估计是一项旨在评估模型在部署过程中预测输出的可信度的任务，由于其对于深度模型的安全部署的重要性，最近受到了广泛的研究关注。先前的工作概述了可靠的置信估计模型应具备的两个重要品质，即在标签不平衡下表现良好的能力和处理各种分布外数据输入的能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个元学习框架，可以同时改进置信估计模型中的这两个质量。具体来说，我们首先构建虚拟训练和测试集，并在它们之间有意设计一些分布差异。然后，我们的框架使用构建的集合通过虚拟训练和测试方案来训练置信估计模型，使其学习泛化到不同分布的知识。我们展示了我们的框架在单目深度估计和图像分类方面的有效性。 本文提出一种元学习框架，通过构建虚拟训练测试集提升置信度估计模型在标签不平衡和分布外数据场景下的可靠性。 Haoxuan Qu,Yanchao Li,Lin Geng Foo,Jason Kuen,Jiuxiang Gu,Jun Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Kevin Yang,Yuandong Tian,Nanyun Peng,Dan Klein
title: Re3: Generating Longer Stories With Recursive Reprompting and Revision
title_zh: Re3：通过递归重新提示和修改生成更长的故事
abstract: We consider the problem of automatically generating longer stories of over two thousand words. Compared to prior work on shorter stories, long-range plot coherence and relevance are more central challenges here. We propose the Recursive Reprompting and Revision framework (Re3) to address these challenges by (a) prompting a general-purpose language model to construct a structured overarching plan, and (b) generating story passages by repeatedly injecting contextual information from both the plan and current story state into a language model prompt. We then revise by (c) reranking different continuations for plot coherence and premise relevance, and finally (d) editing the best continuation for factual consistency. Compared to similar-length stories generated directly from the same base model, human evaluators judged substantially more of Re3's stories as having a coherent overarching plot (by 14% absolute increase), and relevant to the given initial premise (by 20%).
summary: We consider the problem of automatically generating longer stories of over two thousand words. Compared to prior work on shorter stories, long-range plot coherence and relevance are more central challenges here. We propose the Recursive Reprompting and Revision framework (Re3) to address these challenges by (a) prompting a general-purpose language model to construct a structured overarching plan, and (b) generating story passages by repeatedly injecting contextual information from both the plan and current story state into a language model prompt. We then revise by (c) reranking different continuations for plot coherence and premise relevance, and finally (d) editing the best continuation for factual consistency. Compared to similar-length stories generated directly from the same base model, human evaluators judged substantially more of Re3's stories as having a coherent overarching plot (by 14% absolute increase), and relevant to the given initial premise (by 20%).
abstract_zh: 我们考虑自动生成超过两千字的较长故事的问题。与之前的短篇小说研究相比，长期情节的连贯性和相关性是这里更重要的挑战。我们提出了递归重新提示和修订框架（Re3）来应对这些挑战，方法是（a）提示通用语言模型构建结构化的总体计划，以及（b）通过将计划和当前故事状态的上下文信息重复注入语言模型提示来生成故事段落。然后，我们通过（c）重新排列不同的延续以实现情节连贯性和前提相关性进行修改，最后（d）编辑最佳延续以实现事实一致性。与直接从相同基础模型生成的类似长度的故事相比，人类评估者认为 Re3 的故事中有更多的故事具有连贯的总体情节（绝对增加了 14%），并且与给定的初始前提相关（增加了 20%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Re3框架，通过递归重提示和修订技术解决长篇故事生成中的情节连贯性和前提相关性挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成超长故事时面临长期情节连贯性和内容相关性难以保持的核心问题，需要更有效的生成与修正机制。
AI.method: Re3框架包含四个步骤：1) 构建故事总计划；2) 迭代注入计划与当前内容生成段落；3) 基于连贯性与相关性重排序续写；4) 修正最佳续写确保事实一致性。
AI.result: 人类评估显示，Re3生成的故事在情节连贯性上比基线模型提升14%，前提相关性提升20%。
AI.conclusion: Re3通过结构化规划与多阶段修正有效提升了长篇故事生成质量，验证了分步优化策略的有效性。

authors_text: Tommi Kärkkäinen,Jan Hänninen
title: An Additive Autoencoder for Dimension Estimation
title_zh: 用于维度估计的加法自动编码器
abstract: An additive autoencoder for dimension reduction, which is composed of a serially performed bias estimation, linear trend estimation, and nonlinear residual estimation, is proposed and analyzed. Computational experiments confirm that an autoencoder of this form, with only a shallow network to encapsulate the nonlinear behavior, is able to identify an intrinsic dimension of a dataset with a low autoencoding error. This observation leads to an investigation in which shallow and deep network structures, and how they are trained, are compared. We conclude that the deeper network structures obtain lower autoencoding errors during the identification of the intrinsic dimension. However, the detected dimension does not change compared to a shallow network.
summary: An additive autoencoder for dimension reduction, which is composed of a serially performed bias estimation, linear trend estimation, and nonlinear residual estimation, is proposed and analyzed. Computational experiments confirm that an autoencoder of this form, with only a shallow network to encapsulate the nonlinear behavior, is able to identify an intrinsic dimension of a dataset with a low autoencoding error. This observation leads to an investigation in which shallow and deep network structures, and how they are trained, are compared. We conclude that the deeper network structures obtain lower autoencoding errors during the identification of the intrinsic dimension. However, the detected dimension does not change compared to a shallow network.
abstract_zh: 提出并分析了一种用于降维的加性自动编码器，该自动编码器由串行执行的偏差估计、线性趋势估计和非线性残差估计组成。计算实验证实，这种形式的自动编码器仅使用浅层网络来封装非线性行为，能够以较低的自动编码误差识别数据集的内在维度。这一观察结果引发了一项研究，对浅层和深层网络结构以及它们的训练方式进行了比较。我们得出的结论是，更深的网络结构在识别内在维度期间获得更低的自动编码错误。然而，与浅层网络相比，检测到的维度没有变化。

AI.tldr: 提出一种加性自编码器用于数据集的内在维度估计
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理非线性数据时可能存在维度估计偏差，需探索更高效的降维结构
AI.method: 设计包含偏差估计、线性趋势估计和非线性残差估计的分层自编码器，对比浅层与深层网络的训练效果
AI.result: 浅层网络可有效识别内在维度，深层网络虽降低自编码误差但维度检测结果保持一致
AI.conclusion: 网络深度影响重构误差但不改变维度估计结果，说明结构复杂度与维度识别存在非线性关系

authors_text: Edoardo Cetin,Oya Celiktutan
title: Policy Gradient With Serial Markov Chain Reasoning
title_zh: 具有串行马尔可夫链推理的策略梯度
abstract: We introduce a new framework that performs decision-making in reinforcement learning (RL) as an iterative reasoning process. We model agent behavior as the steady-state distribution of a parameterized reasoning Markov chain (RMC), optimized with a new tractable estimate of the policy gradient. We perform action selection by simulating the RMC for enough reasoning steps to approach its steady-state distribution. We show our framework has several useful properties that are inherently missing from traditional RL. For instance, it allows agent behavior to approximate any continuous distribution over actions by parameterizing the RMC with a simple Gaussian transition function. Moreover, the number of reasoning steps to reach convergence can scale adaptively with the difficulty of each action selection decision and can be accelerated by re-using past solutions. Our resulting algorithm achieves state-of-the-art performance in popular Mujoco and DeepMind Control benchmarks, both for proprioceptive and pixel-based tasks.
summary: We introduce a new framework that performs decision-making in reinforcement learning (RL) as an iterative reasoning process. We model agent behavior as the steady-state distribution of a parameterized reasoning Markov chain (RMC), optimized with a new tractable estimate of the policy gradient. We perform action selection by simulating the RMC for enough reasoning steps to approach its steady-state distribution. We show our framework has several useful properties that are inherently missing from traditional RL. For instance, it allows agent behavior to approximate any continuous distribution over actions by parameterizing the RMC with a simple Gaussian transition function. Moreover, the number of reasoning steps to reach convergence can scale adaptively with the difficulty of each action selection decision and can be accelerated by re-using past solutions. Our resulting algorithm achieves state-of-the-art performance in popular Mujoco and DeepMind Control benchmarks, both for proprioceptive and pixel-based tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一个新的框架，该框架将强化学习（RL）中的决策作为迭代推理过程来执行。我们将代理行为建模为参数化推理马尔可夫链（RMC）的稳态分布，并通过新的易于处理的策略梯度估计进行优化。我们通过模拟 RMC 足够的推理步骤来接近其稳态分布来执行动作选择。我们展示了我们的框架具有传统 RL 本质上缺失的几个有用的属性。例如，它允许代理行为通过使用简单的高斯转换函数参数化 RMC 来逼近动作的任何连续分布。此外，达到收敛的推理步骤的数量可以随着每个动作选择决策的难度而自适应地扩展，并且可以通过重新使用过去的解决方案来加速。我们的算法在流行的 Mujoco 和 DeepMind Control 基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，无论是本体感受任务还是基于像素的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于序列马尔可夫链推理的策略梯度框架，通过参数化推理马尔可夫链（RMC）的稳态分布进行强化学习决策。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在处理复杂决策时缺乏灵活性和适应性，无法有效逼近连续动作分布且推理步骤数固定。本文旨在通过引入可参数化的RMC模型解决这些问题。
AI.method: 将智能体行为建模为参数化RMC的稳态分布，使用可计算的策略梯度估计进行优化；通过模拟足够多的推理步骤逼近稳态，并利用历史解加速收敛。
AI.result: 该算法在Mujoco和DeepMind Control基准测试中达到最先进水平，支持本体感觉和像素级任务的高性能决策。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过马尔可夫链推理机制实现了传统RL缺失的灵活性和自适应性，为复杂决策问题提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Policy Gradient With Serial Markov Chain Reasoning 具有串行马尔可夫链推理的策略梯度 We introduce a new framework that performs decision-making in reinforcement learning (RL) as an iterative reasoning process. We model agent behavior as the steady-state distribution of a parameterized reasoning Markov chain (RMC), optimized with a new tractable estimate of the policy gradient. We perform action selection by simulating the RMC for enough reasoning steps to approach its steady-state distribution. We show our framework has several useful properties that are inherently missing from traditional RL. For instance, it allows agent behavior to approximate any continuous distribution over actions by parameterizing the RMC with a simple Gaussian transition function. Moreover, the number of reasoning steps to reach convergence can scale adaptively with the difficulty of each action selection decision and can be accelerated by re-using past solutions. Our resulting algorithm achieves state-of-the-art performance in popular Mujoco and DeepMind Control benchmarks, both for proprioceptive and pixel-based tasks. 我们引入了一个新的框架，该框架将强化学习（RL）中的决策作为迭代推理过程来执行。我们将代理行为建模为参数化推理马尔可夫链（RMC）的稳态分布，并通过新的易于处理的策略梯度估计进行优化。我们通过模拟 RMC 足够的推理步骤来接近其稳态分布来执行动作选择。我们展示了我们的框架具有传统 RL 本质上缺失的几个有用的属性。例如，它允许代理行为通过使用简单的高斯转换函数参数化 RMC 来逼近动作的任何连续分布。此外，达到收敛的推理步骤的数量可以随着每个动作选择决策的难度而自适应地扩展，并且可以通过重新使用过去的解决方案来加速。我们的算法在流行的 Mujoco 和 DeepMind Control 基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，无论是本体感受任务还是基于像素的任务。 本文提出一种基于序列马尔可夫链推理的策略梯度框架，通过参数化推理马尔可夫链（RMC）的稳态分布进行强化学习决策。 Edoardo Cetin,Oya Celiktutan cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Shoaib Azam,Farzeen Munir,Ville Kyrki,Moongu Jeon,Witold Pedrycz
title: Exploring Contextual Representation and Multi-Modality for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 探索端到端自动驾驶的上下文表示和多模态
abstract: Learning contextual and spatial environmental representations enhances autonomous vehicle's hazard anticipation and decision-making in complex scenarios. Recent perception systems enhance spatial understanding with sensor fusion but often lack full environmental context. Humans, when driving, naturally employ neural maps that integrate various factors such as historical data, situational subtleties, and behavioral predictions of other road users to form a rich contextual understanding of their surroundings. This neural map-based comprehension is integral to making informed decisions on the road. In contrast, even with their significant advancements, autonomous systems have yet to fully harness this depth of human-like contextual understanding. Motivated by this, our work draws inspiration from human driving patterns and seeks to formalize the sensor fusion approach within an end-to-end autonomous driving framework. We introduce a framework that integrates three cameras (left, right, and center) to emulate the human field of view, coupled with top-down bird-eye-view semantic data to enhance contextual representation. The sensor data is fused and encoded using a self-attention mechanism, leading to an auto-regressive waypoint prediction module. We treat feature representation as a sequential problem, employing a vision transformer to distill the contextual interplay between sensor modalities. The efficacy of the proposed method is experimentally evaluated in both open and closed-loop settings. Our method achieves displacement error by 0.67m in open-loop settings, surpassing current methods by 6.9% on the nuScenes dataset. In closed-loop evaluations on CARLA's Town05 Long and Longest6 benchmarks, the proposed method enhances driving performance, route completion, and reduces infractions.

abstract_zh: 学习上下文和空间环境表示可以增强自动驾驶汽车在复杂场景中的危险预测和决策。最近的感知系统通过传感器融合增强了空间理解，但通常缺乏完整的环境背景。人类在驾驶时，自然会使用神经图来整合各种因素，例如历史数据、情境微妙性和其他道路使用者的行为预测，以形成对周围环境的丰富的上下文理解。这种基于神经图的理解对于在道路上做出明智的决策至关重要。相比之下，即使自主系统取得了显着的进步，但它尚未充分利用这种类似于人类的上下文理解的深度。受此启发，我们的工作从人类驾驶模式中汲取灵感，并寻求在端到端自动驾驶框架内形式化传感器融合方法。我们引入了一个框架，该框架集成了三个摄像头（左、右、中）来模拟人类视野，并结合自上而下的鸟瞰语义数据来增强上下文表示。使用自注意力机制对传感器数据进行融合和编码，形成自回归航路点预测模块。我们将特征表示视为一个序列问题，使用视觉转换器来提取传感器模态之间的上下文相互作用。该方法的有效性在开环和闭环设置中进行了实验评估。我们的方法在开环设置中实现了 0.67m 的位移误差，在 nuScenes 数据集上比当前方法高出 6.9%。在 CARLA Town05 Long 和 Longest6 基准的闭环评估中，所提出的方法提高了驾驶性能、路线完成度并减少了违规行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端自动驾驶框架，通过结合上下文表示和多模态传感器数据，提升复杂场景下的环境感知与决策能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶系统虽通过传感器融合增强空间理解，但缺乏人类驾驶员般的丰富上下文感知能力，难以在复杂场景中做出精准决策。
AI.method: 整合三摄像头（左、右、中）模拟人类视野，并结合鸟瞰图语义数据，利用自注意力机制融合传感器数据，通过视觉Transformer提取时序特征，生成自回归航路点预测模块。
AI.result: 在开放环测试中位移误差达0.67米，较当前方法在nuScenes数据集提升6.9%；在CARLA Town05基准测试中提升行驶性能与路线完成率并减少违规行为。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多模态数据融合与上下文感知建模，有效提升了自动驾驶系统的环境理解与决策水平，验证了类人神经地图机制在自动驾驶中的可行性。

authors_text: Changde Du,Kaicheng Fu,Jinpeng Li,Huiguang He
title: Decoding Visual Neural Representations by Multimodal Learning of Brain-Visual-Linguistic Features
title_zh: 通过脑-视觉-语言特征的多模态学习解码视觉神经表征
comment: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
comments: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
abstract: Decoding human visual neural representations is a challenging task with great scientific significance in revealing vision-processing mechanisms and developing brain-like intelligent machines. Most existing methods are difficult to generalize to novel categories that have no corresponding neural data for training. The two main reasons are 1) the under-exploitation of the multimodal semantic knowledge underlying the neural data and 2) the small number of paired (stimuli-responses) training data. To overcome these limitations, this paper presents a generic neural decoding method called BraVL that uses multimodal learning of brain-visual-linguistic features. We focus on modeling the relationships between brain, visual and linguistic features via multimodal deep generative models. Specifically, we leverage the mixture-of-product-of-experts formulation to infer a latent code that enables a coherent joint generation of all three modalities. To learn a more consistent joint representation and improve the data efficiency in the case of limited brain activity data, we exploit both intra- and inter-modality mutual information maximization regularization terms. In particular, our BraVL model can be trained under various semi-supervised scenarios to incorporate the visual and textual features obtained from the extra categories. Finally, we construct three trimodal matching datasets, and the extensive experiments lead to some interesting conclusions and cognitive insights: 1) decoding novel visual categories from human brain activity is practically possible with good accuracy; 2) decoding models using the combination of visual and linguistic features perform much better than those using either of them alone; 3) visual perception may be accompanied by linguistic influences to represent the semantics of visual stimuli. Code and data: https://github.com/ChangdeDu/BraVL.

We focus on modeling the relationships between brain, visual and linguistic features via multimodal deep generative models. To learn a more consistent joint representation and improve the data efficiency in the case of limited brain activity data, we exploit both intra- and inter-modality mutual information maximization regularization terms. In particular, our BraVL model can be trained under various semi-supervised scenarios to incorporate the visual and textual features obtained from the extra categories. Finally, we construct three trimodal matching datasets, and the extensive experiments lead to some interesting conclusions and cognitive insights: 1) decoding novel visual categories from human brain activity is practically possible with good accuracy; 2) decoding models using the combination of visual and linguistic features perform much better than those using either of them alone; 3) visual perception may be accompanied by linguistic influences to represent the semantics of visual stimuli. Code and data: https://github.com/ChangdeDu/BraVL.
abstract_zh: 解码人类视觉神经表征是一项具有挑战性的任务，对于揭示视觉处理机制和开发类脑智能机器具有重要的科学意义。大多数现有方法很难推广到没有相应神经数据进行训练的新类别。两个主要原因是 1) 神经数据背后的多模态语义知识开发不足，2) 配对（刺激响应）训练数据数量较少。为了克服这些限制，本文提出了一种称为 BraVL 的通用神经解码方法，该方法使用大脑-视觉-语言特征的多模态学习。我们专注于通过多模态深度生成模型对大脑、视觉和语言特征之间的关系进行建模。具体来说，我们利用专家产品混合公式来推断潜在代码，该代码能够连贯地联合生成所有三种模式。为了在大脑活动数据有限的情况下学习更一致的联合表示并提高数据效率，我们利用模态内和模间互信息最大化正则化项。特别是，我们的 BraVL 模型可以在各种半监督场景下进行训练，以整合从额外类别获得的视觉和文本特征。最后，我们构建了三个三模态匹配数据集，大量的实验得出了一些有趣的结论和认知见解：1）从人类大脑活动中解码新的视觉类别实际上是可能的，并且具有良好的准确性； 2）结合视觉和语言特征的解码模型比单独使用其中任何一个特征的解码模型表现更好； 3）视觉感知可能伴随着语言的影响来表示视觉刺激的语义。代码和数据：https://github.com/ChangdeDu/BraVL。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态学习方法BraVL，通过联合建模脑-视觉-语言特征，解决现有神经解码方法在泛化性和数据效率上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有神经解码方法难以推广到无训练数据的新类别，主要受限于多模态语义知识利用不足和训练数据量过少。
AI.method: 设计混合专家产品模型推断潜在代码，结合模态内/间互信息最大化正则化，支持半监督训练整合额外类别特征。
AI.result: 实验证明可准确解码新视觉类别，多模态融合模型显著优于单一模态，发现视觉感知可能受语言影响表征语义。
AI.conclusion: 多模态联合建模有效提升解码性能，为脑机接口和类脑智能系统提供新思路，揭示视觉语义表征的语言伴随性机制。
