search_text: Decoding Visual Neural Representations by Multimodal Learning of Brain-Visual-Linguistic Features 通过脑-视觉-语言特征的多模态学习解码视觉神经表征 Decoding human visual neural representations is a challenging task with great scientific significance in revealing vision-processing mechanisms and developing brain-like intelligent machines. Most existing methods are difficult to generalize to novel categories that have no corresponding neural data for training. The two main reasons are 1) the under-exploitation of the multimodal semantic knowledge underlying the neural data and 2) the small number of paired (stimuli-responses) training data. To overcome these limitations, this paper presents a generic neural decoding method called BraVL that uses multimodal learning of brain-visual-linguistic features. We focus on modeling the relationships between brain, visual and linguistic features via multimodal deep generative models. Specifically, we leverage the mixture-of-product-of-experts formulation to infer a latent code that enables a coherent joint generation of all three modalities. To learn a more consistent joint representation and improve the data efficiency in the case of limited brain activity data, we exploit both intra- and inter-modality mutual information maximization regularization terms. In particular, our BraVL model can be trained under various semi-supervised scenarios to incorporate the visual and textual features obtained from the extra categories. Finally, we construct three trimodal matching datasets, and the extensive experiments lead to some interesting conclusions and cognitive insights: 1) decoding novel visual categories from human brain activity is practically possible with good accuracy; 2) decoding models using the combination of visual and linguistic features perform much better than those using either of them alone; 3) visual perception may be accompanied by linguistic influences to represent the semantics of visual stimuli. Code and data: https://github.com/ChangdeDu/BraVL. 解码人类视觉神经表征是一项具有挑战性的任务，对于揭示视觉处理机制和开发类脑智能机器具有重要的科学意义。大多数现有方法很难推广到没有相应神经数据进行训练的新类别。两个主要原因是 1) 神经数据背后的多模态语义知识开发不足，2) 配对（刺激响应）训练数据数量较少。为了克服这些限制，本文提出了一种称为 BraVL 的通用神经解码方法，该方法使用大脑-视觉-语言特征的多模态学习。我们专注于通过多模态深度生成模型对大脑、视觉和语言特征之间的关系进行建模。具体来说，我们利用专家产品混合公式来推断潜在代码，该代码能够连贯地联合生成所有三种模式。为了在大脑活动数据有限的情况下学习更一致的联合表示并提高数据效率，我们利用模态内和模间互信息最大化正则化项。特别是，我们的 BraVL 模型可以在各种半监督场景下进行训练，以整合从额外类别获得的视觉和文本特征。最后，我们构建了三个三模态匹配数据集，大量的实验得出了一些有趣的结论和认知见解：1）从人类大脑活动中解码新的视觉类别实际上是可能的，并且具有良好的准确性； 2）结合视觉和语言特征的解码模型比单独使用其中任何一个特征的解码模型表现更好； 3）视觉感知可能伴随着语言的影响来表示视觉刺激的语义。代码和数据：https://github.com/ChangdeDu/BraVL。 本文提出一种多模态学习方法BraVL，通过联合建模脑-视觉-语言特征，解决现有神经解码方法在泛化性和数据效率上的不足。 Changde Du,Kaicheng Fu,Jinpeng Li,Huiguang He cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.MM,cs.NE

authors_text: Sharat Agarwal,Saket Anand,Chetan Arora
title: Reducing Annotation Effort by Identifying and Labeling Contextually Diverse Classes for Semantic Segmentation Under Domain Shift
title_zh: 通过识别和标记上下文不同的类来减少域转移下语义分割的注释工作
abstract: In Active Domain Adaptation (ADA), one uses Active Learning (AL) to select a subset of images from the target domain, which are then annotated and used for supervised domain adaptation (DA). Given the large performance gap between supervised and unsupervised DA techniques, ADA allows for an excellent trade-off between annotation cost and performance. Prior art makes use of measures of uncertainty or disagreement of models to identify `regions' to be annotated by the human oracle. However, these regions frequently comprise of pixels at object boundaries which are hard and tedious to annotate. Hence, even if the fraction of image pixels annotated reduces, the overall annotation time and the resulting cost still remain high. In this work, we propose an ADA strategy, which given a frame, identifies a set of classes that are hardest for the model to predict accurately, thereby recommending semantically meaningful regions to be annotated in a selected frame. We show that these set of `hard' classes are context-dependent and typically vary across frames, and when annotated help the model generalize better. We propose two ADA techniques: the Anchor-based and Augmentation-based approaches to select complementary and diverse regions in the context of the current training set. Our approach achieves 66.6 mIoU on GTA to Cityscapes dataset with an annotation budget of 4.7% in comparison to 64.9 mIoU by MADA using 5% of annotations. Our technique can also be used as a decorator for any existing frame-based AL technique, e.g., we report 1.5% performance improvement for CDAL on Cityscapes using our approach.
summary: In Active Domain Adaptation (ADA), one uses Active Learning (AL) to select a subset of images from the target domain, which are then annotated and used for supervised domain adaptation (DA). Given the large performance gap between supervised and unsupervised DA techniques, ADA allows for an excellent trade-off between annotation cost and performance. Prior art makes use of measures of uncertainty or disagreement of models to identify `regions' to be annotated by the human oracle. However, these regions frequently comprise of pixels at object boundaries which are hard and tedious to annotate. Hence, even if the fraction of image pixels annotated reduces, the overall annotation time and the resulting cost still remain high. In this work, we propose an ADA strategy, which given a frame, identifies a set of classes that are hardest for the model to predict accurately, thereby recommending semantically meaningful regions to be annotated in a selected frame. We show that these set of `hard' classes are context-dependent and typically vary across frames, and when annotated help the model generalize better. We propose two ADA techniques: the Anchor-based and Augmentation-based approaches to select complementary and diverse regions in the context of the current training set. Our approach achieves 66.6 mIoU on GTA to Cityscapes dataset with an annotation budget of 4.7% in comparison to 64.9 mIoU by MADA using 5% of annotations. Our technique can also be used as a decorator for any existing frame-based AL technique, e.g., we report 1.5% performance improvement for CDAL on Cityscapes using our approach.
abstract_zh: 在主动域适应 (ADA) 中，使用主动学习 (AL) 从目标域中选择图像子集，然后对其进行注释并用于监督域适应 (DA)。鉴于有监督和无监督 DA 技术之间存在巨大的性能差距，ADA 可以在注释成本和性能之间实现良好的权衡。现有技术利用模型的不确定性或不一致的测量来识别要由人类预言机注释的“区域”。然而，这些区域通常由对象边界处的像素组成，注释起来既困难又乏味。因此，即使注释的图像像素比例减少，总体注释时间和由此产生的成本仍然很高。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种 ADA 策略，该策略给定一个框架，识别一组模型最难准确预测的类，从而建议在选定的框架中注释语义上有意义的区域。我们表明，这些“硬”类集是上下文相关的，并且通常在不同框架之间有所不同，并且在注释时有助于模型更好地泛化。我们提出了两种 ADA 技术：基于锚定和基于增强的方法，以在当前训练集的背景下选择互补且多样化的区域。我们的方法在 GTA 到 Cityscapes 数据集上使用 4.7% 的注释预算实现了 66.6 mIoU，而 MADA 使用 5% 的注释实现了 64.9 mIoU。我们的技术还可以用作任何现有的基于框架的 AL 技术的装饰器，例如，我们报告使用我们的方法在 Cityscapes 上的 CDAL 性能提高了 1.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种主动域适应策略，通过识别模型难以预测的语义类别来减少标注工作量，提升域迁移下的语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有主动学习方法常选择标注边界区域，导致标注成本高且效率低，难以平衡标注量与模型性能。
AI.method: 提出基于锚点和增强的ADA技术，通过识别每帧中模型预测困难的语义类别，选择具有上下文多样性的区域进行标注。
AI.result: 在GTA到Cityscapes数据集上，以4.7%的标注预算达到66.6 mIoU，优于MADA的64.9 mIoU（5%预算），并可提升CDAL方法1.5%性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过关注上下文相关的困难类别，有效降低标注成本并提升模型泛化能力，可兼容现有帧级主动学习技术。

authors_text: Lizhi Bai,Jun Yang,Chunqi Tian,Yaoru Sun,Maoyu Mao,Yanjun Xu,Weirong Xu
title: DCANet: Differential Convolution Attention Network for RGB-D Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: DCANet：用于 RGB-D 语义分割的差分卷积注意网络
abstract: Combining RGB images and the corresponding depth maps in semantic segmentation proves the effectiveness in the past few years. Existing RGB-D modal fusion methods either lack the non-linear feature fusion ability or treat both modal images equally, regardless of the intrinsic distribution gap or information loss. Here we find that depth maps are suitable to provide intrinsic fine-grained patterns of objects due to their local depth continuity, while RGB images effectively provide a global view. Based on this, we propose a pixel differential convolution attention (DCA) module to consider geometric information and local-range correlations for depth data. Furthermore, we extend DCA to ensemble differential convolution attention (EDCA) which propagates long-range contextual dependencies and seamlessly incorporates spatial distribution for RGB data. DCA and EDCA dynamically adjust convolutional weights by pixel difference to enable self-adaptive in local and long range, respectively. A two-branch network built with DCA and EDCA, called Differential Convolutional Network (DCANet), is proposed to fuse local and global information of two-modal data. Consequently, the individual advantage of RGB and depth data are emphasized. Our DCANet is shown to set a new state-of-the-art performance for RGB-D semantic segmentation on two challenging benchmark datasets, i.e., NYUDv2 and SUN-RGBD.
summary: Combining RGB images and the corresponding depth maps in semantic segmentation proves the effectiveness in the past few years. Existing RGB-D modal fusion methods either lack the non-linear feature fusion ability or treat both modal images equally, regardless of the intrinsic distribution gap or information loss. Here we find that depth maps are suitable to provide intrinsic fine-grained patterns of objects due to their local depth continuity, while RGB images effectively provide a global view. Based on this, we propose a pixel differential convolution attention (DCA) module to consider geometric information and local-range correlations for depth data. Furthermore, we extend DCA to ensemble differential convolution attention (EDCA) which propagates long-range contextual dependencies and seamlessly incorporates spatial distribution for RGB data. DCA and EDCA dynamically adjust convolutional weights by pixel difference to enable self-adaptive in local and long range, respectively. A two-branch network built with DCA and EDCA, called Differential Convolutional Network (DCANet), is proposed to fuse local and global information of two-modal data. Consequently, the individual advantage of RGB and depth data are emphasized. Our DCANet is shown to set a new state-of-the-art performance for RGB-D semantic segmentation on two challenging benchmark datasets, i.e., NYUDv2 and SUN-RGBD.
abstract_zh: 将RGB图像和相应的深度图结合起来进行语义分割在过去几年中证明了其有效性。现有的 RGB-D 模态融合方法要么缺乏非线性特征融合能力，要么平等地对待两个模态图像，而不考虑固有的分布间隙或信息丢失。在这里，我们发现深度图由于其局部深度连续性而适合提供对象的内在细粒度模式，而 RGB 图像有效地提供了全局视图。基于此，我们提出了一种像素差分卷积注意（DCA）模块来考虑深度数据的几何信息和局部范围相关性。此外，我们将 DCA 扩展到集成差分卷积注意 (EDCA)，它传播远程上下文依赖性并无缝合并 RGB 数据的空间分布。 DCA和EDCA通过像素差异动态调整卷积权重，分别实现局部和远距离的自适应。提出了一种用 DCA 和 EDCA 构建的双分支网络，称为差分卷积网络（DCANet），以融合双模态数据的局部和全局信息。因此，强调了 RGB 和深度数据的各自优势。我们的 DCANet 在两个具有挑战性的基准数据集（即 NYUDv2 和 SUN-RGBD）上为 RGB-D 语义分割设置了新的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DCANet网络，通过差分卷积注意力模块融合RGB和深度图像信息，实现RGB-D语义分割。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-D融合方法未能有效利用深度图的局部细节特征与RGB图的全局信息，且忽视了两种模态的分布差异。
AI.method: 设计像素差分卷积注意力（DCA）模块处理深度图局部特征，扩展为长程上下文感知的EDCA模块处理RGB图，并构建双分支网络实现多模态信息融合。
AI.result: 在NYUDv2和SUN-RGBD数据集上达到RGB-D语义分割新SOTA性能，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过差异化的卷积注意力机制，DCANet有效结合了RGB的全局语义与深度图的局部几何特征，为多模态分割提供了新思路。

search_text: DCANet: Differential Convolution Attention Network for RGB-D Semantic Segmentation DCANet：用于 RGB-D 语义分割的差分卷积注意网络 Combining RGB images and the corresponding depth maps in semantic segmentation proves the effectiveness in the past few years. Existing RGB-D modal fusion methods either lack the non-linear feature fusion ability or treat both modal images equally, regardless of the intrinsic distribution gap or information loss. Here we find that depth maps are suitable to provide intrinsic fine-grained patterns of objects due to their local depth continuity, while RGB images effectively provide a global view. Based on this, we propose a pixel differential convolution attention (DCA) module to consider geometric information and local-range correlations for depth data. Furthermore, we extend DCA to ensemble differential convolution attention (EDCA) which propagates long-range contextual dependencies and seamlessly incorporates spatial distribution for RGB data. DCA and EDCA dynamically adjust convolutional weights by pixel difference to enable self-adaptive in local and long range, respectively. A two-branch network built with DCA and EDCA, called Differential Convolutional Network (DCANet), is proposed to fuse local and global information of two-modal data. Consequently, the individual advantage of RGB and depth data are emphasized. Our DCANet is shown to set a new state-of-the-art performance for RGB-D semantic segmentation on two challenging benchmark datasets, i.e., NYUDv2 and SUN-RGBD. 将RGB图像和相应的深度图结合起来进行语义分割在过去几年中证明了其有效性。现有的 RGB-D 模态融合方法要么缺乏非线性特征融合能力，要么平等地对待两个模态图像，而不考虑固有的分布间隙或信息丢失。在这里，我们发现深度图由于其局部深度连续性而适合提供对象的内在细粒度模式，而 RGB 图像有效地提供了全局视图。基于此，我们提出了一种像素差分卷积注意（DCA）模块来考虑深度数据的几何信息和局部范围相关性。此外，我们将 DCA 扩展到集成差分卷积注意 (EDCA)，它传播远程上下文依赖性并无缝合并 RGB 数据的空间分布。 DCA和EDCA通过像素差异动态调整卷积权重，分别实现局部和远距离的自适应。提出了一种用 DCA 和 EDCA 构建的双分支网络，称为差分卷积网络（DCANet），以融合双模态数据的局部和全局信息。因此，强调了 RGB 和深度数据的各自优势。我们的 DCANet 在两个具有挑战性的基准数据集（即 NYUDv2 和 SUN-RGBD）上为 RGB-D 语义分割设置了新的最先进性能。 本文提出DCANet网络，通过差分卷积注意力模块融合RGB和深度图像信息，实现RGB-D语义分割。 Lizhi Bai,Jun Yang,Chunqi Tian,Yaoru Sun,Maoyu Mao,Yanjun Xu,Weirong Xu eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Xue Yang,Gefan Zhang,Wentong Li,Xuehui Wang,Yue Zhou,Junchi Yan
title: H2RBox: Horizontal Box Annotation is All You Need for Oriented Object Detection
title_zh: H2RBox：水平框注释是定向对象检测所需的全部
comment: 15 pages, 6 figures, 8 tables, accepted by ICLR 2023, the source code is available at https://github.com/yangxue0827/h2rbox-mmrotate and https://github.com/yangxue0827/h2rbox-jittor
comments: 15 pages, 6 figures, 8 tables, accepted by ICLR 2023, the source code is available at https://github.com/yangxue0827/h2rbox-mmrotate and https://github.com/yangxue0827/h2rbox-jittor
abstract: Oriented object detection emerges in many applications from aerial images to autonomous driving, while many existing detection benchmarks are annotated with horizontal bounding box only which is also less costive than fine-grained rotated box, leading to a gap between the readily available training corpus and the rising demand for oriented object detection. This paper proposes a simple yet effective oriented object detection approach called H2RBox merely using horizontal box annotation for weakly-supervised training, which closes the above gap and shows competitive performance even against those trained with rotated boxes. The cores of our method are weakly- and self-supervised learning, which predicts the angle of the object by learning the consistency of two different views. To our best knowledge, H2RBox is the first horizontal box annotation-based oriented object detector. Compared to an alternative i.e. horizontal box-supervised instance segmentation with our post adaption to oriented object detection, our approach is not susceptible to the prediction quality of mask and can perform more robustly in complex scenes containing a large number of dense objects and outliers. Experimental results show that H2RBox has significant performance and speed advantages over horizontal box-supervised instance segmentation methods, as well as lower memory requirements. While compared to rotated box-supervised oriented object detectors, our method shows very close performance and speed. The source code is available at PyTorch-based \href{https://github.com/yangxue0827/h2rbox-mmrotate}{MMRotate} and Jittor-based \href{https://github.com/yangxue0827/h2rbox-jittor}{JDet}.
summary: Oriented object detection emerges in many applications from aerial images to autonomous driving, while many existing detection benchmarks are annotated with horizontal bounding box only which is also less costive than fine-grained rotated box, leading to a gap between the readily available training corpus and the rising demand for oriented object detection. This paper proposes a simple yet effective oriented object detection approach called H2RBox merely using horizontal box annotation for weakly-supervised training, which closes the above gap and shows competitive performance even against those trained with rotated boxes. The cores of our method are weakly- and self-supervised learning, which predicts the angle of the object by learning the consistency of two different views. To our best knowledge, H2RBox is the first horizontal box annotation-based oriented object detector. Compared to an alternative i.e. horizontal box-supervised instance segmentation with our post adaption to oriented object detection, our approach is not susceptible to the prediction quality of mask and can perform more robustly in complex scenes containing a large number of dense objects and outliers. Experimental results show that H2RBox has significant performance and speed advantages over horizontal box-supervised instance segmentation methods, as well as lower memory requirements. While compared to rotated box-supervised oriented object detectors, our method shows very close performance and speed. The source code is available at PyTorch-based \href{https://github.com/yangxue0827/h2rbox-mmrotate}{MMRotate} and Jittor-based \href{https://github.com/yangxue0827/h2rbox-jittor}{JDet}.
abstract_zh: 定向物体检测出现在从航拍图像到自动驾驶的许多应用中，而许多现有的检测基准仅用水平边界框进行注释，这也比细粒度旋转框成本更低，导致现有的训练语料库与定向物体检测不断增长的需求之间存在差距。本文提出了一种简单而有效的面向对象检测方法，称为 H2RBox，仅使用水平框注释进行弱监督训练，它弥补了上述差距，即使与使用旋转框训练的方法相比，也显示出有竞争力的性能。我们方法的核心是弱监督学习和自监督学习，它通过学习两种不同视图的一致性来预测对象的角度。据我们所知，H2RBox 是第一个基于水平框注释的面向对象检测器。与替代方案（即水平盒监督实例分割以及我们对定向对象检测的后适应）相比，我们的方法不易受到掩模的预测质量的影响，并且可以在包含大量密集对象和异常值的复杂场景中表现得更加鲁棒。实验结果表明，H2RBox 相对于水平盒监督实例分割方法具有显着的性能和速度优势，并且内存需求较低。与旋转盒监督的面向对象检测器相比，我们的方法显示出非常接近的性能和速度。源代码位于基于 PyTorch 的 \href{https://github.com/yangxue0827/h2rbox-mmrotate}{MMRotate} 和基于 Jittor 的 \href{https://github.com/yangxue0827/h2rbox-jittor}{JDet}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为H2RBox的弱监督定向目标检测方法，仅使用水平框标注即可实现定向检测，填补了现有数据集与定向检测需求之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有检测基准仅使用成本较低的水平框标注，而定向检测需要更精细的旋转框标注，导致数据与需求之间的鸿沟。本文旨在通过弱监督学习解决这一问题。
AI.method: 方法基于弱监督和自监督学习，通过学习两种不同视角的一致性来预测物体角度，无需旋转框标注。
AI.result: H2RBox在速度和内存需求上优于基于水平框的实例分割方法，在复杂场景中表现更鲁棒，且性能与基于旋转框的方法接近。
AI.conclusion: H2RBox是首个仅依赖水平框标注的定向检测器，有效平衡了标注成本与检测性能，为实际应用提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: H2RBox: Horizontal Box Annotation is All You Need for Oriented Object Detection H2RBox：水平框注释是定向对象检测所需的全部 Oriented object detection emerges in many applications from aerial images to autonomous driving, while many existing detection benchmarks are annotated with horizontal bounding box only which is also less costive than fine-grained rotated box, leading to a gap between the readily available training corpus and the rising demand for oriented object detection. This paper proposes a simple yet effective oriented object detection approach called H2RBox merely using horizontal box annotation for weakly-supervised training, which closes the above gap and shows competitive performance even against those trained with rotated boxes. The cores of our method are weakly- and self-supervised learning, which predicts the angle of the object by learning the consistency of two different views. To our best knowledge, H2RBox is the first horizontal box annotation-based oriented object detector. Compared to an alternative i.e. horizontal box-supervised instance segmentation with our post adaption to oriented object detection, our approach is not susceptible to the prediction quality of mask and can perform more robustly in complex scenes containing a large number of dense objects and outliers. Experimental results show that H2RBox has significant performance and speed advantages over horizontal box-supervised instance segmentation methods, as well as lower memory requirements. While compared to rotated box-supervised oriented object detectors, our method shows very close performance and speed. The source code is available at PyTorch-based \href{https://github.com/yangxue0827/h2rbox-mmrotate}{MMRotate} and Jittor-based \href{https://github.com/yangxue0827/h2rbox-jittor}{JDet}. 定向物体检测出现在从航拍图像到自动驾驶的许多应用中，而许多现有的检测基准仅用水平边界框进行注释，这也比细粒度旋转框成本更低，导致现有的训练语料库与定向物体检测不断增长的需求之间存在差距。本文提出了一种简单而有效的面向对象检测方法，称为 H2RBox，仅使用水平框注释进行弱监督训练，它弥补了上述差距，即使与使用旋转框训练的方法相比，也显示出有竞争力的性能。我们方法的核心是弱监督学习和自监督学习，它通过学习两种不同视图的一致性来预测对象的角度。据我们所知，H2RBox 是第一个基于水平框注释的面向对象检测器。与替代方案（即水平盒监督实例分割以及我们对定向对象检测的后适应）相比，我们的方法不易受到掩模的预测质量的影响，并且可以在包含大量密集对象和异常值的复杂场景中表现得更加鲁棒。实验结果表明，H2RBox 相对于水平盒监督实例分割方法具有显着的性能和速度优势，并且内存需求较低。与旋转盒监督的面向对象检测器相比，我们的方法显示出非常接近的性能和速度。源代码位于基于 PyTorch 的 \href{https://github.com/yangxue0827/h2rbox-mmrotate}{MMRotate} 和基于 Jittor 的 \href{https://github.com/yangxue0827/h2rbox-jittor}{JDet}。 本文提出了一种名为H2RBox的弱监督定向目标检测方法，仅使用水平框标注即可实现定向检测，填补了现有数据集与定向检测需求之间的差距。 Xue Yang,Gefan Zhang,Wentong Li,Xuehui Wang,Yue Zhou,Junchi Yan cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Janio Carlos Nascimento Silva,Uéverton S. Souza
title: Computing the Best Case Energy Complexity of Satisfying Assignments in Monotone Circuits
title_zh: 计算单调电路中满足分配的最佳情况能量复杂度
abstract: Measures of circuit complexity are usually analyzed to ensure the computation of Boolean functions with economy and efficiency. One of these measures is energy complexity, which is related to the number of gates that output true in a circuit for an assignment. The idea behind energy complexity comes from the counting of `firing' neurons in a natural neural network. The initial model is based on threshold circuits, but recent works also have analyzed the energy complexity of traditional Boolean circuits. In this work, we discuss the time complexity needed to compute the best-case energy complexity among satisfying assignments of a monotone Boolean circuit, and we call such a problem as MinEC$^+_M$. In the MinEC$^+_M$ problem, we are given a monotone Boolean circuit $C$, a positive integer $k$ and asked to determine whether there is a satisfying assignment $X$ for $C$ such that $EC(C,X) \leq k$, where $EC(C,X)$ is the number of gates that output true in $C$ according to the assignment $X$. We prove that MinEC$^+_M$ is NP-complete even when the input monotone circuit is planar. Besides, we show that the problem is W[1]-hard but in XP when parameterized by the size of the solution. In contrast, we show that when the size of the solution and the genus of the input circuit are aggregated parameters, the MinEC$^+_M$ problem becomes fixed-parameter tractable.
summary: Measures of circuit complexity are usually analyzed to ensure the computation of Boolean functions with economy and efficiency. One of these measures is energy complexity, which is related to the number of gates that output true in a circuit for an assignment. The idea behind energy complexity comes from the counting of `firing' neurons in a natural neural network. The initial model is based on threshold circuits, but recent works also have analyzed the energy complexity of traditional Boolean circuits. In this work, we discuss the time complexity needed to compute the best-case energy complexity among satisfying assignments of a monotone Boolean circuit, and we call such a problem as MinEC$^+_M$. In the MinEC$^+_M$ problem, we are given a monotone Boolean circuit $C$, a positive integer $k$ and asked to determine whether there is a satisfying assignment $X$ for $C$ such that $EC(C,X) \leq k$, where $EC(C,X)$ is the number of gates that output true in $C$ according to the assignment $X$. We prove that MinEC$^+_M$ is NP-complete even when the input monotone circuit is planar. Besides, we show that the problem is W[1]-hard but in XP when parameterized by the size of the solution. In contrast, we show that when the size of the solution and the genus of the input circuit are aggregated parameters, the MinEC$^+_M$ problem becomes fixed-parameter tractable.
abstract_zh: 通常对电路复杂度的度量进行分析，以确保布尔函数计算的经济性和效率。这些衡量标准之一是能量复杂性，它与分配电路中输出 true 的门的数量有关。能量复杂性背后的想法来自于自然神经网络中“放电”神经元的计数。初始模型基于阈值电路，但最近的工作还分析了传统布尔电路的能量复杂性。在这项工作中，我们讨论了在单调布尔电路的满足分配中计算最佳情况能量复杂度所需的时间复杂度，我们将此类问题称为 MinEC$^+_M$。在 MinEC$^+_M$ 问题中，我们给定一个单调布尔电路 $C$，一个正整数 $k$，并要求确定 $C$ 是否存在令人满意的赋值 $X$，使得 $EC(C,X) \leq k$，其中 $EC(C,X)$ 是根据赋值 $X$ 在 $C$ 中输出 true 的门的数量。我们证明即使输入单调电路是平面的，MinEC$^+_M$ 也是 NP 完全的。此外，我们表明该问题是 W[1]-困难的，但在 XP 中，当通过解的大小进行参数化时。相反，我们表明，当解的大小和输入电路的亏格是聚合参数时，MinEC$^+_M$ 问题变得易于处理固定参数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了单调布尔电路中满足赋值的最佳情况能量复杂度计算问题，即MinEC$^+_M$问题，分析其计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 能量复杂度是布尔电路计算效率的重要指标，本文旨在探讨在单调布尔电路中寻找满足赋值的最小能量复杂度的计算难度，以深化对电路复杂性的理解。
AI.method: 通过计算复杂性理论分析，证明MinEC$^+_M$问题在不同参数化下的复杂性，包括NP完备性、W[1]-难性和参数化可解性。
AI.result: MinEC$^+_M$问题在平面单调电路中仍为NP完备，参数化后为W[1]-难但属于XP类；当结合解规模与电路属数时，问题变为固定参数可解。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了能量复杂度优化问题的计算难度边界，为参数化算法设计提供了理论依据，推动了布尔电路复杂性分析的发展。

search_text: Computing the Best Case Energy Complexity of Satisfying Assignments in Monotone Circuits 计算单调电路中满足分配的最佳情况能量复杂度 Measures of circuit complexity are usually analyzed to ensure the computation of Boolean functions with economy and efficiency. One of these measures is energy complexity, which is related to the number of gates that output true in a circuit for an assignment. The idea behind energy complexity comes from the counting of `firing' neurons in a natural neural network. The initial model is based on threshold circuits, but recent works also have analyzed the energy complexity of traditional Boolean circuits. In this work, we discuss the time complexity needed to compute the best-case energy complexity among satisfying assignments of a monotone Boolean circuit, and we call such a problem as MinEC$^+_M$. In the MinEC$^+_M$ problem, we are given a monotone Boolean circuit $C$, a positive integer $k$ and asked to determine whether there is a satisfying assignment $X$ for $C$ such that $EC(C,X) \leq k$, where $EC(C,X)$ is the number of gates that output true in $C$ according to the assignment $X$. We prove that MinEC$^+_M$ is NP-complete even when the input monotone circuit is planar. Besides, we show that the problem is W[1]-hard but in XP when parameterized by the size of the solution. In contrast, we show that when the size of the solution and the genus of the input circuit are aggregated parameters, the MinEC$^+_M$ problem becomes fixed-parameter tractable. 通常对电路复杂度的度量进行分析，以确保布尔函数计算的经济性和效率。这些衡量标准之一是能量复杂性，它与分配电路中输出 true 的门的数量有关。能量复杂性背后的想法来自于自然神经网络中“放电”神经元的计数。初始模型基于阈值电路，但最近的工作还分析了传统布尔电路的能量复杂性。在这项工作中，我们讨论了在单调布尔电路的满足分配中计算最佳情况能量复杂度所需的时间复杂度，我们将此类问题称为 MinEC$^+_M$。在 MinEC$^+_M$ 问题中，我们给定一个单调布尔电路 $C$，一个正整数 $k$，并要求确定 $C$ 是否存在令人满意的赋值 $X$，使得 $EC(C,X) \leq k$，其中 $EC(C,X)$ 是根据赋值 $X$ 在 $C$ 中输出 true 的门的数量。我们证明即使输入单调电路是平面的，MinEC$^+_M$ 也是 NP 完全的。此外，我们表明该问题是 W[1]-困难的，但在 XP 中，当通过解的大小进行参数化时。相反，我们表明，当解的大小和输入电路的亏格是聚合参数时，MinEC$^+_M$ 问题变得易于处理固定参数。 本文研究了单调布尔电路中满足赋值的最佳情况能量复杂度计算问题，即MinEC$^+_M$问题，分析其计算复杂性。 Janio Carlos Nascimento Silva,Uéverton S. authors_text: Ehsan Hallaji,Roozbeh Razavi-Far,Meng Wang,Mehrdad Saif,Bruce Fardanesh
title: A Stream Learning Approach for Real-Time Identification of False Data Injection Attacks in Cyber-Physical Power Systems
title_zh: 一种实时识别网络物理电力系统中虚假数据注入攻击的流学习方法
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security
comments: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security
abstract: This paper presents a novel data-driven framework to aid in system state estimation when the power system is under unobservable false data injection attacks. The proposed framework dynamically detects and classifies false data injection attacks. Then, it retrieves the control signal using the acquired information. This process is accomplished in three main modules, with novel designs, for detection, classification, and control signal retrieval. The detection module monitors historical changes in phasor measurements and captures any deviation pattern caused by an attack on a complex plane. This approach can help to reveal characteristics of the attacks including the direction, magnitude, and ratio of the injected false data. Using this information, the signal retrieval module can easily recover the original control signal and remove the injected false data. Further information regarding the attack type can be obtained through the classifier module. The proposed ensemble learner is compatible with harsh learning conditions including the lack of labeled data, concept drift, concept evolution, recurring classes, and independence from external updates. The proposed novel classifier can dynamically learn from data and classify attacks under all these harsh learning conditions. The introduced framework is evaluated w.r.t. real-world data captured from the Central New York Power System. The obtained results indicate the efficacy and stability of the proposed framework.
summary: This paper presents a novel data-driven framework to aid in system state estimation when the power system is under unobservable false data injection attacks. The proposed framework dynamically detects and classifies false data injection attacks. Then, it retrieves the control signal using the acquired information. This process is accomplished in three main modules, with novel designs, for detection, classification, and control signal retrieval. The detection module monitors historical changes in phasor measurements and captures any deviation pattern caused by an attack on a complex plane. This approach can help to reveal characteristics of the attacks including the direction, magnitude, and ratio of the injected false data. Using this information, the signal retrieval module can easily recover the original control signal and remove the injected false data. Further information regarding the attack type can be obtained through the classifier module. The proposed ensemble learner is compatible with harsh learning conditions including the lack of labeled data, concept drift, concept evolution, recurring classes, and independence from external updates. The proposed novel classifier can dynamically learn from data and classify attacks under all these harsh learning conditions. The introduced framework is evaluated w.r.t. real-world data captured from the Central New York Power System. The obtained results indicate the efficacy and stability of the proposed framework.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的数据驱动框架，当电力系统受到不可观察的虚假数据注入攻击时，可以帮助进行系统状态估计。所提出的框架动态检测和分类虚假数据注入攻击。然后，它使用获取的信息检索控制信号。该过程通过三个主要模块完成，具有新颖的设计，用于检测、分类和控制信号检索。检测模块监视相量测量的历史变化并捕获由对复杂平面的攻击引起的任何偏差模式。这种方法可以帮助揭示攻击的特征，包括注入虚假数据的方向、幅度和比率。利用这些信息，信号检索模块可以轻松恢复原始控制信号并删除注入的虚假数据。有关攻击类型的更多信息可以通过分类器模块获得。所提出的集成学习器能够适应恶劣的学习条件，包括缺乏标记数据、概念漂移、概念演化、重复课程以及独立于外部更新。所提出的新型分类器可以在所有这些恶劣的学习条件下动态地从数据中学习并对攻击进行分类。所引入的框架是根据 w.r.t. 进行评估的。从纽约中央电力系统捕获的真实世界数据。获得的结果表明了所提出框架的有效性和稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于实时识别电力系统中虚假数据注入攻击的流学习方法。
AI.motivation: 在电力系统中，虚假数据注入攻击可能导致系统状态估计错误，威胁系统安全，因此需要一种能够实时检测和分类这些攻击的方法。
AI.method: 该框架包含三个主要模块：检测、分类和控制信号恢复。检测模块通过监测相量测量的历史变化来识别攻击特征；分类模块用于识别攻击类型；信号恢复模块利用检测信息恢复原始控制信号。
AI.result: 该框架在中央纽约电力系统的真实数据上进行了评估，结果表明该框架有效且稳定。
AI.conclusion: 该流学习框架能够在恶劣的学习条件下动态学习并分类攻击，适用于实际电力系统中的虚假数据注入攻击检测。

authors_text: Moses Charikar,Zhihao Jiang,Kirankumar Shiragur,Aaron Sidford
title: On the Efficient Implementation of High Accuracy Optimality of Profile Maximum Likelihood
title_zh: 高精度轮廓最大似然最优性的高效实现
abstract: We provide an efficient unified plug-in approach for estimating symmetric properties of distributions given $n$ independent samples. Our estimator is based on profile-maximum-likelihood (PML) and is sample optimal for estimating various symmetric properties when the estimation error $ε\gg n^{-1/3}$. This result improves upon the previous best accuracy threshold of $ε\gg n^{-1/4}$ achievable by polynomial time computable PML-based universal estimators [ACSS21, ACSS20]. Our estimator reaches a theoretical limit for universal symmetric property estimation as [Han21] shows that a broad class of universal estimators (containing many well known approaches including ours) cannot be sample optimal for every $1$-Lipschitz property when $ε\ll n^{-1/3}$.
summary: We provide an efficient unified plug-in approach for estimating symmetric properties of distributions given $n$ independent samples. Our estimator is based on profile-maximum-likelihood (PML) and is sample optimal for estimating various symmetric properties when the estimation error $ε\gg n^{-1/3}$. This result improves upon the previous best accuracy threshold of $ε\gg n^{-1/4}$ achievable by polynomial time computable PML-based universal estimators [ACSS21, ACSS20]. Our estimator reaches a theoretical limit for universal symmetric property estimation as [Han21] shows that a broad class of universal estimators (containing many well known approaches including ours) cannot be sample optimal for every $1$-Lipschitz property when $ε\ll n^{-1/3}$.
abstract_zh: 我们提供了一种有效的统一插件方法，用于估计给定 $n$ 独立样本的分布的对称属性。我们的估计器基于轮廓最大似然 (PML)，并且在估计误差 $ε\gg n^{-1/3}$ 时是估计各种对称属性的样本最佳值。此结果改进了之前的最佳精度阈值 $ε\gg n^{-1/4}$，可通过多项式时间可计算的基于 PML 的通用估计器 [ACSS21、ACSS20] 实现。我们的估计器达到了通用对称属性估计的理论极限，因为 [Han21] 表明，当 $ε\ll n^{-1/3}$ 时，一类广泛的通用估计器（包含许多众所周知的方法，包括我们的方法）对于每个 $1$-Lipschitz 属性都不能是样本最优。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于轮廓最大似然（PML）的高效通用插件方法，用于估计分布对称性质，并在样本复杂度上达到最优。
AI.motivation: 现有基于PML的通用估计器在估计误差ε≫n^{-1/4}时才能达到样本最优，而本文希望将这一阈值提升至ε≫n^{-1/3}，逼近理论极限。
AI.method: 采用轮廓最大似然（PML）的通用插件估计方法，通过高效实现PML估计器，使其在多项式时间内可计算，并改进了误差阈值。
AI.result: 当估计误差ε≫n^{-1/3}时，该估计器在估计各种对称性质时达到样本最优，优于此前ε≫n^{-1/4}的最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: 该估计器达到了通用对称性质估计的理论极限，因为已有研究证明当ε≪n^{-1/3}时，一类广泛的通用估计器（包括本文方法）无法对所有1-Lipschitz性质保持样本最优。

search_text: On the Efficient Implementation of High Accuracy Optimality of Profile Maximum Likelihood 高精度轮廓最大似然最优性的高效实现 We provide an efficient unified plug-in approach for estimating symmetric properties of distributions given $n$ independent samples. Our estimator is based on profile-maximum-likelihood (PML) and is sample optimal for estimating various symmetric properties when the estimation error $ε\gg n^{-1/3}$. This result improves upon the previous best accuracy threshold of $ε\gg n^{-1/4}$ achievable by polynomial time computable PML-based universal estimators [ACSS21, ACSS20]. Our estimator reaches a theoretical limit for universal symmetric property estimation as [Han21] shows that a broad class of universal estimators (containing many well known approaches including ours) cannot be sample optimal for every $1$-Lipschitz property when $ε\ll n^{-1/3}$. 我们提供了一种有效的统一插件方法，用于估计给定 $n$ 独立样本的分布的对称属性。我们的估计器基于轮廓最大似然 (PML)，并且在估计误差 $ε\gg n^{-1/3}$ 时是估计各种对称属性的样本最佳值。此结果改进了之前的最佳精度阈值 $ε\gg n^{-1/4}$，可通过多项式时间可计算的基于 PML 的通用估计器 [ACSS21、ACSS20] 实现。我们的估计器达到了通用对称属性估计的理论极限，因为 [Han21] 表明，当 $ε\ll n^{-1/3}$ 时，一类广泛的通用估计器（包含许多众所周知的方法，包括我们的方法）对于每个 $1$-Lipschitz 属性都不能是样本最优。 本文提出一种基于轮廓最大似然（PML）的高效通用插件方法，用于估计分布对称性质，并在样本复杂度上达到最优。 Moses Charikar,Zhihao Jiang,Kirankumar Shiragur,Aaron Sidford stat.ML,cs.DS,cs.IT,cs.LG,stat.CO

authors_text: Qian Huang,Hongyu Ren,Jure Leskovec
title: Few-shot Relational Reasoning via Connection Subgraph Pretraining
title_zh: 通过连接子图预训练进行少样本关系推理
comment: NeurIPS 2022. Open source implementation at https://github.com/snap-stanford/csr
comments: NeurIPS 2022. Open source implementation at https://github.com/snap-stanford/csr
abstract: Few-shot knowledge graph (KG) completion task aims to perform inductive reasoning over the KG: given only a few support triplets of a new relation $\bowtie$ (e.g., (chop,$\bowtie$,kitchen), (read,$\bowtie$,library), the goal is to predict the query triplets of the same unseen relation $\bowtie$, e.g., (sleep,$\bowtie$,?). Current approaches cast the problem in a meta-learning framework, where the model needs to be first jointly trained over many training few-shot tasks, each being defined by its own relation, so that learning/prediction on the target few-shot task can be effective. However, in real-world KGs, curating many training tasks is a challenging ad hoc process. Here we propose Connection Subgraph Reasoner (CSR), which can make predictions for the target few-shot task directly without the need for pre-training on the human curated set of training tasks. The key to CSR is that we explicitly model a shared connection subgraph between support and query triplets, as inspired by the principle of eliminative induction. To adapt to specific KG, we design a corresponding self-supervised pretraining scheme with the objective of reconstructing automatically sampled connection subgraphs. Our pretrained model can then be directly applied to target few-shot tasks on without the need for training few-shot tasks. Extensive experiments on real KGs, including NELL, FB15K-237, and ConceptNet, demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework: we show that even a learning-free implementation of CSR can already perform competitively to existing methods on target few-shot tasks; with pretraining, CSR can achieve significant gains of up to 52% on the more challenging inductive few-shot tasks where the entities are also unseen during (pre)training.
summary: Few-shot knowledge graph (KG) completion task aims to perform inductive reasoning over the KG: given only a few support triplets of a new relation $\bowtie$ (e.g., (chop,$\bowtie$,kitchen), (read,$\bowtie$,library), the goal is to predict the query triplets of the same unseen relation $\bowtie$, e.g., (sleep,$\bowtie$,?). Current approaches cast the problem in a meta-learning framework, where the model needs to be first jointly trained over many training few-shot tasks, each being defined by its own relation, so that learning/prediction on the target few-shot task can be effective. However, in real-world KGs, curating many training tasks is a challenging ad hoc process. Here we propose Connection Subgraph Reasoner (CSR), which can make predictions for the target few-shot task directly without the need for pre-training on the human curated set of training tasks. The key to CSR is that we explicitly model a shared connection subgraph between support and query triplets, as inspired by the principle of eliminative induction. To adapt to specific KG, we design a corresponding self-supervised pretraining scheme with the objective of reconstructing automatically sampled connection subgraphs. Our pretrained model can then be directly applied to target few-shot tasks on without the need for training few-shot tasks. Extensive experiments on real KGs, including NELL, FB15K-237, and ConceptNet, demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework: we show that even a learning-free implementation of CSR can already perform competitively to existing methods on target few-shot tasks; with pretraining, CSR can achieve significant gains of up to 52% on the more challenging inductive few-shot tasks where the entities are also unseen during (pre)training.
abstract_zh: 少样本知识图（KG）完成任务旨在对 KG 进行归纳推理：仅给定新关系 $\bowtie$ 的几个支持三元组（例如，（chop，$\bowtie$，kitchen），（read，$\bowtie$，library），目标是预测相同的未见关系 $\bowtie$ 的查询三元组，例如， (sleep,$\bowtie$,?)。当前的方法将问题投射到元学习框架中，其中模型需要首先在许多训练小样本任务上进行联合训练，每个训练任务都由自己的关系定义，以便对目标小样本任务进行学习/预测可以有效。然而，在现实世界的知识图谱中，策划许多训练任务是一个具有挑战性的临时过程。在这里，我们提出了连接子图推理器（CSR），它可以对目标小样本任务进行预测。 CSR 的关键是，受消除归纳原理的启发，我们设计了相应的自监督预训练方案，其目的是重建自动采样的连接子图，而无需进行大量的实验。在真实 KG（包括 NELL、FB15K-237 和 ConceptNet）上的测试证明了我们框架的有效性：我们表明，即使是 CSR 的免学习实现也已经可以在目标少样本任务上与现有方法竞争；通过预训练，CSR 可以在更具挑战性的归纳少样本任务上实现高达 52% 的显着收益，其中实体在（预）训练期间也看不见。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需预训练任务集的少样本知识图谱补全方法CSR，通过建模支持三元组与查询三元组间的连接子图进行推理。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本知识图谱补全方法依赖于大量人工构建的预训练任务，而实际知识图谱中难以获取此类任务集，因此需要一种无需预训练任务的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计Connection Subgraph Reasoner（CSR），显式建模支持三元组与查询三元组间的共享连接子图，并通过自监督预训练重构自动采样的连接子图以适应特定知识图谱。
AI.result: 在NELL、FB15K-237和ConceptNet等真实知识图谱上，CSR的无学习实现已达到现有方法水平，预训练后在更具挑战性的归纳任务中提升达52%。
AI.conclusion: CSR通过连接子图建模和自监督预训练，实现了无需任务特定预训练的少样本关系推理，在多个基准测试中表现出显著优势。

authors_text: Seongmin Park,Jihwa Lee
title: LIME: Weakly-Supervised Text Classification Without Seeds
title_zh: LIME：无种子的弱监督文本分类
abstract: In weakly-supervised text classification, only label names act as sources of supervision. Predominant approaches to weakly-supervised text classification utilize a two-phase framework, where test samples are first assigned pseudo-labels and are then used to train a neural text classifier. In most previous work, the pseudo-labeling step is dependent on obtaining seed words that best capture the relevance of each class label. We present LIME, a framework for weakly-supervised text classification that entirely replaces the brittle seed-word generation process with entailment-based pseudo-classification. We find that combining weakly-supervised classification and textual entailment mitigates shortcomings of both, resulting in a more streamlined and effective classification pipeline. With just an off-the-shelf textual entailment model, LIME outperforms recent baselines in weakly-supervised text classification and achieves state-of-the-art in 4 benchmarks. We open source our code at https://github.com/seongminp/LIME.
summary: In weakly-supervised text classification, only label names act as sources of supervision. Predominant approaches to weakly-supervised text classification utilize a two-phase framework, where test samples are first assigned pseudo-labels and are then used to train a neural text classifier. In most previous work, the pseudo-labeling step is dependent on obtaining seed words that best capture the relevance of each class label. We present LIME, a framework for weakly-supervised text classification that entirely replaces the brittle seed-word generation process with entailment-based pseudo-classification. We find that combining weakly-supervised classification and textual entailment mitigates shortcomings of both, resulting in a more streamlined and effective classification pipeline. With just an off-the-shelf textual entailment model, LIME outperforms recent baselines in weakly-supervised text classification and achieves state-of-the-art in 4 benchmarks. We open source our code at https://github.com/seongminp/LIME.
abstract_zh: 在弱监督文本分类中，只有标签名称充当监督来源。弱监督文本分类的主要方法利用两阶段框架，其中测试样本首先被分配伪标签，然后用于训练神经文本分类器。在大多数以前的工作中，伪标记步骤依赖于获取最能捕获每个类标签相关性的种子词。我们提出了 LIME，一个弱监督文本分类框架，它用基于蕴涵的伪分类完全取代了脆弱的种子词生成过程。我们发现，将弱监督分类和文本蕴含相结合可以减轻两者的缺点，从而形成更加简化和有效的分类流程。仅凭借现成的文本蕴涵模型，LIME 就在弱监督文本分类方面超越了最新的基线，并在 4 个基准测试中达到了最先进的水平。我们在 https://github.com/seongminp/LIME 开源我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LIME框架，通过基于蕴含的伪分类方法，在无需种子词的情况下实现弱监督文本分类。
AI.motivation: 传统弱监督文本分类依赖种子词生成伪标签，但种子词获取过程脆弱且耗时，限制了方法的鲁棒性和适用性。
AI.method: 利用现成的文本蕴含模型直接生成伪标签，取代种子词生成步骤，结合弱监督分类与文本蕴含技术构建端到端分类流水线。
AI.result: 在4个基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，开源代码并验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于蕴含的伪分类方法有效解决了种子词依赖问题，为弱监督文本分类提供了更简洁高效的解决方案。

search_text: LIME: Weakly-Supervised Text Classification Without Seeds LIME：无种子的弱监督文本分类 In weakly-supervised text classification, only label names act as sources of supervision. Predominant approaches to weakly-supervised text classification utilize a two-phase framework, where test samples are first assigned pseudo-labels and are then used to train a neural text classifier. In most previous work, the pseudo-labeling step is dependent on obtaining seed words that best capture the relevance of each class label. We present LIME, a framework for weakly-supervised text classification that entirely replaces the brittle seed-word generation process with entailment-based pseudo-classification. We find that combining weakly-supervised classification and textual entailment mitigates shortcomings of both, resulting in a more streamlined and effective classification pipeline. With just an off-the-shelf textual entailment model, LIME outperforms recent baselines in weakly-supervised text classification and achieves state-of-the-art in 4 benchmarks. We open source our code at https://github.com/seongminp/LIME. 在弱监督文本分类中，只有标签名称充当监督来源。弱监督文本分类的主要方法利用两阶段框架，其中测试样本首先被分配伪标签，然后用于训练神经文本分类器。在大多数以前的工作中，伪标记步骤依赖于获取最能捕获每个类标签相关性的种子词。我们提出了 LIME，一个弱监督文本分类框架，它用基于蕴涵的伪分类完全取代了脆弱的种子词生成过程。我们发现，将弱监督分类和文本蕴含相结合可以减轻两者的缺点，从而形成更加简化和有效的分类流程。仅凭借现成的文本蕴涵模型，LIME 就在弱监督文本分类方面超越了最新的基线，并在 4 个基准测试中达到了最先进的水平。我们在 https://github.com/seongminp/LIME 开源我们的代码。 本文提出LIME框架，通过基于蕴含的伪分类方法，在无需种子词的情况下实现弱监督文本分类。 Seongmin Park,Jihwa Lee cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiao Zhang,Ninglu Shao,Zihua Si,Jun Xu,Wenhan Wang,Hanjing Su,Ji-Rong Wen
title: Reward Imputation with Sketching for Contextual Batched Bandits
title_zh: 通过草图对上下文批量强盗进行奖励插补
abstract: Contextual batched bandit (CBB) is a setting where a batch of rewards is observed from the environment at the end of each episode, but the rewards of the non-executed actions are unobserved, resulting in partial-information feedback. Existing approaches for CBB often ignore the rewards of the non-executed actions, leading to underutilization of feedback information. In this paper, we propose an efficient approach called Sketched Policy Updating with Imputed Rewards (SPUIR) that completes the unobserved rewards using sketching, which approximates the full-information feedbacks. We formulate reward imputation as an imputation regularized ridge regression problem that captures the feedback mechanisms of both executed and non-executed actions. To reduce time complexity, we solve the regression problem using randomized sketching. We prove that our approach achieves an instantaneous regret with controllable bias and smaller variance than approaches without reward imputation. Furthermore, our approach enjoys a sublinear regret bound against the optimal policy. We also present two extensions, a rate-scheduled version and a version for nonlinear rewards, making our approach more practical. Experimental results show that SPUIR outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on synthetic, public benchmark, and real-world datasets.
summary: Contextual batched bandit (CBB) is a setting where a batch of rewards is observed from the environment at the end of each episode, but the rewards of the non-executed actions are unobserved, resulting in partial-information feedback. Existing approaches for CBB often ignore the rewards of the non-executed actions, leading to underutilization of feedback information. In this paper, we propose an efficient approach called Sketched Policy Updating with Imputed Rewards (SPUIR) that completes the unobserved rewards using sketching, which approximates the full-information feedbacks. We formulate reward imputation as an imputation regularized ridge regression problem that captures the feedback mechanisms of both executed and non-executed actions. To reduce time complexity, we solve the regression problem using randomized sketching. We prove that our approach achieves an instantaneous regret with controllable bias and smaller variance than approaches without reward imputation. Furthermore, our approach enjoys a sublinear regret bound against the optimal policy. We also present two extensions, a rate-scheduled version and a version for nonlinear rewards, making our approach more practical. Experimental results show that SPUIR outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on synthetic, public benchmark, and real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 上下文批量老虎机（CBB）是一种在每集结束时从环境中观察到一批奖励的设置，但未观察到未执行操作的奖励，从而导致部分信息反馈。现有的 CBB 方法经常忽略未执行操作的奖励，导致反馈信息的利用不足。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为“带有估算奖励的草图策略更新”（SPUIR）的有效方法，该方法使用草图来完成未观察到的奖励，这近似于全信息反馈。我们将奖励插补制定为插补正则化岭回归问题，它捕获已执行和未执行动作的反馈机制。为了降低时间复杂度，我们使用随机草图来解决回归问题。我们证明，与没有奖励插补的方法相比，我们的方法可以通过可控偏差和更小的方差实现瞬时后悔。此外，我们的方法具有与最优策略相悖的次线性遗憾。我们还提出了两个扩展，一个速率计划版本和一个非线性奖励版本，使我们的方法更加实用。实验结果表明，SPUIR 在合成、公共基准和真实数据集上的性能优于最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于sketching的奖励填补方法SPUIR，解决上下文批量带问题中未观测奖励的利用不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有批量带算法忽略未执行动作的奖励信息，导致反馈利用率低，无法充分学习最优策略。
AI.method: 将奖励填补建模为正则化岭回归问题，结合随机化sketching技术降低计算复杂度，并扩展支持非线性奖励和动态调整的版本。
AI.result: 理论证明SPUIR具有可控偏差和更小方差，次线性悔恨界；实验显示在合成数据、基准和真实数据集上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SPUIR通过有效利用未观测奖励信息，提升了批量带算法的性能，且扩展性强，适用于更广泛场景。

Existing approaches for CBB often ignore the rewards of the non-executed actions, leading to underutilization of feedback information. In this paper, we propose an efficient approach called Sketched Policy Updating with Imputed Rewards (SPUIR) that completes the unobserved rewards using sketching, which approximates the full-information feedbacks. We formulate reward imputation as an imputation regularized ridge regression problem that captures the feedback mechanisms of both executed and non-executed actions. To reduce time complexity, we solve the regression problem using randomized sketching. We prove that our approach achieves an instantaneous regret with controllable bias and smaller variance than approaches without reward imputation. Furthermore, our approach enjoys a sublinear regret bound against the optimal policy. We also present two extensions, a rate-scheduled version and a version for nonlinear rewards, making our approach more practical. Experimental results show that SPUIR outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on synthetic, public benchmark, and real-world datasets. 上下文批量老虎机（CBB）是一种在每集结束时从环境中观察到一批奖励的设置，但未观察到未执行操作的奖励，从而导致部分信息反馈。现有的 CBB 方法经常忽略未执行操作的奖励，导致反馈信息的利用不足。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为“带有估算奖励的草图策略更新”（SPUIR）的有效方法，该方法使用草图来完成未观察到的奖励，这近似于全信息反馈。我们将奖励插补制定为插补正则化岭回归问题，它捕获已执行和未执行动作的反馈机制。为了降低时间复杂度，我们使用随机草图来解决回归问题。我们证明，与没有奖励插补的方法相比，我们的方法可以通过可控偏差和更小的方差实现瞬时后悔。此外，我们的方法具有与最优策略相悖的次线性遗憾。我们还提出了两个扩展，一个速率计划版本和一个非线性奖励版本，使我们的方法更加实用。实验结果表明，SPUIR 在合成、公共基准和真实数据集上的性能优于最先进的基线。 本文提出一种基于sketching的奖励填补方法SPUIR，解决上下文批量带问题中未观测奖励的利用不足问题。 Xiao Zhang,Ninglu Shao,Zihua Si,Jun Xu,Wenhan Wang,Hanjing Su,Ji-Rong Wen cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Diane Castonguay,Erika M. M. Coelho,Hebert Coelho,Julliano R. Nascimento,Uéverton S. Souza
title: Perfect matching cuts partitioning a graph into complementary subgraphs
title_zh: 完美匹配将图划分为互补子图
abstract: In Partition Into Complementary Subgraphs (Comp-Sub) we are given a graph $G=(V,E)$, and an edge set property $Π$, and asked whether $G$ can be decomposed into two graphs, $H$ and its complement $\overline{H}$, for some graph $H$, in such a way that the edge cut $[V(H),V(\overline{H})]$ satisfies the property $Π$. Motivated by previous work, we consider Comp-Sub($Π$) when the property $Π=\mathcal{PM}$ specifies that the edge cut of the decomposition is a perfect matching. We prove that Comp-Sub($\mathcal{PM}$) is GI-hard when the graph $G$ is $\{C_{k\geq 7}, \overline{C}_{k\geq 7} \}$-free. On the other hand, we show that Comp-Sub($\mathcal{PM}$) is polynomial-time solvable on $hole$-free graphs and on $P_5$-free graphs. Furthermore, we present characterizations of Comp-Sub($\mathcal{PM}$) on chordal, distance-hereditary, and extended $P_4$-laden graphs.
summary: In Partition Into Complementary Subgraphs (Comp-Sub) we are given a graph $G=(V,E)$, and an edge set property $Π$, and asked whether $G$ can be decomposed into two graphs, $H$ and its complement $\overline{H}$, for some graph $H$, in such a way that the edge cut $[V(H),V(\overline{H})]$ satisfies the property $Π$. Motivated by previous work, we consider Comp-Sub($Π$) when the property $Π=\mathcal{PM}$ specifies that the edge cut of the decomposition is a perfect matching. We prove that Comp-Sub($\mathcal{PM}$) is GI-hard when the graph $G$ is $\{C_{k\geq 7}, \overline{C}_{k\geq 7} \}$-free. On the other hand, we show that Comp-Sub($\mathcal{PM}$) is polynomial-time solvable on $hole$-free graphs and on $P_5$-free graphs. Furthermore, we present characterizations of Comp-Sub($\mathcal{PM}$) on chordal, distance-hereditary, and extended $P_4$-laden graphs.
abstract_zh: 在划分互补子图（Comp-Sub）中，我们给定一个图 $G=(V,E)$ 和一个边集属性 $Π$，并询问对于某个图 $H$，$G$ 是否可以分解为两个图 $H$ 及其补图 $\overline{H}$，使得边割 $[V(H),V(\overline{H})]$ 满足属性 $Π$。受先前工作的启发，当属性 $Π=\mathcal{PM}$ 指定分解的边缘切割是完美匹配时，我们考虑 Comp-Sub($Π$)。我们证明当图 $G$ 是 $\{C_{k\geq 7}, \overline{C}_{k\geq 7} \}$ 自由时，Comp-Sub($\mathcal{PM}$) 是 GI 困难的。另一方面，我们证明 Comp-Sub($\mathcal{PM}$) 在 $hole$-free 图和 $P_5$-free 图上是多项式时间可解的。此外，我们还提出了 Comp-Sub($\mathcal{PM}$) 在弦图、距离遗传图和扩展 $P_4$ 负载图上的表征。

AI.tldr: 本文研究将图分解为互补子图的问题，其中边割集为完美匹配。
AI.motivation: 受先前关于图分解的研究启发，探讨具有完美匹配边割集的互补子图分解问题。
AI.method: 通过复杂度分析与算法设计，结合图类特性进行分类讨论。
AI.result: 证明在特定图类中该问题为GI难，而在无洞图和P5-自由图中可多项式求解，并给出若干图类的刻画。
AI.conclusion: 明确了完美匹配边割集分解问题在不同图类中的计算复杂性与可解性边界。

authors_text: Fotis Iliopoulos,Vasilis Kontonis,Cenk Baykal,Gaurav Menghani,Khoa Trinh,Erik Vee
title: Weighted Distillation with Unlabeled Examples
title_zh: 未标记示例的加权蒸馏
abstract: Distillation with unlabeled examples is a popular and powerful method for training deep neural networks in settings where the amount of labeled data is limited: A large ''teacher'' neural network is trained on the labeled data available, and then it is used to generate labels on an unlabeled dataset (typically much larger in size). These labels are then utilized to train the smaller ''student'' model which will actually be deployed. Naturally, the success of the approach depends on the quality of the teacher's labels, since the student could be confused if trained on inaccurate data. This paper proposes a principled approach for addressing this issue based on a ''debiasing'' reweighting of the student's loss function tailored to the distillation training paradigm. Our method is hyper-parameter free, data-agnostic, and simple to implement. We demonstrate significant improvements on popular academic datasets and we accompany our results with a theoretical analysis which rigorously justifies the performance of our method in certain settings.
summary: Distillation with unlabeled examples is a popular and powerful method for training deep neural networks in settings where the amount of labeled data is limited: A large ''teacher'' neural network is trained on the labeled data available, and then it is used to generate labels on an unlabeled dataset (typically much larger in size). These labels are then utilized to train the smaller ''student'' model which will actually be deployed. Naturally, the success of the approach depends on the quality of the teacher's labels, since the student could be confused if trained on inaccurate data. This paper proposes a principled approach for addressing this issue based on a ''debiasing'' reweighting of the student's loss function tailored to the distillation training paradigm. Our method is hyper-parameter free, data-agnostic, and simple to implement. We demonstrate significant improvements on popular academic datasets and we accompany our results with a theoretical analysis which rigorously justifies the performance of our method in certain settings.
abstract_zh: 使用未标记示例进行蒸馏是一种流行且强大的方法，用于在标记数据量有限的环境中训练深度神经网络：大型“教师”神经网络在可用的标记数据上进行训练，然后用于在未标记数据集（通常大小更大）上生成标签。然后使用这些标签来训练实际部署的较小的“学生”模型。当然，该方法的成功取决于教师标签的质量，因为如果接受不准确的数据训练，学生可能会感到困惑。本文提出了一种解决该问题的原则性方法，该方法基于针对蒸馏训练范式定制的学生损失函数的“去偏”重新加权。我们的方法是无超参数的、与数据无关的并且易于实现。我们展示了对流行学术数据集的显着改进，并且我们对结果进行了理论分析，严格证明了我们的方法在某些设置下的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于加权知识蒸馏的方法，利用未标记数据提升学生模型性能
AI.motivation: 解决知识蒸馏中教师模型生成标签可能存在的偏差问题，提升学生模型在有限标记数据下的性能
AI.method: 通过重新加权学生损失函数进行去偏处理，无需超参数且适用于各种数据集
AI.result: 在多个学术数据集上实现显著性能提升，并通过理论分析证明方法有效性
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效提升知识蒸馏效果，具有理论依据且易于实施，适用于实际场景

search_text: Weighted Distillation with Unlabeled Examples 未标记示例的加权蒸馏 Distillation with unlabeled examples is a popular and powerful method for training deep neural networks in settings where the amount of labeled data is limited: A large ''teacher'' neural network is trained on the labeled data available, and then it is used to generate labels on an unlabeled dataset (typically much larger in size). These labels are then utilized to train the smaller ''student'' model which will actually be deployed. Naturally, the success of the approach depends on the quality of the teacher's labels, since the student could be confused if trained on inaccurate data. This paper proposes a principled approach for addressing this issue based on a ''debiasing'' reweighting of the student's loss function tailored to the distillation training paradigm. Our method is hyper-parameter free, data-agnostic, and simple to implement. We demonstrate significant improvements on popular academic datasets and we accompany our results with a theoretical analysis which rigorously justifies the performance of our method in certain settings. 使用未标记示例进行蒸馏是一种流行且强大的方法，用于在标记数据量有限的环境中训练深度神经网络：大型“教师”神经网络在可用的标记数据上进行训练，然后用于在未标记数据集（通常大小更大）上生成标签。然后使用这些标签来训练实际部署的较小的“学生”模型。当然，该方法的成功取决于教师标签的质量，因为如果接受不准确的数据训练，学生可能会感到困惑。本文提出了一种解决该问题的原则性方法，该方法基于针对蒸馏训练范式定制的学生损失函数的“去偏”重新加权。我们的方法是无超参数的、与数据无关的并且易于实现。我们展示了对流行学术数据集的显着改进，并且我们对结果进行了理论分析，严格证明了我们的方法在某些设置下的性能。 提出一种基于加权知识蒸馏的方法，利用未标记数据提升学生模型性能 Fotis Iliopoulos,Vasilis Kontonis,Cenk Baykal,Gaurav Menghani,Khoa Trinh,Erik Vee cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yanjing Li,Sheng Xu,Baochang Zhang,Xianbin Cao,Peng Gao,Guodong Guo
title: Q-ViT: Accurate and Fully Quantized Low-bit Vision Transformer
title_zh: Q-ViT：精确且完全量化的低位视觉变压器
abstract: The large pre-trained vision transformers (ViTs) have demonstrated remarkable performance on various visual tasks, but suffer from expensive computational and memory cost problems when deployed on resource-constrained devices. Among the powerful compression approaches, quantization extremely reduces the computation and memory consumption by low-bit parameters and bit-wise operations. However, low-bit ViTs remain largely unexplored and usually suffer from a significant performance drop compared with the real-valued counterparts. In this work, through extensive empirical analysis, we first identify the bottleneck for severe performance drop comes from the information distortion of the low-bit quantized self-attention map. We then develop an information rectification module (IRM) and a distribution guided distillation (DGD) scheme for fully quantized vision transformers (Q-ViT) to effectively eliminate such distortion, leading to a fully quantized ViTs. We evaluate our methods on popular DeiT and Swin backbones. Extensive experimental results show that our method achieves a much better performance than the prior arts. For example, our Q-ViT can theoretically accelerates the ViT-S by 6.14x and achieves about 80.9% Top-1 accuracy, even surpassing the full-precision counterpart by 1.0% on ImageNet dataset. Our codes and models are attached on https://github.com/YanjingLi0202/Q-ViT
summary: The large pre-trained vision transformers (ViTs) have demonstrated remarkable performance on various visual tasks, but suffer from expensive computational and memory cost problems when deployed on resource-constrained devices. Among the powerful compression approaches, quantization extremely reduces the computation and memory consumption by low-bit parameters and bit-wise operations. However, low-bit ViTs remain largely unexplored and usually suffer from a significant performance drop compared with the real-valued counterparts. In this work, through extensive empirical analysis, we first identify the bottleneck for severe performance drop comes from the information distortion of the low-bit quantized self-attention map. We then develop an information rectification module (IRM) and a distribution guided distillation (DGD) scheme for fully quantized vision transformers (Q-ViT) to effectively eliminate such distortion, leading to a fully quantized ViTs. We evaluate our methods on popular DeiT and Swin backbones. Extensive experimental results show that our method achieves a much better performance than the prior arts. For example, our Q-ViT can theoretically accelerates the ViT-S by 6.14x and achieves about 80.9% Top-1 accuracy, even surpassing the full-precision counterpart by 1.0% on ImageNet dataset. Our codes and models are attached on https://github.com/YanjingLi0202/Q-ViT
abstract_zh: 大型预训练视觉变换器（ViT）在各种视觉任务上表现出了卓越的性能，但在资源受限的设备上部署时会遇到昂贵的计算和内存成本问题。在强大的压缩方法中，量化极大地减少了低位参数和逐位操作的计算和内存消耗。然而，低位 ViT 在很大程度上仍未被探索，并且与实际价值的对应物相比，通常会出现显着的性能下降。在这项工作中，通过广泛的实证分析，我们首先确定了性能严重下降的瓶颈来自于低位量化自注意力图的信息失真。然后，我们为完全量化视觉变换器（Q-ViT）开发了信息校正模块（IRM）和分布引导蒸馏（DGD）方案，以有效消除这种失真，从而获得完全量化的ViT。我们在流行的 DeiT 和 Swin 主干上评估我们的方法。大量的实验结果表明，我们的方法比现有技术取得了更好的性能。例如，我们的 Q-ViT 理论上可以将 ViT-S 加速 6.14 倍，并实现约 80.9% 的 Top-1 准确率，甚至在 ImageNet 数据集上超过全精度对手 1.0%。我们的代码和模型附在 https://github.com/YanjingLi0202/Q-ViT

AI.tldr: 本文提出Q-ViT，一种通过量化技术实现低比特视觉Transformer（ViT）的方法，以解决其在资源受限设备上的计算和内存消耗问题。
AI.motivation: 大型预训练视觉Transformer（ViT）在视觉任务中表现优异，但部署在资源受限设备时面临高昂的计算和内存成本。尽管量化技术能降低计算和内存消耗，但低比特ViT通常性能下降显著。
AI.method: 通过实证分析，本文发现低比特量化自注意力图的信息失真是性能下降的关键瓶颈。为此，提出信息校正模块（IRM）和分布引导蒸馏（DGD）方案，有效消除量化失真，实现全量化ViT。
AI.result: 在DeiT和Swin骨干网络上实验表明，Q-ViT在ImageNet数据集上实现80.9%的Top-1准确率，比全精度模型高出1.0%，且理论加速比达6.14倍。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过IRM和DGD有效缓解量化失真，显著提升低比特ViT性能，为资源受限设备部署提供了可行方案。
